Fine-grained causal tracing reveals a form-specific organization of rule knowledge in transformer layers: formulas and descriptions are concentrated in earlier layers, while instances are more associated with middle layers. These results suggest that rule knowledge is not uniformly localized, and therefore cannot be reliably edited by a single-layer or contiguous-block intervention. Based on this insight, we propose Distributed Multi-Layer Editing (DMLE), which applies a shared early-layer update to formulas and descriptions and a separate middle-layer update to instances. While remaining competitive on standard editing metrics, DMLE achieves substantially stronger rule-level editing performance. On average, it improves instance portability and rule understanding by 13.91 and 50.19 percentage points, respectively, over the strongest baseline across GPT-J-6B, Qwen2.5-7B, Qwen2-7B, and LLaMA-3-8B. The code is available at https://github.com/Pepper66/DMLE.

</details>


### [221] [Loop, Think, & Generalize: Implicit Reasoning in Recurrent-Depth Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07822)
*Harsh Kohli,Srinivasan Parthasarathy,Huan Sun,Yuekun Yao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 循环深度Transformer通过迭代计算增强组合泛化能力，解决隐式推理中的系统泛化和深度外推问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Transformer大语言模型虽然存储了大量事实知识和规则，但在隐式多跳推理中难以组合这些知识，缺乏对其参数化知识的组合泛化能力

Method: 研究循环深度Transformer，在相同Transformer层上进行迭代计算；通过从头训练模型进行受控研究，分析系统泛化和深度外推两种组合泛化挑战

Result: 普通Transformer在两种泛化挑战中都表现不佳，而循环深度Transformer能有效实现泛化；系统泛化通过三阶段顿悟过程实现，深度外推可通过扩展推理时循环来解锁

Conclusion: 循环深度Transformer能显著提升组合泛化能力，但存在过度思考限制，即过多循环会降低预测质量并限制对极深组合的泛化

Abstract: We study implicit reasoning, i.e. the ability to combine knowledge or rules within a single forward pass. While transformer-based large language models store substantial factual knowledge and rules, they often fail to compose this knowledge for implicit multi-hop reasoning, suggesting a lack of compositional generalization over their parametric knowledge. To address this limitation, we study recurrent-depth transformers, which enables iterative computation over the same transformer layers. We investigate two compositional generalization challenges under the implicit reasoning scenario: systematic generalization, i.e. combining knowledge that is never used for compositions during training, and depth extrapolation, i.e. generalizing from limited reasoning depth (e.g. training on up to 5-hop) to deeper compositions (e.g. 10-hop). Through controlled studies with models trained from scratch, we show that while vanilla transformers struggle with both generalization challenges, recurrent-depth transformers can effectively make such generalization. For systematic generalization, we find that this ability emerges through a three-stage grokking process, transitioning from memorization to in-distribution generalization and finally to systematic generalization, supported by mechanistic analysis. For depth extrapolation, we show that generalization beyond training depth can be unlocked by scaling inference-time recurrence, with more iterations enabling deeper reasoning. We further study how training strategies affect extrapolation, providing guidance on training recurrent-depth transformers, and identify a key limitation, overthinking, where excessive recurrence degrades predictions and limits generalization to very deep compositions.

</details>


### [222] [GRASS: Gradient-based Adaptive Layer-wise Importance Sampling for Memory-efficient Large Language Model Fine-tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07808)
*Kaiyuan Tian,Yu Tang,Gongqingjian Jiang,Baihui Liu,Yifu Gao,Xialin Su,Linbo Qiao,Dongsheng Li*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: GRASS：基于梯度的自适应分层重要性采样框架，通过梯度范数评估层重要性并自适应调整采样概率，结合分层优化器状态卸载机制，显著降低内存使用同时提升下游任务性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法存在局限性：全参数微调内存需求大；低秩适应方法限制模型表达能力且性能低于全参数微调；分层微调方法采用静态层重要性采样策略，忽略了层重要性随任务和训练阶段的变化，导致下游任务性能次优。

Method: 提出GRASS框架：1）使用平均梯度范数作为任务感知和训练阶段感知的层重要性评估指标；2）通过自适应训练策略动态调整层采样概率；3）引入分层优化器状态卸载机制，重叠计算与通信以进一步降低内存使用。

Result: 在多个模型和基准测试上的实验表明，GRASS持续优于现有最先进方法：平均准确率提升最高达4.38个百分点，内存使用降低最高达19.97%，同时保持可比的训练吞吐量。

Conclusion: GRASS通过梯度驱动的自适应层重要性采样和优化器状态卸载，有效解决了大语言模型微调中的内存效率与性能权衡问题，为内存受限环境下的高效模型适应提供了新方案。

Abstract: Full-parameter fine-tuning of large language models is constrained by substantial GPU memory requirements. Low-rank adaptation methods mitigate this challenge by updating only a subset of parameters. However, these approaches often limit model expressiveness and yield lower performance than full-parameter fine-tuning. Layer-wise fine-tuning methods have emerged as an alternative, enabling memory-efficient training through static layer importance sampling strategies. However, these methods overlook variations in layer importance across tasks and training stages, resulting in suboptimal performance on downstream tasks. To address these limitations, we propose GRASS, a gradient-based adaptive layer-wise importance sampling framework. GRASS utilizes mean gradient norms as a task-aware and training-stage-aware metric for estimating layer importance. Furthermore, GRASS adaptively adjusts layer sampling probabilities through an adaptive training strategy. We also introduce a layer-wise optimizer state offloading mechanism that overlaps computation and communication to further reduce memory usage while maintaining comparable training throughput. Extensive experiments across multiple models and benchmarks demonstrate that GRASS consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving an average accuracy improvement of up to 4.38 points and reducing memory usage by up to 19.97\%.

</details>


### [223] [DIVERSED: Relaxed Speculative Decoding via Dynamic Ensemble Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07622)
*Ziyi Wang,Siva Rajesh Kasa,Ankith M S,Santhosh Kumar Kasa,Jiaru Zou,Sumit Negi,Ruqi Zhang,Nan Jiang,Qifan Song*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: DIVERSED提出了一种动态验证松弛推测解码框架，通过集成验证器混合草稿和目标模型分布，提高接受率并加速大语言模型推理


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统推测解码的验证步骤过于严格，强制要求接受的token分布必须与目标模型完全匹配，导致许多合理token被拒绝，降低了接受率并限制了整体加速效果

Method: 提出动态验证松弛推测解码(DIVERSED)，学习一个基于集成的验证器，以任务相关和上下文相关的权重混合草稿模型和目标模型的分布

Result: DIVERSED在保持生成质量的同时，相比标准推测解码方法显著提高了推理效率

Conclusion: 通过松弛验证约束并动态调整草稿与目标模型的权重，DIVERSED能够有效提升大语言模型推理的加速效果，同时保证生成质量

Abstract: Speculative decoding is an effective technique for accelerating large language model inference by drafting multiple tokens in parallel. In practice, its speedup is often bottlenecked by a rigid verification step that strictly enforces the accepted token distribution to exactly match the target model. This constraint leads to the rejection of many plausible tokens, lowering the acceptance rate and limiting overall time speedup. To overcome this limitation, we propose Dynamic Verification Relaxed Speculative Decoding (DIVERSED), a relaxed verification framework that improves time efficiency while preserving generation quality. DIVERSED learns an ensemble-based verifier that blends the draft and target model distributions with a task-dependent and context-dependent weight. We provide theoretical justification for our approach and demonstrate empirically that DIVERSED achieves substantially higher inference efficiency compared to standard speculative decoding methods. Code is available at: https://github.com/comeusr/diversed.

</details>


### [224] [AtomEval: Atomic Evaluation of Adversarial Claims in Fact Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07967)
*Hongyi Cen,Mingxin Wang,Yule Liu,Jingyi Zheng,Hanze Jia,Tan Tang,Yingcai Wu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: AtomEval：一种基于原子分解的对抗性声明重写评估框架，通过SROM原子分解和原子有效性评分来检测事实性破坏，超越了传统基于表面相似度的评估方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前对抗性声明重写评估存在缺陷：标准评估指标无法捕捉真值条件一致性，经常将语义已损坏的重写标记为成功，导致评估结果不可靠。

Method: 提出AtomEval评估框架：1) 将声明分解为"主体-关系-对象-修饰语"(SROM)原子；2) 使用原子有效性评分(AVS)评估对抗性重写；3) 在FEVER数据集上测试代表性攻击策略和LLM生成器。

Result: 实验表明AtomEval提供更可靠的评估信号。使用AtomEval分析发现：更强的LLM模型不一定能产生更有效的对抗性声明，揭示了当前对抗性评估实践中被忽视的局限性。

Conclusion: AtomEval框架能够有效检测对抗性重写中的事实性破坏，为事实核查系统评估提供更可靠的指标，同时揭示了LLM对抗性生成能力的局限性。

Abstract: Adversarial claim rewriting is widely used to test fact-checking systems, but standard metrics fail to capture truth-conditional consistency and often label semantically corrupted rewrites as successful. We introduce AtomEval, a validity-aware evaluation framework that decomposes claims into subject-relation-object-modifier (SROM) atoms and scores adversarial rewrites with Atomic Validity Scoring (AVS), enabling detection of factual corruption beyond surface similarity. Experiments on the FEVER dataset across representative attack strategies and LLM generators show that AtomEval provides more reliable evaluation signals in our experiments. Using AtomEval, we further analyze LLM-based adversarial generators and observe that stronger models do not necessarily produce more effective adversarial claims under validity-aware evaluation, highlighting previously overlooked limitations in current adversarial evaluation practices.

</details>


### [225] [CAMO: A Class-Aware Minority-Optimized Ensemble for Robust Language Model Evaluation on Imbalanced Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07583)
*Mohamed Ehab,Ali Hamdi,Khaled Shaban*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: CAMO是一种针对类别不平衡问题的集成学习方法，通过分层处理机制动态提升少数类性能，在多个不平衡数据集上取得最优F1分数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界分类任务中普遍存在类别不平衡问题，传统集成方法偏向多数类，导致少数类性能下降和整体F1分数降低，需要专门针对不平衡问题的优化方法。

Method: 提出CAMO（Class-Aware Minority-Optimized）集成技术，采用分层处理机制，结合投票分布、置信度校准和模型间不确定性，动态增强少数类预测，同时保持多数类性能。

Result: 在两个高度不平衡的领域特定基准数据集（DIAR-AI/Emotion和三元BEA 2025）上验证，使用8种语言模型（3个LLM和5个SLM）在零样本和微调设置下，与7种现有集成算法对比，CAMO在严格宏F1分数上始终最优。

Conclusion: CAMO是一个可靠、领域无关的不平衡分类框架，其优势与模型适配性协同作用，表明最佳集成选择取决于模型特性，为不平衡分类问题提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Real-world categorization is severely hampered by class imbalance because traditional ensembles favor majority classes, which lowers minority performance and overall F1-score. We provide a unique ensemble technique for imbalanced problems called CAMO (Class-Aware Minority-Optimized).Through a hierarchical procedure that incorporates vote distributions, confidence calibration, and inter model uncertainty, CAMO dynamically boosts underrepresented classes while preserving and amplifying minority forecasts. We verify CAMO on two highly unbalanced, domain-specific benchmarks: the DIAR-AI/Emotion dataset and the ternary BEA 2025 dataset. We benchmark against seven proven ensemble algorithms using eight different language models (three LLMs and five SLMs) under zero-shot and fine-tuned settings .With refined models, CAMO consistently earns the greatest strict macro F1-score, setting a new benchmark. Its benefit works in concert with model adaptation, showing that the best ensemble choice depends on model properties .This proves that CAMO is a reliable, domain-neutral framework for unbalanced categorization.

</details>


### [226] [Reasoning-Based Refinement of Unsupervised Text Clusters with LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07562)
*Tunazzina Islam*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出基于LLM推理的无监督聚类结果精炼框架，通过语义判断而非嵌入生成来验证和重构聚类输出


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统无监督方法产生的语义结构常存在不连贯、冗余或缺乏基础的问题，难以在没有标注数据的情况下验证。需要一种机制来验证和精炼无监督聚类结果。

Method: 提出基于LLM推理的三阶段精炼框架：1) 连贯性验证 - LLM评估聚类摘要是否得到成员文本支持；2) 冗余裁决 - 基于语义重叠合并或拒绝候选聚类；3) 标签基础化 - 以完全无监督方式为聚类分配可解释标签。该设计将表示学习与结构验证解耦。

Result: 在两个具有不同交互模型的社交媒体语料库上评估，相比经典主题模型和最近基于表示的基线方法，在聚类连贯性和人类对齐标签质量方面取得一致改进。人类评估显示与LLM生成标签高度一致。鲁棒性分析表明跨平台稳定性良好。

Conclusion: LLM基于推理的方法可作为验证和精炼无监督语义结构的通用机制，无需监督即可实现对大规模文本集合更可靠、可解释的分析。该方法超越了仅基于嵌入的方法的常见失败模式。

Abstract: Unsupervised methods are widely used to induce latent semantic structure from large text collections, yet their outputs often contain incoherent, redundant, or poorly grounded clusters that are difficult to validate without labeled data. We propose a reasoning-based refinement framework that leverages large language models (LLMs) not as embedding generators, but as semantic judges that validate and restructure the outputs of arbitrary unsupervised clustering algorithms.Our framework introduces three reasoning stages: (i) coherence verification, where LLMs assess whether cluster summaries are supported by their member texts; (ii) redundancy adjudication, where candidate clusters are merged or rejected based on semantic overlap; and (iii) label grounding, where clusters are assigned interpretable labels in a fully unsupervised manner. This design decouples representation learning from structural validation and mitigates common failure modes of embedding-only approaches. We evaluate the framework on real-world social media corpora from two platforms with distinct interaction models, demonstrating consistent improvements in cluster coherence and human-aligned labeling quality over classical topic models and recent representation-based baselines. Human evaluation shows strong agreement with LLM-generated labels, despite the absence of gold-standard annotations. We further conduct robustness analyses under matched temporal and volume conditions to assess cross-platform stability. Beyond empirical gains, our results suggest that LLM-based reasoning can serve as a general mechanism for validating and refining unsupervised semantic structure, enabling more reliable and interpretable analyses of large text collections without supervision.

</details>


### [227] [Lexical Tone is Hard to Quantize: Probing Discrete Speech Units in Mandarin and Yorùbá](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07467)
*Opeyemi Osakuade,Simon King*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 离散语音单元在编码超音段特征（如声调）方面存在局限性，虽然SSL潜在表示本身能编码声调，但量化过程倾向于优先编码语音结构，导致声调信息不可靠。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离散语音单元在多种口语任务中广泛应用，包括需要韵律信息的任务，但研究发现当前DSU量化策略在编码超音段特征（如声调）方面存在不足，这会影响需要文本和语音联合建模的任务质量。

Method: 使用普通话和约鲁巴语等声调语言进行研究，分析SSL潜在表示和量化后DSU对声调的编码能力。比较多种量化方法，并提出一种两阶段K-means聚类方案：第一阶段编码语音信息，第二阶段在残差表示上编码声调信息。

Result: SSL潜在表示本身能够编码声调信息，但经过量化得到的DSU倾向于优先编码语音结构，导致声调编码不可靠。这一现象在各种量化方法中都存在，不仅限于最常用的K-means方法。

Conclusion: 当前DSU量化策略在编码超音段特征方面存在局限性，需要开发新的声调感知（或韵律感知）的语音表示学习技术。提出的两阶段K-means聚类方案为解决这一问题提供了潜在方向。

Abstract: Discrete speech units (DSUs) are derived by quantising representations from models trained using self-supervised learning (SSL). They are a popular representation for a wide variety of spoken language tasks, including those where prosody matters. DSUs are especially convenient for tasks where text and speech are jointly modelled, such as text-to-speech and multimodal dialogue systems. But we have found that DSUs encode suprasegmental information less reliably than segmental structure, which we demonstrate in this work using lexical tone, though this limitation likely extends to other suprasegmental features such as prosody.
  Our investigations using the tone languages Mandarin and Yorùbá show that the SSL latent representations themselves do encode tone, yet DSUs obtained using quantisation tend to prioritise phonetic structure, which makes lexical tone less reliably encoded. This remains true for a variety of quantisation methods, not only the most common, K-means.
  We conclude that current DSU quantisation strategies have limitations for suprasegmental features, which suggests a need for new, tone-aware (or prosody-aware) techniques in speech representation learning. We point towards a potential form of the solution by performing K-means clustering once to encode phonetic information, then again on the residual representation, which better encodes lexical tone.

</details>


### [228] [TSUBASA: Improving Long-Horizon Personalization via Evolving Memory and Self-Learning with Context Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07894)
*Xinliang Frederick Zhang,Lu Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: TSUBASA是一个两阶段方法，通过动态记忆演化和上下文蒸馏目标的自学习，提升个性化大语言模型在长时程任务中的能力，打破质量-效率权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 个性化大语言模型在长时程任务（如跟踪用户长期对话历史）中表现不佳，现有记忆机制难以捕捉演化行为，RAG范式受限于质量-效率权衡，参数化适配因标注数据稀缺而存在训练-推理差距。

Method: 提出TSUBASA两阶段方法：1) 通过动态记忆演化改进记忆写入；2) 通过上下文蒸馏目标的自学习改进记忆读取，将用户经验内化。

Result: 在长时程基准测试中使用Qwen-3模型家族（4B到32B）进行广泛评估，验证了TSUBASA的有效性，超越了主要依赖记忆写入的竞争性记忆增强系统（如Mem0和Memory-R1）。

Conclusion: TSUBASA打破了质量-效率障碍，实现了帕累托改进，以更少的token预算提供稳健、高保真的个性化服务。

Abstract: Personalized large language models (PLLMs) have garnered significant attention for their ability to align outputs with individual's needs and preferences. However, they still struggle with long-horizon tasks, such as tracking a user's extensive history of conversations or activities. Existing memory mechanisms often fail to capture evolving behaviors, and RAG paradigms are trapped by a quality-efficiency tradeoff. Meanwhile, parametric adaptation is bottlenecked by train-inference gap due to the scarcity of labeled data. To enhance the long-horizon capabilities of PLLMs, we introduce TSUBASA, a two-pronged approach designed to improve memory writing via dynamic memory evolution, and memory reading via self-learning with a context distillation objective to internalize user experiences. Extensive evaluations on long-horizon benchmarks using the Qwen-3 model family (4B to 32B) validate the effectiveness of TSUBASA, surpassing competitive memory-augmented systems that rely primarily on memory writing, such as Mem0 and Memory-R1. Our analyses further confirms that TSUBASA breaks the quality-efficiency barrier to achieve Pareto improvements, delivering robust, high-fidelity personalization with a reduced token budget.

</details>


### [229] [Data Selection for Multi-turn Dialogue Instruction Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07892)
*Bo Li,Shikun Zhang,Wei Ye*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出MDS多轮对话选择框架，通过全局覆盖和局部结构两阶段评分，从嘈杂的多轮对话数据中选择高质量对话用于指令调优


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前指令调优语言模型依赖的大型多轮对话数据集通常存在噪声和结构不一致问题，包括话题漂移、重复闲聊和跨轮次答案格式不匹配，需要从数据选择角度解决这些问题

Method: MDS框架包含两个阶段：1) 全局覆盖阶段在用户查询轨迹空间进行分箱选择，保留有代表性且非冗余的对话；2) 局部结构阶段通过实体基础的话题定位和信息进展评估对话内可靠性，同时考虑查询-答案形式一致性以实现功能对齐

Result: MDS在三个多轮基准测试和银行领域测试集上优于强单轮选择器、对话级LLM评分器和启发式基线，在无参考和有参考指标上获得最佳综合排名，且在相同训练预算下对长对话更鲁棒

Conclusion: MDS通过对话级而非孤立轮次的选择框架，有效解决了多轮对话数据集的质量问题，为指令调优提供了高质量数据选择方案

Abstract: Instruction-tuned language models increasingly rely on large multi-turn dialogue corpora, but these datasets are often noisy and structurally inconsistent, with topic drift, repetitive chitchat, and mismatched answer formats across turns. We address this from a data selection perspective and propose \textbf{MDS} (Multi-turn Dialogue Selection), a dialogue-level framework that scores whole conversations rather than isolated turns. MDS combines a global coverage stage that performs bin-wise selection in the user-query trajectory space to retain representative yet non-redundant dialogues, with a local structural stage that evaluates within-dialogue reliability through entity-grounded topic grounding and information progress, together with query-answer form consistency for functional alignment. MDS outperforms strong single-turn selectors, dialogue-level LLM scorers, and heuristic baselines on three multi-turn benchmarks and an in-domain Banking test set, achieving the best overall rank across reference-free and reference-based metrics, and is more robust on long conversations under the same training budget. Code and resources are included in the supplementary materials.

</details>


### [230] [Efficient Learned Data Compression via Dual-Stream Feature Decoupling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07239)
*Huidong Ma,Xinyan Shi,Hui Sun,Xiaofei Yue,Xiaoguang Liu,Gang Wang,Wentong Cai*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出双流多尺度解耦器，将局部和全局上下文解耦，用浅层并行流替代深度串行处理，结合分层门控细化器进行自适应特征优化，实现压缩比和吞吐量的SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统学习型数据压缩方法在精确概率建模与系统效率间存在平衡难题。单一流架构难以同时捕获微观句法和宏观语义特征，需要深度串行堆叠导致延迟增加。异构系统受设备速度不匹配限制，串行处理使吞吐量受阿姆达尔定律约束。

Method: 1. 双流多尺度解耦器：解耦局部和全局上下文，用浅层并行流替代深度串行处理；2. 分层门控细化器：自适应特征细化和精确概率建模；3. 并发流并行流水线：克服系统瓶颈，实现全流水线并行。

Result: 实验表明该方法在压缩比和吞吐量上均达到最先进性能，同时保持最低延迟和内存使用。代码已在GitHub开源。

Conclusion: 提出的双流多尺度解耦架构有效解决了学习型数据压缩中概率建模与系统效率的平衡问题，通过并行化设计克服了传统串行处理的瓶颈，实现了压缩性能与计算效率的双重优化。

Abstract: While Learned Data Compression (LDC) has achieved superior compression ratios, balancing precise probability modeling with system efficiency remains challenging. Crucially, uniform single-stream architectures struggle to simultaneously capture micro-syntactic and macro-semantic features, necessitating deep serial stacking that exacerbates latency. Compounding this, heterogeneous systems are constrained by device speed mismatches, where throughput is capped by Amdahl's Law due to serial processing. To this end, we propose a Dual-Stream Multi-Scale Decoupler that disentangles local and global contexts to replace deep serial processing with shallow parallel streams, and incorporate a Hierarchical Gated Refiner for adaptive feature refinement and precise probability modeling. Furthermore, we design a Concurrent Stream-Parallel Pipeline, which overcomes systemic bottlenecks to achieve full-pipeline parallelism. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both compression ratio and throughput, while maintaining the lowest latency and memory usage. The code is available at https://github.com/huidong-ma/FADE.

</details>


### [231] [Detecting HIV-Related Stigma in Clinical Narratives Using Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07717)
*Ziyi Chen,Yasir Khan,Mengyuan Zhang,Cheng Peng,Mengxian Lyu,Yiyang Liu,Krishna Vaddiparti,Robert L Cook,Mattia Prosperi,Yonghui Wu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 开发基于大语言模型的工具，从临床记录中自动识别HIV相关污名化，使用专家关键词和临床词嵌入筛选句子，比较多种模型在零样本和少样本设置下的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: HIV相关污名化是影响HIV感染者心理健康、医疗参与和治疗结果的关键心理社会决定因素。虽然临床叙述中记录了污名化相关经历，但缺乏现成的工具来提取和分类这些信息。

Method: 从2012-2022年佛罗里达大学健康中心的HIV感染者临床记录中识别句子，使用专家策划的污名化相关关键词并通过临床词嵌入迭代扩展。共标注1,332个句子，分为四个污名化子量表：公众态度担忧、披露担忧、负面自我形象和个人化污名。比较了GatorTron-large和BERT作为编码器基线模型，以及GPT-OSS-20B、LLaMA-8B和MedGemma-27B作为生成式大语言模型，在零样本和少样本提示下的性能。

Result: GatorTron-large获得最佳整体性能（Micro F1 = 0.62）。少样本提示显著提高了生成模型的性能，5-shot GPT-OSS-20B和LLaMA-8B分别达到Micro-F1分数0.57和0.59。性能因污名化子量表而异，负面自我形象预测性最高，个人化污名最具挑战性。零样本生成推理显示出显著失败率（高达32%）。

Conclusion: 本研究开发了首个实用的自然语言处理工具，用于从临床记录中识别HIV污名化，为临床实践和研究提供了有价值的工具，同时揭示了不同污名化维度的识别难度差异。

Abstract: Human immunodeficiency virus (HIV)-related stigma is a critical psychosocial determinant of health for people living with HIV (PLWH), influencing mental health, engagement in care, and treatment outcomes. Although stigma-related experiences are documented in clinical narratives, there is a lack of off-the-shelf tools to extract and categorize them. This study aims to develop a large language model (LLM)-based tool for identifying HIV stigma from clinical notes. We identified clinical notes from PLWH receiving care at the University of Florida (UF) Health between 2012 and 2022. Candidate sentences were identified using expert-curated stigma-related keywords and iteratively expanded via clinical word embeddings. A total of 1,332 sentences were manually annotated across four stigma subscales: Concern with Public Attitudes, Disclosure Concerns, Negative Self-Image, and Personalized Stigma. We compared GatorTron-large and BERT as encoder-based baselines, and GPT-OSS-20B, LLaMA-8B, and MedGemma-27B as generative LLMs, under zero-shot and few-shot prompting. GatorTron-large achieved the best overall performance (Micro F1 = 0.62). Few-shot prompting substantially improved generative model performance, with 5-shot GPT-OSS-20B and LLaMA-8B achieving Micro-F1 scores of 0.57 and 0.59, respectively. Performance varied by stigma subscale, with Negative Self-Image showing the highest predictability and Personalized Stigma remaining the most challenging. Zero-shot generative inference exhibited non-trivial failure rates (up to 32%). This study develops the first practical NLP tool for identifying HIV stigma in clinical notes.

</details>


### [232] [Dynamic Context Evolution for Scalable Synthetic Data Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07147)
*Ryan Lingo,Rajeev Chhajer*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出动态上下文演化(DCE)框架解决大语言模型跨批次模式崩溃问题，通过三种机制保持输出多样性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在独立多次提示时会产生重复输出，即跨批次模式崩溃现象。现有方法依赖临时去重和种子轮换，缺乏系统化解决方案。

Method: 提出动态上下文演化(DCE)框架，包含三个机制：1) 语言化尾部采样(模型评估想法明显程度并丢弃明显想法)；2) 语义记忆(维护持久嵌入索引以拒绝跨批次近重复)；3) 自适应提示演化(基于记忆状态和轮换多样性策略重构生成提示)

Result: 在三个领域(可持续包装概念、教育考试题目、创意写作提示)和两个模型家族(gpt-5-mini和claude-haiku-4-5)的实验中，DCE实现0.0%崩溃率(对比朴素提示的5.6%)，产生17-18个HDBSCAN聚类(对比朴素方法的2-17个)，表明概念结构更丰富可靠

Conclusion: DCE框架有效解决跨批次模式崩溃问题，去重和提示演化单独不足但联合有效，仅需标准API调用(约$0.50/1000候选)，无需微调或定制架构

Abstract: Large language models produce repetitive output when prompted independently across many batches, a phenomenon we term cross-batch mode collapse: the progressive loss of output diversity when a language model is prompted repeatedly without access to its prior generations. Practitioners have long mitigated this with ad hoc deduplication and seed rotation, but no principled framework exists. We introduce Dynamic Context Evolution (DCE), comprising three mechanisms: (1) verbalized tail sampling (the model labels each idea with a guess about how obvious it is, and obvious ideas are discarded), which filters high-probability candidates via model self-assessment; (2) semantic memory, which maintains a persistent embedding index to reject near-duplicates across batches; and (3) adaptive prompt evolution, which reconstructs the generation prompt each batch using memory state and rotating diversity strategies. In experiments across three domains (sustainable packaging concepts, educational exam questions, and creative writing prompts) and two model families (gpt-5-mini and claude-haiku-4-5), a component ablation across 2-3 random seeds per method shows that DCE achieves 0.0 +/- 0.0% collapse versus 5.6 +/- 2.0% for naive prompting, while producing 17-18 HDBSCAN clusters per seed versus naive's volatile 2-17, indicating reliably richer conceptual structure. These results are validated with an independent embedding model (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) and hold across sensitivity sweeps of the VTS threshold tau and dedup threshold delta. Deduplication and prompt evolution are individually insufficient but jointly effective, at approximately $0.50 per 1,000 candidates using only standard API calls, with no fine-tuning or custom architectures required.

</details>


### [233] [ReDAct: Uncertainty-Aware Deferral for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07036)
*Dzianis Piatrashyn,Nikita Kotelevskii,Kirill Grishchenkov,Nikita Glazkov,Ivan Nasonov,Ilya Makarov,Timothy Baldwin,Preslav Nakov,Roman Vashurin,Maxim Panov*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: ReDAct框架通过结合小型廉价LLM和大型可靠LLM，在不确定性超过阈值时将决策推迟给大模型，从而在保持性能的同时显著降低推理成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM智能体在顺序决策中存在幻觉问题，单个错误可能导致轨迹不可逆恶化。虽然大型LLM幻觉较少，但token成本显著更高，需要平衡性能与成本。

Method: 提出ReDAct（Reason-Defer-Act）框架，配备两个LLM：默认使用小型廉价模型，当小型模型的预测不确定性超过校准阈值时，将决策推迟给大型可靠模型。

Result: 在ALFWorld和MiniGrid等文本化具身环境中评估，仅将约15%的决策推迟给大型模型即可达到完全使用大型模型的性能，同时显著降低推理成本。

Conclusion: ReDAct通过智能地将不确定性决策推迟给大型LLM，有效解决了LLM智能体在顺序决策中的幻觉问题与成本权衡，实现了性能与效率的良好平衡。

Abstract: Recently, LLM-based agents have become increasingly popular across many applications, including complex sequential decision-making problems. However, they inherit the tendency of LLMs to hallucinate, leading to incorrect decisions. In sequential settings, even a single mistake can irreversibly degrade the trajectory, making hallucinations an even bigger problem. Although larger LLMs hallucinate less, they incur a significantly higher per-token cost. In this paper, we address this tradeoff by proposing ReDAct (Reason-Defer-Act). In ReDAct, an agent is equipped with two LLMs: a small, cheap model used by default, and a large, more reliable but expensive model. When the predictive uncertainty of the small model exceeds a calibrated threshold, the decision is deferred to the large model. We evaluate our approach in text-based embodied environments such as ALFWorld and MiniGrid and show that deferring only about 15% of decisions to the large model can match the quality of using it exclusively, while significantly reducing inference costs.

</details>


### [234] [TR-EduVSum: A Turkish-Focused Dataset and Consensus Framework for Educational Video Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07553)
*Figen Eğin,Aytuğ Onan*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一个自动生成土耳其语教育视频金标准摘要的框架，创建了TR-EduVSum数据集，并开发了基于共识的AutoMUP方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是解决土耳其语教育视频摘要领域缺乏自动、可复现的金标准摘要生成方法的问题。传统方法依赖单一人工摘要，而多个人工摘要的共识可以产生更可靠的参考标准。

Method: 提出了AutoMUP方法：1）从多个人工摘要中提取意义单元；2）使用嵌入表示对意义单元进行聚类；3）统计建模参与者间一致性；4）基于共识权重生成分级摘要。金标准摘要对应最高共识的AutoMUP配置。

Result: 实验结果显示：1）AutoMUP摘要与强大的LLM摘要（Flash 2.5和GPT-5.1）具有高语义重叠；2）消融研究明确证明共识权重和聚类对摘要质量的决定性作用；3）该方法可以低成本推广到其他突厥语系语言。

Conclusion: AutoMUP框架能够自动、可复现地生成基于多个人工摘要共识的金标准摘要，为土耳其语教育视频摘要提供了可靠的评估基准，并具有跨突厥语系语言的推广潜力。

Abstract: This study presents a framework for generating the gold-standard summary fully automatically and reproducibly based on multiple human summaries of Turkish educational videos. Within the scope of the study, a new dataset called TR-EduVSum was created, encompassing 82 Turkish course videos in the field of "Data Structures and Algorithms" and containing a total of 3281 independent human summaries. Inspired by existing pyramid-based evaluation approaches, the AutoMUP (Automatic Meaning Unit Pyramid) method is proposed, which extracts consensus-based content from multiple human summaries. AutoMUP clusters the meaning units extracted from human summaries using embedding, statistically models inter-participant agreement, and generates graded summaries based on consensus weight. In this framework, the gold summary corresponds to the highest-consensus AutoMUP configuration, constructed from the most frequently supported meaning units across human summaries. Experimental results show that AutoMUP summaries exhibit high semantic overlap with robust LLM (Large Language Model) summaries such as Flash 2.5 and GPT-5.1. Furthermore, ablation studies clearly demonstrate the decisive role of consensus weight and clustering in determining summary quality. The proposed approach can be generalized to other Turkic languages at low cost.

</details>


### [235] [EMSDialog: Synthetic Multi-person Emergency Medical Service Dialogue Generation from Electronic Patient Care Reports via Multi-LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07549)
*Xueren Ge,Sahil Murtaza,Anthony Cortez,Homa Alemzadeh*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 提出EMS对话数据集生成管道，创建多说话者EMS对话数据集EMSdialog，用于提升对话诊断预测的准确性、及时性和稳定性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有医学对话语料多为二元对话或缺乏多参与者工作流程和标注，无法满足流式临床对话中证据追踪和诊断决策的需求

Method: 基于ePCR的、话题流驱动的多智能体生成管道，通过迭代规划、生成和自修正对话，结合基于规则的事实和话题流检查

Result: 生成EMSdialog数据集，包含4,414个合成的多说话者EMS对话，标注43种诊断、说话者角色和轮次级话题；人工和LLM评估证实高质量和真实性；EMSdialog增强训练提升EMS对话诊断预测的准确性、及时性和稳定性

Conclusion: 提出的数据生成管道能创建高质量合成医学对话数据集，有效支持流式临床对话中的诊断预测任务

Abstract: Conversational diagnosis prediction requires models to track evolving evidence in streaming clinical conversations and decide when to commit to a diagnosis. Existing medical dialogue corpora are largely dyadic or lack the multi-party workflow and annotations needed for this setting. We introduce an ePCR-grounded, topic-flow-based multi-agent generation pipeline that iteratively plans, generates, and self-refines dialogues with rule-based factual and topic flow checks. The pipeline yields EMSDialog, a dataset of 4,414 synthetic multi-speaker EMS conversations based on a real-world ePCR dataset, annotated with 43 diagnoses, speaker roles, and turn-level topics. Human and LLM evaluations confirm high quality and realism of EMSDialog using both utterance- and conversation-level metrics. Results show that EMSDialog-augmented training improves accuracy, timeliness, and stability of EMS conversational diagnosis prediction.

</details>


### [236] [When to Call an Apple Red: Humans Follow Introspective Rules, VLMs Don't](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06422)
*Jonathan Nemitz,Carsten Eickhoff,Junyi Jessy Li,Kyle Mahowald,Michal Golovanevsky,William Rudman*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文引入GCA数据集研究视觉语言模型的自我认知一致性，发现模型会系统性违反自己的内省规则，而人类参与者则能保持一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究视觉语言模型何时会出现意外行为、模型是否能可靠预测自身行为、以及模型是否遵循其内省推理，这些都是可信部署的核心挑战。

Method: 引入Graded Color Attribution (GCA)数据集，包含三种条件下的线图：世界知识重新着色、反事实重新着色和无颜色先验的形状。让VLMs和人类参与者建立颜色标签阈值规则，然后比较这些规则与后续颜色归属决策的一致性。

Result: 模型系统性违反自己的内省规则（如GPT-5-mini在强颜色先验对象上违反率近60%），而人类参与者能保持规则一致性。VLMs是优秀的颜色覆盖率估计器，但在最终响应中公然违背自己的推理。世界知识先验会系统性降低模型忠实性，这与人类认知模式不同。

Conclusion: VLM推理失败并非难度驱动，而是内省自我知识校准错误。这对高风险部署有直接影响，挑战了关于VLM推理能力的现有观点。

Abstract: Understanding when Vision-Language Models (VLMs) will behave unexpectedly, whether models can reliably predict their own behavior, and if models adhere to their introspective reasoning are central challenges for trustworthy deployment. To study this, we introduce the Graded Color Attribution (GCA) dataset, a controlled benchmark designed to elicit decision rules and evaluate participant faithfulness to these rules. GCA consists of line drawings that vary pixel-level color coverage across three conditions: world-knowledge recolorings, counterfactual recolorings, and shapes with no color priors. Using GCA, both VLMs and human participants establish a threshold: the minimum percentage of pixels of a given color an object must have to receive that color label. We then compare these rules with their subsequent color attribution decisions. Our findings reveal that models systematically violate their own introspective rules. For example, GPT-5-mini violates its stated introspection rules in nearly 60\% of cases on objects with strong color priors. Human participants remain faithful to their stated rules, with any apparent violations being explained by a well-documented tendency to overestimate color coverage. In contrast, we find that VLMs are excellent estimators of color coverage, yet blatantly contradict their own reasoning in their final responses. Across all models and strategies for eliciting introspective rules, world-knowledge priors systematically degrade faithfulness in ways that do not mirror human cognition. Our findings challenge the view that VLM reasoning failures are difficulty-driven and suggest that VLM introspective self-knowledge is miscalibrated, with direct implications for high-stakes deployment.

</details>


### [237] [Enabling Intrinsic Reasoning over Dense Geospatial Embeddings with DFR-Gemma](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07490)
*Xuechen Zhang,Aviv Slobodkin,Joydeep Paul,Mandar Sharma,Samet Oymak,Shravya Shetty,Gautam Prasad*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: DFR-Gemma框架使LLM能够直接对密集地理空间嵌入进行推理，无需中间文本转换，提高了效率和准确性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有地理空间基础模型（如PDFM）与LLM的集成有限，现有方法将嵌入作为检索索引或转换为文本描述，存在冗余、令牌效率低和数值不准确的问题

Method: 提出DFR-Gemma框架，通过轻量级投影器将高维嵌入与LLM潜在空间对齐，使嵌入可以作为语义令牌与自然语言指令一起注入，实现直接特征推理

Result: 实验表明DFR使LLM能够解码潜在空间模式，在多种任务上实现准确的零样本推理，同时相比基于文本的基线显著提高效率

Conclusion: 将嵌入作为主要数据输入为多模态地理空间智能提供了更直接、高效和可扩展的方法

Abstract: Representation learning for geospatial and spatio-temporal data plays a critical role in enabling general-purpose geospatial intelligence. Recent geospatial foundation models, such as the Population Dynamics Foundation Model (PDFM), encode complex population and mobility dynamics into compact embeddings. However, their integration with Large Language Models (LLMs) remains limited. Existing approaches to LLM integration treat these embeddings as retrieval indices or convert them into textual descriptions for reasoning, introducing redundancy, token inefficiency, and numerical inaccuracies. We propose Direct Feature Reasoning-Gemma (DFR-Gemma), a novel framework that enables LLMs to reason directly over dense geospatial embeddings. DFR aligns high-dimensional embeddings with the latent space of an LLM via a lightweight projector, allowing embeddings to be injected as semantic tokens alongside natural language instructions. This design eliminates the need for intermediate textual representations and enables intrinsic reasoning over spatial features. To evaluate this paradigm, we introduce a multi-task geospatial benchmark that pairs embeddings with diverse question-answer tasks, including feature querying, comparison, and semantic description. Experimental results show that DFR allows LLMs to decode latent spatial patterns and perform accurate zero-shot reasoning across tasks, while significantly improving efficiency compared to text-based baselines. Our results demonstrate that treating embeddings as primary data inputs, provides a more direct, efficient, and scalable approach to multimodal geospatial intelligence.

</details>


### [238] [Evaluating In-Context Translation with Synchronous Context-Free Grammar Transduction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07320)
*Jackson Petty,Jaulie Goe,Tal Linzen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LLMs在基于上下文语法描述的字符串转导任务中表现不佳，准确率随语法规模和句子长度显著下降，形态和书写差异进一步降低性能，主要错误类型包括词汇选择错误、幻觉和未翻译。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 针对低资源语言机器翻译的数据依赖问题，研究LLMs能否通过上下文中的语言描述（如教科书、词典）来推断语法规则与句子之间的关系，从而减少对大规模训练数据的依赖。

Method: 使用同步上下文无关文法构建形式语言对，模拟自然语言的语法、形态和书写特征。在给定语法和源语言句子的条件下，测量LLMs将句子从一个形式语言翻译到另一个的能力，并系统变化语法规模、句子长度、语言属性和书写系统。

Result: 1. LLMs翻译准确率随语法规模和句子长度显著下降；2. 源语言和目标语言之间的形态和书写差异会大幅降低模型性能；3. 主要错误类型包括：错误回忆目标语言词汇、幻觉生成新词汇、以及未翻译源语言词汇。

Conclusion: LLMs基于上下文语法描述进行翻译的能力有限，特别是在处理复杂语法、长句子和语言差异时表现不佳，这限制了其在低资源语言翻译中完全替代大规模训练数据的潜力。

Abstract: Low-resource languages pose a challenge for machine translation with large language models (LLMs), which require large amounts of training data. One potential way to circumvent this data dependence is to rely on LLMs' ability to use in-context descriptions of languages, like textbooks and dictionaries. To do so, LLMs must be able to infer the link between the languages' grammatical descriptions and the sentences in question. Here we isolate this skill using a formal analogue of the task: string transduction based on a formal grammar provided in-context. We construct synchronous context-free grammars which define pairs of formal languages designed to model particular aspects of natural language grammar, morphology, and written representation. Using these grammars, we measure how well LLMs can translate sentences from one formal language into another when given both the grammar and the source-language sentence. We vary the size of the grammar, the lengths of the sentences, the syntactic and morphological properties of the languages, and their written script. We note three key findings. First, LLMs' translation accuracy decreases markedly as a function of grammar size and sentence length. Second, differences in morphology and written representation between the source and target languages can strongly diminish model performance. Third, we examine the types of errors committed by models and find they are most prone to recall the wrong words from the target language vocabulary, hallucinate new words, or leave source-language words untranslated.

</details>


### [239] [Adaptive Prompt Structure Factorization: A Framework for Self-Discovering and Optimizing Compositional Prompt Programs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06699)
*Haoyue Liu,Zhichao Wang,Yongxin Guo,Haoran Shou,Xiaoying Tang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: aPSF框架通过将提示分解为语义因子并进行干预性单因子更新，实现了更高效、可控的API-only提示优化


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有API-only提示优化器通常迭代编辑整体提示，导致组件耦合、信用分配不明确、可控性差和token浪费，需要更高效的优化方法

Method: 提出自适应提示结构分解(aPSF)框架：1)使用架构模型发现任务特定的提示结构作为语义因子；2)进行干预性单因子更新：通过验证性能变化估计每个因子的边际贡献，并通过错误引导的因子选择将更新路由到当前主要失败源

Result: 在多个高级推理基准测试中，aPSF优于包括原则感知优化器在内的强基线，平均准确率提升高达+2.16个百分点，在MultiArith上减少45-87%的token优化成本，并在1步内达到峰值验证性能

Conclusion: aPSF通过因子分解和干预性更新实现了更高效、可控的提示优化，为API-only环境下的提示工程提供了新范式

Abstract: Automated prompt optimization is crucial for eliciting reliable reasoning from large language models (LLMs), yet most API-only prompt optimizers iteratively edit monolithic prompts, coupling components and obscuring credit assignment, limiting controllability, and wasting tokens. We propose Adaptive Prompt Structure Factorization (aPSF), an API-only framework (prompt-in/text-out; no access to model internals) that uses an Architect model to discover task-specific prompt structures as semantic factors. aPSF then performs interventional, single-factor updates: interventional factor-level scoring estimates each factor's marginal contribution via validation-performance changes, and error-guided factor selection routes updates to the current dominant failure source for more sample-efficient optimization. Across multiple advanced reasoning benchmarks, aPSF outperforms strong baselines including principle-aware optimizers, improving accuracy by up to +2.16 percentage points on average, and reduces optimization cost by 45--87% tokens on MultiArith while reaching peak validation in 1 step.

</details>


### [240] [The Impact of Steering Large Language Models with Persona Vectors in Educational Applications](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07102)
*Yongchao Wu,Aron Henriksson*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究首次系统评估了激活引导的人格特质在AI教育应用中的影响，发现人格引导会降低回答质量，且对开放式语言艺术任务的影响远大于事实性科学任务；在自动评分方面，人格特质会导致可预测的校准偏移，不同模型架构对人格引导的敏感性差异显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然激活引导技术可以在推理时个性化调整大型语言模型，但其在教育场景中的具体影响尚不明确。研究旨在系统评估人格向量引导在短答案生成和自动评分任务中的效果，特别是在不同任务类型和模型架构下的表现差异。

Method: 研究使用ASAP-SAS基准测试，为七种人格特质创建人格向量，在三种模型（涵盖两种架构）上进行实验。分析人格引导对短答案生成质量和自动评分校准的影响，比较开放式语言艺术任务与事实性科学任务的敏感性差异，并评估不同模型架构（混合专家模型与密集模型）对人格引导的响应程度。

Result: 人格引导总体上降低了回答质量，对开放式语言艺术任务的影响比对事实性科学任务大得多（解释性和论证性任务的敏感性高达11倍）。在评分方面，观察到可预测的校准偏移：邪恶和不礼貌的评分者更严厉，善良和乐观的评分者更宽容。语言艺术任务对评分者个性化的敏感性是科学任务的2.5-3倍，混合专家模型的校准偏移大约是密集模型的6倍。

Conclusion: 这是首个系统研究激活引导人格特质在教育生成和评分中影响的工作。结果表明，在教育场景中部署引导模型时，需要考虑任务感知和架构感知的校准，因为不同任务类型和模型架构对人格引导的敏感性存在显著差异，这对教育AI系统的可靠性和公平性具有重要意义。

Abstract: Activation-based steering can personalize large language models at inference time, but its effects in educational settings remain unclear. We study persona vectors for seven character traits in short-answer generation and automated scoring on the ASAP-SAS benchmark across three models spanning two architectures. Persona steering lowers answer quality overall, with much larger effects on open-ended English Language Arts (ELA) prompts than on factual science prompts; interpretive and argumentative tasks are up to 11x more sensitive. On the scoring side, we observe predictable valence-aligned calibration shifts: evil and impolite scorers grade more harshly, while good and optimistic scorers grade more leniently. ELA tasks are 2.5-3x more susceptible to scorer personalization than science tasks, and the Mixture-of-Experts model shows roughly 6x larger calibration shifts than the dense models. To our knowledge, this is the first study to systematically examine the effects of activation-steered persona traits in educational generation and scoring, and the results highlight the need for task-aware and architecture-aware calibration when deploying steered models in educational settings.

</details>


### [241] [STRIDE-ED: A Strategy-Grounded Stepwise Reasoning Framework for Empathetic Dialogue Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07100)
*Hongru Ji,Yuyin Fan,Meng Zhao,Xianghua Li,Lianwei Wu,Chao Gao*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: STRIDE-ED是一个基于策略、可解释的深度推理框架，通过结构化、策略条件化的推理来建模共情对话，解决了现有方法缺乏全面策略框架、显式任务对齐多阶段推理和高质量策略感知数据的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有共情对话方法存在三个根本限制：缺乏全面的共情策略框架、缺乏显式任务对齐的多阶段推理、缺乏高质量的策略感知数据，导致无法有效建模共情对话这一复杂的多阶段认知和决策过程。

Method: 1. 提出STRIDE-ED框架：基于策略、可解释的深度推理框架，通过结构化、策略条件化的推理建模共情对话；2. 开发策略感知数据精炼流程：集成基于LLM的标注、多模型一致性加权评估和动态采样，构建与共情策略对齐的高质量训练数据；3. 采用两阶段训练范式：结合监督微调和多目标强化学习，使模型行为与目标情感、共情策略和响应格式更好对齐。

Result: 大量实验表明，STRIDE-ED在不同开源LLMs上具有良好泛化能力，在自动指标和人工评估上均持续优于现有方法。

Conclusion: STRIDE-ED通过结构化策略条件推理、高质量策略感知数据构建和两阶段训练范式，有效解决了共情对话建模中的关键挑战，为共情对话系统提供了更全面、可解释的解决方案。

Abstract: Empathetic dialogue requires not only recognizing a user's emotional state but also making strategy-aware, context-sensitive decisions throughout response generation. However, the lack of a comprehensive empathy strategy framework, explicit task-aligned multi-stage reasoning, and high-quality strategy-aware data fundamentally limits existing approaches, preventing them from effectively modeling empathetic dialogue as a complex, multi-stage cognitive and decision-making process. To address these challenges, we propose STRIDE-ED, a STRategy-grounded, Interpretable, and DEep reasoning framework that models Empathetic Dialogue through structured, strategy-conditioned reasoning. To support effective learning, we develop a strategy-aware data refinement pipeline integrating LLM-based annotation, multi-model consistency-weighted evaluation, and dynamic sampling to construct high-quality training data aligned with empathetic strategies. Furthermore, we adopt a two-stage training paradigm that combines supervised fine-tuning with multi-objective reinforcement learning to better align model behaviors with target emotions, empathetic strategies, and response formats. Extensive experiments demonstrate that STRIDE-ED generalizes across diverse open-source LLMs and consistently outperforms existing methods on both automatic metrics and human evaluations.

</details>


### [242] [The Detection-Extraction Gap: Models Know the Answer Before They Can Say It](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06613)
*Hanyang Wang,Mingxuan Zhu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究发现推理模型在答案确定后仍继续生成大量文本，提出"检测-提取差距"概念，并开发了基于自由续写的早期退出方法BAEE，显著减少生成长度同时提升准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代推理模型在答案已经确定后仍继续生成长文本，造成计算资源浪费。研究发现52-88%的思维链标记是在答案可恢复后产生的，揭示了一个结构性现象：检测与提取之间的差距。

Method: 提出Black-box Adaptive Early Exit (BAEE)方法，利用自由续写进行检测和提取，通过比较自由续写和强制提取的分布差异，在答案确定时提前退出生成过程。

Result: BAEE方法能够截断70-78%的序列生成，同时将准确率提升1-5个百分点。对于思考模式模型，早期退出防止了答案被后续生成覆盖，获得了高达5.8个百分点的提升。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了推理模型中的检测-提取差距现象，提出的BAEE方法通过利用自由续写实现早期退出，显著减少了计算成本同时提升了模型性能，为高效推理提供了新思路。

Abstract: Modern reasoning models continue generating long after the answer is already determined. Across five model configurations, two families, and three benchmarks, we find that 52--88% of chain-of-thought tokens are produced after the answer is recoverable from a partial prefix. This post-commitment generation reveals a structural phenomenon: the detection-extraction gap. Free continuations from early prefixes recover the correct answer even at 10% of the trace, while forced extraction fails on 42% of these cases. The answer is recoverable from the model state, yet prompt-conditioned decoding fails to extract it. We formalize this mismatch via a total-variation bound between free and forced continuation distributions, yielding quantitative estimates of suffix-induced shift. Exploiting this asymmetry, we propose Black-box Adaptive Early Exit (BAEE), which uses free continuations for both detection and extraction, truncating 70--78% of serial generation while improving accuracy by 1--5pp across all models. For thinking-mode models, early exit prevents post-commitment overwriting, yielding gains of up to 5.8pp; a cost-optimized variant achieves 68--73% reduction at a median of 9 API calls. Code is available at https://github.com/EdWangLoDaSc/know2say.

</details>


### [243] [LLM-based Schema-Guided Extraction and Validation of Missing-Person Intelligence from Heterogeneous Data Sources](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06571)
*Joshua Castillo,Ravi Mukkamala*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 开发了Guardian Parser Pack系统，通过AI驱动的解析和标准化流程，将多源调查文档转换为统一格式，支持失踪人员和儿童安全调查工作流。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 失踪人员和儿童安全调查依赖于结构各异的案件文档（包括结构化表格、公告式海报和叙述性网页档案），这些文档在布局、术语和数据质量上的差异阻碍了快速分诊、大规模分析和搜索规划工作流。

Method: 提出Guardian Parser Pack系统，包含：(1) 多引擎PDF文本提取与OCR回退；(2) 基于规则的来源识别与特定来源解析器；(3) 模式优先的协调和验证；(4) 可选的大语言模型辅助提取路径，包含验证器引导的修复和共享地理编码服务。

Result: 在75个手动对齐案例子集上，LLM辅助路径的提取质量显著高于确定性比较器（F1 = 0.8664 vs. 0.2578）；在517个解析记录中，LLM路径也提高了聚合关键字段完整性（96.97% vs. 93.23%）。确定性路径速度更快（平均运行时间0.03秒/记录 vs. LLM路径3.95秒/记录）。所有LLM输出都通过了初始模式验证。

Conclusion: 研究结果支持在高风险调查环境中，在模式优先、可审计的流程中受控使用概率性AI，LLM辅助路径显著提高了提取质量，而验证器引导的修复作为内置安全措施而非性能提升的主要贡献者。

Abstract: Missing-person and child-safety investigations rely on heterogeneous case documents, including structured forms, bulletin-style posters, and narrative web profiles. Variations in layout, terminology, and data quality impede rapid triage, large-scale analysis, and search-planning workflows. This paper introduces the Guardian Parser Pack, an AI-driven parsing and normalization pipeline that transforms multi-source investigative documents into a unified, schema-compliant representation suitable for operational review and downstream spatial modeling. The proposed system integrates (i) multi-engine PDF text extraction with Optical Character Recognition (OCR) fallback, (ii) rule-based source identification with source-specific parsers, (iii) schema-first harmonization and validation, and (iv) an optional Large Language Model (LLM)-assisted extraction pathway incorporating validator-guided repair and shared geocoding services. We present the system architecture, key implementation decisions, and output design, and evaluate performance using both gold-aligned extraction metrics and corpus-level operational indicators. On a manually aligned subset of 75 cases, the LLM-assisted pathway achieved substantially higher extraction quality than the deterministic comparator (F1 = 0.8664 vs. 0.2578), while across 517 parsed records per pathway it also improved aggregate key-field completeness (96.97\% vs. 93.23\%). The deterministic pathway remained much faster (mean runtime 0.03 s/record vs. 3.95 s/record for the LLM pathway). In the evaluated run, all LLM outputs passed initial schema validation, so validator-guided repair functioned as a built-in safeguard rather than a contributor to the observed gains. These results support controlled use of probabilistic AI within a schema-first, auditable pipeline for high-stakes investigative settings.

</details>


### [244] [Self-Preference Bias in Rubric-Based Evaluation of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06996)
*José Pombal,Ricardo Rei,André F. T. Martins*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 研究发现LLM作为评判者在基于规则的评估中存在自我偏好偏差，即使在客观标准下也会错误地偏向自身输出，影响模型排名和发展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM作为评判者的评估方法已成为主流，但存在自我偏好偏差问题，即评判者倾向于偏好自身或同系列模型的输出。这种偏差会扭曲评估结果，特别是在递归自我改进的背景下，阻碍模型发展。需要研究这种偏差在基于规则的评估范式中的表现。

Method: 研究采用基于规则的评估范式，使用IFEval（具有可编程验证规则的基准）和HealthBench（医学聊天基准）。在IFEval中分析客观标准下的自我偏好偏差；在HealthBench中分析主观规则下的偏差。通过分析规则特征（如负面规则、极端长度、主观主题）来探究偏差驱动因素，并测试集成多个评判者的缓解效果。

Result: 1. 在客观规则下（IFEval），当生成器失败时，评判者对自身输出的错误通过率最高可达50%；2. 集成多个评判者有助于减轻但无法完全消除自我偏好偏差；3. 在主观规则下（HealthBench），偏差可使模型得分偏移高达10分，足以影响前沿模型排名；4. 负面规则、极端规则长度和急诊转诊等主观主题特别容易受到偏差影响。

Conclusion: 基于规则的评估中普遍存在自我偏好偏差，即使在客观标准下也无法避免。这种偏差显著影响模型评估和排名，特别是在医疗等关键领域。虽然集成方法能部分缓解问题，但需要更系统的解决方案来确保评估的公平性和准确性。

Abstract: LLM-as-a-judge has become the de facto approach for evaluating LLM outputs. However, judges are known to exhibit self-preference bias (SPB): they tend to favor outputs produced by themselves or by models from their own family. This skews evaluations and, thus, hinders model development, especially in settings of recursive self-improvement. We present the first study of SPB in rubric-based evaluation, an increasingly popular benchmarking paradigm where judges issue binary verdicts on individual evaluation criteria, instead of assigning holistic scores or rankings. Using IFEval, a benchmark with programmatically verifiable rubrics, we show that SPB persists even when evaluation criteria are entirely objective: among rubrics where generators fail, judges can be up to 50\% more likely to incorrectly mark them as satisfied when the output is their own. We also find that, similarly to other evaluation paradigms, ensembling multiple judges helps mitigate SPB, but without fully eliminating it. On HealthBench, a medical chat benchmark with subjective rubrics, we observe that SPB skews model scores by up to 10 points, a potentially decisive margin when ranking frontier models. We analyze the factors that drive SPB in this setting, finding that negative rubrics, extreme rubric lengths, and subjective topics like emergency referrals are particularly susceptible.

</details>


### [245] [The Illusion of Stochasticity in LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06543)
*Xiangming Gu,Soham De,Michalis Titsias,Larisa Markeeva,Petar Veličković,Razvan Pascanu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: LLM作为智能体时存在随机采样能力缺陷，无法可靠地将内部概率估计映射到随机输出


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型作为智能体运行时需要可靠的随机采样能力来模拟从观测数据推断的分布，但现有LLM在这方面存在根本性缺陷

Method: 通过跨多个模型家族、模型规模、提示风格和分布的严格实证分析，评估LLM的随机采样能力

Result: 前沿模型虽然能将提供的随机种子转换为目标分布，但直接从特定分布采样的能力存在根本性缺陷

Conclusion: 可靠的随机采样是LLM作为智能体的基本但尚未满足的要求，需要解决这一关键失败点

Abstract: In this work, we demonstrate that reliable stochastic sampling is a fundamental yet unfulfilled requirement for Large Language Models (LLMs) operating as agents. Agentic systems are frequently required to sample from distributions, often inferred from observed data, a process which needs to be emulated by the LLM. This leads to a distinct failure point: while standard RL agents rely on external sampling mechanisms, LLMs fail to map their internal probability estimates to their stochastic outputs. Through rigorous empirical analysis across multiple model families, model sizes, prompting styles, and distributions, we demonstrate the extent of this failure. Crucially, we show that while powerful frontier models can convert provided random seeds to target distributions, their ability to sample directly from specific distributions is fundamentally flawed.

</details>


### [246] [The AI Skills Shift: Mapping Skill Obsolescence, Emergence, and Transition Pathways in the LLM Era](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06906)
*Rudra Jadhav,Janhavi Danve*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究提出了技能自动化可行性指数(SAFI)，评估了四个前沿LLM在263个文本任务上的表现，发现数学和编程技能自动化可行性最高，而主动倾听和阅读理解最低，并提出了AI影响矩阵框架。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大型语言模型重塑全球劳动力市场，政策制定者和工作者需要关于哪些职业技能最易受自动化影响的实证数据，以指导政策制定和职业规划。

Method: 开发了技能自动化可行性指数(SAFI)，对四个前沿LLM（LLaMA 3.3 70B、Mistral Large、Qwen 2.5 72B、Gemini 2.5 Flash）在263个文本任务上进行基准测试，涵盖美国劳工部O*NET分类中的35项技能。结合Anthropic经济指数的真实AI采用数据，提出了AI影响矩阵框架。

Result: 1. 数学(73.2)和编程(71.8)自动化可行性最高，主动倾听(42.2)和阅读理解(45.5)最低；2. 发现"能力-需求倒置"现象；3. 78.7%的AI交互是增强而非自动化；4. 四个模型在技能表现上高度一致(3.6分差距)，表明文本自动化可行性更多取决于技能而非模型。

Conclusion: 研究提供了技能层面自动化可行性的实证基准，表明AI对劳动力市场的影响主要是增强而非替代，且文本任务的自动化可行性主要由技能特性而非模型差异决定。所有数据、代码和模型响应均已开源。

Abstract: As Large Language Models reshape the global labor market, policymakers and workers need empirical data on which occupational skills may be most susceptible to automation. We present the Skill Automation Feasibility Index (SAFI), benchmarking four frontier LLMs -- LLaMA 3.3 70B, Mistral Large, Qwen 2.5 72B, and Gemini 2.5 Flash -- across 263 text-based tasks spanning all 35 skills in the U.S. Department of Labor's O*NET taxonomy (1,052 total model calls, 0% failure rate). Cross-referencing with real-world AI adoption data from the Anthropic Economic Index (756 occupations, 17,998 tasks), we propose an AI Impact Matrix -- an interpretive framework that positions skills along four quadrants: High Displacement Risk, Upskilling Required, AI-Augmented, and Lower Displacement Risk. Key findings: (1) Mathematics (SAFI: 73.2) and Programming (71.8) receive the highest automation feasibility scores; Active Listening (42.2) and Reading Comprehension (45.5) receive the lowest; (2) a "capability-demand inversion" where skills most demanded in AI-exposed jobs are those LLMs perform least well at in our benchmark; (3) 78.7% of observed AI interactions are augmentation, not automation; (4) all four models converge to similar skill profiles (3.6-point spread), suggesting that text-based automation feasibility may be more skill-dependent than model-dependent. SAFI measures LLM performance on text-based representations of skills, not full occupational execution. All data, code, and model responses are open-sourced.

</details>


### [247] [Do We Need Distinct Representations for Every Speech Token? Unveiling and Exploiting Redundancy in Large Speech Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06871)
*Bajian Xiang,Tingwei Guo,Xuan Chen,Yang Han*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Affinity Pooling方法，通过相似性合并冗余语音token，显著降低大语音语言模型的推理成本，同时保持语义准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语音语言模型通常以高token率运行以确保声学保真度，但这导致序列长度远超实际语义内容，产生过高的推理成本。研究发现深层编码存在极端冗余，为压缩提供了机会。

Method: 通过层间oracle干预揭示冗余层次结构，提出Affinity Pooling——一种无需训练、基于相似性的token合并机制，在输入层和深层策略性地应用以压缩语音表示。

Result: 在三个任务上的评估显示，该方法减少27.48%的预填充FLOPs，同时保持竞争性准确率。实际部署证实显著效率提升：内存节省约1.7倍，长语音的首token生成时间加快约1.1倍。

Conclusion: 研究挑战了完全独立token表示的必要性，为大语音语言模型效率提供了新视角，证明通过智能压缩可以在保持语义信息的同时大幅降低计算成本。

Abstract: Large Speech Language Models (LSLMs) typically operate at high token rates (tokens/s) to ensure acoustic fidelity, yet this results in sequence lengths that far exceed the underlying semantic content, incurring prohibitive inference costs. In this paper, we empirically revisit the necessity of such granular token-level processing. Through layer-wise oracle interventions, we unveil a structured redundancy hierarchy: while shallow layers encode essential acoustic details, deep layers exhibit extreme redundancy, allowing for aggressive compression. Motivated by these findings, we introduce Affinity Pooling, a training-free, similarity-based token merging mechanism. By strategically applying this method at both input and deep layers, we effectively compress speech representations without compromising semantic information. Extensive evaluations across three tasks demonstrate that our approach reduces prefilling FLOPs by 27.48\% while maintaining competitive accuracy. Practical deployment further confirms significant efficiency gains, yielding up to $\sim$1.7$\times$ memory savings and $\sim$1.1$\times$ faster time-to-first-token on long utterances. Our results challenge the necessity of fully distinct token representations, providing new perspectives on LSLM efficiency.

</details>


### [248] [HingeMem: Boundary Guided Long-Term Memory with Query Adaptive Retrieval for Scalable Dialogues](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06845)
*Yijie Zhong,Yunfan Gao,Haofen Wang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: HingeMem提出了一种边界引导的长期记忆系统，基于事件分割理论构建可解释的索引接口，通过边界触发超边来组织人物、时间、地点和话题四个元素，实现自适应检索以减少计算开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有对话系统的长期记忆方法依赖连续摘要或基于OpenIE的图构建，配合固定的Top-k检索，导致跨查询类别的适应性有限且计算开销高。需要一种更高效、自适应且可解释的长期记忆机制。

Method: HingeMem基于事件分割理论，当人物、时间、地点或话题任一元素变化时触发边界，将当前片段写入记忆。构建边界触发的超边索引接口，并引入查询自适应检索机制：1) 确定查询条件下的元素索引记忆路由；2) 基于估计的查询类型控制检索深度。

Result: 在LOCOMO数据集上，从0.6B到生产级模型（如Qwen3-0.6B到Qwen-Flash）的广泛实验中，HingeMem相比强基线实现了约20%的相对改进（无需查询类别指定），同时显著降低计算成本（相比HippoRAG2减少68%的问答token成本）。

Conclusion: HingeMem不仅推进了记忆建模，其自适应检索机制使其特别适合需要高效且可信赖的长期记忆的Web应用，在减少冗余操作和保持显著上下文方面表现出色。

Abstract: Long-term memory is critical for dialogue systems that support continuous, sustainable, and personalized interactions. However, existing methods rely on continuous summarization or OpenIE-based graph construction paired with fixed Top-\textit{k} retrieval, leading to limited adaptability across query categories and high computational overhead. In this paper, we propose HingeMem, a boundary-guided long-term memory that operationalizes event segmentation theory to build an interpretable indexing interface via boundary-triggered hyperedges over four elements: person, time, location, and topic. When any such element changes, HingeMem draws a boundary and writes the current segment, thereby reducing redundant operations and preserving salient context. To enable robust and efficient retrieval under diverse information needs, HingeMem introduces query-adaptive retrieval mechanisms that jointly decide (a) \textit{what to retrieve}: determine the query-conditioned routing over the element-indexed memory; (b) \textit{how much to retrieve}: control the retrieval depth based on the estimated query type. Extensive experiments across LLM scales (from 0.6B to production-tier models; \textit{e.g.}, Qwen3-0.6B to Qwen-Flash) on LOCOMO show that HingeMem achieves approximately $20\%$ relative improvement over strong baselines without query categories specification, while reducing computational cost (68\%$\downarrow$ question answering token cost compared to HippoRAG2). Beyond advancing memory modeling, HingeMem's adaptive retrieval makes it a strong fit for web applications requiring efficient and trustworthy memory over extended interactions.

</details>


### [249] [On the Step Length Confounding in LLM Reasoning Data Selection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06834)
*Bing Wang,Rui Miao,Chen Shen,Shaotian Yan,Kaiyuan Liu,Ximing Li,Xiaosong Yuan,Sinan Fan,Jun Zhang,Jieping Ye*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出ASLEC方法解决LLM推理数据选择中的步长混淆问题，通过丢弃首词概率或因果去偏回归来提升数据选择质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于自然度的数据选择方法在LLM推理数据集上存在步长混淆问题——倾向于选择推理步骤更长而非质量更高的样本，这源于推理步骤中低概率首词的影响。

Method: 提出两种变体方法：ASLEC-DROP在计算平均对数概率时丢弃首词概率；ASLEC-CASL应用因果去偏回归消除首词的混淆效应。

Result: 在四个LLM和五个评估基准上的实验证明，ASLEC方法能有效缓解步长混淆问题，提升数据选择质量。

Conclusion: 步长混淆是LLM推理数据选择中的系统性偏差，ASLEC方法通过处理首词概率问题有效解决了这一挑战，为高质量推理数据集的构建提供了改进方案。

Abstract: Large reasoning models have recently demonstrated strong performance on complex tasks that require long chain-of-thought reasoning, through supervised fine-tuning on large-scale and high-quality datasets. To construct such datasets, existing pipelines generate long reasoning data from more capable Large Language Models (LLMs) and apply manually heuristic or naturalness-based selection methods to filter high-quality samples. Despite the proven effectiveness of naturalness-based data selection, which ranks data by the average log probability assigned by LLMs, our analysis shows that, when applied to LLM reasoning datasets, it systematically prefers samples with longer reasoning steps (i.e., more tokens per step) rather than higher-quality ones, a phenomenon we term step length confounding. Through quantitative analysis, we attribute this phenomenon to low-probability first tokens in reasoning steps; longer steps dilute their influence, thereby inflating the average log probabilities. To address this issue, we propose two variant methods: ASLEC-DROP, which drops first-token probabilities when computing average log probability, and ASLEC-CASL, which applies a causal debiasing regression to remove the first tokens' confounding effect. Experiments across four LLMs and five evaluation benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach in mitigating the step length confounding problem.

</details>


### [250] [WRAP++: Web discoveRy Amplified Pretraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06829)
*Jiang Zhou,Yunhao Wang,Xing Wu,Tinghao Yu,Feng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: WRAP++通过发现网页超链接中的跨文档关系，合成需要跨文档推理的问答对，显著增强LLM预训练中的知识获取能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单文档改写方法局限于文档内部知识，缺乏跨文档关联关系，导致事实知识缺乏关联上下文。需要开发能够发现跨文档关系并合成跨文档推理数据的方法。

Method: WRAP++通过发现网页超链接中的高置信度关系模式（双向链接和共同提及），为每个发现的文档对合成需要跨文档推理的联合问答。这种方法从原始文本中放大数据规模，产生单文档无法提供的关联知识。

Result: 在Wikipedia上，WRAP++将约84亿token的原始文本放大为800亿token的跨文档问答数据。在SimpleQA上，基于OLMo的7B和32B模型使用WRAP++训练后，显著优于单文档方法，并展现出持续的扩展收益。

Conclusion: 跨文档知识发现和放大方法WRAP++通过合成需要跨文档推理的问答数据，有效增强了LLM的知识获取能力，证明了跨文档关系在预训练中的重要性。

Abstract: Synthetic data rephrasing has emerged as a powerful technique for enhancing knowledge acquisition during large language model (LLM) pretraining. However, existing approaches operate at the single-document level, rewriting individual web pages in isolation. This confines synthesized examples to intra-document knowledge, missing cross-document relationships and leaving facts with limited associative context. We propose WRAP++ (Web discoveRy Amplified Pretraining), which amplifies the associative context of factual knowledge by discovering cross-document relationships from web hyperlinks and synthesizing joint QA over each discovered document pair. Concretely, WRAP++ discovers high-confidence relational motifs including dual-links and co-mentions, and synthesizes QA that requires reasoning across both documents. This produces relational knowledge absent from either source document alone, creating diverse entry points to the same facts. Because the number of valid entity pairs grows combinatorially, this discovery-driven synthesis also amplifies data scale far beyond single-document rewriting. Instantiating WRAP++ on Wikipedia, we amplify ~8.4B tokens of raw text into 80B tokens of cross-document QA data. On SimpleQA, OLMo-based models at both 7B and 32B scales trained with WRAP++ substantially outperform single-document approaches and exhibit sustained scaling gains, underscoring the advantage of cross-document knowledge discovery and amplification.

</details>


### [251] [Environmental, Social and Governance Sentiment Analysis on Slovene News: A Novel Dataset and Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06826)
*Paula Dodig,Boshko Koloski,Katarina Sitar Šuštar,Senja Pollak,Matthew Purver*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究创建了首个公开可用的斯洛文尼亚语ESG情感数据集，并开发了多种模型用于自动检测ESG情感，比较了单语、多语、嵌入式和LLM模型的性能，并在案例研究中展示了应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ESG因素对企业绩效和可持续发展评估日益重要，但针对小型公司和新兴市场的可靠ESG评级仍然有限，特别是缺乏斯洛文尼亚语的ESG数据集和分析工具。

Method: 从MaCoCu斯洛文尼亚新闻语料库创建首个公开ESG情感数据集，结合LLM辅助筛选和人工标注公司相关ESG内容。评估了单语模型(SloBERTa)、多语模型(XLM-R)、嵌入分类器(TabPFN)、分层集成架构和大语言模型(LLM)的性能。

Result: LLM在环境(ESG-E)方面表现最佳(Gemma3-27B, F1-macro: 0.61)，在社会(ESG-S)方面表现最佳(gpt-oss 20B, F1-macro: 0.45)，而微调的SloBERTa在治理(ESG-G)分类中表现最好(F1-macro: 0.54)。在案例研究中展示了最佳分类器(gpt-oss)如何用于分析选定公司长期ESG表现。

Conclusion: 该研究提供了首个斯洛文尼亚语ESG情感数据集和有效的自动检测方法，证明了LLM在ESG情感分析中的潜力，为新兴市场和小型公司的ESG评估提供了实用工具。

Abstract: Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) considerations are increasingly integral to assessing corporate performance, reputation, and long-term sustainability. Yet, reliable ESG ratings remain limited for smaller companies and emerging markets. We introduce the first publicly available Slovene ESG sentiment dataset and a suite of models for automatic ESG sentiment detection. The dataset, derived from the MaCoCu Slovene news collection, combines large language model (LLM)-assisted filtering with human annotation of company-related ESG content. We evaluate the performance of monolingual (SloBERTa) and multilingual (XLM-R) models, embedding-based classifiers (TabPFN), hierarchical ensemble architectures, and large language models. Results show that LLMs achieve the strongest performance on Environmental (Gemma3-27B, F1-macro: 0.61) and Social aspects (gpt-oss 20B, F1-macro: 0.45), while fine-tuned SloBERTa is the best model on Governance classification (F1-macro: 0.54). We then show in a small case study how the best-preforming classifier (gpt-oss) can be applied to investigate ESG aspects for selected companies across a long time frame.

</details>


<div id='stat.ML'></div>

# stat.ML [[Back]](#toc)

### [252] [Differentially Private Language Generation and Identification in the Limit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08504)
*Anay Mehrotra,Grigoris Velegkas,Xifan Yu,Felix Zhou*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 研究差分隐私下的极限语言生成与识别，发现隐私对生成无定性影响但有定量代价，对识别则存在根本性障碍，揭示了生成与识别的新差异维度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在差分隐私约束下的极限语言生成与识别问题，探索隐私保护对语言学习能力的影响，特别是在Kleinberg和Mullainathan提出的极限生成模型框架下。

Method: 采用差分隐私算法研究极限语言生成和识别问题。对于生成问题，设计ε-差分隐私算法处理可数语言集合；对于识别问题，分析隐私约束下的理论界限，区分对抗性和随机性设置。

Result: 1. 生成方面：隐私无定性代价但存在定量代价，可数集合可实现ε-差分隐私生成，但有限集合需要Ω(k/ε)样本而非非隐私的1个样本。
2. 识别方面：隐私存在根本性障碍，无法识别具有无限交集和有限集合差异的两个语言集合；在随机性设置下，隐私识别仅当在对抗性模型中可识别时才可能。

Conclusion: 隐私约束揭示了生成与识别的新差异维度，对于识别问题，隐私在对抗性和随机性设置间产生了分离效应，为隐私保护下的语言学习理论提供了新见解。

Abstract: We initiate the study of language generation in the limit, a model recently introduced by Kleinberg and Mullainathan [KM24], under the constraint of differential privacy. We consider the continual release model, where a generator must eventually output a stream of valid strings while protecting the privacy of the entire input sequence. Our first main result is that for countable collections of languages, privacy comes at no qualitative cost: we provide an $\varepsilon$-differentially-private algorithm that generates in the limit from any countable collection. This stands in contrast to many learning settings where privacy renders learnability impossible. However, privacy does impose a quantitative cost: there are finite collections of size $k$ for which uniform private generation requires $Ω(k/\varepsilon)$ samples, whereas just one sample suffices non-privately.
  We then turn to the harder problem of language identification in the limit. Here, we show that privacy creates fundamental barriers. We prove that no $\varepsilon$-DP algorithm can identify a collection containing two languages with an infinite intersection and a finite set difference, a condition far stronger than the classical non-private characterization of identification. Next, we turn to the stochastic setting where the sample strings are sampled i.i.d. from a distribution (instead of being generated by an adversary). Here, we show that private identification is possible if and only if the collection is identifiable in the adversarial model. Together, our results establish new dimensions along which generation and identification differ and, for identification, a separation between adversarial and stochastic settings induced by privacy constraints.

</details>


### [253] [Intensity Dot Product Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07810)
*Giulio Valentino Dalla Riva,Matteo Dalla Riva*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出Intensity Dot Product Graphs (IDPGs)模型，将随机点积图(RDPG)的固定潜在位置替换为欧几里得潜在空间上的泊松点过程，从而获得随机节点数量的图模型，同时保持点积亲和性的几何可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统潜在位置随机图模型通常将节点集视为固定，而graphon和随机测度构造虽然允许更多随机性，但牺牲了几何可解释性。需要一种既能处理随机节点数量，又能保持RDPG式点积亲和性几何解释的模型。

Method: 引入Intensity Dot Product Graphs (IDPGs)，用欧几里得潜在空间上的泊松点过程替代RDPG中的固定潜在位置集合。定义热图和期望算子作为概率矩阵的连续类比，建立谱一致性结果连接邻接矩阵奇异值与算子谱，并与graphon和digraphon表示进行比较。

Result: IDPGs提供了具有随机节点数量的图模型，保持了RDPG式点积亲和性的几何可解释性。证明了谱一致性结果，展示了经典RDPG如何在集中极限中出现。模型通过演化强度参数化，自然地支持通过偏微分方程进行时间扩展。

Conclusion: IDPGs模型成功地将RDPG扩展到随机节点数量的情况，同时保持了潜在空间的几何可解释性。该模型为图数据分析提供了更灵活的框架，特别适用于节点数量变化的场景，并为时间演化图模型提供了自然的扩展途径。

Abstract: Latent-position random graph models usually treat the node set as fixed once the sample size is chosen, while graphon-based and random-measure constructions allow more randomness at the cost of weaker geometric interpretability. We introduce \emph{Intensity Dot Product Graphs} (IDPGs), which extend Random Dot Product Graphs by replacing a fixed collection of latent positions with a Poisson point process on a Euclidean latent space. This yields a model with random node populations, RDPG-style dot-product affinities, and a population-level intensity that links continuous latent structure to finite observed graphs. We define the heat map and the desire operator as continuous analogues of the probability matrix, prove a spectral consistency result connecting adjacency singular values to the operator spectrum, compare the construction with graphon and digraphon representations, and show how classical RDPGs arise in a concentrated limit. Because the model is parameterized by an evolving intensity, temporal extensions through partial differential equations arise naturally.

</details>


### [254] [Order-Optimal Sequential 1-Bit Mean Estimation in General Tail Regimes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07796)
*Ivan Lau,Jonathan Scarlett*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出一种基于随机阈值查询的自适应均值估计器，在1比特通信约束下实现最优样本复杂度，适用于具有有界k阶中心矩的分布，并揭示了自适应与非自适应方法之间的显著性能差距。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在严格的1比特通信约束下的均值估计问题，旨在设计能够在有限比特通信下实现最优样本复杂度的自适应估计器，并探索1比特量化的基本极限。

Method: 提出基于随机阈值查询的自适应均值估计器，通过顺序选择的阈值进行1比特查询（指示样本是否超过阈值），适用于具有有界均值μ∈[-λ, λ]和有界k阶中心矩的分布。

Result: 对于k≠2，样本复杂度匹配未量化极小极大下界加上不可避免的O(log(λ/σ))定位成本；对于k=2，样本复杂度有额外的O(log(σ/ε))乘法惩罚，且证明这是1比特量化的基本极限。同时揭示了显著的自适应性差距：非自适应估计器的样本复杂度必须随搜索空间参数λ/σ线性增长。

Conclusion: 提出的自适应1比特均值估计器在多种尾部分布下实现最优样本复杂度，揭示了1比特量化的基本极限和自适应方法的显著优势，并提供了处理未知采样预算、未知尺度参数和有限自适应阶段的算法变体。

Abstract: In this paper, we study the problem of mean estimation under strict 1-bit communication constraints. We propose a novel adaptive mean estimator based solely on randomized threshold queries, where each 1-bit outcome indicates whether a given sample exceeds a sequentially chosen threshold. Our estimator is $(ε, δ)$-PAC for any distribution with a bounded mean $μ\in [-λ, λ]$ and a bounded $k$-th central moment $\mathbb{E}[|X-μ|^k] \le σ^k$ for any fixed $k > 1$. Crucially, our sample complexity is order-optimal in all such tail regimes, i.e., for every such $k$ value. For $k \neq 2$, our estimator's sample complexity matches the unquantized minimax lower bounds plus an unavoidable $O(\log(λ/σ))$ localization cost. For the finite-variance case ($k=2$), our estimator's sample complexity has an extra multiplicative $O(\log(σ/ε))$ penalty, and we establish a novel information-theoretic lower bound showing that this penalty is a fundamental limit of 1-bit quantization. We also establish a significant adaptivity gap: for both threshold queries and more general interval queries, the sample complexity of any non-adaptive estimator must scale linearly with the search space parameter $λ/σ$, rendering it vastly less sample efficient than our adaptive approach. Finally, we present algorithmic variants that (i) handle an unknown sampling budget, (ii) adapt to an unknown scale parameter~$σ$ given (possibly loose) bounds, and (iii) require only two stages of adaptivity at the expense of more complicated general 1-bit queries.

</details>


### [255] [Sparse $ε$ insensitive zone bounded asymmetric elastic net support vector machines for pattern classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07748)
*Haiyan Du,Hu Yang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出了一种结合弹性网损失和鲁棒损失框架的稀疏ε不敏感有界非对称弹性网损失，并基于此构建了ε-BAEN-SVM模型，该模型同时具备稀疏性和鲁棒性，在噪声环境下表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SVM模型对噪声敏感且缺乏稀疏性，这限制了其性能。为了解决这些问题，需要开发一种既稀疏又鲁棒的SVM变体。

Method: 结合弹性网损失与鲁棒损失框架，构建稀疏ε不敏感有界非对称弹性网损失，并集成到SVM中形成ε-BAEN-SVM。使用基于裁剪对偶坐标下降的半二次算法求解非凸优化问题，将问题转化为一系列加权子问题，通过ε参数提高计算效率。

Result: ε-BAEN-SVM在模拟和真实数据集上优于传统和现有鲁棒SVM。模型在噪声环境下良好平衡了稀疏性和鲁棒性，统计测试证实了其优越性。在高斯核下，实现了更好的准确性和噪声不敏感性。

Conclusion: 提出的ε-BAEN-SVM模型有效解决了传统SVM对噪声敏感和缺乏稀疏性的问题，在理论和实验上都验证了其有效性，具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Existing support vector machines(SVM) models are sensitive to noise and lack sparsity, which limits their performance. To address these issues, we combine the elastic net loss with a robust loss framework to construct a sparse $\varepsilon$-insensitive bounded asymmetric elastic net loss, and integrate it with SVM to build $\varepsilon$ Insensitive Zone Bounded Asymmetric Elastic Net Loss-based SVM($\varepsilon$-BAEN-SVM). $\varepsilon$-BAEN-SVM is both sparse and robust. Sparsity is proven by showing that samples inside the $\varepsilon$-insensitive band are not support vectors. Robustness is theoretically guaranteed because the influence function is bounded. To solve the non-convex optimization problem, we design a half-quadratic algorithm based on clipping dual coordinate descent. It transforms the problem into a series of weighted subproblems, improving computational efficiency via the $\varepsilon$ parameter. Experiments on simulated and real datasets show that $\varepsilon$-BAEN-SVM outperforms traditional and existing robust SVMs. It balances sparsity and robustness well in noisy environments. Statistical tests confirm its superiority. Under the Gaussian kernel, it achieves better accuracy and noise insensitivity, validating its effectiveness and practical value.

</details>


### [256] [The Condition-Number Principle for Prototype Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07744)
*Romano Li,Jianfei Cao*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文建立了几何框架，将原型聚类的目标精度与结构恢复联系起来，定义了聚类条件数，证明当该数较小时，目标值小的解必然具有小的误分类误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究原型聚类中目标函数精度与聚类结构恢复之间的关系，提供理论框架来解释低目标值何时能可靠地反映有意义的聚类结构。

Method: 开发算法无关的几何框架，定义聚类条件数（比较簇内尺度与跨越簇边界所需的最小损失增加），分析可容许损失函数类，建立确定性非渐近保证。

Result: 当聚类条件数较小时，任何具有小子最优性间隙的解相对于基准划分的误分类误差也小；误差集中在簇边界附近；在加强的局部边界条件下，足够深的簇核心能被精确恢复。

Conclusion: 该框架为解释低目标值作为有意义的聚类结构的可靠证据提供了几何原理，分离了算法精度与实例内在几何难度的作用，揭示了鲁棒性与对簇不平衡敏感性的基本权衡。

Abstract: We develop a geometric framework that links objective accuracy to structural recovery in prototype-based clustering. The analysis is algorithm-agnostic and applies to a broad class of admissible loss functions. We define a clustering condition number that compares within-cluster scale to the minimum loss increase required to move a point across a cluster boundary. When this quantity is small, any solution with a small suboptimality gap must also have a small misclassification error relative to a benchmark partition. The framework also clarifies a fundamental trade-off between robustness and sensitivity to cluster imbalance, leading to sharp phase transitions for exact recovery under different objectives. The guarantees are deterministic and non-asymptotic, and they separate the role of algorithmic accuracy from the intrinsic geometric difficulty of the instance. We further show that errors concentrate near cluster boundaries and that sufficiently deep cluster cores are recovered exactly under strengthened local margins. Together, these results provide a geometric principle for interpreting low objective values as reliable evidence of meaningful clustering structure.

</details>


### [257] [On the Unique Recovery of Transport Maps and Vector Fields from Finite Measure-Valued Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07671)
*Jonah Botvinick-Greenhouse,Yunan Yang*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 该论文建立了从有限测度值数据中唯一恢复向量场和传输映射的理论保证，为生成模型、数据驱动动力系统和PDE反问题提供了新见解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究如何从有限的推前密度数据中唯一确定微分同胚映射，以及从有限的加权散度观测中唯一确定向量场，这对于理解生成模型、数据驱动动力系统和PDE反问题的可辨识性至关重要。

Method: 利用Whitney和Takens嵌入定理，分析微分同胚通过其推前作用在有限个密度上的可辨识性条件，并引入新的度量来比较微分同胚。在无穷小设置中，研究通过密度沿光滑向量场的导数观测来确定向量场。

Result: 建立了微分同胚从有限推前密度数据中唯一可辨识的一般条件，并给出了所需密度数量m的估计（仅依赖于问题的内在维度）。证明了向量场从有限加权散度观测中唯一可辨识的类似结果。

Conclusion: 该研究为生成模型、数据驱动动力系统和PDE反问题提供了新的理论保证，通过Perron-Frobenius和Koopman算子框架解释结果，并展示了数值实验验证理论。

Abstract: We establish guarantees for the unique recovery of vector fields and transport maps from finite measure-valued data, yielding new insights into generative models, data-driven dynamical systems, and PDE inverse problems. In particular, we provide general conditions under which a diffeomorphism can be uniquely identified from its pushforward action on finitely many densities, i.e., when the data $\{(ρ_j,f_\#ρ_j)\}_{j=1}^m$ uniquely determines $f$. As a corollary, we introduce a new metric which compares diffeomorphisms by measuring the discrepancy between finitely many pushforward densities in the space of probability measures. We also prove analogous results in an infinitesimal setting, where derivatives of the densities along a smooth vector field are observed, i.e., when $\{(ρ_j,\text{div} (ρ_j v))\}_{j=1}^m$ uniquely determines $v$. Our analysis makes use of the Whitney and Takens embedding theorems, which provide estimates on the required number of densities $m$, depending only on the intrinsic dimension of the problem. We additionally interpret our results through the lens of Perron--Frobenius and Koopman operators and demonstrate how our techniques lead to new guarantees for the well-posedness of certain PDE inverse problems related to continuity, advection, Fokker--Planck, and advection-diffusion-reaction equations. Finally, we present illustrative numerical experiments demonstrating the unique identification of transport maps from finitely many pushforward densities, and of vector fields from finitely many weighted divergence observations.

</details>


### [258] [Variational Approximated Restricted Maximum Likelihood Estimation for Spatial Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07635)
*Debjoy Thakur*

Main category: stat.ML

TL;DR: 提出VREML框架，通过变分近似解决空间数据高斯ICAR模型的可扩展推断问题，相比传统REML方法计算效率更高且无近似误差


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统REML方法需要反复对大稀疏精度矩阵进行求逆和分解，计算成本高昂，限制了空间数据高斯ICAR模型的可扩展推断

Method: 提出变分限制最大似然(VREML)框架，使用高斯变分分布近似难处理的边际似然，通过构建限制似然的证据下界(ELBO)，开发计算高效的坐标上升算法联合估计空间随机效应和方差分量

Result: 理论上证明了ELBO的单调收敛性，并数学上展示了在高斯ICAR设置下变分族是精确的，表明后验层面近似误差为零；实证上VREML优于MLE和INLA方法
