The proposed approach is structured in three progressive and interconnected stages. First, we introduce a real-time LfD method that learns both the trajectory and variable impedance from a single demonstration, significantly improving efficiency and reproduction fidelity. To ensure high-quality and intuitive {kinesthetic teaching}, we then present a null-space optimization strategy that proactively manages singularities and provides a consistent interaction feel during human demonstration. Finally, to ensure generalized safety, we introduce a foundational null-space compliance method that enables the entire robot body to compliantly adapt to post-learning external interactions without compromising main task performance. This final contribution transforms the system into a versatile HRI platform, moving beyond end-effector (EE)-specific applications. We validate the complete framework through comprehensive comparative experiments on a 7-DOF KUKA LWR robot. The results demonstrate a safer, more intuitive, and more efficient unified system for a wide range of human-robot collaborative tasks.

</details>


### [332] [EMMa: End-Effector Stability-Oriented Mobile Manipulation for Tracked Rescue Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08292)
*Yifei Wang,Hao Zhang,Jidong Huang,Shuohang Fang,Haoyao Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出用于履带式移动机械臂的协调运动生成框架，通过耦合末端执行器与移动基座状态的路径优化模型和隔离控制方案，在救援任务中实现稳定的末端执行器操作。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究在规划和控制层面忽视了末端执行器的多种运动特性，而救援任务中的自主操作不仅需要确保机器人运动的可达性和安全性，还要在不同任务需求下保持稳定的末端执行器操作。

Method: 1) 构建协调路径优化模型，耦合末端执行器与移动基座状态，设计紧凑的成本/约束表示以减轻非线性并降低计算复杂度；2) 开发具有前馈补偿和反馈调节的隔离控制方案，实现机器人的协调路径跟踪。

Result: 在救援场景的大量仿真和真实世界实验中，所提框架在任务成功率和末端执行器运动稳定性等关键指标上持续优于最先进方法，验证了其在复杂移动操作任务中的有效性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 该框架通过协调路径优化和隔离控制，显著提升了履带式移动机械臂在复杂救援场景中的末端执行器操作稳定性，为自主救援机器人提供了有效的运动生成解决方案。

Abstract: The autonomous operation of tracked mobile manipulators in rescue missions requires not only ensuring the reachability and safety of robot motion but also maintaining stable end-effector manipulation under diverse task demands. However, existing studies have overlooked many end-effector motion properties at both the planning and control levels. This paper presents a motion generation framework for tracked mobile manipulators to achieve stable end-effector operation in complex rescue scenarios. The framework formulates a coordinated path optimization model that couples end-effector and mobile base states and designs compact cost/constraint representations to mitigate nonlinearities and reduce computational complexity. Furthermore, an isolated control scheme with feedforward compensation and feedback regulation is developed to enable coordinated path tracking for the robot. Extensive simulated and real-world experiments on rescue scenarios demonstrate that the proposed framework consistently outperforms SOTA methods across key metrics, including task success rate and end-effector motion stability, validating its effectiveness and robustness in complex mobile manipulation tasks.

</details>


### [333] [EvoGymCM: Harnessing Continuous Material Stiffness for Soft Robot Co-Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08258)
*Le Shen,Kangyao Huang,Wentao Zhao,Huaping Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: EvoGymCM：一个软体机器人协同设计基准套件，将连续材料刚度作为与形态和控制并列的一类设计变量，包含反应性和不变性两种材料设置，通过两种协同设计范式显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有软体机器人协同设计平台（如EvoGym）将材料维度严格离散化，人为限制了设计空间和性能。需要建立连续材料刚度作为一类设计变量的基准，以充分释放软体机器人的物理潜力。

Method: 提出EvoGymCM基准套件，包含两种设置：EvoGymCM-R（反应性材料，受可编程材料启发）和EvoGymCM-I（不变性材料，受传统材料启发）。针对高维耦合问题，提出两种形态-材料-控制协同设计范式：反应性材料协同设计（学习实时刚度调节策略）和不变性材料协同设计（联合优化形态和固定材料场）。

Result: 系统实验表明，连续材料优化能显著提升性能，并在形态、材料和控制之间实现协同效应。两种协同设计范式在不同任务中均表现出优越性。

Conclusion: 连续材料刚度作为一类设计变量对于软体机器人协同设计至关重要。EvoGymCM基准套件为材料感知的软体机器人设计提供了标准化评估框架，两种协同设计范式为可编程材料和传统材料的应用提供了有效指导。

Abstract: In the automated co-design of soft robots, precisely adapting the material stiffness field to task environments is crucial for unlocking their full physical potential. However, mainstream platforms (e.g., EvoGym) strictly discretize the material dimension, artificially restricting the design space and performance of soft robots. To address this, we propose EvoGymCM (EvoGym with Continuous Materials), a benchmark suite formally establishing continuous material stiffness as a first-class design variable alongside morphology and control. Aligning with real-world material mechanisms, EvoGymCM introduces two settings: (i) EvoGymCM-R (Reactive), motivated by programmable materials with dynamically tunable stiffness; and (ii) EvoGymCM-I (Invariant), motivated by traditional materials with invariant stiffness fields. To tackle the resulting high-dimensional coupling, we formulate two Morphology-Material-Control co-design paradigms: (i) Reactive-Material Co-Design, which learns real-time stiffness tuning policies to guide programmable materials; and (ii) Invariant-Material Co-Design, which jointly optimizes morphology and fixed material fields to guide traditional material fabrication. Systematic experiments across diverse tasks demonstrate that continuous material optimization boosts performance and unlocks synergy across morphology, material, and control.

</details>


### [334] [Open-Ended Instruction Realization with LLM-Enabled Multi-Planner Scheduling in Autonomous Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08031)
*Jiawei Liu,Xun Gong,Fen Fang,Muli Yang,Bohao Qu,Yunfeng Hu,Hong Chen,Xulei Yang,Qing Guo*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种基于大语言模型的自动驾驶指令实现框架，通过生成可执行脚本来调度多个基于模型预测控制的运动规划器，将乘客的开放式自然语言指令转化为车辆控制信号。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前人机交互研究忽视了自动驾驶中乘客的操控需求。自然语言提供了直观界面，但将开放式指令转化为控制信号同时保持可解释性和可追溯性仍具挑战。

Method: 提出指令实现框架：1) 使用LLM解释指令；2) 生成可执行脚本调度多个基于MPC的运动规划器；3) 将规划轨迹转化为控制信号。采用调度中心设计，在不同时间尺度上解耦语义推理和车辆控制。

Result: 框架显著提高了任务完成率，降低了LLM查询成本，在安全性和合规性方面与专业AD方法相当，并对LLM推理延迟表现出较大容忍度。研究还引入了闭环设置下的开放式指令实现基准。

Conclusion: 该框架建立了从高级指令到低级动作的透明、可追溯决策链，为自动驾驶中基于自然语言的乘客操控需求提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Most Human-Machine Interaction (HMI) research overlooks the maneuvering needs of passengers in autonomous driving (AD). Natural language offers an intuitive interface, yet translating passenger open-ended instructions into control signals, without sacrificing interpretability and traceability, remains a challenge. This study proposes an instruction-realization framework that leverages a large language model (LLM) to interpret instructions, generates executable scripts that schedule multiple model predictive control (MPC)-based motion planners based on real-time feedback, and converts planned trajectories into control signals. This scheduling-centric design decouples semantic reasoning from vehicle control at different timescales, establishing a transparent, traceable decision-making chain from high-level instructions to low-level actions. Due to the absence of high-fidelity evaluation tools, this study introduces a benchmark for open-ended instruction realization in a closed-loop setting. Comprehensive experiments reveal that the framework significantly improves task-completion rates over instruction-realization baselines, reduces LLM query costs, achieves safety and compliance on par with specialized AD approaches, and exhibits considerable tolerance to LLM inference latency. For more qualitative illustrations and a clearer understanding.

</details>


### [335] [State and Trajectory Estimation of Tensegrity Robots via Factor Graphs and Chebyshev Polynomials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08185)
*Edgar Granados,Patrick Meng,Charles Tang,Shrimed Sangani,William R. Johnson,Rebecca Kramer-Bottiglio,Kostas Bekris*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于因子图的两阶段方法，用于缆索驱动张拉整体机器人的鲁棒状态/轨迹估计，融合RGB-D相机和缆长传感器数据


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 张拉整体机器人具有柔顺性和适应性，但其非线性、欠约束动力学使状态估计具有挑战性。可靠的连续时间全刚体链路估计对闭环控制、系统辨识和机器学习至关重要，而传统方法往往不足

Method: 提出两阶段方法：1) 在线状态估计采用基于因子图的方法，融合RGB-D相机和缆长传感器测量；2) 使用马氏距离聚类算法处理噪声，切比雪夫多项式方法估计最可能速度和中间状态

Result: 与基于ICP的算法相比，该方法在仿真和真实数据上表现良好，为复杂张拉整体机器人运动提供高保真度、连续时间状态和轨迹估计

Conclusion: 因子图方法首次应用于该领域，利用机器人结构特性并提供有效的传感器融合解决方案，能够处理实际非线性问题

Abstract: Tensegrity robots offer compliance and adaptability, but their nonlinear, and underconstrained dynamics make state estimation challenging. Reliable continuous-time estimation of all rigid links is crucial for closed-loop control, system identification, and machine learning; however, conventional methods often fall short. This paper proposes a two-stage approach for robust state or trajectory estimation (i.e., filtering or smoothing) of a cable-driven tensegrity robot. For online state estimation, this work introduces a factor-graph-based method, which fuses measurements from an RGB-D camera with on-board cable length sensors. To the best of the authors' knowledge, this is the first application of factor graphs in this domain. Factor graphs are a natural choice, as they exploit the robot's structural properties and provide effective sensor fusion solutions capable of handling nonlinearities in practice. Both the Mahalanobis distance-based clustering algorithm, used to handle noise, and the Chebyshev polynomial method, used to estimate the most probable velocities and intermediate states, are shown to perform well on simulated and real-world data, compared to an ICP-based algorithm. Results show that the approach provides high fidelity, continuous-time state and trajectory estimates for complex tensegrity robot motions.

</details>


### [336] [ViVa: A Video-Generative Value Model for Robot Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08168)
*Jindi Lv,Hao Li,Jie Li,Yifei Nie,Fankun Kong,Yang Wang,Xiaofeng Wang,Zheng Zhu,Chaojun Ni,Qiuping Deng,Hengtao Li,Jiancheng Lv,Guan Huang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ViVa是一个视频生成价值模型，通过重新利用预训练视频生成器进行价值估计，结合当前观测和机器人本体感知预测未来本体感知和当前状态标量值，在真实世界机器人操作任务中显著提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于视觉语言模型（VLM）的价值模型难以捕捉时间动态，在长视野任务中价值估计不可靠。视觉语言动作（VLA）模型虽然通过大规模预训练推进了机器人操作，但在部分可观测性和延迟反馈的现实部署中仍面临挑战。

Method: 提出ViVa模型，重新利用预训练视频生成器进行价值估计。模型以当前观测和机器人本体感知为输入，联合预测未来本体感知和当前状态的标量价值。通过利用预训练视频生成器的时空先验，将价值估计建立在预期的具身动态基础上。

Result: 在真实世界盒子组装任务中，ViVa集成到RECAP框架后带来显著改进。所有三个任务的定性分析证实ViVa产生更可靠的价值信号，准确反映任务进展。模型还能泛化到新物体，展示了视频生成模型在价值估计中的潜力。

Conclusion: ViVa通过利用视频语料库的时空先验，将价值估计与前瞻性预测相结合，超越了静态快照方法。视频生成模型为价值估计提供了有前景的方向，特别是在需要处理时间动态和部分可观测性的真实世界机器人操作任务中。

Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have advanced robot manipulation through large-scale pretraining, but real-world deployment remains challenging due to partial observability and delayed feedback. Reinforcement learning addresses this via value functions, which assess task progress and guide policy improvement. However, existing value models built on vision-language models (VLMs) struggle to capture temporal dynamics, undermining reliable value estimation in long-horizon tasks. In this paper, we propose ViVa, a video-generative value model that repurposes a pretrained video generator for value estimation. Taking the current observation and robot proprioception as input, ViVa jointly predicts future proprioception and a scalar value for the current state. By leveraging the spatiotemporal priors of a pretrained video generator, our approach grounds value estimation in anticipated embodiment dynamics, moving beyond static snapshots to intrinsically couple value with foresight. Integrated into RECAP, ViVa delivers substantial improvements on real-world box assembly. Qualitative analysis across all three tasks confirms that ViVa produces more reliable value signals, accurately reflecting task progress. By leveraging spatiotemporal priors from video corpora, ViVa also generalizes to novel objects, highlighting the promise of video-generative models for value estimation.

</details>


### [337] [AgiPIX: Bridging Simulation and Reality in Indoor Aerial Inspection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08009)
*Sasanka Kuruppu Arachchige,Juan Jose Garcia,Changda Tian,Lauri Suomela,Panos Trahanias,Adriana Tapus,Joni-Kristian Kämäräinen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Agipix是一个开源硬件软件协同设计平台，用于室内自主飞行和关键资产检查，具备紧凑的主动感知、硬件同步、GPU加速计算能力，支持容器化ROS 2模块化自主堆栈和逼真数字孪生，实现仿真与真实飞行的零样本迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 室内自主飞行和关键资产检查在感知、规划、控制和学习方面面临根本性挑战，目前缺乏一个紧凑、主动感知、开源且能在仿真和真实世界操作中复现的平台。

Method: 设计了紧凑的硬件同步主动感知平台，配备板载GPU加速计算能力；开发了容器化ROS 2模块化自主堆栈；创建了硬件平台的逼真数字孪生和可靠用户界面；支持容器化自主组件在仿真和真实飞行之间的零样本迁移。

Result: 在工业室内环境中展示了使用板载传感器的轨迹跟踪和探索性能；所有硬件设计、仿真资产和容器化软件均已开源发布并附带文档。

Conclusion: Agipix平台填补了室内自主飞行领域缺乏紧凑、主动感知、开源且可复现平台的空白，通过硬件软件协同设计和数字孪生技术实现了仿真与真实操作的快速迭代。

Abstract: Autonomous indoor flight for critical asset inspection presents fundamental challenges in perception, planning, control, and learning. Despite rapid progress, there is still a lack of a compact, active-sensing, open-source platform that is reproducible across simulation and real-world operation. To address this gap, we present Agipix, a co-designed open hardware and software platform for indoor aerial autonomy and critical asset inspection. Agipix features a compact, hardware-synchronized active-sensing platform with onboard GPU-accelerated compute that is capable of agile flight; a containerized ROS~2-based modular autonomy stack; and a photorealistic digital twin of the hardware platform together with a reliable UI. These elements enable rapid iteration via zero-shot transfer of containerized autonomy components between simulation and real flights. We demonstrate trajectory tracking and exploration performance using onboard sensing in industrial indoor environments. All hardware designs, simulation assets, and containerized software are released openly together with documentation.

</details>


### [338] [HEX: Humanoid-Aligned Experts for Cross-Embodiment Whole-Body Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07993)
*Shuanghao Bai,Meng Li,Xinyuan Lv,Jiawei Wang,Xinhua Wang,Fei Liao,Chengkai Hou,Langzhe Gu,Wanqi Zhou,Kun Wu,Ziluo Ding,Zhiyuan Xu,Lei Sun,Shanghang Zhang,Zhengping Che,Jian Tang,Badong Chen*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: HEX是一个面向双足人形机器人的状态中心化协调操作框架，通过统一状态表示、专家混合本体感知预测器和轻量历史标记实现高效的全身体协调控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-语言-动作模型通常独立处理机器人身体部位，缺乏全身协调控制，导致高自由度人形机器人控制困难且不稳定。人类通过协调全身控制实现复杂操作，需要开发能够模拟这种协调性的框架。

Method: 1) 引入人形对齐的通用状态表示，支持异构具身的可扩展学习；2) 采用专家混合统一本体感知预测器，从大规模多具身轨迹数据建模全身协调和时序运动动态；3) 使用轻量历史标记总结过去观察，避免推理时重复编码历史图像；4) 采用残差门控融合机制和流匹配动作头，自适应整合视觉-语言线索与本体感知动态生成动作。

Result: 在真实世界人形机器人操作任务中，HEX在任务成功率和泛化能力方面达到最先进性能，特别是在快速反应和长时域场景中表现优异。

Conclusion: HEX通过状态中心化框架、统一状态表示和协调建模机制，成功解决了高自由度人形机器人协调控制难题，为复杂机器人操作提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Humans achieve complex manipulation through coordinated whole-body control, whereas most Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models treat robot body parts largely independently, making high-DoF humanoid control challenging and often unstable. We present HEX, a state-centric framework for coordinated manipulation on full-sized bipedal humanoid robots. HEX introduces a humanoid-aligned universal state representation for scalable learning across heterogeneous embodiments, and incorporates a Mixture-of-Experts Unified Proprioceptive Predictor to model whole-body coordination and temporal motion dynamics from large-scale multi-embodiment trajectory data. To efficiently capture temporal visual context, HEX uses lightweight history tokens to summarize past observations, avoiding repeated encoding of historical images during inference. It further employs a residual-gated fusion mechanism with a flow-matching action head to adaptively integrate visual-language cues with proprioceptive dynamics for action generation. Experiments on real-world humanoid manipulation tasks show that HEX achieves state-of-the-art performance in task success rate and generalization, particularly in fast-reaction and long-horizon scenarios.

</details>


### [339] [Incremental Residual Reinforcement Learning Toward Real-World Learning for Social Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07945)
*Haruto Nagahisa,Kohei Matsumoto,Yuki Tomita,Yuki Hyodo,Ryo Kurazume*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出IRRL方法，结合增量学习和残差强化学习，解决移动机器人社会导航中计算资源受限和学习效率问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 移动机器人需求增长，社会导航成为关键任务。由于行人动态和社会规范在不同地区差异很大，仿真难以涵盖所有真实场景。真实世界RL直接在物理环境中学习是可行方案，但面临边缘设备计算资源受限和学习效率的挑战

Method: 提出增量残差强化学习（IRRL），整合增量学习（轻量级过程，无需回放缓冲区或批量更新）和残差强化学习（仅训练相对于基础策略的残差，提高学习效率）

Result: 仿真实验显示，尽管缺乏回放缓冲区，IRRL性能与基于回放缓冲区的传统方法相当，并优于现有增量学习方法。真实世界实验证实IRRL能使机器人通过真实世界学习有效适应未见环境

Conclusion: IRRL方法成功解决了移动机器人社会导航中真实世界RL面临的计算资源受限和学习效率问题，为机器人适应不同地区的社会规范提供了有效解决方案

Abstract: As the demand for mobile robots continues to increase, social navigation has emerged as a critical task, driving active research into deep reinforcement learning (RL) approaches. However, because pedestrian dynamics and social conventions vary widely across different regions, simulations cannot easily encompass all possible real-world scenarios. Real-world RL, in which agents learn while operating directly in physical environments, presents a promising solution to this issue. Nevertheless, this approach faces significant challenges, particularly regarding constrained computational resources on edge devices and learning efficiency. In this study, we propose incremental residual RL (IRRL). This method integrates incremental learning, which is a lightweight process that operates without a replay buffer or batch updates, with residual RL, which enhances learning efficiency by training only on the residuals relative to a base policy. Through the simulation experiments, we demonstrated that, despite lacking a replay buffer, IRRL achieved performance comparable to those of conventional replay buffer-based methods and outperformed existing incremental learning approaches. Furthermore, the real-world experiments confirmed that IRRL can enable robots to effectively adapt to previously unseen environments through the real-world learning.

</details>


### [340] [On-Policy Distillation of Language Models for Autonomous Vehicle Motion Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07944)
*Amirhossein Afsharrad,Amirhesam Abedsoltan,Ahmadreza Moradipari,Sanjay Lall*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于广义知识蒸馏（GKD）的方法，将大型语言模型在自动驾驶运动规划中的知识迁移到更小的学生模型中，实现了在模型规模减少5倍的情况下接近教师模型性能的效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在自动驾驶运动规划中展现出潜力，但将其部署到资源受限的车载系统中存在挑战。需要将大型教师LLM的运动规划知识有效迁移到更小、更易部署的学生模型中。

Method: 基于GPT-Driver框架，将驾驶场景表示为语言提示，通过思维链推理生成轨迹点。研究了两种学生训练范式：1）基于策略的广义知识蒸馏（GKD），使用教师模型的密集token级反馈训练学生模型自身生成的输出；2）密集反馈强化学习基线，使用教师模型的log概率作为策略梯度框架中的每token奖励信号。

Result: 在nuScenes基准测试中，GKD方法显著优于RL基线，在模型规模减少5倍的情况下，性能接近教师模型水平。

Conclusion: 基于策略的知识蒸馏是一种原则性且有效的方法，可用于在自动驾驶系统中部署基于LLM的规划器，平衡了模型性能和部署效率。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently demonstrated strong potential for autonomous vehicle motion planning by reformulating trajectory prediction as a language generation problem. However, deploying capable LLMs in resource-constrained onboard systems remains a fundamental challenge. In this paper, we study how to effectively transfer motion planning knowledge from a large teacher LLM to a smaller, more deployable student model. We build on the GPT-Driver framework, which represents driving scenes as language prompts and generates waypoint trajectories with chain-of-thought reasoning, and investigate two student training paradigms: (i) on-policy generalized knowledge distillation (GKD), which trains the student on its own self-generated outputs using dense token-level feedback from the teacher, and (ii) a dense-feedback reinforcement learning (RL) baseline that uses the teacher's log-probabilities as per-token reward signals in a policy gradient framework. Experiments on the nuScenes benchmark show that GKD substantially outperforms the RL baseline and closely approaches teacher-level performance despite a 5$\times$ reduction in model size. These results highlight the practical value of on-policy distillation as a principled and effective approach to deploying LLM-based planners in autonomous driving systems.

</details>


### [341] [RAGE-XY: RADAR-Aided Longitudinal and Lateral Forces Estimation For Autonomous Race Cars](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07939)
*Davide Malvezzi,Nicola Musiu,Eugenio Mascaro,Francesco Iacovacci,Marko Bertogna*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RAGE-XY扩展了RAGE实时估计框架，通过在线RADAR校准和三轮车模型改进车辆动力学估计，能同时估计车速、轮胎侧偏角和车辆受力


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 改进原始RAGE框架，解决传感器未对准导致的横向速度估计不准确问题，并扩展车辆模型以同时估计纵向和横向动力学

Method: 1. 集成在线RADAR校准模块以补偿传感器未对准；2. 将基础车辆模型从单轨近似扩展为三轮车模型；3. 仅使用标准车载传感器（IMU和RADAR）进行实时估计

Result: 在高保真仿真和EAV-24自动驾驶赛车真实实验中验证，证明在估计横向和纵向车辆动力学方面具有更高的准确性和鲁棒性

Conclusion: RAGE-XY通过在线传感器校准和改进的车辆模型，显著提升了车辆动力学状态估计的性能，为自动驾驶系统提供了更可靠的实时状态信息

Abstract: In this work, we present RAGE-XY, an extended version of RAGE, a real-time estimation framework that simultaneously infers vehicle velocity, tire slip angles, and the forces acting on the vehicle using only standard onboard sensors such as IMUs and RADARs. Compared to the original formulation, the proposed method incorporates an online RADAR calibration module, improving the accuracy of lateral velocity estimation in the presence of sensor misalignment. Furthermore, we extend the underlying vehicle model from a single-track approximation to a tricycle model, enabling the estimation of rear longitudinal tire forces in addition to lateral dynamics. We validate the proposed approach through both high-fidelity simulations and real-world experiments conducted on the EAV-24 autonomous race car, demonstrating improved accuracy and robustness in estimating both lateral and longitudinal vehicle dynamics.

</details>


### [342] [The Sustainability Gap in Robotics: A Large-Scale Survey of Sustainability Awareness in 50,000 Research Articles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07921)
*Antun Skuric,Leandro Von Werra,Thomas Wolf*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 对arXiv cs.RO类别近5万篇论文的大规模调查显示，机器人学研究中可持续发展动机和沟通存在显著差距：尽管许多研究可映射到SDG相关领域，但明确提及可持续性影响的比例低于2%，SDG引用低于0.1%，可持续发展动机论文比例低于5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是量化机器人学研究领域中可持续发展沟通和动机的现状，评估该领域在应对全球可持续发展挑战方面的意识和承诺水平。通过大规模分析，揭示机器人学研究的潜在社会、生态和可持续性影响与实际研究动机之间的差距。

Method: 研究方法包括对arXiv cs.RO类别2015年至2026年初近50,000篇开放获取论文进行大规模文本分析。量化论文中提及社会、生态和可持续性影响的频率，分析其与联合国可持续发展目标（SDGs）的对齐程度，并评估可持续发展动机在研究框架中的体现。

Result: 研究结果显示机器人学领域存在持续的动机差距：虽然大量机器人学论文可映射到SDG相关领域，但明确提及可持续性相关影响的比例通常低于2%，明确SDG引用低于0.1%，可持续发展动机论文比例低于5%。这表明尽管机器人学技术快速发展，可持续性尚未成为研究框架的标准组成部分。

Conclusion: 结论指出机器人学领域需要加强可持续发展意识和动机。研究者、会议和机构应采取具体行动来缩小这些差距，支持向更有意识和负责任的创新转变，使可持续性成为机器人学研究的核心考量因素。

Abstract: We present a large-scale survey of sustainability communication and motivation in robotics research. Our analysis covers nearly 50,000 open-access papers from arXiv's cs.RO category published between 2015 and early 2026. In this study, we quantify how often papers mention social, ecological, and sustainability impacts, and we analyse their alignment with the UN Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).
  The results reveal a persistent gap between the field's potential and its stated intent. While a large fraction of robotics papers can be mapped to SDG-relevant domains, explicit sustainability motivation remains remarkably low. Specifically, mentions of sustainability-related impacts are typically below 2%, explicit SDG references stay below 0.1%, and the proportion of sustainability-motivated papers remains below 5%. These trends suggest that while the field of robotics is advancing rapidly, sustainability is not yet a standard part of research framing.
  We conclude by proposing concrete actions for researchers, conferences, and institutions to close these awareness and motivation gaps, supporting a shift toward more intentional and responsible innovation.

</details>


### [343] [Harnessing Embodied Agents: Runtime Governance for Policy-Constrained Execution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07833)
*Xue Qin,Simin Luan,John See,Cong Yang,Zhijun Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个用于具身智能体的策略约束执行框架，将认知与执行监管分离，通过外部化运行时治理层实现动作控制、能力准入、执行监控和回滚处理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着具身智能体从被动推理系统演变为与工具、机器人和物理环境交互的主动执行器，一旦授予执行权限，核心挑战在于如何在运行时保持动作的可控性。现有方法将安全和恢复逻辑嵌入智能体循环内部，使得执行控制难以标准化、审计和适应。

Method: 提出策略约束执行框架，将智能体认知与执行监督分离。治理被外部化到专门的运行时层，执行策略检查、能力准入、执行监控、回滚处理和人工覆盖。形式化定义了具身智能体、具身能力模块和运行时治理层之间的控制边界。

Result: 通过1000次随机模拟试验在三个治理维度上验证：96.2%的未授权动作被拦截；运行时漂移下的不安全持续从100%降至22.2%；91.4%的恢复成功率且完全符合策略要求。所有结果均显著优于基线（p<0.001）。

Conclusion: 通过将运行时治理重构为一类系统问题，本文定位策略约束执行为具身智能体系统的关键设计原则，强调不仅需要更强的智能体，还需要更强的运行时治理。

Abstract: Embodied agents are evolving from passive reasoning systems into active executors that interact with tools, robots, and physical environments. Once granted execution authority, the central challenge becomes how to keep actions governable at runtime. Existing approaches embed safety and recovery logic inside the agent loop, making execution control difficult to standardize, audit, and adapt.
  This paper argues that embodied intelligence requires not only stronger agents, but stronger runtime governance. We propose a framework for policy-constrained execution that separates agent cognition from execution oversight. Governance is externalized into a dedicated runtime layer performing policy checking, capability admission, execution monitoring, rollback handling, and human override.
  We formalize the control boundary among the embodied agent, Embodied Capability Modules (ECMs), and runtime governance layer, and validate through 1000 randomized simulation trials across three governance dimensions. Results show 96.2% interception of unauthorized actions, reduction of unsafe continuation from 100% to 22.2% under runtime drift, and 91.4% recovery success with full policy compliance, substantially outperforming all baselines (p<0.001). By reframing runtime governance as a first-class systems problem, this paper positions policy-constrained execution as a key design principle for embodied agent systems.

</details>


### [344] [Learning Without Losing Identity: Capability Evolution for Embodied Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07799)
*Xue Qin,Simin Luan,John See,Cong Yang,Zhijun Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出能力中心演化范式，将具身智能体的认知身份与能力演化分离，通过模块化、版本化的具身能力模块实现持续改进，保持系统稳定性和安全性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法通过修改智能体本身（提示工程、策略更新或结构重设计）来提升性能，导致长期系统中不稳定和身份丢失。需要一种既能持续改进又能保持智能体认知身份的方法。

Method: 引入具身能力模块（ECMs）概念，作为模块化、版本化的具身功能单元。提出统一框架，将能力演化与智能体身份解耦。能力通过任务执行、经验收集、模型精炼和模块更新的闭环过程演化，所有执行由运行时层管理以确保安全和策略约束。

Result: 在模拟具身任务中，能力演化在20次迭代后将任务成功率从32.4%提升至91.3%，优于智能体修改基线和现有技能学习方法（SPiRL、SkiMo），同时保持零策略漂移和零安全违规。

Conclusion: 将智能体身份与能力演化分离为长期具身智能提供了可扩展且安全的基础，使智能体能够持续改进能力而不丧失认知身份。

Abstract: Embodied agents are expected to operate persistently in dynamic physical environments, continuously acquiring new capabilities over time. Existing approaches to improving agent performance often rely on modifying the agent itself -- through prompt engineering, policy updates, or structural redesign -- leading to instability and loss of identity in long-lived systems. In this work, we propose a capability-centric evolution paradigm for embodied agents. We argue that a robot should maintain a persistent agent as its cognitive identity, while enabling continuous improvement through the evolution of its capabilities. Specifically, we introduce the concept of Embodied Capability Modules (ECMs), which represent modular, versioned units of embodied functionality that can be learned, refined, and composed over time. We present a unified framework in which capability evolution is decoupled from agent identity. Capabilities evolve through a closed-loop process involving task execution, experience collection, model refinement, and module updating, while all executions are governed by a runtime layer that enforces safety and policy constraints. We demonstrate through simulated embodied tasks that capability evolution improves task success rates from 32.4% to 91.3% over 20 iterations, outperforming both agent-modification baselines and established skill-learning methods (SPiRL, SkiMo), while preserving zero policy drift and zero safety violations. Our results suggest that separating agent identity from capability evolution provides a scalable and safe foundation for long-term embodied intelligence.

</details>


### [345] [RoboAgent: Chaining Basic Capabilities for Embodied Task Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07774)
*Peiran Xu,Jiaqi Zheng,Yadong Mu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RoboAgent：一种基于能力驱动的具身任务规划框架，通过调度器主动调用不同子能力来分解复杂规划任务，使视觉语言模型能更好地处理多轮交互、长时程推理和扩展上下文分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管视觉语言模型在多模态理解和推理方面取得了显著进展，但在涉及多轮交互、长时程推理和扩展上下文分析的具身任务规划中表现仍然有限。需要一种方法将复杂规划分解为VLM能更好处理的基本视觉语言问题。

Method: 提出RoboAgent框架：1）能力驱动的规划流水线，模型主动调用不同子能力；2）每个能力维护自己的上下文，根据调度器查询产生中间推理结果或与环境交互；3）调度器和所有能力由单个VLM实现；4）采用三阶段训练范式：行为克隆、DAgger训练和强化学习；5）利用环境模拟器内部信息构建高质量监督，引入增强和合成数据。

Result: 在广泛使用的具身任务规划基准测试中进行了大量实验，验证了所提方法的有效性。代码将在GitHub上开源。

Conclusion: RoboAgent通过能力驱动的规划框架，将复杂具身规划分解为VLM能更好处理的基本问题，实现了更透明可控的推理过程，显著提升了VLM在具身任务规划中的性能。

Abstract: This paper focuses on embodied task planning, where an agent acquires visual observations from the environment and executes atomic actions to accomplish a given task. Although recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved impressive results in multimodal understanding and reasoning, their performance remains limited when applied to embodied planning that involves multi-turn interaction, long-horizon reasoning, and extended context analysis. To bridge this gap, we propose RoboAgent, a capability-driven planning pipeline in which the model actively invokes different sub-capabilities. Each capability maintains its own context, and produces intermediate reasoning results or interacts with the environment according to the query given by a scheduler. This framework decomposes complex planning into a sequence of basic vision-language problems that VLMs can better address, enabling a more transparent and controllable reasoning process. The scheduler and all capabilities are implemented with a single VLM, without relying on external tools. To train this VLM, we adopt a multi-stage paradigm that consists of: (1) behavior cloning with expert plans, (2) DAgger training using trajectories collected by the model, and (3) reinforcement learning guided by an expert policy. Across these stages, we exploit the internal information of the environment simulator to construct high-quality supervision for each capability, and we further introduce augmented and synthetic data to enhance the model's performance in more diverse scenarios. Extensive experiments on widely used embodied task planning benchmarks validate the effectiveness of the proposed approach. Our codes will be available at https://github.com/woyut/RoboAgent_CVPR26.

</details>


### [346] [Vision-Language Navigation for Aerial Robots: Towards the Era of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07705)
*Xingyu Xia,Lekai Zhou,Yujie Tang,Xiaozhou Zhu,Hai Zhu,Wen Yao*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文对空中视觉语言导航（Aerial VLN）领域进行了系统性综述，重点关注大语言模型和视觉语言模型的整合，提出了分类框架、评估体系分析，并识别了七个关键开放问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着无人机技术和多模态AI的发展，空中视觉语言导航成为重要研究方向。本文旨在系统梳理该领域进展，特别是LLM/VLM整合带来的变革，分析现有方法的优缺点，为未来研究提供指导。

Method: 采用系统性文献综述方法：1) 正式定义Aerial VLN问题及两种交互范式；2) 将现有方法归纳为五类架构分类；3) 分析评估基础设施（数据集、仿真平台、指标）；4) 在共享基准上比较方法性能；5) 识别关键架构权衡；6) 综合七个具体开放问题。

Result: 建立了Aerial VLN方法的五类分类体系（序列到序列、端到端LLM/VLM、分层、多智能体、对话导航），系统分析了各类设计原理和技术权衡。评估了现有基础设施的局限性（规模、多样性、真实世界基础、指标覆盖），并识别了关键架构权衡（离散vs连续动作、端到端vs分层、仿真到现实差距）。

Conclusion: Aerial VLN领域在LLM/VLM整合下快速发展，但仍面临七大开放挑战：长时指令接地、视点鲁棒性、可扩展空间表示、连续6-DoF动作执行、机载部署、基准标准化、多无人机集群导航。需要跨学科合作解决这些挑战，推动技术向实际应用发展。

Abstract: Aerial vision-and-language navigation (Aerial VLN) aims to enable unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) to interpret natural language instructions and autonomously navigate complex three-dimensional environments by grounding language in visual perception. This survey provides a critical and analytical review of the Aerial VLN field, with particular attention to the recent integration of large language models (LLMs) and vision-language models (VLMs). We first formally introduce the Aerial VLN problem and define two interaction paradigms: single-instruction and dialog-based, as foundational axes. We then organize the body of Aerial VLN methods into a taxonomy of five architectural categories: sequence-to-sequence and attention-based methods, end-to-end LLM/VLM methods, hierarchical methods, multi-agent methods, and dialog-based navigation methods. For each category, we systematically analyze design rationales, technical trade-offs, and reported performance. We critically assess the evaluation infrastructure for Aerial VLN, including datasets, simulation platforms, and metrics, and identify their gaps in scale, environmental diversity, real-world grounding, and metric coverage. We consolidate cross-method comparisons on shared benchmarks and analyze key architectural trade-offs, including discrete versus continuous actions, end-to-end versus hierarchical designs, and the simulation-to-reality gap. Finally, we synthesize seven concrete open problems: long-horizon instruction grounding, viewpoint robustness, scalable spatial representation, continuous 6-DoF action execution, onboard deployment, benchmark standardization, and multi-UAV swarm navigation, with specific research directions grounded in the evidence presented throughout the survey.

</details>


### [347] [Bird-Inspired Spatial Flapping Wing Mechanism via Coupled Linkages with Single Actuator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07677)
*Daniel Huczala,Sun-Pill Jung,Frank C. Park*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于Bennett连杆的鸟类仿生扑翼机构，采用两个耦合的空间四杆机构，仅需单个电机驱动即可实现协调的扫掠-折叠翼运动。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 空间单环机构如Bennett连杆具有单自由度驱动和非平凡空间轨迹的优点，适合轻量化仿生机器人设计。然而，其几何任务综合较为复杂，数学难度高，工程应用中常被回避。

Method: 提出简化的运动学方法，从包含所需表面积的四边形构建Bennett连杆；采用两个耦合的空间四杆机构，一个主动驱动产生空间扫掠行程，另一个串联耦合的连杆保持非驱动状态，在行程周期内被动切换伸展和折叠的翼构型。

Result: 该架构实现了单驱动输入下的协调扫掠-折叠翼运动，降低了重量和控制复杂度；通过3D打印原型组装测试，验证了预期的空间行程和被动折叠行为。

Conclusion: 提出的简化运动学方法和被动状态切换机制成功实现了基于Bennett连杆的仿生扑翼机构，为轻量化、单驱动仿生机器人设计提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Spatial single-loop mechanisms such as Bennett linkages offer a unique combination of one-degree-of-freedom actuation and nontrivial spatial trajectories, making them attractive for lightweight bio-inspired robotic design. However, although they appear simple and elegant, the geometric task-based synthesis is rather complicated and often avoided in engineering tasks due to the mathematical complexity involved. This paper presents a bird-inspired flapping-wing mechanism built from two coupled spatial four-bars, driven by a single motor. One linkage is actuated to generate the desired spatial sweeping stroke, while the serially coupled linkage remains unactuated and passively switches between extended and folded wing configurations over the stroke cycle. We introduce a simplified kinematic methodology for constructing Bennett linkages from quadrilaterals that contain a desired surface area and further leverage mechanically induced passive state switching. This architecture realizes a coordinated sweep-and-fold wing motion with a single actuation input, reducing weight and control complexity. A 3D-printed prototype is assembled and tested, demonstrating the intended spatial stroke and passive folding behavior.

</details>


### [348] [Reset-Free Reinforcement Learning for Real-World Agile Driving: An Empirical Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07672)
*Kohei Honda,Hirotaka Hosogaya*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 论文实证研究了无重置强化学习在真实世界敏捷驾驶中的应用，发现仿真与真实世界存在显著差距，TD-MPC2在物理平台上表现最佳，而残差学习在真实世界中未能发挥优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究无重置强化学习在真实世界高速驾驶中的应用，解决轮胎摩擦极限附近驾驶的挑战，包括复杂车辆动力学、执行延迟和未建模效应等问题，这些因素阻碍了精确仿真和直接仿真到真实的策略迁移。

Method: 使用模型预测路径积分控制作为重置策略和残差学习的基础策略，系统比较了PPO、SAC和TD-MPC2三种代表性RL算法在仿真和真实实验中的表现，包括有/无残差学习的情况。在1/10比例车辆上于湿滑室内赛道进行连续学习。

Result: 仿真与真实世界存在明显差距：SAC+残差学习在仿真中表现最佳，但只有TD-MPC2在物理平台上持续优于MPPI基线。残差学习在仿真中明显有益，但在真实世界中未能转移其优势，甚至可能降低性能。

Conclusion: 真实世界的无重置强化学习面临仿真中不存在的独特挑战，需要针对野外训练开发专门的算法。TD-MPC2在物理平台上表现最稳定，而残差学习在真实世界中的有效性有限。

Abstract: This paper presents an empirical study of reset-free reinforcement learning (RL) for real-world agile driving, in which a physical 1/10-scale vehicle learns continuously on a slippery indoor track without manual resets. High-speed driving near the limits of tire friction is particularly challenging for learning-based methods because complex vehicle dynamics, actuation delays, and other unmodeled effects hinder both accurate simulation and direct sim-to-real transfer of learned policies. To enable autonomous training on a physical platform, we employ Model Predictive Path Integral control (MPPI) as both the reset policy and the base policy for residual learning, and systematically compare three representative RL algorithms, i.e., PPO, SAC, and TD-MPC2, with and without residual learning in simulation and real-world experiments. Our results reveal a clear gap between simulation and real-world: SAC with residual learning achieves the highest returns in simulation, yet only TD-MPC2 consistently outperforms the MPPI baseline on the physical platform. Moreover, residual learning, while clearly beneficial in simulation, fails to transfer its advantage to the real world and can even degrade performance. These findings reveal that reset-free RL in the real world poses unique challenges absent from simulation, calling for further algorithmic development tailored to training in the wild.

</details>


### [349] [Safe Large-Scale Robust Nonlinear MPC in Milliseconds via Reachability-Constrained System Level Synthesis on the GPU](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07644)
*Jeffrey Fang,Glen Chou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: GPU-SLS：基于GPU并行化的安全鲁棒非线性模型预测控制框架，适用于高维不确定机器人系统和长规划时域，实现实时联合优化


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以处理高维不确定机器人系统的实时安全控制问题，需要开发能够处理大规模决策变量和约束的高效GPU并行化框架

Method: 开发GPU并行化框架，包含：1）基于顺序二次规划的轨迹优化，使用GPU加速的QP求解器（并行关联扫描和自适应缓存的ADMM框架）；2）通过系统级合成优化鲁棒跟踪控制器和闭环可达集；3）支持可达性约束的固定时域和滚动时域控制

Result: 性能显著提升：名义轨迹求解时间相比CPU求解器减少97.7%，相比GPU求解器减少71.8%；SLS控制和可达性计算加速237倍；在复杂非线性系统（61D四足机器人、75D人形机器人）上实现100%经验安全性，平均在线计算时间20毫秒，可处理2×10^5决策变量和8×10^4约束

Conclusion: GPU-SLS框架实现了高维不确定机器人系统的实时安全鲁棒控制，通过GPU并行化和高效算法设计显著提升了计算性能，为复杂机器人系统的在线控制提供了可行解决方案

Abstract: We present GPU-SLS, a GPU-parallelized framework for safe, robust nonlinear model predictive control (MPC) that scales to high-dimensional uncertain robotic systems and long planning horizons. Our method jointly optimizes an inequality-constrained, dynamically-feasible nominal trajectory, a tracking controller, and a closed-loop reachable set under disturbance, all in real-time. To efficiently compute nominal trajectories, we develop a sequential quadratic programming procedure with a novel GPU-accelerated quadratic program (QP) solver that uses parallel associative scans and adaptive caching within an alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM) framework. The same GPU QP backend is used to optimize robust tracking controllers and closed-loop reachable sets via system level synthesis (SLS), enabling reachability-constrained control in both fixed- and receding-horizon settings. We achieve substantial performance gains, reducing nominal trajectory solve times by 97.7% relative to state-of-the-art CPU solvers and 71.8% compared to GPU solvers, while accelerating SLS-based control and reachability by 237x. Despite large problem scales, our method achieves 100% empirical safety, unlike high-dimensional learning-based reachability baselines. We validate our approach on complex nonlinear systems, including whole-body quadrupeds (61D) and humanoids (75D), synthesizing robust control policies online on the GPU in 20 milliseconds on average and scaling to problems with 2 x 10^5 decision variables and 8 x 10^4 constraints. The implementation of our method is available at https://github.com/Jeff300fang/gpu_sls.

</details>


### [350] [EgoVerse: An Egocentric Human Dataset for Robot Learning from Around the World](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07607)
*Ryan Punamiya,Simar Kareer,Zeyi Liu,Josh Citron,Ri-Zhao Qiu,Xiongyi Cai,Alexey Gavryushin,Jiaqi Chen,Davide Liconti,Lawrence Y. Zhu,Patcharapong Aphiwetsa,Baoyu Li,Aniketh Cheluva,Pranav Kuppili,Yangcen Liu,Dhruv Patel,Aidan Gao,Hye-Young Chung,Ryan Co,Renee Zbizika,Jeff Liu,Xiaomeng Xu,Haoyu Xiong,Geng Chen,Sebastiano Oliani,Chenyu Yang,Xi Wang,James Fort,Richard Newcombe,Josh Gao,Jason Chong,Garrett Matsuda,Aseem Doriwala,Marc Pollefeys,Robert Katzschmann,Xiaolong Wang,Shuran Song,Judy Hoffman,Danfei Xu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: EgoVerse是一个用于机器人学习的协作平台，统一了人类数据收集、处理与访问，包含1,362小时人类演示数据，并通过多实验室研究验证了人类数据对机器人策略性能的积极影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人学习依赖大规模多样化数据，但机器人数据收集成本高、难以扩展。人类自我中心数据提供了有前景的替代方案，但现有数据集范围有限、难以扩展且分散在不同机构。

Method: 开发EgoVerse协作平台，统一数据收集、处理和访问框架；收集1,362小时人类演示数据，涵盖1,965个任务、240个场景和2,087名演示者；进行大规模人类到机器人迁移研究，在多个实验室、任务和机器人形态下复制实验。

Result: 当前版本包含1,362小时（80k片段）人类演示数据，具有标准化格式、操作相关标注和下游学习工具。研究发现策略性能通常随人类数据增加而提升，但有效扩展取决于人类数据与机器人学习目标的对齐程度。

Conclusion: EgoVerse的数据集、平台和研究为人类数据驱动的机器人学习建立了可重复进展的基础，证明了协作数据收集框架的价值和人类数据对机器人学习的重要性。

Abstract: Robot learning increasingly depends on large and diverse data, yet robot data collection remains expensive and difficult to scale. Egocentric human data offer a promising alternative by capturing rich manipulation behavior across everyday environments. However, existing human datasets are often limited in scope, difficult to extend, and fragmented across institutions. We introduce EgoVerse, a collaborative platform for human data-driven robot learning that unifies data collection, processing, and access under a shared framework, enabling contributions from individual researchers, academic labs, and industry partners. The current release includes 1,362 hours (80k episodes) of human demonstrations spanning 1,965 tasks, 240 scenes, and 2,087 unique demonstrators, with standardized formats, manipulation-relevant annotations, and tooling for downstream learning. Beyond the dataset, we conduct a large-scale study of human-to-robot transfer with experiments replicated across multiple labs, tasks, and robot embodiments under shared protocols. We find that policy performance generally improves with increased human data, but that effective scaling depends on alignment between human data and robot learning objectives. Together, the dataset, platform, and study establish a foundation for reproducible progress in human data-driven robot learning. Videos and additional information can be found at https://egoverse.ai/

</details>


### [351] [SANDO: Safe Autonomous Trajectory Planning for Dynamic Unknown Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07599)
*Kota Kondo,Jesús Tordesillas,Jonathan P. How*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SANDO是一个用于3D动态未知环境的安全轨迹规划器，通过热图A*全局规划、时空安全飞行走廊和混合整数二次规划优化，在保证安全的同时实现快速重规划。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在3D动态未知环境中，障碍物位置和运动先验未知，现有方法存在速度与安全性的权衡：软约束方法快速但无法保证无碰撞，硬约束方法安全但计算时间长。

Method: 1) 热图A*全局规划器使用软成本引导路径远离高风险区域；2) 时空安全飞行走廊生成器创建时间分层多面体，仅按每个时间层的最坏可达集膨胀障碍物；3) 混合整数二次规划轨迹优化，采用变量消除技术减少决策变量；4) 形式化安全分析建立速度边界和估计误差假设下的无碰撞保证。

Result: 变量消除技术使优化时间加速达7.4倍；STSFC在密集动态环境中对可行性至关重要；在标准化静态基准、障碍丰富的静态森林和动态环境中，SANDO在所有难度级别上均实现最高成功率且无约束违反；感知实验在无地面真值障碍信息下表现鲁棒；硬件实验中无人机在静态环境完成6次安全飞行，在动态障碍中完成10次安全飞行。

Conclusion: SANDO成功解决了动态未知环境中轨迹规划的速度-安全性权衡问题，通过创新的热图规划、时空安全走廊和高效优化方法，在保证形式化安全的同时实现了快速重规划，在仿真和硬件实验中均表现出优越性能。

Abstract: SANDO is a safe trajectory planner for 3D dynamic unknown environments, where obstacle locations and motions are unknown a priori and a collision-free plan can become unsafe at any moment, requiring fast replanning. Existing soft-constraint planners are fast but cannot guarantee collision-free paths, while hard-constraint methods ensure safety at the cost of longer computation. SANDO addresses this trade-off through three contributions. First, a heat map-based A* global planner steers paths away from high-risk regions using soft costs, and a spatiotemporal safe flight corridor (STSFC) generator produces time-layered polytopes that inflate obstacles only by their worst-case reachable set at each time layer, rather than by the worst case over the entire horizon. Second, trajectory optimization is formulated as a Mixed-Integer Quadratic Program (MIQP) with hard collision-avoidance constraints, and a variable elimination technique reduces the number of decision variables, enabling fast computation. Third, a formal safety analysis establishes collision-free guarantees under explicit velocity-bound and estimation-error assumptions. Ablation studies show that variable elimination yields up to 7.4x speedup in optimization time, and that STSFCs are critical for feasibility in dense dynamic environments. Benchmark simulations against state-of-the-art methods across standardized static benchmarks, obstacle-rich static forests, and dynamic environments show that SANDO consistently achieves the highest success rate with no constraint violations across all difficulty levels; perception-only experiments without ground truth obstacle information confirm robust performance under realistic sensing. Hardware experiments on a UAV with fully onboard planning, perception, and localization demonstrate six safe flights in static environments and ten safe flights among dynamic obstacles.

</details>


### [352] [Grasp as You Dream: Imitating Functional Grasping from Generated Human Demonstrations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07517)
*Chao Tang,Jiacheng Xu,Haofei Lu,Bolin Zou,Wenlong Dong,Hong Zhang,Danica Kragic*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: GraspDreamer：利用视觉生成模型合成人类演示数据，实现零样本功能抓取的通用机器人方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 构建能在开放世界环境中执行功能抓取的通用机器人面临巨大挑战，现有方法要么局限于狭窄的对象/任务集，要么需要大规模数据收集来捕捉现实世界多样性。

Method: 提出GraspDreamer方法，利用视觉生成模型（如视频生成模型）合成的人类演示数据，结合特定具身动作优化，实现零样本功能抓取，无需大量数据收集。

Result: 在多个公共基准测试和不同机器人手上展示了优越的数据效率和泛化性能，真实世界评估验证了在真实机器人上的有效性，并能扩展到下游操作任务和支持视觉运动策略学习。

Conclusion: GraspDreamer通过利用视觉生成模型中编码的通用先验知识，为开放世界功能抓取提供了一种数据高效、泛化能力强的替代方案。

Abstract: Building generalist robots capable of performing functional grasping in everyday, open-world environments remains a significant challenge due to the vast diversity of objects and tasks. Existing methods are either constrained to narrow object/task sets or rely on prohibitively large-scale data collection to capture real-world variability. In this work, we present an alternative approach, GraspDreamer, a method that leverages human demonstrations synthesized by visual generative models (VGMs) (e.g., video generation models) to enable zero-shot functional grasping without labor-intensive data collection. The key idea is that VGMs pre-trained on internet-scale human data implicitly encode generalized priors about how humans interact with the physical world, which can be combined with embodiment-specific action optimization to enable functional grasping with minimal effort. Extensive experiments on the public benchmarks with different robot hands demonstrate the superior data efficiency and generalization performance of GraspDreamer compared to previous methods. Real-world evaluations further validate the effectiveness on real robots. Additionally, we showcase that GraspDreamer can (1) be naturally extended to downstream manipulation tasks, and (2) can generate data to support visuomotor policy learning.

</details>


### [353] [Active Reward Machine Inference From Raw State Trajectories](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07480)
*Mohamad Louai Shehab,Antoine Aspeel,Necmiye Ozay*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 从原始状态和策略信息中学习奖励机器，无需奖励、标签或机器节点观察，并扩展到主动学习以提高效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 手动指定奖励机器（包括捕捉决策基础的高层特征的标记函数）是一项艰巨任务，现有方法需要访问奖励、标签或机器节点观察，但在信息稀缺情况下学习奖励机器的问题尚未解决

Method: 提出从原始状态和策略信息直接学习奖励机器的方法，不依赖奖励、标签或机器节点观察，确定轨迹数据的充分条件，并扩展到主动学习设置，通过增量查询轨迹扩展来提高数据效率和计算效率

Result: 在多个网格世界示例中验证了方法的有效性，展示了在信息稀缺情况下学习奖励机器的可行性，以及主动学习在提高数据效率和计算效率方面的优势

Conclusion: 证明了从原始状态和策略信息中学习奖励机器的可行性，确定了信息稀缺情况下的充分数据条件，主动学习扩展进一步提高了效率，为自动化奖励机器学习提供了理论基础和实用方法

Abstract: Reward machines are automaton-like structures that capture the memory required to accomplish a multi-stage task. When combined with reinforcement learning or optimal control methods, they can be used to synthesize robot policies to achieve such tasks. However, specifying a reward machine by hand, including a labeling function capturing high-level features that the decisions are based on, can be a daunting task. This paper deals with the problem of learning reward machines directly from raw state and policy information. As opposed to existing works, we assume no access to observations of rewards, labels, or machine nodes, and show what trajectory data is sufficient for learning the reward machine in this information-scarce regime. We then extend the result to an active learning setting where we incrementally query trajectory extensions to improve data (and indirectly computational) efficiency. Results are demonstrated with several grid world examples.

</details>


### [354] [CMP: Robust Whole-Body Tracking for Loco-Manipulation via Competence Manifold Projection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07457)
*Ziyang Cheng,Haoyu Wei,Hang Yin,Xiuwei Xu,Bingyao Yu,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出Competence Manifold Projection (CMP)方法，通过能力流形投影提高腿式移动机械臂对分布外输入的鲁棒性，同时保持任务性能连续性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有解耦控制方案对腿式移动机械臂具有鲁棒性，但学习整体全身控制策略跟踪全局末端执行器位姿时，对传感器噪声或不可行用户命令引起的分布外输入仍很脆弱。

Method: 提出能力流形投影(CMP)：1) 使用逐帧安全方案将无限时域安全约束转化为计算高效的单步流形包含；2) 采用下界安全估计器区分未掌握意图与训练分布；3) 引入同构潜在空间对齐流形几何与安全概率，实现O(1)高效防御任意分布外意图。

Result: CMP在典型分布外场景中实现高达10倍的生存率提升，基线方法遭受灾难性失败时，CMP仅产生低于10%的跟踪性能下降。系统展现出对分布外目标的"尽力而为"泛化行为。

Conclusion: CMP方法显著提高了腿式移动机械臂对分布外输入的鲁棒性，在保持任务性能的同时实现了高效的安全防御机制，系统能够沿能力边界渐进完成分布外目标。

Abstract: While decoupled control schemes for legged mobile manipulators have shown robustness, learning holistic whole-body control policies for tracking global end-effector poses remains fragile against Out-of-Distribution (OOD) inputs induced by sensor noise or infeasible user commands. To improve robustness against these perturbations without sacrificing task performance and continuity, we propose Competence Manifold Projection (CMP). Specifically, we utilize a Frame-Wise Safety Scheme that transforms the infinite-horizon safety constraint into a computationally efficient single-step manifold inclusion. To instantiate this competence manifold, we employ a Lower-Bounded Safety Estimator that distinguishes unmastered intentions from the training distribution. We then introduce an Isomorphic Latent Space (ILS) that aligns manifold geometry with safety probability, enabling efficient O(1) seamless defense against arbitrary OOD intents. Experiments demonstrate that CMP achieves up to a 10-fold survival rate improvement in typical OOD scenarios where baselines suffer catastrophic failure, incurring under 10% tracking degradation. Notably, the system exhibits emergent ``best-effort'' generalization behaviors to progressively accomplish OOD goals by adhering to the competence boundaries. Result videos are available at: https://shepherd1226.github.io/CMP.

</details>


### [355] [TAMEn: Tactile-Aware Manipulation Engine for Closed-Loop Data Collection in Contact-Rich Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07335)
*Longyan Wu,Jieji Ren,Chenghang Jiang,Junxi Zhou,Shijia Peng,Ran Huang,Guoying Gu,Li Chen,Hongyang Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: TAMEn系统：用于接触丰富任务闭环数据收集的触觉感知操作引擎，通过跨形态可穿戴接口和双模态采集管道，结合大规模触觉预训练和恢复数据，显著提升双手机器人操作成功率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 手持式范例虽能高效收集机器人操作演示，但在实现接触丰富的双手机器人操作方面面临硬件适应性、数据效率和在线可行性检查等关键挑战。现有硬件设计存在夹爪特异性、跟踪精度与便携性权衡问题，且缺乏执行过程中的交互恢复数据收集能力。

Method: 提出TAMEn系统：1) 跨形态可穿戴接口，快速适应异构夹爪；2) 双模态采集管道：精度模式（运动捕捉）用于高保真演示，便携模式（VR跟踪）用于野外采集和触觉可视化恢复遥操作；3) 金字塔结构数据体系：统一大规模触觉预训练、任务特定双手机器人演示和人机交互恢复数据。

Result: 可行性感知管道显著提升演示可重放性；提出的视觉-触觉学习框架将多种双手机器人操作任务的成功率从34%提升至75%；硬件和数据集已开源。

Conclusion: TAMEn系统通过硬件创新和闭环数据收集策略，有效解决了接触丰富双手机器人操作中的数据收集挑战，显著提升了操作性能，为视觉-触觉操作研究提供了可复现的基础设施。

Abstract: Handheld paradigms offer an efficient and intuitive way for collecting large-scale demonstration of robot manipulation. However, achieving contact-rich bimanual manipulation through these methods remains a pivotal challenge, which is substantially hindered by hardware adaptability and data efficacy. Prior hardware designs remain gripper-specific and often face a trade-off between tracking precision and portability. Furthermore, the lack of online feasibility checking during demonstration leads to poor replayability. More importantly, existing handheld setups struggle to collect interactive recovery data during robot execution, lacking the authentic tactile information necessary for robust policy refinement. To bridge these gaps, we present TAMEn, a tactile-aware manipulation engine for closed-loop data collection in contact-rich tasks. Our system features a cross-morphology wearable interface that enables rapid adaptation across heterogeneous grippers. To balance data quality and environmental diversity, we implement a dual-modal acquisition pipeline: a precision mode leveraging motion capture for high-fidelity demonstrations, and a portable mode utilizing VR-based tracking for in-the-wild acquisition and tactile-visualized recovery teleoperation. Building on this hardware, we unify large-scale tactile pretraining, task-specific bimanual demonstrations, and human-in-the-loop recovery data into a pyramid-structured data regime, enabling closed-loop policy refinement. Experiments show that our feasibility-aware pipeline significantly improves demonstration replayability, and that the proposed visuo-tactile learning framework increases task success rates from 34% to 75% across diverse bimanual manipulation tasks. We further open-source the hardware and dataset to facilitate reproducibility and support research in visuo-tactile manipulation.

</details>


### [356] [RoSHI: A Versatile Robot-oriented Suit for Human Data In-the-Wild](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07331)
*Wenjing Margaret Mao,Jefferson Ng,Luyang Hu,Daniel Gehrig,Antonio Loquercio*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RoSHI是一种混合可穿戴系统，融合低成本稀疏IMU和Project Aria眼镜，通过自我中心感知在度量全局坐标系中估计穿戴者的完整3D姿态和身体形状


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩展机器人学习需要包含丰富长时程交互的人类数据，现有数据收集方法在便携性、遮挡鲁棒性和全局一致性之间存在权衡

Method: 结合低成本稀疏IMU和Project Aria眼镜的混合可穿戴系统，利用IMU提供遮挡鲁棒性和高速运动捕捉，自我中心SLAM锚定长时程运动并稳定上半身姿态

Result: 在敏捷活动数据集上，RoSHI通常优于其他自我中心基线方法，与最先进的外部中心基线（SAM3D）性能相当，且记录的运动数据适用于真实世界人形机器人策略学习

Conclusion: RoSHI系统通过传感器融合实现了便携、遮挡鲁棒且全局一致的人类运动捕捉，为机器人学习提供了高质量的人类数据收集方案

Abstract: Scaling up robot learning will likely require human data containing rich and long-horizon interactions in the wild. Existing approaches for collecting such data trade off portability, robustness to occlusion, and global consistency. We introduce RoSHI, a hybrid wearable that fuses low-cost sparse IMUs with the Project Aria glasses to estimate the full 3D pose and body shape of the wearer in a metric global coordinate frame from egocentric perception. This system is motivated by the complementarity of the two sensors: IMUs provide robustness to occlusions and high-speed motions, while egocentric SLAM anchors long-horizon motion and stabilizes upper body pose. We collect a dataset of agile activities to evaluate RoSHI. On this dataset, we generally outperform other egocentric baselines and perform comparably to a state-of-the-art exocentric baseline (SAM3D). Finally, we demonstrate that the motion data recorded from our system are suitable for real-world humanoid policy learning. For videos, data and more, visit the project webpage: https://roshi-mocap.github.io/

</details>


### [357] [OpenPRC: A Unified Open-Source Framework for Physics-to-Task Evaluation in Physical Reservoir Computing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07423)
*Yogesh Phalak,Wen Sin Lor,Apoorva Khairnar,Benjamin Jantzen,Noel Naughton,Suyi Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: OpenPRC是一个开源Python框架，为物理储层计算提供统一的物理到任务流程，通过五个模块实现GPU加速模拟、实验数据摄取、模块化学习、信息理论分析和物理感知优化，使用通用HDF5模式确保可重复性和互操作性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 物理储层计算利用物理基板的固有非线性动力学作为固定计算储层，为节能和具身机器学习提供了有前景的范式。然而，当前PRC系统的开发和评估工作流程仍然分散：现有工具通常只处理管道的孤立部分，如特定基板模拟、数字储层基准测试或读出训练。缺乏一个统一的框架，能够通过相同的数据接口表示高保真模拟轨迹和真实实验测量，实现跨基板和数据源的可重复评估、分析和物理感知优化。

Method: OpenPRC框架采用模式驱动的物理到任务管道，围绕五个模块构建：1) GPU加速的混合RK4-PBD物理引擎(demlat)；2) 基于视频的实验摄取层(openprc.vision)；3) 模块化学习层(reservoir)；4) 信息理论分析和基准测试工具(analysis)；5) 物理感知优化(optimize)。通用HDF5模式强制执行可重复性和互操作性，允许GPU模拟和实验获取的轨迹无需修改即可进入相同的下游工作流程。

Result: 框架展示了多种能力：包括折纸镶嵌结构的模拟、从物理储层中基于视频的轨迹提取，以及用于标准化PRC基准测试、相关性诊断和容量分析的通用接口。该框架与外部物理引擎（包括PyBullet、PyElastica和MERLIN）兼容。

Conclusion: OpenPRC填补了物理储层计算领域统一框架的空白，通过标准化的数据接口和工作流程，实现了模拟和实验数据的无缝集成，为PRC社区提供了标准化的工具层，促进可重复研究、跨基板比较和物理感知优化。

Abstract: Physical Reservoir Computing (PRC) leverages the intrinsic nonlinear dynamics of physical substrates, mechanical, optical, spintronic, and beyond, as fixed computational reservoirs, offering a compelling paradigm for energy-efficient and embodied machine learning. However, the practical workflow for developing and evaluating PRC systems remains fragmented: existing tools typically address only isolated parts of the pipeline, such as substrate-specific simulation, digital reservoir benchmarking, or readout training. What is missing is a unified framework that can represent both high-fidelity simulated trajectories and real experimental measurements through the same data interface, enabling reproducible evaluation, analysis, and physics-aware optimization across substrates and data sources. We present OpenPRC, an open-source Python framework that fills this gap through a schema-driven physics-to-task pipeline built around five modules: a GPU-accelerated hybrid RK4-PBD physics engine (demlat), a video-based experimental ingestion layer (openprc.vision), a modular learning layer (reservoir), information-theoretic analysis and benchmarking tools (analysis), and physics-aware optimization (optimize). A universal HDF5 schema enforces reproducibility and interoperability, allowing GPU-simulated and experimentally acquired trajectories to enter the same downstream workflow without modification. Demonstrated capabilities include simulations of Origami tessellations, video-based trajectory extraction from a physical reservoir, and a common interface for standardized PRC benchmarking, correlation diagnostics, and capacity analysis. The longer-term vision is to serve as a standardizing layer for the PRC community, compatible with external physics engines including PyBullet, PyElastica, and MERLIN.

</details>


### [358] [Robust Quadruped Locomotion via Evolutionary Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07224)
*Brian McAteer,Karl Mason*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究比较了四种强化学习方法在四足机器人行走任务上的表现，发现结合进化搜索的方法（特别是CEM-TD3）在训练和迁移到未见过地形时表现最佳，显著提升了策略的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度强化学习在四足机器人运动控制中取得了进展，但在模拟环境中训练的策略在环境变化时往往难以迁移。本研究旨在通过结合基于梯度的策略优化和基于群体的进化搜索，提高策略的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

Method: 研究评估了四种方法：标准深度强化学习基线DDPG和TD3，以及两种结合交叉熵方法（CEM）的变体CEM-DDPG和CEM-TD3。所有智能体在平坦地形上训练，然后在平坦地形和训练中未遇到的崎岖地形上进行测试。

Result: 在平坦地形上，TD3表现最佳（平均奖励5927.26），但CEM-TD3在训练和评估中总体表现最好（17611.41）。在崎岖地形迁移测试中，标准深度强化学习方法性能急剧下降（DDPG：-1016.32，TD3：-99.73），而进化变体保留了大部分能力，CEM-TD3表现最强（19574.33）。

Conclusion: 结合进化搜索可以减少过拟合并提高运动控制任务的策略鲁棒性，特别是在部署条件与训练条件不同的情况下。CEM-TD3在训练和迁移测试中都表现出最佳性能。

Abstract: Deep reinforcement learning has recently achieved strong results in quadrupedal locomotion, yet policies trained in simulation often fail to transfer when the environment changes. Evolutionary reinforcement learning aims to address this limitation by combining gradient-based policy optimisation with population-driven exploration. This work evaluates four methods on a simulated walking task: DDPG, TD3, and two Cross-Entropy-based variants CEM-DDPG and CEM-TD3. All agents are trained on flat terrain and later tested both on this domain and on a rough terrain not encountered during training. TD3 performs best among the standard deep RL baselines on flat ground with a mean reward of 5927.26, while CEM-TD3 achieves the highest rewards overall during training and evaluation 17611.41. Under the rough-terrain transfer test, performance of the deep RL methods drops sharply. DDPG achieves -1016.32 and TD3 achieves -99.73, whereas the evolutionary variants retain much of their capability. CEM-TD3 records the strongest transfer performance with a mean reward of 19574.33. These findings suggest that incorporating evolutionary search can reduce overfitting and improve policy robustness in locomotion tasks, particularly when deployment conditions differ from those seen during training.

</details>


### [359] [An RTK-SLAM Dataset for Absolute Accuracy Evaluation in GNSS-Degraded Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07151)
*Wei Zhang,Vincent Ress,David Skuddis,Uwe Soergel,Norbert Haala*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 论文指出RTK-SLAM系统中常用的ATE评估指标存在缺陷，因为它通过SE(3)对齐吸收了全局漂移和系统误差，无法准确评估RTK-SLAM的全局精度。作者提出了新的数据集和评估方法，使用全站仪独立建立地面真值，揭示了SE(3)对齐可能低估绝对定位误差达76%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RTK-SLAM系统结合了SLAM的相对一致性和RTK GNSS的全局参考坐标，但现有评估方法存在严重问题。标准的ATE指标通过SE(3)对齐操作吸收了全局漂移和系统误差，使得轨迹看起来比实际更准确，无法正确评估RTK-SLAM的全局精度。现有数据集通常将GNSS作为地面真值的一部分，缺乏独立的地面真值验证。

Method: 提出了新的数据集和评估方法：1）使用手持RTK-SLAM设备采集两个场景的数据；2）关键设计原则是将RTK接收器仅作为系统输入，而通过大地测量全站仪独立建立地面真值；3）评估了激光雷达-惯性、视觉-惯性、激光雷达-视觉-惯性RTK-SLAM系统以及独立RTK；4）同时报告直接全局精度和SE(3)对齐的相对精度以明确差距。

Result: 实验结果表明：1）SE(3)对齐可能低估绝对定位误差高达76%；2）在开阔天空条件下，RTK-SLAM能够实现厘米级的绝对精度；3）在室内环境中，RTK-SLAM仍能保持分米级的全局精度，而独立RTK会退化到数十米级别；4）数据集、校准文件和评估脚本已公开。

Conclusion: 论文揭示了RTK-SLAM评估中SE(3)对齐方法的局限性，提出了更可靠的评估框架。通过独立的地面真值验证，证明了RTK-SLAM在开阔天空条件下能达到厘米级精度，在室内也能保持分米级精度，显著优于独立RTK。公开的数据集和工具为RTK-SLAM系统的准确评估提供了重要基础。

Abstract: RTK-SLAM systems integrate simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) with real-time kinematic (RTK) GNSS positioning, promising both relative consistency and globally referenced coordinates for efficient georeferenced surveying. A critical and underappreciated issue is that the standard evaluation metric, Absolute Trajectory Error (ATE), first fits an optimal rigid-body transformation between the estimated trajectory and reference before computing errors. This so-called SE(3) alignment absorbs global drift and systematic errors, making trajectories appear more accurate than they are in practice, and is unsuitable for evaluating the global accuracy of RTK-SLAM. We present a geodetically referenced dataset and evaluation methodology that expose this gap. A key design principle is that the RTK receiver is used solely as a system input, while ground truth is established independently via a geodetic total station. This separation is absent from all existing datasets, where GNSS typically serves as (part of) the ground truth. The dataset is collected with a handheld RTK-SLAM device, comprising two scenes. We evaluate LiDAR-inertial, visual-inertial, and LiDAR-visual-inertial RTK-SLAM systems alongside standalone RTK, reporting direct global accuracy and SE(3)-aligned relative accuracy to make the gap explicit. Results show that SE(3) alignment can underestimate absolute positioning error by up to 76\%. RTK-SLAM achieves centimeter-level absolute accuracy in open-sky conditions and maintains decimeter-level global accuracy indoors, where standalone RTK degrades to tens of meters. The dataset, calibration files, and evaluation scripts are publicly available at https://rtk-slam-dataset.github.io/.

</details>


### [360] [Flow Motion Policy: Manipulator Motion Planning with Flow Matching Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07084)
*Davood Soleymanzadeh,Xiao Liang,Minghui Zheng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: Flow Motion Policy是一种用于机械臂的端到端神经运动规划器，利用流匹配方法的随机生成公式捕捉规划数据集的多模态特性，通过推理时最佳N采样提高规划成功率和效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有开环端到端神经运动规划器通常为给定工作空间生成单一路径，且未充分利用其开环结构进行推理时优化。需要一种能够捕捉规划数据集多模态特性并支持推理时优化的方法。

Method: 提出Flow Motion Policy，基于流匹配方法的随机生成公式对可行路径分布进行建模。该方法生成多个端到端候选路径，规划后评估碰撞状态，并执行第一个无碰撞解决方案。

Result: 与代表性采样基和神经运动规划方法相比，Flow Motion Policy提高了规划成功率和效率，证明了随机生成策略在端到端运动规划和推理时优化中的有效性。

Conclusion: Flow Motion Policy通过捕捉规划数据集的多模态特性和支持推理时最佳N采样，为机械臂运动规划提供了一种有效的开环端到端神经运动规划方法。

Abstract: Open-loop end-to-end neural motion planners have recently been proposed to improve motion planning for robotic manipulators. These methods enable planning directly from sensor observations without relying on a privileged collision checker during planning. However, many existing methods generate only a single path for a given workspace across different runs, and do not leverage their open-loop structure for inference-time optimization. To address this limitation, we introduce Flow Motion Policy, an open-loop, end-to-end neural motion planner for robotic manipulators that leverages the stochastic generative formulation of flow matching methods to capture the inherent multi-modality of planning datasets. By modeling a distribution over feasible paths, Flow Motion Policy enables efficient inference-time best-of-$N$ sampling. The method generates multiple end-to-end candidate paths, evaluates their collision status after planning, and executes the first collision-free solution. We benchmark the Flow Motion Policy against representative sampling-based and neural motion planning methods. Evaluation results demonstrate that Flow Motion Policy improves planning success and efficiency, highlighting the effectiveness of stochastic generative policies for end-to-end motion planning and inference-time optimization. Experimental evaluation videos are available via this \href{https://zh.engr.tamu.edu/wp-content/uploads/sites/310/2026/03/FMP-Website.mp4}{link}.

</details>


### [361] [AEROS: A Single-Agent Operating Architecture with Embodied Capability Modules](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07039)
*Xue Qin,Simin Luan,Cong Yang,Zhijun Li*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: AEROS框架将机器人建模为单一持久智能主体，通过可安装的具身能力模块扩展功能，实现模块化扩展、可组合能力执行和系统级安全保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有机器人系统缺乏统一原则来组织智能、能力和执行，要么采用单体架构耦合技能，要么分解为松散协调的模块或多智能体，缺乏一致的身份和控制权模型。

Method: 提出AEROS（Agent Execution Runtime Operating System）框架，将每个机器人建模为单一持久智能体，能力通过具身能力模块提供，执行约束和安全保证由策略分离运行时强制执行。

Result: 在PyBullet仿真中，Franka Panda 7-DOF机械臂的8个实验显示：AEROS在三个任务中达到100%成功率（基线为67-93%），策略层阻止所有无效动作，运行时优势跨任务泛化，ECM热加载后100%成功。

Conclusion: AEROS为机器人系统提供了统一的智能主体模型，通过模块化能力扩展和策略分离运行时实现了可扩展性、可组合性和系统级安全性，为机器人系统架构提供了新范式。

Abstract: Robotic systems lack a principled abstraction for organizing intelligence, capabilities, and execution in a unified manner. Existing approaches either couple skills within monolithic architectures or decompose functionality into loosely coordinated modules or multiple agents, often without a coherent model of identity and control authority. We argue that a robot should be modeled as a single persistent intelligent subject whose capabilities are extended through installable packages. We formalize this view as AEROS (Agent Execution Runtime Operating System), in which each robot corresponds to one persistent agent and capabilities are provided through Embodied Capability Modules (ECMs). Each ECM encapsulates executable skills, models, and tools, while execution constraints and safety guarantees are enforced by a policy-separated runtime. This separation enables modular extensibility, composable capability execution, and consistent system-level safety. We evaluate a reference implementation in PyBullet simulation with a Franka Panda 7-DOF manipulator across eight experiments covering re-planning, failure recovery, policy enforcement, baseline comparison, cross-task generality, ECM hot-swapping, ablation, and failure boundary analysis. Over 100 randomized trials per condition, AEROS achieves 100% task success across three tasks versus baselines (BehaviorTree.CPP-style and ProgPrompt-style at 92--93%, flat pipeline at 67--73%), the policy layer blocks all invalid actions with zero false acceptances, runtime benefits generalize across tasks without task-specific tuning, and ECMs load at runtime with 100% post-swap success.

</details>


### [362] [KITE: Keyframe-Indexed Tokenized Evidence for VLM-Based Robot Failure Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07034)
*Mehdi Hosseinzadeh,King Hang Wong,Feras Dayoub*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: KITE是一个无需训练、基于关键帧锚定、布局接地的前端系统，可将长机器人执行视频转换为紧凑、可解释的标记化证据，供视觉语言模型使用，支持机器人故障检测、识别、定位、解释和纠正。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的视觉语言模型在处理长机器人执行视频时面临挑战，需要将复杂的视频内容转换为结构化、可解释的表示形式，以支持全面的机器人故障分析任务。

Method: KITE通过提取运动显著的关键帧，结合开放词汇检测，为每个关键帧生成示意性鸟瞰图表示，编码相对物体布局、坐标轴、时间戳和检测置信度，然后将这些视觉线索与机器人配置和场景上下文标记序列化为统一提示。

Result: 在RoboFAC基准测试中，KITE与Qwen2.5-VL结合在无需训练设置下显著优于原始Qwen2.5-VL，在模拟故障检测、识别和定位方面有特别大的提升，同时与RoboFAC调优基线保持竞争力。QLoRA微调进一步提高了解释和纠正质量。

Conclusion: KITE作为一个结构化、可解释的前端系统，能够有效支持机器人故障分析，在实际双臂机器人上展示了实用适用性，为机器人视频分析提供了紧凑且可解释的表示方法。

Abstract: We present KITE, a training-free, keyframe-anchored, layout-grounded front-end that converts long robot-execution videos into compact, interpretable tokenized evidence for vision-language models (VLMs). KITE distills each trajectory into a small set of motion-salient keyframes with open-vocabulary detections and pairs each keyframe with a schematic bird's-eye-view (BEV) representation that encodes relative object layout, axes, timestamps, and detection confidence. These visual cues are serialized with robot-profile and scene-context tokens into a unified prompt, allowing the same front-end to support failure detection, identification, localization, explanation, and correction with an off-the-shelf VLM. On the RoboFAC benchmark, KITE with Qwen2.5-VL substantially improves over vanilla Qwen2.5-VL in the training-free setting, with especially large gains on simulation failure detection, identification, and localization, while remaining competitive with a RoboFAC-tuned baseline. A small QLoRA fine-tune further improves explanation and correction quality. We also report qualitative results on real dual-arm robots, demonstrating the practical applicability of KITE as a structured and interpretable front-end for robot failure analysis. Code and models are released on our project page: https://m80hz.github.io/kite/

</details>


### [363] [Differentiable Environment-Trajectory Co-Optimization for Safe Multi-Agent Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06972)
*Zhan Gao,Gabriele Fadini,Stelian Coros,Amanda Prorok*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出一个双层优化框架，将环境配置作为决策变量与智能体动作联合优化，以实现安全导航。通过可微优化方法迭代求解下层轨迹优化和上层环境配置优化，利用KKT条件和隐函数定理计算梯度，并提出了新的导航安全度量指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统多智能体导航方法将环境视为固定约束，忽略了环境配置对智能体性能的影响。本文认为环境配置应与智能体动作联合优化，以在空间约束、规则和限制下实现更安全的导航。

Method: 1. 建立双层优化问题：下层优化智能体轨迹以最小化导航成本，上层优化环境配置以最大化导航安全性。2. 开发可微优化方法：使用内点法迭代求解下层问题，梯度上升法求解上层问题。3. 关键技术：利用KKT条件和隐函数定理计算智能体轨迹对环境参数的梯度，实现双层结构的可微性。4. 提出新的导航安全度量指标，并通过测度理论证明其有效性。

Result: 实验在仓库物流到城市交通等多种安全关键导航场景中验证了框架的有效性。结果表明，优化后的环境能够提供导航引导，同时提高智能体的安全性和效率。

Conclusion: 将环境配置作为决策变量与智能体动作联合优化的方法能够显著改善多智能体导航的安全性和效率。提出的双层优化框架和可微优化方法为解决安全关键导航问题提供了有效途径。

Abstract: The environment plays a critical role in multi-agent navigation by imposing spatial constraints, rules, and limitations that agents must navigate around. Traditional approaches treat the environment as fixed, without exploring its impact on agents' performance. This work considers environment configurations as decision variables, alongside agent actions, to jointly achieve safe navigation. We formulate a bi-level problem, where the lower-level sub-problem optimizes agent trajectories that minimize navigation cost and the upper-level sub-problem optimizes environment configurations that maximize navigation safety. We develop a differentiable optimization method that iteratively solves the lower-level sub-problem with interior point methods and the upper-level sub-problem with gradient ascent. A key challenge lies in analytically coupling these two levels. We address this by leveraging KKT conditions and the Implicit Function Theorem to compute gradients of agent trajectories w.r.t. environment parameters, enabling differentiation throughout the bi-level structure. Moreover, we propose a novel metric that quantifies navigation safety as a criterion for the upper-level environment optimization, and prove its validity through measure theory. Our experiments validate the effectiveness of the proposed framework in a variety of safety-critical navigation scenarios, inspired from warehouse logistics to urban transportation. The results demonstrate that optimized environments provide navigation guidance, improving both agents' safety and efficiency.

</details>


### [364] [Learning-Based Strategy for Composite Robot Assembly Skill Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06949)
*Khalil Abuibaid,Aleksandr Sidorenko,Achim Wagner,Martin Ruskowski*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于残差强化学习的模块化技能策略，用于解决工业机器人执行接触丰富的孔轴装配任务中的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 工业机器人在执行接触丰富的任务（如孔轴装配）时面临几何公差严格、摩擦变化和接触动力学不确定等挑战，特别是在使用位置控制机械臂时。需要一种既能适应环境变化又能保持安全性和样本效率的方法。

Method: 采用基于技能的残差强化学习（RRL）方法，将装配过程表示为具有明确前置条件、后置条件和不变条件的复合技能。通过RRL将适应限制在每个技能内部的残差细化，保持整体技能结构和执行流程不变，确保安全性和样本效率。在MuJoCo仿真中使用UR5e机器人和Robotiq夹爪，采用SAC和JAX进行训练。

Result: 结果表明，所提出的方法能够实现装配技能的鲁棒执行，证明了其在工业自动化中的适用性。技能封装和残差适应策略有效解决了接触丰富任务中的不确定性问题。

Conclusion: 基于残差强化学习的技能封装策略为工业机器人执行接触丰富的装配任务提供了一种可重用、模块化且鲁棒的解决方案，在保持安全性和样本效率的同时实现了对不确定性的适应。

Abstract: Contact-rich robotic skills remain challenging for industrial robots due to tight geometric tolerances, frictional variability, and uncertain contact dynamics, particularly when using position-controlled manipulators. This paper presents a reusable and encapsulated skill-based strategy for peg-in-hole assembly, in which adaptation is achieved through Residual Reinforcement Learning (RRL). The assembly process is represented using composite skills with explicit pre-, post-, and invariant conditions, enabling modularity, reusability, and well-defined execution semantics across task variations. Safety and sample efficiency are promoted through RRL by restricting adaptation to residual refinements within each skill during contact-rich interactions, while the overall skill structure and execution flow remain invariant. The proposed approach is evaluated in MuJoCo simulation on a UR5e robot equipped with a Robotiq gripper and trained using SAC and JAX. Results demonstrate that the proposed formulation enables robust execution of assembly skills, highlighting its suitability for industrial automation.

</details>


### [365] [Sustainable Transfer Learning for Adaptive Robot Skills](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06943)
*Khalil Abuibaid,Vinit Hegiste,Nigora Gafur,Achim Wagner,Martin Ruskowski*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该研究探索了不同机器人平台间的策略迁移，重点关注使用强化学习的孔轴装配任务，发现微调能显著提升性能并减少训练步数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 从零开始学习机器人技能通常耗时，而重用数据能促进可持续性并提高样本效率。本研究旨在探索不同机器人平台间的策略迁移，以减少重复训练需求。

Method: 在两个不同机器人上进行孔轴装配任务的强化学习策略训练，然后评估零样本迁移、微调和从零开始训练三种方式的性能。

Result: 零样本迁移导致较低的成功率和较长的任务执行时间，而微调能显著提升性能且需要更少的训练步数。

Conclusion: 策略迁移结合适应技术能提高样本效率和泛化能力，减少大量重复训练需求，支持可持续的机器人学习。

Abstract: Learning robot skills from scratch is often time-consuming, while reusing data promotes sustainability and improves sample efficiency. This study investigates policy transfer across different robotic platforms, focusing on peg-in-hole task using reinforcement learning (RL). Policy training is carried out on two different robots. Their policies are transferred and evaluated for zero-shot, fine-tuning, and training from scratch. Results indicate that zero-shot transfer leads to lower success rates and relatively longer task execution times, while fine-tuning significantly improves performance with fewer training time-steps. These findings highlight that policy transfer with adaptation techniques improves sample efficiency and generalization, reducing the need for extensive retraining and supporting sustainable robotic learning.

</details>


### [366] [Towards Multi-Object Nonprehensile Transportation via Shared Teleoperation: A Framework Based on Virtual Object Model Predictive Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06932)
*Xinyang Fan,Zhaoyang Chen,Shu Xin,Yi Ren,Zainan Jiang,Fenglei Ni,Hong Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种用于多物体非抓取式遥操作的共享控制框架，人类和机器人共享位置控制，机器人自主管理方向以满足动态约束，显著减少了滑动距离并消除了翻倒现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多物体非抓取式遥操作需要同时进行轨迹跟踪和托盘方向控制，现有方法存在模型依赖、参数不确定和多物体适应性差的问题。

Method: 1) 使用基于虚拟对象(VO)的方法进行理论动态约束分析，简化轨迹规划约束；2) 基于MPC的轨迹平滑算法，强制执行实时约束并协调用户跟踪与方向控制；3) 人类和机器人共享位置控制，机器人自主管理方向。

Result: 能够稳定操纵9个物体，加速度高达2.4 m/s²；与基线相比，滑动距离减少72.45%，翻倒率从13.9%降至0%，在复杂场景中表现出强大的适应性。

Conclusion: 提出的共享遥操作框架有效解决了多物体非抓取运输中的动态约束问题，通过人类-机器人协作和自主方向控制实现了稳定、精确的操作性能。

Abstract: Multi-object nonprehensile transportation in teleoperation demands simultaneous trajectory tracking and tray orientation control. Existing methods often struggle with model dependency, uncertain parameters, and multi-object adaptability. We propose a shared teleoperation framework where humans and robots share positioning control, while the robot autonomously manages orientation to satisfy dynamic constraints. Key contributions include: 1) A theoretical dynamic constraint analysis utilizing a novel virtual object (VO)-based method to simplify constraints for trajectory planning. 2) An MPC-based trajectory smoothing algorithm that enforces real-time constraints and coordinates user tracking with orientation control. 3) Validations demonstrating stable manipulation of nine objects at accelerations up to 2.4 m/s2. Compared to the baseline, our approach reduces sliding distance by 72.45% and eliminates tip-overs (0% vs. 13.9%), proving robust adaptability in complex scenarios.

</details>


### [367] [RichMap: A Reachability Map Balancing Precision, Efficiency, and Flexibility for Rich Robot Manipulation Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06778)
*Yupu Lu,Yuxiang Ma,Jia Pan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: RichMap是一种高精度可达性地图表示方法，通过改进经典网格结构，在保持结构灵活性的同时实现接近紧凑地图形式的性能，支持机器人操作任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 需要一种既能保持高效率又能维持结构灵活性的高精度可达性地图表示方法，以支持多样化的机器人操作任务。

Method: 通过改进经典网格结构，利用S²（或SO(3)）的理论容量边界确保严格覆盖，并采用异步流水线进行高效构建。

Result: 验证显示高预测准确率（>98%）、低误报率（1-2%）和快速批量查询（约15μs/查询）。在跨具身场景的方块推动实验中，通过基于能量的扩散策略转移实现了高达26%的性能提升。

Conclusion: RichMap在效率与灵活性之间取得了良好平衡，支持机器人工作空间相似性量化和策略转移等应用，为机器人操作任务提供了有效的可达性地图表示方案。

Abstract: This paper presents RichMap, a high-precision reachability map representation designed to balance efficiency and flexibility for versatile robot manipulation tasks. By refining the classic grid-based structure, we propose a streamlined approach that achieves performance close to compact map forms (e.g., RM4D) while maintaining structural flexibility. Our method utilizes theoretical capacity bounds on $\mathbb{S}^2$ (or $SO(3)$) to ensure rigorous coverage and employs an asynchronous pipeline for efficient construction. We validate the map against comprehensive metrics, pursuing high prediction accuracy ($>98\%$), low false positive rates ($1\sim2\%$), and fast large-batch query ($\sim$15 $μ$s/query). We extend the framework applications to quantify robot workspace similarity via maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) metrics and demonstrate energy-based guidance for diffusion policy transfer, achieving up to $26\%$ improvement for cross-embodiment scenarios in the block pushing experiment.

</details>


### [368] [Train-Small Deploy-Large: Leveraging Diffusion-Based Multi-Robot Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06598)
*Siddharth Singh,Soumee Guha,Qing Chang,Scott Acton*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出基于扩散模型的多机器人路径规划方法，能够在训练时使用少量机器人，部署时泛化到更多机器人，实现"训练小、部署大"的范式


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习的多机器人路径规划方法难以扩展到变化的机器人数量，特别是部署时机器人数量增加的情况。传统方法通常在固定数量的机器人上训练，测试时减少数量尚可容忍，但增加数量时通常失败。同时，为更多机器人训练这些方法既耗时又计算昂贵。而分析方法在计算扩展性或处理环境动态变化方面存在困难。

Method: 提出基于扩散模型的规划器，能够处理动态变化的机器人数量。方法采用单一共享的扩散模型规划器，结合专用的智能体间注意力计算和时间卷积。该方法在有限数量的机器人上训练，但能够有效泛化到部署时更大数量的机器人。

Result: 结果表明，集成单一共享扩散模型规划器与专用智能体间注意力计算和时间卷积，能够实现"训练小、部署大"的范式，并保持良好的准确性。该方法在多种场景中得到验证，并与现有的多智能体强化学习技术和启发式控制方法进行了性能比较。

Conclusion: 基于扩散模型的多机器人路径规划方法能够有效解决现有方法在机器人数量变化时的扩展性和泛化性问题，实现了在少量机器人上训练、在更多机器人上部署的实用范式，为动态多机器人系统提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Learning based multi-robot path planning methods struggle to scale or generalize to changes, particularly variations in the number of robots during deployment.
