  Motivated by platform-mediated systems, we propose Regret-Aware Policy Optimization (RAPO), which augments the environment with persistent harm-trace and scar fields and applies a bounded, mass-preserving transition reweighting to reduce reachability of historically harmful regions.
  On graph diffusion tasks (50-1000 nodes), RAPO suppresses replay, reducing re-amplification gain (RAG) from 0.98 to 0.33 on 250-node graphs while retaining 82\% of task return. Disabling transition deformation only during replay restores re-amplification (RAG 0.91), isolating environment-level deformation as the causal mechanism.

</details>


### [594] [GIRL: Generative Imagination Reinforcement Learning via Information-Theoretic Hallucination Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07426)
*Prakul Sunil Hiremath*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GIRL是一种基于潜在世界模型的强化学习框架，通过跨模态基础信号和不确定性自适应信任区域瓶颈来减少模型误差累积和想象轨迹漂移，在长时程任务中显著提升样本效率和性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于模型的强化学习（MBRL）通过想象轨迹优化策略来提高样本效率，但长时程规划中模型误差会累积，导致想象轨迹偏离训练流形，性能下降。现有方法难以有效控制这种漂移问题。

Method: GIRL包含两个核心组件：1）使用冻结基础模型（DINOv2）的跨模态基础信号，将潜在转移先验锚定到语义一致的嵌入空间，惩罚不一致或不可信的预测；2）不确定性自适应信任区域瓶颈，将KL正则化器解释为约束优化问题的拉格朗日乘子，通过期望信息增益和相对性能损失信号校准学习区域，限制想象漂移。

Result: 在DeepMind Control、Adroit Hand Manipulation和带视觉干扰的Meta-World三个基准测试中，GIRL相比DreamerV3将潜在轨迹漂移减少了38-61%，提高了渐近回报，在长时程任务中需要更少的环境交互。在稀疏奖励和高接触设置下，GIRL也优于TD-MPC2。蒸馏先验变体减少了推理开销并提高了计算效率。

Conclusion: GIRL通过跨模态基础信号和自适应信任区域瓶颈有效解决了MBRL中的想象漂移问题，在长时程规划任务中显著提升了样本效率和性能，为基于模型的强化学习提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) improves sample efficiency by optimizing policies inside imagined rollouts, but long-horizon planning degrades when model errors compound and imagined trajectories drift off the training manifold. We introduce GIRL (Generative Imagination Reinforcement Learning), a latent world-model framework that addresses this failure mode with two key components. First, a cross-modal grounding signal derived from a frozen foundation model (DINOv2) anchors the latent transition prior to a semantically consistent embedding space, penalizing inconsistent or implausible predictions. Second, an uncertainty-adaptive trust-region bottleneck interprets the KL regularizer as the Lagrange multiplier of a constrained optimization problem, restricting imagination drift within a learned region calibrated by Expected Information Gain and a Relative Performance Loss signal.
  We re-derive a value-gap bound using the Performance Difference Lemma and Integral Probability Metrics, yielding a bound that remains informative as the discount factor approaches one and connects the objective to real-environment regret. Experiments across three benchmark suites, including DeepMind Control, Adroit Hand Manipulation, and Meta-World with visual distractors, show that GIRL reduces latent rollout drift by 38 to 61 percent across tasks relative to DreamerV3, improves asymptotic return, and requires fewer environment interactions on long-horizon tasks. GIRL also outperforms TD-MPC2 on sparse-reward and high-contact settings under standard evaluation metrics. A distilled-prior variant reduces inference overhead and improves computational efficiency relative to the full model.

</details>


### [595] [Tracking Adaptation Time: Metrics for Temporal Distribution Shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07266)
*Lorenzo Iovine,Giacomo Ziffer,Emanuele Della Valle*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出三种互补指标来区分模型适应性与数据内在难度，以更动态、可解释地评估时间分布漂移下的模型鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估时间分布漂移鲁棒性的指标仅量化性能平均下降，无法捕捉模型如何适应演化数据，导致时间退化常被误解：当准确率下降时，不清楚是模型未能适应还是数据本身变得更具学习挑战性。

Method: 提出三种互补指标来区分模型适应性与数据内在难度，这些指标共同提供时间分布漂移下模型行为的动态、可解释视图。

Result: 结果显示，这些指标揭示了现有分析隐藏的适应模式，为演化环境中时间鲁棒性提供了更丰富的理解。

Conclusion: 提出的三种互补指标能够有效区分模型适应性与数据内在难度，为时间分布漂移下的模型行为提供更动态、可解释的评估框架。

Abstract: Evaluating robustness under temporal distribution shift remains an open challenge. Existing metrics quantify the average decline in performance, but fail to capture how models adapt to evolving data. As a result, temporal degradation is often misinterpreted: when accuracy declines, it is unclear whether the model is failing to adapt or whether the data itself has become inherently more challenging to learn. In this work, we propose three complementary metrics to distinguish adaptation from intrinsic difficulty in the data. Together, these metrics provide a dynamic and interpretable view of model behavior under temporal distribution shift. Results show that our metrics uncover adaptation patterns hidden by existing analysis, offering a richer understanding of temporal robustness in evolving environments.

</details>


### [596] [A comparative analysis of machine learning models in SHAP analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07258)
*Justin Lin,Julia Fukuyama*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文探讨了SHAP分析在不同机器学习模型和数据集上的应用，提出了多分类问题的瀑布图泛化方法，旨在帮助分析师更好地理解和解释黑盒模型的预测过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大数据和复杂模型的发展，黑盒模型在关键决策场景中缺乏可解释性成为主要问题。SHAP分析虽然能解释模型预测，但其解释具有模型依赖性，缺乏通用的分析流程，需要系统研究来指导实践应用。

Method: 1. 对多种机器学习模型和数据集进行详细的SHAP分析研究；2. 提出多分类问题中瀑布图（waterfall plot）的新泛化方法；3. 探索SHAP值在不同模型和数据集中的解释模式。

Result: 揭示了SHAP分析在不同模型和数据集中的细节与细微差别，为分析师提供了实用的指导。提出的多分类瀑布图泛化方法扩展了SHAP可视化工具的应用范围。

Conclusion: SHAP分析是解释黑盒模型预测的有效工具，但其解释具有模型依赖性。通过系统研究和新的可视化方法，可以增强分析师在可解释AI领域的能力，促进数据驱动解决方案的开发。

Abstract: In this growing age of data and technology, large black-box models are becoming the norm due to their ability to handle vast amounts of data and learn incredibly complex data patterns. The deficiency of these methods, however, is their inability to explain the prediction process, making them untrustworthy and their use precarious in high-stakes situations. SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) analysis is an explainable AI method growing in popularity for its ability to explain model predictions in terms of the original features. For each sample and feature in the data set, an associated SHAP value quantifies the contribution of that feature to the prediction of that sample. Analysis of these SHAP values provides valuable insight into the model's decision-making process, which can be leveraged to create data-driven solutions. The interpretation of these SHAP values, however, is model-dependent, so there does not exist a universal analysis procedure. To aid in these efforts, we present a detailed investigation of SHAP analysis across various machine learning models and data sets. In uncovering the details and nuance behind SHAP analysis, we hope to empower analysts in this less-explored territory. We also present a novel generalization of the waterfall plot to the multi-classification problem.

</details>


### [597] [FP4 Explore, BF16 Train: Diffusion Reinforcement Learning via Efficient Rollout Scaling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06916)
*Yitong Li,Junsong Chen,Shuchen Xue,Pengcuo Zeren,Siyuan Fu,Dinghao Yang,Yangyang Tang,Junjie Bai,Ping Luo,Song Han,Enze Xie*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Sol-RL框架，通过FP4量化加速扩散模型强化学习对齐训练，在保持训练完整性的同时实现4.64倍加速


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于强化学习的后训练是文本到图像扩散模型对齐的有效方法，但大规模基础模型（如FLUX.1-12B）的rollout扩展带来巨大计算负担。FP4量化可缓解瓶颈，但朴素量化方法会引入性能下降风险

Method: 提出Sol-RL框架：1）使用高吞吐NVFP4 rollouts生成大规模候选池并提取高对比度子集；2）用BF16精度重新生成选定样本，并仅在这些样本上优化策略。通过解耦候选探索和策略优化，结合算法机制与系统级吞吐增益

Result: 在SANA、FLUX.1和SD3.5-L上的实验表明，该方法在保持BF16精度训练完整性的同时，充分利用FP4算术的吞吐增益，在多个指标上实现更优的对齐性能，训练收敛加速达4.64倍

Conclusion: Sol-RL通过算法-硬件协同设计，有效加速rollout阶段同时保留高保真样本进行优化，以低成本解锁大规模rollout扩展的能力，为扩散模型对齐提供高效解决方案

Abstract: Reinforcement-Learning-based post-training has recently emerged as a promising paradigm for aligning text-to-image diffusion models with human preferences. In recent studies, increasing the rollout group size yields pronounced performance improvements, indicating substantial room for further alignment gains. However, scaling rollouts on large-scale foundational diffusion models (e.g., FLUX.1-12B) imposes a heavy computational burden. To alleviate this bottleneck, we explore the integration of FP4 quantization into Diffusion RL rollouts. Yet, we identify that naive quantized pipelines inherently introduce risks of performance degradation. To overcome this dilemma between efficiency and training integrity, we propose Sol-RL (Speed-of-light RL), a novel FP4-empowered Two-stage Reinforcement Learning framework. First, we utilize high-throughput NVFP4 rollouts to generate a massive candidate pool and extract a highly contrastive subset. Second, we regenerate these selected samples in BF16 precision and optimize the policy exclusively on them. By decoupling candidate exploration from policy optimization, Sol-RL integrates the algorithmic mechanisms of rollout scaling with the system-level throughput gains of NVFP4. This synergistic algorithm-hardware design effectively accelerates the rollout phase while reserving high-fidelity samples for optimization. We empirically demonstrate that our framework maintains the training integrity of BF16 precision pipeline while fully exploiting the throughput gains enabled by FP4 arithmetic. Extensive experiments across SANA, FLUX.1, and SD3.5-L substantiate that our approach delivers superior alignment performance across multiple metrics while accelerating training convergence by up to $4.64\times$, unlocking the power of massive rollout scaling at a fraction of the cost.

</details>


### [598] [Weaves, Wires, and Morphisms: Formalizing and Implementing the Algebra of Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07242)
*Vincent Abbott,Gioele Zardini*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出用于深度学习模型的范畴论框架，通过轴步幅和数组广播范畴形式化广播操作，实现架构的数学表达和组合操作


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习模型虽然是明确定义的数学函数，但缺乏描述模型架构的形式化数学框架。现有的临时符号、图表和伪代码难以处理非线性广播以及组件与组合模型之间的关系

Method: 引入基于范畴论的深度学习模型框架，通过新颖的轴步幅和数组广播范畴形式化广播操作，将数学定义转化为人类可管理的图表和机器可管理的数据结构

Result: 开发了Python(pyncd)和TypeScript(tsncd)的双重实现，展示框架的通用性，支持代数构造、图转换、PyTorch编译和图表渲染等功能

Conclusion: 为深度学习模型设计和分析提供了系统化、形式化的基础，使架构的数学函数能够以组合方式精确表达和操作

Abstract: Despite deep learning models running well-defined mathematical functions, we lack a formal mathematical framework for describing model architectures. Ad-hoc notation, diagrams, and pseudocode poorly handle nonlinear broadcasting and the relationship between individual components and composed models. This paper introduces a categorical framework for deep learning models that formalizes broadcasting through the novel axis-stride and array-broadcasted categories. This allows the mathematical function underlying architectures to be precisely expressed and manipulated in a compositional manner. These mathematical definitions are translated into human manageable diagrams and machine manageable data structures. We provide a mirrored implementation in Python (pyncd) and TypeScript (tsncd) to show the universal aspect of our framework, along with features including algebraic construction, graph conversion, PyTorch compilation and diagram rendering. This lays the foundation for a systematic, formal approach to deep learning model design and analysis.

</details>


### [599] [FlashSAC: Fast and Stable Off-Policy Reinforcement Learning for High-Dimensional Robot Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04539)
*Donghu Kim,Youngdo Lee,Minho Park,Kinam Kim,I Made Aswin Nahendra,Takuma Seno,Sehee Min,Daniel Palenicek,Florian Vogt,Danica Kragic,Jan Peters,Jaegul Choo,Hojoon Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FlashSAC是一种基于Soft Actor-Critic的快速稳定离策略强化学习算法，通过减少梯度更新、使用更大模型和更高数据吞吐量来提升训练效率，同时在增加规模时通过约束权重、特征和梯度范数来保持稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有强化学习方法存在局限性：在策略方法（如PPO）依赖窄分布数据，在高维状态动作空间中难以准确评估策略；离策略方法能从更广泛分布学习但收敛慢且不稳定，因为拟合多样数据的价值函数需要大量梯度更新，导致批评器误差通过自举累积。

Method: FlashSAC基于Soft Actor-Critic构建，借鉴监督学习中的缩放定律，大幅减少梯度更新次数，同时补偿以更大模型和更高数据吞吐量。为在增加规模时保持稳定性，算法明确约束权重、特征和梯度范数，控制批评器误差累积。

Result: 在10个模拟器的60多个任务中，FlashSAC在最终性能和训练效率上一致优于PPO和强离策略基线，在高维任务（如灵巧操作）上提升最大。在仿真到真实的人形机器人运动任务中，FlashSAC将训练时间从数小时减少到数分钟。

Conclusion: FlashSAC展示了离策略强化学习在仿真到真实迁移中的潜力，通过减少梯度更新、增加模型规模和约束规范来平衡效率与稳定性，为高维机器人控制任务提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a core approach for robot control when expert demonstrations are unavailable. On-policy methods such as Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) are widely used for their stability, but their reliance on narrowly distributed on-policy data limits accurate policy evaluation in high-dimensional state and action spaces. Off-policy methods can overcome this limitation by learning from a broader state-action distribution, yet suffer from slow convergence and instability, as fitting a value function over diverse data requires many gradient updates, causing critic errors to accumulate through bootstrapping. We present FlashSAC, a fast and stable off-policy RL algorithm built on Soft Actor-Critic. Motivated by scaling laws observed in supervised learning, FlashSAC sharply reduces gradient updates while compensating with larger models and higher data throughput. To maintain stability at increased scale, FlashSAC explicitly bounds weight, feature, and gradient norms, curbing critic error accumulation. Across over 60 tasks in 10 simulators, FlashSAC consistently outperforms PPO and strong off-policy baselines in both final performance and training efficiency, with the largest gains on high-dimensional tasks such as dexterous manipulation. In sim-to-real humanoid locomotion, FlashSAC reduces training time from hours to minutes, demonstrating the promise of off-policy RL for sim-to-real transfer.

</details>


### [600] [On the Price of Privacy for Language Identification and Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07238)
*Xiaoyu Li,Andi Han,Jiaojiao Jiang,Junbin Gao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了语言模型在差分隐私下的语言识别和生成任务，量化了隐私成本。近似DP下可达到非私有误差率，纯DP下误差指数衰减因子为min{1,ε}，且该界限是紧的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着大语言模型越来越多地在敏感用户数据上训练，理解语言学习中的隐私基本成本变得至关重要。研究在不可知统计设置下差分隐私语言识别和生成的基本界限。

Method: 在不可知统计设置下建立差分隐私语言识别和生成的算法，并给出匹配的下界。分析近似(ε,δ)-DP和纯ε-DP两种隐私设置下的性能界限。

Result: 近似DP下可恢复非私有误差率：识别为exp(-r(n))（任意r(n)=o(n)），生成为exp(-Ω(n))。纯DP下指数衰减因子为min{1,ε}，该界限是紧的（在常数因子内）。生成任务在温和假设下，上界exp(-min{1,ε}·Ω(n))与下界匹配，建立了最优速率。

Conclusion: 语言学习中的隐私成本出人意料地温和：近似DP下完全不存在成本，纯DP下仅为指数中的min{1,ε}因子。这为隐私保护语言学习提供了理论基础。

Abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly trained on sensitive user data, understanding the fundamental cost of privacy in language learning becomes essential. We initiate the study of differentially private (DP) language identification and generation in the agnostic statistical setting, establishing algorithms and matching lower bounds that precisely quantify the cost of privacy. For both tasks, approximate $(\varepsilon, δ)$-DP with constant $\varepsilon > 0$ recovers the non-private error rates: $\exp(-r(n))$ for identification (for any $r(n) = o(n)$) and $\exp(-Ω(n))$ for generation. Under pure $\varepsilon$-DP, the exponents degrade by a multiplicative factor of $\min\{1, \varepsilon\}$, which we show is tight up to constants. Notably, for generation under pure DP with mild assumptions, the upper bound $\exp(-\min\{1,\varepsilon\} \cdot Ω(n))$ matches the lower bound up to some constants, establishing an optimal rate. Our results show that the cost of privacy in language learning is surprisingly mild: absent entirely under approximate DP, and exactly a $\min\{1,\varepsilon\}$ factor in the exponent under pure DP.

</details>


### [601] [How Does Machine Learning Manage Complexity?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07233)
*Lance Fortnow*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文通过计算复杂性视角分析机器学习模型的能力，特别是它们建模复杂系统的能力。研究关注可计算分布而非更广泛的样本分布，提出机器学习可视为产生P/poly可计算分布的过程，并证明如果模型能最小化与密码学伪随机生成器分布的误差，则其输出分布必须接近均匀分布。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前机器学习模型通常在可采样或更复杂分布的数据上训练，这些分布范围远超过可计算分布。通过专注于可计算分布，机器学习模型能更好地通过概率管理复杂性。研究旨在从计算复杂性角度理解机器学习模型建模复杂系统的能力。

Method: 将机器学习抽象为产生P/poly可计算分布的过程，这些分布具有多项式有界的最大熵。通过理论分析证明：如果机器学习模型产生的分布μ能最小化与密码学伪随机生成器生成分布的误差，则μ必须接近均匀分布。

Result: 主要理论结果是：当机器学习模型试图最小化与密码学伪随机生成器分布的误差时，其产生的分布必须接近均匀分布。这展示了机器学习模型在可计算分布框架下对复杂性的建模能力。

Conclusion: 计算复杂性视角为理解机器学习模型的能力提供了新框架。通过专注于可计算分布，机器学习能更好地管理复杂性。研究结果表明，在密码学伪随机生成器的背景下，机器学习模型的输出分布具有特定的理论性质，这有助于理解模型如何建模复杂系统。

Abstract: We provide a computational complexity lens to understand the power of machine learning models, particularly their ability to model complex systems.
  Machine learning models are often trained on data drawn from sampleable or more complex distributions, a far wider range of distributions than just computable ones. By focusing on computable distributions, machine learning models can better manage complexity via probability. We abstract away from specific learning mechanisms, modeling machine learning as producing P/poly-computable distributions with polynomially-bounded max-entropy.
  We illustrate how learning computable distributions models complexity by showing that if a machine learning model produces a distribution $μ$ that minimizes error against the distribution generated by a cryptographic pseudorandom generator, then $μ$ must be close to uniform.

</details>


### [602] [Multimodal Large Language Models for Multi-Subject In-Context Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07422)
*Yucheng Zhou,Dubing Chen,Huan Zheng,Jianbing Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MUSIC是首个专门为多主体上下文图像生成设计的MLLM，通过自动数据生成、视觉思维链机制和语义驱动的空间布局规划，解决了多主体图像生成中的主体缺失和语义漂移问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本到图像生成方法在生成包含多个给定主体的图像时面临挑战，随着参考身份数量增加，常出现主体缺失和语义漂移问题，需要专门的多主体上下文图像生成解决方案。

Method: 1) 提出自动可扩展的数据生成管道，无需人工标注；2) 引入视觉思维链机制，通过逐步推理从主体图像到语义和生成；3) 开发语义驱动的空间布局规划方法，管理视觉复杂性；4) 在训练中纳入复杂主体图像以增强链式推理能力。

Result: MUSIC在多主体和单主体场景中均显著超越其他方法，并创建了专门用于多主体上下文生成的新基准MSIC。

Conclusion: MUSIC通过创新的数据生成、视觉思维链和空间布局规划方法，有效解决了多主体图像生成的核心挑战，在多主体上下文图像生成领域取得了突破性进展。

Abstract: Recent advances in text-to-image (T2I) generation have enabled visually coherent image synthesis from descriptions, but generating images containing multiple given subjects remains challenging. As the number of reference identities increases, existing methods often suffer from subject missing and semantic drift. To address this problem, we propose MUSIC, the first MLLM specifically designed for \textbf{MU}lti-\textbf{S}ubject \textbf{I}n-\textbf{C}ontext image generation. To overcome the data scarcity, we introduce an automatic and scalable data generation pipeline that eliminates the need for manual annotation. Furthermore, we enhance the model's understanding of multi-subject semantic relationships through a vision chain-of-thought (CoT) mechanism, guiding step-by-step reasoning from subject images to semantics and generation. To mitigate identity entanglement and manage visual complexity, we develop a novel semantics-driven spatial layout planning method and demonstrate its test-time scalability. By incorporating complex subject images during training, we improve the model's capacity for chained reasoning. In addition, we curate MSIC, a new benchmark tailored for multi-subject in-context generation. Experimental results demonstrate that MUSIC significantly surpasses other methods in both multi- and single-subject scenarios.

</details>


### [603] [Diffusion Processes on Implicit Manifolds](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07213)
*Victor Kawasaki-Borruat,Clara Grotehans,Pierre Vandergheynst,Adam Gosztolai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种在隐式数据流形上构建扩散过程的方法，仅使用点云样本而不需要几何原语，通过估计生成器和carré-du-champ来定义环境空间中的SDE，收敛于光滑流形上的扩散过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高维数据通常位于低维流形附近，但现有方法需要显式的几何结构（如坐标图、投影等）。本文旨在仅使用点云样本，在隐式流形上构建扩散过程，为流形感知的采样、探索和生成建模提供基础。

Method: 通过从数据构建的邻近图估计扩散过程的无穷小生成器及其carré-du-champ（CDC），这两者共同编码了目标扩散的局部随机和几何结构。基于此构造数据驱动的随机微分方程（SDE），并在环境空间中定义。提供了使用Euler-Maruyama积分的数值模拟程序。

Result: 证明了随着样本数量增加，诱导过程在概率路径空间上依分布收敛于其光滑流形对应物。该方法被称为隐式流形值扩散（IMDs），为数据流形上的扩散动力学提供了严格的实现基础。

Conclusion: IMDs为数据流形上的扩散过程提供了严格的隐式构造方法，仅需点云样本而无需几何原语。这为流形感知的采样、探索和生成建模开辟了新方向，并提供了实用的数值实现框架。

Abstract: High-dimensional data are often modeled as lying near a low-dimensional manifold. We study how to construct diffusion processes on this data manifold in the implicit setting. That is, using only point cloud samples and without access to charts, projections, or other geometric primitives. Our main contribution is a data-driven SDE that captures intrinsic diffusion on the underlying manifold while being defined in ambient space. The construction relies on estimating the diffusion's infinitesimal generator and its carré-du-champ (CDC) from a proximity graph built from the data. The generator and CDC together encode the local stochastic and geometric structure of the intended diffusion. We show that, as the number of samples grows, the induced process converges in law on the space of probability paths to its smooth manifold counterpart. We call this construction Implicit Manifold-valued Diffusions (IMDs), and furthermore present a numerical simulation procedure using Euler-Maruyama integration. This gives a rigorous basis for practical implementations of diffusion dynamics on data manifolds, and opens new directions for manifold-aware sampling, exploration, and generative modeling.

</details>


### [604] [Beyond the Mean: Modelling Annotation Distributions in Continuous Affect Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07198)
*Kosmas Pinitas,Ilias Maglogiannis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于Beta分布的分布感知框架，用于连续情感预测中的标注共识建模，替代传统点估计方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 情感标注具有主观性和认知复杂性，传统方法将标注者间的变异性压缩为均值或中位数等点估计，丢失了标注者分歧和不确定性的重要信息

Method: 提出基于Beta分布的分布感知框架，模型预测标注分布的均值和标准差，通过矩匹配转换为有效的Beta分布参数，可恢复偏度、峰度和分位数等高阶分布描述符

Result: 在SEWA和RECOLA数据集上使用多模态特征进行评估，Beta分布建模产生的预测分布与经验标注分布高度匹配，同时与传统回归方法相比具有竞争力的性能

Conclusion: 研究强调了在情感计算中建模标注不确定性的重要性，展示了分布感知学习在主观信号分析中的潜力

Abstract: Emotion annotation is inherently subjective and cognitively demanding, producing signals that reflect diverse perceptions across annotators rather than a single ground truth. In continuous affect prediction, this variability is typically collapsed into point estimates such as the mean or median, discarding valuable information about annotator disagreement and uncertainty. In this work, we propose a distribution-aware framework that models annotation consensus using the Beta distribution. Instead of predicting a single affect value, models estimate the mean and standard deviation of the annotation distribution, which are transformed into valid Beta parameters through moment matching. This formulation enables the recovery of higher-order distributional descriptors, including skewness, kurtosis, and quantiles, in closed form. As a result, the model captures not only the central tendency of emotional perception but also variability, asymmetry, and uncertainty in annotator responses. We evaluate the proposed approach on the SEWA and RECOLA datasets using multimodal features. Experimental results show that Beta-based modelling produces predictive distributions that closely match the empirical annotator distributions while achieving competitive performance with conventional regression approaches. These findings highlight the importance of modelling annotation uncertainty in affective computing and demonstrate the potential of distribution-aware learning for subjective signal analysis.

</details>


### [605] [SPAMoE: Spectrum-Aware Hybrid Operator Framework for Full-Waveform Inversion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07421)
*Zhenyu Wang,Peiyuan Li,Yongxiang Shi,Ruoyu Wu,Chenfei Liao,Lei Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SPAMoE：一种用于全波形反演的新型频谱感知框架，通过谱保持DINO编码器和谱分解路由机制解决多尺度地质特征的频率纠缠问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全波形反演在重建高分辨率地下速度模型时面临计算量大和不适定问题。现有CNN和单范式神经算子方法难以处理多尺度地质特征的频率纠缠问题，需要新的频谱感知框架来解决这一根本挑战。

Method: 提出SPAMoE框架，包含：1）谱保持DINO编码器，通过对编码表示的高-低频率能量比施加下界来缓解高频崩溃；2）谱分解和路由机制，动态分配频率带至包含FNO、MNO和LNO的混合专家集成；3）在OpenFWI的十个子数据集上进行验证。

Result: 在OpenFWI的十个子数据集上，SPAMoE相对于官方报告的最佳基线，平均MAE降低了54.1%，为基于学习的全波形反演建立了新的架构框架。

Conclusion: SPAMoE通过频谱感知设计有效解决了多尺度地质特征的频率纠缠问题，显著提升了全波形反演的精度，为复杂多尺度结构反问题提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: Full-waveform inversion (FWI) is pivotal for reconstructing high-resolution subsurface velocity models but remains computationally intensive and ill-posed. While deep learning approaches promise efficiency, existing Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) and single-paradigm Neural Operators (NOs) struggle with one fundamental issue: frequency entanglement of multi-scale geological features. To address this challenge, we propose Spectral-Preserving Adaptive MoE (SPAMoE), a novel spectrum-aware framework for solving inverse problems with complex multi-scale structures. Our approach introduces a Spectral-Preserving DINO Encoder that enforces a lower bound on the high-to-low frequency energy ratio of the encoded representation, mitigating high-frequency collapse and stabilizing subsequent frequency-domain modeling. Furthermore, we design a novel Spectral Decomposition and Routing mechanism that dynamically assigns frequency bands to a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) ensemble comprising FNO, MNO, and LNO. On the ten OpenFWI sub-datasets, experiments show that SPAMoE reduces the average MAE by 54.1% relative to the best officially reported OpenFWI baseline, thereby establishing a new architectural framework for learning-based full-waveform inversion.

</details>


### [606] [Mixture Proportion Estimation and Weakly-supervised Kernel Test for Conditional Independence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07191)
*Yushi Hirose,Akito Narahara,Takafumi Kanamori*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于条件独立性的混合比例估计新方法，在不可约性假设不成立时仍能保证可识别性，并开发矩估计器和核检验方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有混合比例估计方法依赖不可约性假设或其变体来保证可识别性，但在该假设不成立时无法有效估计类别先验。需要新的假设框架来扩展可识别性条件。

Method: 提出基于类别标签条件独立性的新假设，确保可识别性；开发矩估计方法并分析其渐近性质；提出弱监督核检验来验证条件独立性假设。

Result: 新估计器相比现有方法性能提升；核检验成功控制I型和II型错误；条件独立性假设为因果发现和公平性评估等应用提供独立价值。

Conclusion: 基于条件独立性的混合比例估计框架扩展了可识别性条件，在不可约性假设不成立时仍能有效估计类别先验，为弱监督学习提供更稳健的工具。

Abstract: Mixture proportion estimation (MPE) aims to estimate class priors from unlabeled data. This task is a critical component in weakly supervised learning, such as PU learning, learning with label noise, and domain adaptation. Existing MPE methods rely on the \textit{irreducibility} assumption or its variant for identifiability. In this paper, we propose novel assumptions based on conditional independence (CI) given the class label, which ensure identifiability even when irreducibility does not hold. We develop method of moments estimators under these assumptions and analyze their asymptotic properties. Furthermore, we present weakly-supervised kernel tests to validate the CI assumptions, which are of independent interest in applications such as causal discovery and fairness evaluation. Empirically, we demonstrate the improved performance of our estimators compared with existing methods and that our tests successfully control both type I and type II errors.\label{key}

</details>


### [607] [Improving Semantic Uncertainty Quantification in Language Model Question-Answering via Token-Level Temperature Scaling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07172)
*Tom A. Lamb,Desi R. Ivanova,Philip H. S. Torr,Tim G. J. Rudner*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 温度缩放是改善语义不确定性校准和区分度的简单有效方法，优于启发式基线和更复杂的标记级重校准方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注不确定性度量的区分度而忽视校准，但校准和区分度捕捉不确定性的不同方面，仅关注区分度会得到不完整的评估。需要系统评估这两个方面来填补这一空白。

Method: 通过优化单个标量温度参数来校准语义置信度分布，认为这提供了合适的归纳偏置。在问答任务上系统评估多种置信度度量，比较温度缩放与启发式基线和标记级重校准方法。

Result: 当前方法（特别是固定温度启发式）产生系统性错误校准且区分度差的语义置信度分布。温度缩放能一致改善语义校准、区分度和下游熵，在问答任务上优于启发式基线和更复杂的标记级重校准方法。

Conclusion: 优化单个标量温度是改善语义不确定性校准和区分度的简单而有效的解决方案，温度缩放应成为语义不确定性量化的标准实践。

Abstract: Calibration is central to reliable semantic uncertainty quantification, yet prior work has largely focused on discrimination, neglecting calibration. As calibration and discrimination capture distinct aspects of uncertainty, focusing on discrimination alone yields an incomplete picture. We address this gap by systematically evaluating both aspects across a broad set of confidence measures. We show that current approaches, particularly fixed-temperature heuristics, produce systematically miscalibrated and poorly discriminative semantic confidence distributions. We demonstrate that optimising a single scalar temperature, which, we argue, provides a suitable inductive bias, is a surprisingly simple yet effective solution. Our exhaustive evaluation confirms that temperature scaling consistently improves semantic calibration, discrimination, and downstream entropy, outperforming both heuristic baselines and more expressive token-level recalibration methods on question-answering tasks.

</details>


### [608] [Lumbermark: Resistant Clustering by Chopping Up Mutual Reachability Minimum Spanning Trees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07143)
*Marek Gagolewski*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Lumbermark是一种鲁棒的分裂聚类算法，能够检测不同大小、密度和形状的簇，通过迭代切割数据集互达最小生成树中的突出连接部分来实现聚类。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有聚类算法在处理不同大小、密度和形状的簇时存在局限性，需要一种更鲁棒的算法来检测复杂数据分布中的簇结构，同时减少低密度对象（如噪声点和离群值）的影响。

Method: Lumbermark基于互达距离构建最小生成树，通过迭代切割树中连接大型分支的突出片段来识别簇。互达距离平滑了数据分布并减少了低密度对象的影响。该算法可视为HDBSCAN的替代方案，但能生成用户指定大小的分区。

Result: Lumbermark在基准数据上表现良好，提供了快速易用的Python和R开源实现（'lumbermark'包），能够有效检测不同大小、密度和形状的簇。

Conclusion: Lumbermark是一种有效的分裂聚类算法，可作为HDBSCAN的替代方案，为数据科学家和从业者提供了处理复杂聚类问题的实用工具。

Abstract: We introduce Lumbermark, a robust divisive clustering algorithm capable of detecting clusters of varying sizes, densities, and shapes. Lumbermark iteratively chops off large limbs connected by protruding segments of a dataset's mutual reachability minimum spanning tree. The use of mutual reachability distances smoothens the data distribution and decreases the influence of low-density objects, such as noise points between clusters or outliers at their peripheries. The algorithm can be viewed as an alternative to HDBSCAN that produces partitions with user-specified sizes. A fast, easy-to-use implementation of the new method is available in the open-source 'lumbermark' package for Python and R. We show that Lumbermark performs well on benchmark data and hope it will prove useful to data scientists and practitioners across different fields.

</details>


### [609] [Selective Neuron Amplification for Training-Free Task Enhancement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07098)
*Ryyan Akhtar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SNA（选择性神经元放大）是一种在推理时增强任务相关神经元影响力而不改变模型参数的方法，主要解决LLM因内部回路激活不足而非知识缺失导致的失败


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型经常在看似已理解的任务上失败，研究发现这更多是由于推理时某些内部回路未被强烈激活，而非知识缺失。需要一种方法在不改变模型参数的情况下增强任务相关神经元的影响

Method: 提出选择性神经元放大（SNA）方法，在推理时识别并增强与特定任务相关的神经元活动，不改变模型参数，不永久修改模型。该方法主要针对模型不确定的情况，对已有信心的任务影响较小

Result: SNA在模型不确定时能显著改善性能，但对已有信心的任务影响有限。这表明某些模型失败是由于弱激活而非能力缺失，验证了内部回路激活不足是模型失败的重要原因

Conclusion: 模型失败常源于内部回路激活不足而非知识缺失，SNA通过推理时选择性放大任务相关神经元有效改善性能，为理解模型失败机制和开发轻量级干预方法提供了新思路

Abstract: Large language models often fail on tasks they seem to already understand. In our experiments, this appears to be less about missing knowledge and more about certain internal circuits not being strongly activated during inference. We explore Selective Neuron Amplification, which increases the influence of task relevant neurons without changing the model's parameters. The method works at inference time and does not permanently alter the model. SNA helps mainly when the model is uncertain, while having low effect when the model is already confident. This suggests that some model failures are due to weak activation rather than lack of capability.

</details>


### [610] [Are Stochastic Multi-objective Bandits Harder than Single-objective Bandits?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07096)
*Changkun Guan,Mengfan Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文证明了在随机多目标赌博机问题中，帕累托遗憾实际上由最大次优性差距g†决定，而非目标维度，并提出了达到最优遗憾界O(K log T/g†)的新算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多目标赌博机中一个长期存在的问题是：由于引入了帕累托序关系和帕累托遗憾，性能优化是否本质上比单目标情况更难？现有研究表明在随机设置中帕累托遗憾随维度增加而增加，但这一有争议且微妙的现象促使作者探究多目标赌博机是否真的比单目标更难。

Method: 提出了一种新算法，采用嵌套双层不确定性量化机制，通过上下置信界估计器同时处理臂和目标的不确定性。算法结合了用于臂选择的top-two竞赛策略和用于维度选择的不确定性贪婪规则，平衡了两层的探索与利用。

Result: 证明了在随机设置中，帕累托遗憾实际上由最大次优性差距g†决定，下界为Ω(K log T/g†)。提出的算法达到了O(K log T/g†)的帕累托遗憾，因此是最优的。数值实验验证了算法的遗憾保证，并显示出相对于基准方法的显著优势。

Conclusion: 多目标赌博机在随机设置中并不比单目标更难，帕累托遗憾由最大次优性差距而非维度决定。提出的双层不确定性量化算法达到了最优遗憾界，解决了这一长期存在的问题。

Abstract: Multi-objective bandits have attracted increasing attention because of their broad applicability and mathematical elegance, where the reward of each arm is a multi-dimensional vector rather than a scalar. This naturally introduces Pareto order relations and Pareto regret. A long-standing question in this area is whether performance is fundamentally harder to optimize because of this added complexity. A recent surprising result shows that, in the adversarial setting, Pareto regret is no larger than classical regret; however, in the stochastic setting, where the regret notion is different, the picture remains unclear. In fact, existing work suggests that Pareto regret in the stochastic case increases with the dimensionality. This controversial yet subtle phenomenon motivates our central question: \emph{are multi-objective bandits actually harder than single-objective ones?} We answer this question in full by showing that, in the stochastic setting, Pareto regret is in fact governed by the maximum sub-optimality gap \(g^\dagger\), and hence by the minimum marginal regret of order \(Ω(\frac{K\log T}{g^\dagger})\). We further develop a new algorithm that achieves Pareto regret of order \(O(\frac{K\log T}{g^\dagger})\), and is therefore optimal. The algorithm leverages a nested two-layer uncertainty quantification over both arms and objectives through upper and lower confidence bound estimators. It combines a top-two racing strategy for arm selection with an uncertainty-greedy rule for dimension selection. Together, these components balance exploration and exploitation across the two layers. We also conduct comprehensive numerical experiments to validate the proposed algorithm, showing the desired regret guarantee and significant gains over benchmark methods.

</details>


### [611] [Mining Electronic Health Records to Investigate Effectiveness of Ensemble Deep Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07085)
*Manar D. Samad,Yina Hou,Shrabani Ghosh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种集成深度聚类方法，通过聚合多个嵌入维度的聚类结果来改进传统和深度学习聚类在电子健康记录数据分析中的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电子健康记录中的患者聚类和疾病亚型识别对于阐明病理生理学和辅助临床决策至关重要，但目前医疗信息学中的聚类仍主要基于传统方法（特别是K-means），在应用于自编码器学习的嵌入表示时效果有限。深度学习聚类方法主要针对图像数据设计，与表格型EHR数据存在显著差异。

Method: 提出了一种集成深度聚类方法，该方法不是依赖单个固定嵌入空间，而是聚合从多个嵌入维度获得的聚类分配。将这种深度聚类方法与传统聚类方法结合在一个新颖的集成框架中，形成集成嵌入深度聚类方法。

Result: 在All of Us研究计划的真实EHR数据上评估了14种不同的聚类方法，提出的集成嵌入深度聚类方法在多个患者队列中获得了最佳的整体性能排名。研究还强调了按生物性别特异性聚类EHR数据的重要性。

Conclusion: 结合传统和深度聚类方法的集成框架优于单一方法，特别是在处理表格型EHR数据时。集成嵌入深度聚类方法为患者聚类和疾病亚型识别提供了更有效的解决方案。

Abstract: In electronic health records (EHRs), clustering patients and distinguishing disease subtypes are key tasks to elucidate pathophysiology and aid clinical decision-making. However, clustering in healthcare informatics is still based on traditional methods, especially K-means, and has achieved limited success when applied to embedding representations learned by autoencoders as hybrid methods. This paper investigates the effectiveness of traditional, hybrid, and deep learning methods in heart failure patient cohorts using real EHR data from the All of Us Research Program. Traditional clustering methods perform robustly because deep learning approaches are specifically designed for image clustering, a task that differs substantially from the tabular EHR data setting. To address the shortcomings of deep clustering, we introduce an ensemble-based deep clustering approach that aggregates cluster assignments obtained from multiple embedding dimensions, rather than relying on a single fixed embedding space. When combined with traditional clustering in a novel ensemble framework, the proposed ensemble embedding for deep clustering delivers the best overall performance ranking across 14 diverse clustering methods and multiple patient cohorts. This paper underscores the importance of biological sex-specific clustering of EHR data and the advantages of combining traditional and deep clustering approaches over a single method.

</details>


### [612] [Epistemic Robust Offline Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07072)
*Abhilash Reddy Chenreddy,Erick Delage*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个统一的离线强化学习框架，用紧凑的Q值不确定性集合替代离散集成，解决数据覆盖不足导致的认知不确定性，并在风险敏感行为策略下实现更好的鲁棒性和泛化性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线强化学习从固定数据集学习策略，面临认知不确定性挑战，特别是当行为策略系统性地避免某些动作时，这会导致不准确的价值估计和不可靠的泛化。现有的集成方法如SAC-N需要大型集成，且经常混淆认知不确定性和随机不确定性。

Method: 提出统一且可泛化的框架，用紧凑的Q值不确定性集合替代离散集成。引入基于Epinet的模型，直接塑造不确定性集合以优化鲁棒贝尔曼目标下的累积奖励，而不依赖集成。

Result: 为评估离线RL算法在风险敏感行为策略下的性能引入了基准测试，并在表格和连续状态域中证明该方法相比基于集成的方法实现了改进的鲁棒性和泛化性。

Conclusion: 提出的框架通过紧凑的不确定性集合有效解决了离线强化学习中的认知不确定性问题，避免了大型集成的需求，在风险敏感场景下表现出更好的性能。

Abstract: Offline reinforcement learning learns policies from fixed datasets without further environment interaction. A key challenge in this setting is epistemic uncertainty, arising from limited or biased data coverage, particularly when the behavior policy systematically avoids certain actions. This can lead to inaccurate value estimates and unreliable generalization. Ensemble-based methods like SAC-N mitigate this by conservatively estimating Q-values using the ensemble minimum, but they require large ensembles and often conflate epistemic with aleatoric uncertainty. To address these limitations, we propose a unified and generalizable framework that replaces discrete ensembles with compact uncertainty sets over Q-values. %We further introduce an Epinet based model that directly shapes the uncertainty sets to optimize the cumulative reward under the robust Bellman objective without relying on ensembles. We also introduce a benchmark for evaluating offline RL algorithms under risk-sensitive behavior policies, and demonstrate that our method achieves improved robustness and generalization over ensemble-based baselines across both tabular and continuous state domains.

</details>


### [613] [AdaBoost Does Not Always Cycle: A Computer-Assisted Counterexample](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07055)
*Erik Y. Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文通过计算机辅助构造了一个反例，证明了Rudin等人提出的关于穷举AdaBoost是否总是收敛到有限循环的开放问题为否。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决Rudin、Schapire和Daubechies在2012年COLT会议上提出的开放问题：穷举AdaBoost是否总是收敛到有限循环？这个问题在机器学习理论中具有重要意义，涉及AdaBoost算法的收敛性分析。

Method: 采用计算机辅助方法构造反例，基于块乘积装置（block-product gadget），该装置的两个因子共享精确的周期-2轨道（5步分支映射），但其线性化返回映射的主导特征值具有无理对数比。这种无理性迫使爆发获胜序列具有无理渐近频率，从而排除了最终周期性。

Result: 成功构造了一个反例，证明穷举AdaBoost不一定收敛到有限循环。所有断言都通过精确有理算术进行了验证，确保了数学严谨性。

Conclusion: 穷举AdaBoost不一定收敛到有限循环，解决了Rudin等人提出的开放问题。该反例基于无理对数比的特征值构造，排除了最终周期性的可能性。研究是与GPT-5.4 Pro和Claude Opus 4.6合作完成的。

Abstract: We give a computer-assisted counterexample to the open question, posed by Rudin, Schapire, and Daubechies in COLT 2012, of whether exhaustive AdaBoost always converges to a finite cycle. The construction is based on a block-product gadget whose two factors share an exact period-2 orbit for their 5-step branch maps, but whose linearized return maps have dominant eigenvalues with an irrational logarithmic ratio. This irrationality forces the burst-winner sequence to have an irrational asymptotic frequency, precluding eventual periodicity. All assertions are certified by exact rational arithmetic. This work was developed in collaboration with GPT-5.4 Pro and Claude Opus 4.6.

</details>


### [614] [MoE Routing Testbed: Studying Expert Specialization and Routing Behavior at Small Scale](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07030)
*Tobias Falke,Nicolas Anastassacos,Samson Tan,Chankrisna Richy Meas,Chandana Satya Prakash,Nitesh Sekhar,M Saiful Bari,Krishna Kompella,Gamaleldin F. Elsayed*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出MoE路由测试平台，用于在小规模下清晰评估MoE路由动态，通过可量化指标衡量专家专业化程度，发现平衡范围是关键因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏混合专家架构在大型语言模型中越来越流行，但面临训练挑战：需要所有专家得到良好训练并以非冗余方式专业化。现有评估困难，因为缺乏标准指标，且小规模路由技术表现相似，不能反映大规模行为。

Method: 提出MoE路由测试平台：使用具有清晰可区分领域的数据混合，配合基于这些领域规定理想路由的参考路由器，提供明确的比较上限。该平台能够量化测量专家专业化程度。

Result: 通过测试平台比较多种MoE路由方法，发现平衡范围是允许专业化同时保持高专家利用率的关键因素。这一观察在35倍更大的模型中得到验证。

Conclusion: MoE路由测试平台为评估路由动态提供了有效工具，揭示了平衡范围对专家专业化和利用率的重要性，且这一发现在大规模模型中具有普适性。

Abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures are increasingly popular for frontier large language models (LLM) but they introduce training challenges due to routing complexity. Fully leveraging parameters of an MoE model requires all experts to be well-trained and to specialize in non-redundant ways. Assessing this, however, is complicated due to lack of established metrics and, importantly, many routing techniques exhibit similar performance at smaller sizes, which is often not reflective of their behavior at large scale. To address this challenge, we propose the MoE Routing Testbed, a setup that gives clearer visibility into routing dynamics at small scale while using realistic data. The testbed pairs a data mix with clearly distinguishable domains with a reference router that prescribes ideal routing based on these domains, providing a well-defined upper bound for comparison. This enables quantifiable measurement of expert specialization. To demonstrate the value of the testbed, we compare various MoE routing approaches and show that balancing scope is the crucial factor that allows specialization while maintaining high expert utilization. We confirm that this observation generalizes to models 35x larger.

</details>


### [615] [Learning to Query History: Nonstationary Classification via Learned Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07027)
*Jimmy Gammell,Bishal Thapaliya,Yoon Jung,Riyasat Ohib,Bilel Fehri,Deepayan Chakrabarti*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种通过历史标记序列增强分类器的方法，使用可学习的离散检索机制从历史数据中采样相关示例，以应对非平稳分类问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 实际分类场景中普遍存在非平稳性，导致已部署模型在训练时验证集表现良好但在实际应用中性能下降。需要解决分布漂移问题，提高模型在非平稳环境中的鲁棒性。

Method: 将非平稳分类重新定义为时间序列预测问题：不仅基于当前输入，还基于历史标记示例序列进行预测。引入可学习的离散检索机制，通过输入相关的查询从历史数据中采样相关示例，使用基于分数的梯度估计器与分类器端到端训练。历史数据可以存储在任意文件系统中。

Result: 在合成基准和Amazon Reviews '23（电子产品类别）上的实验表明，相比标准分类器，该方法对分布漂移具有更好的鲁棒性。随着历史数据序列长度的增加，VRAM使用量可预测地增长。

Conclusion: 通过将非平稳分类重新定义为时间序列预测，并引入可学习的离散检索机制，能够有效利用历史数据提高分类器在分布漂移下的鲁棒性，同时保持可扩展的存储和计算特性。

Abstract: Nonstationarity is ubiquitous in practical classification settings, leading deployed models to perform poorly even when they generalize well to holdout sets available at training time. We address this by reframing nonstationary classification as time series prediction: rather than predicting from the current input alone, we condition the classifier on a sequence of historical labeled examples that extends beyond the training cutoff. To scale to large sequences, we introduce a learned discrete retrieval mechanism that samples relevant historical examples via input-dependent queries, trained end-to-end with the classifier using a score-based gradient estimator. This enables the full corpus of historical data to remain on an arbitrary filesystem during training and deployment. Experiments on synthetic benchmarks and Amazon Reviews '23 (electronics category) show improved robustness to distribution shift compared to standard classifiers, with VRAM scaling predictably as the length of the historical data sequence increases.

</details>


### [616] [Predictive Representations for Skill Transfer in Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07016)
*Ruben Vereecken,Luke Dickens,Alessandra Russo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于状态抽象的强化学习迁移方法，通过结果预测状态表示（OPSRs）和基于OPSR的技能来实现任务间的知识迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 强化学习扩展面临的关键挑战是泛化学习到的行为。如果没有迁移已获得知识的能力，智能体只能从头开始学习每个任务。需要一种能够实现任务间知识迁移的方法，特别是通过状态抽象来实现。

Method: 提出结果预测状态表示（OPSRs），这是一种基于环境结果（任务无关的紧凑观察）的智能体中心、任务无关的状态抽象。OPSRs由结果预测组成。然后引入基于OPSR的技能（基于选项的抽象动作），这些技能可以通过状态抽象在任务间重用。方法包括从演示中学习OPSR技能，并在新任务中应用这些技能。

Result: 理论分析和实证研究表明，OPSRs具有最优但有限的迁移潜力。通过引入基于OPSR的技能，克服了这种权衡。在实证研究中，从演示中学习的OPSR技能显著加速了在全新未见任务中的学习过程，无需任何预处理。

Conclusion: 该论文提出的框架是强化学习迁移领域的一个有前景的进展，特别是通过结合状态抽象和动作抽象来实现迁移。基于OPSR的技能能够有效促进任务间的知识重用，加速新任务的学习。

Abstract: A key challenge in scaling up Reinforcement Learning is generalizing learned behaviour. Without the ability to carry forward acquired knowledge an agent is doomed to learn each task from scratch. In this paper we develop a new formalism for transfer by virtue of state abstraction. Based on task-independent, compact observations (outcomes) of the environment, we introduce Outcome-Predictive State Representations (OPSRs), agent-centered and task-independent abstractions that are made up of predictions of outcomes. We show formally and empirically that they have the potential for optimal but limited transfer, then overcome this trade-off by introducing OPSR-based skills, i.e. abstract actions (based on options) that can be reused between tasks as a result of state abstraction. In a series of empirical studies, we learn OPSR-based skills from demonstrations and show how they speed up learning considerably in entirely new and unseen tasks without any pre-processing. We believe that the framework introduced in this work is a promising step towards transfer in RL in general, and towards transfer through combining state and action abstraction specifically.

</details>


### [617] [Super Agents and Confounders: Influence of surrounding agents on vehicle trajectory prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03463)
*Daniel Jost,Luca Paparusso,Martin Stoll,Jörg Wagner,Raghu Rajan,Joschka Bödecker*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 研究发现当前轨迹预测模型存在严重缺陷：周围交通参与者信息反而降低预测精度，模型学习到不稳定、非因果的决策模式。提出条件信息瓶颈方法，无需额外监督即可有效压缩有用特征并忽略有害信息，提升预测性能和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在高度交互的驾驶场景中，轨迹预测通常依赖于周围交通参与者（如车辆和行人）的信息。然而研究发现，许多先进的轨迹预测模型存在一个令人惊讶且关键的缺陷：周围智能体的信息反而会降低预测精度而非提高。这促使研究者深入分析模型的决策机制，并寻求解决方案。

Method: 首先使用基于Shapley值的归因方法对现有最先进的轨迹预测模型进行综合分析，揭示模型学习到不稳定和非因果的决策模式。在此基础上，提出集成条件信息瓶颈（CIB）的方法，该方法无需额外监督，通过训练有效压缩智能体特征，并忽略对预测任务无益的特征。

Result: 在多个数据集和模型架构上的综合实验表明，这种简单而有效的方法在许多情况下不仅提高了整体轨迹预测性能，还增强了对不同扰动的鲁棒性。研究结果强调了在轨迹预测中需要选择性整合上下文信息的重要性，因为这些信息常常包含虚假或误导性信号。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了轨迹预测模型中存在的关键缺陷，并提出了条件信息瓶颈作为解决方案。该方法能够有效过滤有害的上下文信息，提升预测性能和鲁棒性。同时，研究提供了可解释的指标来识别非鲁棒行为，为改进轨迹预测模型开辟了有前景的途径。

Abstract: In highly interactive driving scenes, trajectory prediction is conditioned on information from surrounding traffic participants such as cars and pedestrians. Our main contribution is a comprehensive analysis of state-of-the-art trajectory predictors, which reveals a surprising and critical flaw: many surrounding agents degrade prediction accuracy rather than improve it. Using Shapley-based attribution, we rigorously demonstrate that models learn unstable and non-causal decision-making schemes that vary significantly across training runs. Building on these insights, we propose to integrate a Conditional Information Bottleneck (CIB), which does not require additional supervision and is trained to effectively compress agent features as well as ignore those that are not beneficial for the prediction task. Comprehensive experiments using multiple datasets and model architectures demonstrate that this simple yet effective approach not only improves overall trajectory prediction performance in many cases but also increases robustness to different perturbations. Our results highlight the importance of selectively integrating contextual information, which can often contain spurious or misleading signals, in trajectory prediction. Moreover, we provide interpretable metrics for identifying non-robust behavior and present a promising avenue towards a solution.

</details>


### [618] [Stress Estimation in Elderly Oncology Patients Using Visual Wearable Representations and Multi-Instance Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06990)
*Ioannis Kyprakis,Vasileios Skaramagkas,Georgia Karanasiou,Vasilis Bouratzis,Andri Papakonstantinou,Dimitar Stefanovski,Kalliopi Keramida,Aristofania Simatou,Ketti Mazzocco,Anastasia Constantinidou,Konstantinos Marias,Dimitrios I. Fotiadis,Manolis Tsiknakis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 使用可穿戴设备数据（智能手表和心电图传感器）通过多模态视觉表示和弱监督学习预测老年乳腺癌患者的感知压力水平


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 心理压力在心脏肿瘤学中具有临床相关性，但通常仅通过患者报告结果测量进行评估，很少整合到连续的心脏毒性监测中。需要利用可穿戴设备数据客观、连续地评估压力水平。

Method: 将可穿戴设备数据（物理活动、睡眠、心电图）转换为异质视觉表示，使用轻量级预训练专家混合模型（Tiny-BioMoE）嵌入为192维向量，通过基于注意力的多实例学习聚合这些表示来预测感知压力量表得分。

Result: 在留一受试者交叉验证中，预测结果与问卷得分呈中等程度相关（M3：R²=0.24，Pearson r=0.42，Spearman rho=0.48；M6：R²=0.28，Pearson r=0.49，Spearman rho=0.52），全局RMSE/MAE在M3为6.62/6.07，M6为6.13/5.54。

Conclusion: 多模态可穿戴数据可用于预测老年乳腺癌患者的感知压力水平，为连续心脏毒性监测提供客观评估方法，但预测精度仍有提升空间。

Abstract: Psychological stress is clinically relevant in cardio-oncology, yet it is typically assessed only through patient-reported outcome measures (PROMs) and is rarely integrated into continuous cardiotoxicity surveillance. We estimate perceived stress in an elderly, multicenter breast cancer cohort (CARDIOCARE) using multimodal wearable data from a smartwatch (physical activity and sleep) and a chest-worn ECG sensor. Wearable streams are transformed into heterogeneous visual representations, yielding a weakly supervised setting in which a single Perceived Stress Scale (PSS) score corresponds to many unlabeled windows. A lightweight pretrained mixture-of-experts backbone (Tiny-BioMoE) embeds each representation into 192-dimensional vectors, which are aggregated via attention-based multiple instance learning (MIL) to predict PSS at month 3 (M3) and month 6 (M6). Under leave-one-subject-out (LOSO) evaluation, predictions showed moderate agreement with questionnaire scores (M3: R^2=0.24, Pearson r=0.42, Spearman rho=0.48; M6: R^2=0.28, Pearson r=0.49, Spearman rho=0.52), with global RMSE/MAE of 6.62/6.07 at M3 and 6.13/5.54 at M6.

</details>


### [619] [Frailty Estimation in Elderly Oncology Patients Using Multimodal Wearable Data and Multi-Instance Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06985)
*Ioannis Kyprakis,Vasileios Skaramagkas,Georgia Karanasiou,Lampros Lakkas,Andri Papakonstantinou,Domen Ribnikar,Kalliopi Keramida,Dorothea Tsekoura,Ketti Mazzocco,Anastasia Constantinidou,Konstantinos Marias,Dimitrios I. Fotiadis,Manolis Tsiknakis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种基于多模态可穿戴设备的框架，用于评估老年乳腺癌患者在随访期间与衰弱相关的功能变化，采用注意力机制的多实例学习方法融合不规则的多模态数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 衰弱和功能衰退严重影响老年癌症患者的治疗耐受性和预后，但传统评估仅限于不频繁的门诊随访，无法捕捉日常生活中的动态变化。

Method: 结合智能手表的活动/睡眠特征和胸带采集的心率变异性特征，构建患者时间序列数据包；采用基于注意力的多实例学习模型，通过模态特定的多层感知机编码器处理不规则、多模态的可穿戴数据，预测FACIT-F和握力相对于基线的离散变化类别。

Result: 在留一受试者交叉验证中，完整多模态模型在M3和M6时间点对握力变化的平衡准确率/F1分别为0.68±0.08/0.67±0.09和0.70±0.10/0.69±0.08；对FACIT-F变化分别为0.59±0.04/0.58±0.06和0.64±0.05/0.63±0.07。消融实验表明智能手表活动/睡眠特征最具预测力，HRV与智能手表数据融合时提供补充信息。

Conclusion: 多模态可穿戴框架能够有效评估老年乳腺癌患者随访期间的衰弱相关功能变化，注意力机制的多实例学习方法能够处理真实世界中的不规则数据和缺失问题，为连续监测功能状态提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Frailty and functional decline strongly influence treatment tolerance and outcomes in older patients with cancer, yet assessment is typically limited to infrequent clinic visits. We propose a multimodal wearable framework to estimate frailty-related functional change between visits in elderly breast cancer patients enrolled in the multicenter CARDIOCARE study. Free-living smartwatch physical activity and sleep features are combined with ECG-derived heart rate variability (HRV) features from a chest strap and organized into patient-horizon bags aligned to month 3 (M3) and month 6 (M6) follow-ups. Our innovation is an attention-based multiple instance learning (MIL) formulation that fuses irregular, multimodal wearable instances under real-world missingness and weak supervision. An attention-based MIL model with modality-specific multilayer perceptron (MLP) encoders with embedding dimension 128 aggregates variable-length and partially missing longitudinal instances to predict discretized change-from-baseline classes (worsened, stable, improved) for FACIT-F and handgrip strength. Under subject-independent leave-one-subject-out (LOSO) evaluation, the full multimodal model achieved balanced accuracy/F1 of 0.68 +/- 0.08/0.67 +/- 0.09 at M3 and 0.70 +/- 0.10/0.69 +/- 0.08 at M6 for handgrip, and 0.59 +/- 0.04/0.58 +/- 0.06 at M3 and 0.64 +/- 0.05/0.63 +/- 0.07 at M6 for FACIT-F. Ablation results indicated that smartwatch activity and sleep provide the strongest predictive information for frailty-related functional changes, while HRV contributes complementary information when fused with smartwatch streams.

</details>


### [620] [GAN-based Domain Adaptation for Image-aware Layout Generation in Advertising Poster Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07409)
*Chenchen Xu,Min Zhou,Tiezheng Ge,Weiwei Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于GAN的图像条件化广告海报布局生成方法，构建了包含6万对修复海报的数据集，设计了CGL-GAN和PDA-GAN两种模型，其中PDA-GAN通过像素级判别器实现无监督域适应，并提出了三个内容感知评估指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 布局在平面设计和海报生成中至关重要。现有深度学习方法需要成对的产品图像和布局数据，但存在修复海报与干净图像之间的域差距问题。需要开发能够生成与图像内容感知的布局的模型。

Method: 1) 构建CGL-Dataset数据集（60,548对修复海报和121,000张干净产品图像）；2) 设计CGL-GAN模型，在修复区域使用高斯模糊生成布局；3) 提出PDA-GAN模型，引入像素级判别器实现无监督域适应，连接浅层特征图并为每个像素计算GAN损失；4) 提出三个内容感知评估指标。

Result: 定量和定性评估表明，PDA-GAN实现了最先进的性能，能够生成高质量的图像感知布局。提出的内容感知指标有效评估了模型捕捉图形元素与图像内容之间复杂关系的能力。

Conclusion: PDA-GAN通过像素级判别器有效桥接了修复海报与干净图像之间的域差距，成功生成了与图像视觉纹理相关的布局。提出的数据集、模型和评估指标为图像条件化布局生成提供了全面解决方案。

Abstract: Layout plays a crucial role in graphic design and poster generation. Recently, the application of deep learning models for layout generation has gained significant attention. This paper focuses on using a GAN-based model conditioned on images to generate advertising poster graphic layouts, requiring a dataset of paired product images and layouts. To address this task, we introduce the Content-aware Graphic Layout Dataset (CGL-Dataset), consisting of 60,548 paired inpainted posters with annotations and 121,000 clean product images. The inpainting artifacts introduce a domain gap between the inpainted posters and clean images. To bridge this gap, we design two GAN-based models. The first model, CGL-GAN, uses Gaussian blur on the inpainted regions to generate layouts. The second model combines unsupervised domain adaptation by introducing a GAN with a pixel-level discriminator (PD), abbreviated as PDA-GAN, to generate image-aware layouts based on the visual texture of input images. The PD is connected to shallow-level feature maps and computes the GAN loss for each input-image pixel. Additionally, we propose three novel content-aware metrics to assess the model's ability to capture the intricate relationships between graphic elements and image content. Quantitative and qualitative evaluations demonstrate that PDA-GAN achieves state-of-the-art performance and generates high-quality image-aware layouts.

</details>


### [621] [A First Guess is Rarely the Final Answer: Learning to Search in the Travelling Salesperson Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06940)
*Andoni Irazusta Garmendia*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: NICO-TSP：一种用于旅行商问题的神经改进框架，通过专门为局部搜索设计的表示、架构和训练方法，显著优于现有学习方法和启发式搜索基线


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经求解器通常输出单一解，而实践中会进行采样或后处理搜索；现有学习改进方法性能不足，主要原因是设计不匹配——沿用了单解方法的表示、架构和训练方法，而非围绕局部搜索机制专门设计

Method: NICO-TSP采用2-opt改进框架：1) 用n个边令牌表示当前路径，与邻域算子对齐；2) 直接评分2-opt移动，无需路径位置编码；3) 两阶段训练：模仿学习短视界最优轨迹，然后进行无评论家的基于组的强化学习长轨迹训练

Result: 在计算匹配评估中，NICO-TSP在搜索步数和实际时间上均提供更强、更步效的改进；对更大分布外实例泛化更可靠；既可作为经典局部搜索的竞争替代，也可作为构造求解器的强大测试时精炼模块

Conclusion: 神经改进方法需要专门为局部搜索机制设计，而非简单沿用单解方法的设计；NICO-TSP通过专门设计的表示、架构和训练方法，实现了对TSP的稳健、可扩展改进

Abstract: Most neural solvers for the Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP) are trained to output a single solution, even though practitioners rarely stop there: at test time, they routinely spend extra compute on sampling or post-hoc search. This raises a natural question: can the search procedure itself be learned? Neural improvement methods take this perspective by learning a policy that applies local modifications to a candidate solution, accumulating gains over an improvement trajectory. Yet learned improvement for TSP remains comparatively immature, with existing methods still falling short of robust, scalable performance. We argue that a key reason is design mismatch: many approaches reuse state representations, architectural choices, and training recipes inherited from single-solution methods, rather than being built around the mechanics of local search. This mismatch motivates NICO-TSP (Neural Improvement for Combinatorial Optimization): a 2-opt improvement framework for TSP. NICO-TSP represents the current tour with exactly $n$ edge tokens aligned with the neighborhood operator, scores 2-opt moves directly without tour positional encodings, and trains via a two-stage procedure: imitation learning to short-horizon optimal trajectories, followed by critic-free group-based reinforcement learning over longer rollouts. Under compute-matched evaluations that measure improvement as a function of both search steps and wall-clock time, NICO-TSP delivers consistently stronger and markedly more step-efficient improvement than prior learned and heuristic search baselines, generalizes far more reliably to larger out-of-distribution instances, and serves both as a competitive replacement for classical local search and as a powerful test-time refinement module for constructive solvers.

</details>


### [622] [Drifting Fields are not Conservative](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06333)
*Leonard Franz,Sebastian Hoffmann,Georg Martius*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 漂移模型通过向量值漂移场将生成样本向数据分布传输，但研究发现漂移场通常不是保守场，无法表示为标量势的梯度。高斯核是唯一例外，而通过锐化核的替代归一化方法可为任何径向核恢复保守性，使漂移模型可通过损失函数训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究漂移模型是否等价于优化标量损失，因为漂移模型通过向量值漂移场传输样本，但理论上漂移场可能不是保守场，无法表示为标量势的梯度，这影响了训练方法的理论基础。

Method: 分析漂移场的保守性，发现位置相关的归一化是导致非保守性的根源。提出通过锐化核进行替代归一化，为任何径向核恢复保守性，从而得到明确定义的损失函数用于训练漂移模型。

Result: 高斯核是唯一使漂移场完全保守的例外情况。对于一般径向核，通过锐化核的替代归一化方法可恢复保守性，使漂移模型可通过损失函数训练。虽然漂移场匹配目标比损失最小化更通用，但实际增益有限。

Conclusion: 建议使用概念更简单的损失函数形式训练漂移模型，因为虽然漂移场匹配目标理论上更通用，但实际应用中利用这种灵活性带来的收益有限，而损失函数方法提供了更简洁的理论框架。

Abstract: Drifting models generate high-quality samples in a single forward pass by transporting generated samples toward the data distribution using a vector valued drift field. We investigate whether this procedure is equivalent to optimizing a scalar loss and find that, in general, it is not: drift fields are not conservative - they cannot be written as the gradient of any scalar potential. We identify the position-dependent normalization as the source of non-conservatism. The Gaussian kernel is the unique exception where the normalization is harmless and the drift field is exactly the gradient of a scalar function. Generalizing this, we propose an alternative normalization via a related kernel (the sharp kernel) which restores conservatism for any radial kernel, yielding well-defined loss functions for training drifting models. While we identify that the drifting field matching objective is strictly more general than loss minimization, as it can implement non-conservative transport fields that no scalar loss can reproduce, we observe that practical gains obtained utilizing this flexibility are minimal. We thus propose to train drifting models with the conceptually simpler formulations utilizing loss functions.

</details>


### [623] [VertAX: a differentiable vertex model for learning epithelial tissue mechanics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06896)
*Alessandro Pasqui,Jim Martin Catacora Ocana,Anshuman Sinha,Matthieu Perez,Fabrice Delbary,Giorgio Gosti,Mattia Miotto,Domenico Caudo,Maxence Ernoult,Hervé Turlier*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: VertAX是一个基于JAX的可微分顶点模型框架，用于上皮组织力学建模，支持自动微分、GPU加速和双层优化，可用于正向模拟、参数推断和逆力学设计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 上皮组织通过细胞间的局部力学相互作用动态重塑，顶点模型能很好捕捉这一过程，但其众多可调参数使得推断和优化具有挑战性，需要灵活建模和学习组织力学的计算框架。

Method: 开发了VertAX框架，基于JAX实现可微分顶点建模，提供自动微分、GPU加速和端到端双层优化。用户可用纯Python定义任意能量和成本函数，并与机器学习流程无缝集成。比较了三种微分策略：自动微分、隐式微分和平衡传播。

Result: 展示了VertAX在三个代表性任务上的应用：组织形态发生的正向建模、力学参数推断和组织尺度行为的逆设计。基准测试表明平衡传播仅通过重复正向、无伴随模拟即可近似梯度，为非可微分模拟器扩展逆生物物理问题提供了简单途径。

Conclusion: VertAX为上皮组织的力学建模提供了一个灵活、可微分的计算框架，支持从正向模拟到参数推断和逆设计的多种应用，特别是平衡传播方法为扩展逆生物物理问题到非可微分模拟器提供了低工程成本的解决方案。

Abstract: Epithelial tissues dynamically reshape through local mechanical interactions among cells, a process well captured by vertex models. Yet their many tunable parameters make inference and optimization challenging, motivating computational frameworks that flexibly model and learn tissue mechanics. We introduce VertAX, a differentiable JAX-based framework for vertex-modeling of confluent epithelia. VertAX provides automatic differentiation, GPU acceleration, and end-to-end bilevel optimization for forward simulation, parameter inference, and inverse mechanical design. Users can define arbitrary energy and cost functions in pure Python, enabling seamless integration with machine-learning pipelines. We demonstrate VertAX on three representative tasks: (i) forward modeling of tissue morphogenesis, (ii) mechanical parameter inference, and (iii) inverse design of tissue-scale behaviors. We benchmark three differentiation strategies-automatic differentiation, implicit differentiation, and equilibrium propagation-showing that the latter can approximate gradients using repeated forward, adjoint-free simulations alone, offering a simple route for extending inverse biophysical problems to non-differentiable simulators with limited additional engineering effort.

</details>


### [624] [Accelerating Training of Autoregressive Video Generation Models via Local Optimization with Representation Continuity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07402)
*Yucheng Zhou,Jianbing Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Local Opt.和ReCo方法加速自回归视频生成训练，在减少一半训练成本的同时保持生成质量


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自回归模型在图像生成中表现出色，但在视频生成中面临高计算成本和长训练时间的限制，需要探索加速训练的方法

Method: 提出两种方法：1) Local Optimization (Local Opt.) - 在局部窗口内优化token，利用上下文信息减少误差传播；2) Representation Continuity (ReCo) - 受Lipschitz连续性启发，使用连续性损失约束表示变化，提高模型鲁棒性

Result: 在类别和文本到视频数据集上的实验表明，该方法在保持质量的同时将训练成本减半，性能优于基线模型

Conclusion: 提出的Local Opt.和ReCo策略有效解决了自回归视频生成中的训练加速问题，在减少训练帧数时缓解了误差累积和不一致问题，实现了高效高质量的视频生成

Abstract: Autoregressive models have shown superior performance and efficiency in image generation, but remain constrained by high computational costs and prolonged training times in video generation. In this study, we explore methods to accelerate training for autoregressive video generation models through empirical analyses. Our results reveal that while training on fewer video frames significantly reduces training time, it also exacerbates error accumulation and introduces inconsistencies in the generated videos. To address these issues, we propose a Local Optimization (Local Opt.) method, which optimizes tokens within localized windows while leveraging contextual information to reduce error propagation. Inspired by Lipschitz continuity, we propose a Representation Continuity (ReCo) strategy to improve the consistency of generated videos. ReCo utilizes continuity loss to constrain representation changes, improving model robustness and reducing error accumulation. Extensive experiments on class- and text-to-video datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves superior performance to the baseline while halving the training cost without sacrificing quality.

</details>


### [625] [Critical Patch-Aware Sparse Prompting with Decoupled Training for Continual Learning on the Edge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07399)
*Wonseon Lim,Jaesung Lee,Dae-Won Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CPS-Prompt：一种面向边缘设备持续学习的关键补丁感知稀疏提示框架，通过关键补丁采样和分离式提示-分类器训练，显著降低训练时内存占用和计算成本，在保持精度的同时提升训练效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于提示的持续学习方法主要关注精度或推理性能，忽视了边缘设备上训练时的内存和计算成本。边缘设备持续学习需要高精度和训练效率，以满足严格的内存和计算约束下的设备端自适应需求。

Method: 提出CPS-Prompt框架：1）关键补丁采样（CPS）进行任务感知的token缩减，减少计算量；2）分离式提示和分类器训练（DPCT）降低反向传播开销。两者结合优化训练时内存使用和计算成本。

Result: 在三个公开基准测试和真实边缘硬件上，CPS-Prompt相比平衡的CODA-Prompt基线，峰值内存、训练时间和能效提升约1.6倍，同时平均精度保持在最先进的C-Prompt的2%以内，与CODA-Prompt精度相当。

Conclusion: CPS-Prompt通过关键补丁采样和分离式训练策略，在保持竞争性精度的同时，显著提升了边缘设备持续学习的训练效率，为资源受限环境下的设备端自适应提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Continual learning (CL) on edge devices requires not only high accuracy but also training-time efficiency to support on-device adaptation under strict memory and computational constraints. While prompt-based continual learning (PCL) is parameter-efficient and achieves competitive accuracy, prior work has focused mainly on accuracy or inference-time performance, often overlooking the memory and computational costs of on-device training. In this paper, we propose CPS-Prompt, a critical patch-aware sparse prompting framework that explicitly targets training-time memory usage and computational cost by integrating critical patch sampling (CPS) for task-aware token reduction and decoupled prompt and classifier training (DPCT) to reduce backpropagation overhead. Experiments on three public benchmarks and real edge hardware show that CPS-Prompt improves peak memory, training time, and energy efficiency by about 1.6x over the balanced CODA-Prompt baseline, while maintaining accuracy within 2% of the state-of-the-art C-Prompt on average and remaining competitive with CODA-Prompt in accuracy. The code is available at https://github.com/laymond1/cps-prompt.

</details>


### [626] [Contraction-Aligned Analysis of Soft Bellman Residual Minimization with Weighted Lp-Norm for Markov Decision Problem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06837)
*Hyukjun Yang,Han-Dong Lim,Donghwan Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种基于加权Lp范数的软贝尔曼残差最小化方法，通过调整p值使优化目标与贝尔曼算子的收缩几何对齐，从而改善函数逼近下的MDP求解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在函数逼近下求解MDP存在基本挑战，特别是在线性函数逼近设置中。关键困难源于几何不匹配：贝尔曼最优算子在L∞范数下是收缩的，但常用的投影值迭代和贝尔曼残差最小化方法基于L2范数。这种不匹配限制了梯度优化方法的效果。

Method: 提出软贝尔曼残差最小化方法，并将其扩展到广义加权Lp范数。通过调整p值，使优化目标与贝尔曼算子的收缩几何对齐。该方法保持与梯度优化兼容，同时提供更好的误差传播控制。

Result: 分析表明，随着p增加，优化目标与贝尔曼算子的收缩几何更加一致，并推导了相应的性能误差界。该方法在残差最小化和贝尔曼收缩之间建立了原则性联系，改进了误差传播控制。

Conclusion: 通过加权Lp范数方法，解决了函数逼近下MDP求解中的几何不匹配问题，为梯度优化提供了更好的理论基础，同时保持与现有优化方法的兼容性。

Abstract: The problem of solving Markov decision processes under function approximation remains a fundamental challenge, even under linear function approximation settings. A key difficulty arises from a geometric mismatch: while the Bellman optimality operator is contractive in the Linfty-norm, commonly used objectives such as projected value iteration and Bellman residual minimization rely on L2-based formulations. To enable gradient-based optimization, we consider a soft formulation of Bellman residual minimization and extend it to a generalized weighted Lp -norm. We show that this formulation aligns the optimization objective with the contraction geometry of the Bellman operator as p increases, and derive corresponding performance error bounds. Our analysis provides a principled connection between residual minimization and Bellman contraction, leading to improved control of error propagation while remaining compatible with gradient-based optimization.

</details>


### [627] [STQuant: Spatio-Temporal Adaptive Framework for Optimizer Quantization in Large Multimodal Model Training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06836)
*Minglu Liu,Cunchen Hu,Liangliang Xu,Fengming Tang,Ruijia Wang,Fu Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: STQuant是一个分布式训练框架，通过跨层、状态变量和训练步骤的动态精度分配来减少优化器状态的内存占用，同时保持模型质量，相比现有方案将优化器状态内存减少84.4%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有量化方法大多采用固定精度策略，忽略了优化器状态分布在不同层和训练步骤中差异显著的事实。这种统一设计通常会导致明显的精度下降，因此需要超越固定量化的动态方法。

Method: STQuant采用两种关键技术：1) 可证明接近最优的因子选择策略，准确识别对精度适应最具影响力的因素；2) 动态转换决策算法，将搜索成本从指数复杂度降低到线性复杂度。该框架在训练过程中动态分配精度，考虑层、状态变量和训练步骤三个维度。

Result: 在GPT-2和ViT上的实验表明，STQuant将优化器状态内存减少84.4%，平均位宽低至5.1比特，相比现有解决方案有显著改进。同时仅产生O(N/K)的计算开销，需要O(1)的额外空间。

Conclusion: STQuant通过动态精度分配有效解决了大规模模型训练中的内存瓶颈问题，在显著减少优化器状态内存占用的同时保持了模型质量，为超越固定量化提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Quantization is an effective way to reduce the memory cost of large-scale model training. However, most existing methods adopt fixed-precision policies, which ignore the fact that optimizer-state distributions vary significantly across layers and training steps. Such uniform designs often introduce noticeable accuracy degradation. To move beyond fixed quantization, we propose STQuant, a distributed training framework that reduces the memory footprint of optimizer states via dynamic precision allocation across layers, state variables, and training steps, while maintaining model quality. Naively applying dynamic quantization during training is challenging for two reasons. First, optimizer states are numerically sensitive, and quantization noise can destabilize quality. Second, jointly considering multiple states and layers induces a large combinatorial search space. STQuant addresses these challenges with two key techniques: 1) a provably near-optimal factor selection strategy that accurately identifies the most influential factors for precision adaptation. 2) a dynamic transition decision algorithm that reduces the search cost from exponential to linear complexity. Experiments on GPT-2 and ViT show that STQuant reduces optimizer-state memory by 84.4%, achieving an average bit-width of as low as 5.1 bits, compared with existing solutions. Moreover, STQuant incurs only O(N/K) computational overhead and requires O(1) extra space.

</details>


### [628] [MoBiE: Efficient Inference of Mixture of Binary Experts under Post-Training Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06798)
*Zhixiong Zhao,Zukang Xu,Zhixuan Chen,Dawei Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MoBiE是首个专门为MoE架构大语言模型设计的二值化框架，通过联合SVD分解减少专家间冗余、整合全局损失梯度增强权重重要性估计、引入输入零空间误差约束缓解路由失真，在保持无额外存储开销的同时显著提升模型性能与推理效率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于MoE的大语言模型虽然性能强大，但面临高内存和计算成本问题。现有的二值化方法主要针对密集模型设计，无法有效处理MoE特有的挑战，包括专家间冗余、任务无关的重要性估计以及量化引起的路由偏移。

Method: MoBiE框架包含三个核心技术：1) 使用联合SVD分解减少跨专家冗余；2) 将全局损失梯度整合到局部Hessian度量中以增强权重重要性估计；3) 引入基于输入零空间的误差约束来缓解路由失真。这些优化不增加额外存储开销。

Result: 在多个MoE-based LLM和基准测试中，MoBiE始终优于最先进的二值化方法。例如，在Qwen3-30B-A3B上，困惑度降低52.2%，平均零样本性能提升43.4%，推理速度提升超过2倍，同时缩短量化时间。

Conclusion: MoBiE是首个专门为MoE架构LLMs设计的二值化框架，有效解决了MoE特有的量化挑战，在保持高效性的同时显著提升了模型性能，为MoE模型的部署提供了实用的高效解决方案。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) based large language models (LLMs) offer strong performance but suffer from high memory and computation costs. Weight binarization provides extreme efficiency, yet existing binary methods designed for dense LLMs struggle with MoE-specific issues, including cross-expert redundancy, task-agnostic importance estimation, and quantization-induced routing shifts. To this end, we propose MoBiE, the first binarization framework tailored for MoE-based LLMs. MoBiE is built on three core innovations: 1. using joint SVD decomposition to reduce cross-expert redundancy; 2. integrating global loss gradients into local Hessian metrics to enhance weight importance estimation; 3. introducing an error constraint guided by the input null space to mitigate routing distortion. Notably, MoBiE achieves these optimizations while incurring no additional storage overhead, striking a balance between efficiency and model performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MoBiE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art binary methods across multiple MoE-based LLMs and benchmarks. For example, on Qwen3-30B-A3B, MoBiE reduces perplexity by 52.2$\%$, improves average zero-shot performance by 43.4$\%$, achieves over 2 $\times$ inference speedup, and further shortens quantization time. The code is available at https://github.com/Kishon-zzx/MoBiE.

</details>


### [629] [Flux Attention: Context-Aware Hybrid Attention for Efficient LLMs Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07394)
*Quantong Qiu,Zhiyi Hong,Yi Yang,Haitian Wang,Kebin Liu,Qingqing Dang,Juntao Li,Min Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Flux Attention是一种上下文感知的层级动态注意力框架，通过轻量级层路由器在冻结的预训练LLMs中自适应选择全注意力或稀疏注意力，解决长上下文场景中注意力计算复杂度和负载均衡问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准注意力机制的二次计算复杂度限制了LLMs在长上下文场景中的可扩展性。现有混合注意力方法通常采用静态分配比例，无法适应不同任务的动态检索需求，且头级动态稀疏性会导致计算负载不均衡和同步延迟，阻碍自回归解码的硬件加速。

Method: 提出Flux Attention框架，在冻结的预训练LLMs中集成轻量级层路由器，根据输入上下文自适应地将每一层路由到全注意力(FA)或稀疏注意力(SA)。这种层级路由保持了高保真信息检索，同时确保连续内存访问，将理论计算减少转化为实际时钟加速。

Result: 实验表明，Flux Attention在多个长上下文和数学推理基准测试中实现了性能与推理速度的优越权衡。在预填充和解码阶段分别实现了高达2.8倍和2.0倍的速度提升，仅需在8×A800 GPU上进行12小时训练。

Conclusion: Flux Attention通过上下文感知的层级动态注意力优化，有效解决了长上下文LLMs中的计算瓶颈问题，在保持性能的同时显著提升推理效率，为实际部署提供了可行的参数高效解决方案。

Abstract: The quadratic computational complexity of standard attention mechanisms presents a severe scalability bottleneck for LLMs in long-context scenarios. While hybrid attention mechanisms combining Full Attention (FA) and Sparse Attention (SA) offer a potential solution, existing methods typically rely on static allocation ratios that fail to accommodate the variable retrieval demands of different tasks. Furthermore, head-level dynamic sparsity often introduces severe computational load imbalance and synchronization long-tails, which hinder hardware acceleration during autoregressive decoding. To bridge this gap, we introduce Flux Attention, a context-aware framework that dynamically optimizes attention computation at the layer level. By integrating a lightweight Layer Router into frozen pretrained LLMs, the proposed method adaptively routes each layer to FA or SA based on the input context. This layer-wise routing preserves high-fidelity information retrieval while ensuring contiguous memory access, translating theoretical computational reductions into practical wall-clock speedups. As a parameter-efficient approach, our framework requires only 12 hours of training on 8$\times$A800 GPUs. Extensive experiments across multiple long-context and mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that Flux Attention achieves a superior trade-off between performance and inference speed compared with baseline models, with speed improvements of up to $2.8\times$ and $2.0\times$ in the prefill and decode stages.

</details>


### [630] [Geometric Properties of the Voronoi Tessellation in Latent Semantic Manifolds of Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06767)
*Marshall Brett*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究验证了语言模型表示空间中Voronoi镶嵌的线性扩展规律，并开发了无需重新训练即可通过边界优化提升模型性能的后处理技术。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 语言模型在离散token上操作但在连续向量空间中计算，这会在表示流形上诱导出Voronoi镶嵌。研究旨在实证分析这种镶嵌结构，特别是验证表达性间隙的线性扩展规律，并探索通过边界优化改善模型性能的后处理方法。

Method: 使用Qwen3.5-4B-Base模型，首先采用float32边界重计算解决bfloat16量化伪影，验证Mabrok(2026)的线性扩展规律。其次开发边界优化程序(MRP)，包括直接边界最大化和Fisher信息距离最大化两种方法，通过剂量响应扫描比较两种方法的性能。

Result: 1) 验证了表达性间隙的线性扩展规律(R²=0.9997)，发现中层存在几何模糊区域(24-28层，ρ=-0.29)，最终层对齐良好(ρ=0.836)。2) MRP能有效改善边界，两种方法都能纠正约16,300个位置，但Fisher方法在λ=0.15-0.6范围内保持约5,300个位置损伤不变，实现+28%中值边界改善且下游基准不变。优化收益集中在高频结构token(84%)，内容和实体类贡献随λ增加而减少。

Conclusion: Fisher MRP是一种可行的几何优化工具，其实用上限不是由总体损伤决定，而是由token级收益的均匀性决定。该方法能在保持扩展规律的同时压缩表达性间隙，但需要关注优化收益在不同token类型间的分布不均问题。

Abstract: Language models operate on discrete tokens but compute in continuous vector spaces, inducing a Voronoi tessellation over the representation manifold. We study this tessellation empirically on Qwen3.5-4B-Base, making two contributions. First, using float32 margin recomputation to resolve bfloat16 quantization artifacts, we validate Mabrok's (2026) linear scaling law of the expressibility gap with $R^2$ = 0.9997 - the strongest confirmation to date - and identify a mid-layer geometric ambiguity regime where margin geometry is anti-correlated with cross-entropy (layers 24-28, $ρ$ = -0.29) before crystallizing into alignment at the final layer ($ρ$ = 0.836).
  Second, we show that the Voronoi tessellation of a converged model is reshapable through margin refinement procedures (MRP): short post-hoc optimization runs that widen token-decision margins without retraining. We compare direct margin maximization against Fisher information distance maximization across a dose-response sweep. Both methods find the same ceiling of ~16,300 correctable positions per 256K evaluated, but differ critically in collateral damage. Margin maximization damage escalates with intervention strength until corrections are overwhelmed. Fisher damage remains constant at ~5,300 positions across the validated range ($λ$ = 0.15-0.6), achieving +28% median margin improvement at $λ$ = 0.6 with invariant downstream benchmarks - a geometric reorganization that compresses the expressibility gap while preserving its scaling law. However, frequency and token-class audits reveal that gains concentrate in high-frequency structural tokens (84% of net corrections at $λ$ = 0.6), with content and entity-like contributions shrinking at higher $λ$. Fisher MRP is therefore a viable geometric polishing tool whose practical ceiling is set not by aggregate damage but by the uniformity of token-level benefit.

</details>


### [631] [The Rhetoric of Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06754)
*Robert C. Williamson*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文从修辞学视角审视机器学习技术，认为其本质上是说服的艺术而非客观建模工具，并探讨了"操纵即服务"商业模式


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 挑战机器学习作为"客观"、"中立"技术构建"世界模型"的传统观点，揭示其内在的修辞性和说服本质

Method: 采用修辞学理论框架分析机器学习技术，从说服艺术的角度审视其运作机制和特征

Result: 识别出机器学习具有固有的修辞特征，并揭示了"操纵即服务"这一普遍商业模式如何利用这些特征

Conclusion: 机器学习本质上是一种修辞技术而非客观建模工具，其在"操纵即服务"商业模式中的应用凸显了其说服和操纵的潜力

Abstract: I examine the technology of machine learning from the perspective of rhetoric, which is simply the art of persuasion. Rather than being a neutral and "objective" way to build "world models" from data, machine learning is (I argue) inherently rhetorical. I explore some of its rhetorical features, and examine one pervasive business model where machine learning is widely used, "manipulation as a service."

</details>


### [632] [Busemann energy-based attention for emotion analysis in Poincaré discs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06752)
*Zinaid Kapić,Vladimir Jaćimović*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: EmBolic：一种基于双曲几何的深度学习架构，用于文本消息的细粒度情感分析，利用双曲空间有效捕捉词语和情感之间的层次关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法将情感视为没有度量结构的分类集合，而实际上情感之间存在语义模糊性产生的层次关系。双曲几何能高效捕捉这些层次结构，为情感计算提供更合适的表示空间。

Method: 提出EmBolic架构，核心是双曲圆盘中的注意力机制。模型从文本消息生成查询（双曲圆盘中的点），而键（边界上的点）从生成的查询自动产生。预测基于查询和键之间的Busemann能量，评估文本消息与代表情感类别的方向的对齐程度。

Result: 实验表明模型具有良好的泛化性能，即使在表示空间维度较小时也能获得相当好的预测准确率。研究支持双曲表示在情感计算领域具有特别优势的观点。

Conclusion: 双曲几何能有效建模情感之间的层次关系，EmBolic架构通过双曲空间中的注意力机制和Busemann能量实现了细粒度情感分析，为情感计算提供了新的几何视角。

Abstract: We present EmBolic - a novel fully hyperbolic deep learning architecture for fine-grained emotion analysis from textual messages. The underlying idea is that hyperbolic geometry efficiently captures hierarchies between both words and emotions. In our context, these hierarchical relationships arise from semantic ambiguities. EmBolic aims to infer the curvature on the continuous space of emotions, rather than treating them as a categorical set without any metric structure. In the heart of our architecture is the attention mechanism in the hyperbolic disc. The model is trained to generate queries (points in the hyperbolic disc) from textual messages, while keys (points at the boundary) emerge automatically from the generated queries. Predictions are based on the Busemann energy between queries and keys, evaluating how well a certain textual message aligns with the class directions representing emotions. Our experiments demonstrate strong generalization properties and reasonably good prediction accuracy even for small dimensions of the representation space. Overall, this study supports our claim that affective computing is one of the application domains where hyperbolic representations are particularly advantageous.

</details>


### [633] [Bi-level Heterogeneous Learning for Time Series Foundation Models: A Federated Learning Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06727)
*Shengchao Chen,Guodong Long,Dikai Liu,Jing Jiang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种细粒度学习方法，通过联邦学习框架解决时间序列基础模型训练中的异构性问题，在点预测和概率预测中优于集中式和联邦式基线


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 时间序列数据的异构性比视觉或语言数据更为显著，因为时间动态在不同领域和任务间差异很大。现有时间序列基础模型训练通常采用混合批次策略合并大规模数据集，这可能导致梯度冲突并降低表示质量。

Method: 提出细粒度学习方法，从异构序列中蒸馏不变知识同时减少跨域干扰。将异构性分为两个层次：域间和域内。设计联邦学习方法，通过局部正则化强制域不变和语义一致表示来缓解域内冲突，并通过域感知聚合增强跨域协作来解决域间差异。

Result: 在多样化基准测试中，使用该方法训练的时间序列基础模型在点预测和概率预测方面持续优于集中式和联邦式基线，同时在大规模零样本性能方面达到竞争性水平。

Conclusion: 该方法为在异构环境中从头训练时间序列基础模型提供了灵活途径，通过解决双层次异构性问题显著提升了模型性能。

Abstract: Heterogeneity in time series data is more pronounced than in vision or language, as temporal dynamics vary substantially across domains and tasks.
