Existing efforts on training time series foundation models (TSFMs) from scratch are often trained with mixed-batch strategies that merge large-scale datasets, which can cause gradient conflicts and degrade representation quality. To address this, we propose a fine-grained learning method that distills invariant knowledge from heterogeneous series while reducing cross-domain interference. We characterize heterogeneity at two levels: inter-domain and intra-domain. To tackle this bi-level heterogeneity, we design a federated learning method that mitigates intra-domain conflicts by enforcing domain-invariant and semantically consistent representations through local regularization, and addresses inter-domain discrepancies by enhancing cross-domain collaboration via domain-aware aggregation. Experiments across diverse benchmarks show that TSFMs trained with our method consistently outperform both centralized and federated TSFM baselines in point and probabilistic forecasting, while also achieving competitive zero-shot performance at scale, offering a flexible pathway for training TSFMs from scratch in heterogeneous environments.

</details>


### [634] [Bi-Lipschitz Autoencoder With Injectivity Guarantee](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06701)
*Qipeng Zhan,Zhuoping Zhou,Zexuan Wang,Qi Long,Li Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Bi-Lipschitz自编码器(BLAE)，通过注入性正则化和双Lipschitz松弛解决传统正则化自编码器的非单射映射问题，提升流形结构保持能力和分布漂移鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统正则化自编码器在降维过程中常面临非单射映射问题，导致收敛困难和潜在表示失真。现有方法存在过于刚性的约束，限制了其有效性和鲁棒性。

Method: 提出Bi-Lipschitz自编码器(BLAE)，包含两个关键创新：1) 基于分离准则的注入性正则化方案，消除病态局部极小值；2) 双Lipschitz松弛，保持几何结构并展现对数据分布漂移的鲁棒性。

Result: 在多个数据集上的实验结果表明，BLAE在保持流形结构方面持续优于现有方法，同时对采样稀疏性和分布漂移具有鲁棒性。

Conclusion: BLAE通过解决编码器非单射性这一核心瓶颈，提供了更有效的流形保持降维方法，在保持几何结构的同时增强了对抗分布漂移的鲁棒性。

Abstract: Autoencoders are widely used for dimensionality reduction, based on the assumption that high-dimensional data lies on low-dimensional manifolds. Regularized autoencoders aim to preserve manifold geometry during dimensionality reduction, but existing approaches often suffer from non-injective mappings and overly rigid constraints that limit their effectiveness and robustness. In this work, we identify encoder non-injectivity as a core bottleneck that leads to poor convergence and distorted latent representations. To ensure robustness across data distributions, we formalize the concept of admissible regularization and provide sufficient conditions for its satisfaction. In this work, we propose the Bi-Lipschitz Autoencoder (BLAE), which introduces two key innovations: (1) an injective regularization scheme based on a separation criterion to eliminate pathological local minima, and (2) a bi-Lipschitz relaxation that preserves geometry and exhibits robustness to data distribution drift. Empirical results on diverse datasets show that BLAE consistently outperforms existing methods in preserving manifold structure while remaining resilient to sampling sparsity and distribution shifts. Code is available at https://github.com/qipengz/BLAE.

</details>


### [635] [Model-Based Reinforcement Learning for Control under Time-Varying Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.02260)
*Klemens Iten,Bruce Lee,Chenhao Li,Lenart Treven,Andreas Krause,Bhavya Sukhija*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文研究非平稳动态系统中的强化学习控制问题，提出了一种基于自适应数据缓冲机制的乐观模型强化学习算法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界中的系统动态通常是非平稳的（由于漂移、磨损或运行条件变化），而传统的基于学习的控制方法通常假设系统动态是平稳的，这一假设在实际应用中经常被违反

Method: 采用持续模型强化学习框架，使用高斯过程动态模型，在频率主义变分预算假设下进行分析，提出具有自适应数据缓冲机制的乐观模型强化学习算法

Result: 分析表明持续非平稳性需要明确限制过时数据的影响以保持校准的不确定性和有意义的动态遗憾保证，提出的算法在具有非平稳动态的连续控制基准测试中表现出改进的性能

Conclusion: 针对非平稳动态系统的强化学习需要专门处理过时数据的影响，提出的自适应数据缓冲机制能有效应对动态变化，在非平稳环境中提供更好的控制性能

Abstract: Learning-based control methods typically assume stationary system dynamics, an assumption often violated in real-world systems due to drift, wear, or changing operating conditions. We study reinforcement learning for control under time-varying dynamics. We consider a continual model-based reinforcement learning setting in which an agent repeatedly learns and controls a dynamical system whose transition dynamics evolve across episodes. We analyze the problem using Gaussian process dynamics models under frequentist variation-budget assumptions. Our analysis shows that persistent non-stationarity requires explicitly limiting the influence of outdated data to maintain calibrated uncertainty and meaningful dynamic regret guarantees. Motivated by these insights, we propose a practical optimistic model-based reinforcement learning algorithm with adaptive data buffer mechanisms and demonstrate improved performance on continuous control benchmarks with non-stationary dynamics.

</details>


### [636] [GraphWalker: Graph-Guided In-Context Learning for Clinical Reasoning on Electronic Health Records](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06684)
*Yue Fang,Weibin Liao,Yuxin Guo,Jiaran Gao,Hongxin Ding,Jinyang Zhang,Xinke Jiang,Zhibang Yang,Junfeng Zhao,Yasha Wang,Liantao Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GraphWalker：针对电子健康记录临床推理的演示选择框架，通过整合数据驱动和模型驱动视角、群体发现以及惰性贪婪搜索，解决现有上下文学习方法在视角限制、群体意识和信息聚合方面的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有电子健康记录上下文学习方法面临三个核心挑战：1) 视角限制——数据驱动的相似性无法与LLM推理需求对齐，模型驱动信号受限于临床能力；2) 群体意识缺失——演示选择独立进行，未建模群体级结构；3) 信息聚合问题——忽略演示间的冗余和交互效应，导致边际收益递减。

Method: 提出GraphWalker框架：1) 联合建模患者临床信息和LLM估计的信息增益，整合数据驱动与模型驱动视角；2) 引入群体发现避免噪声局部最优；3) 采用带前沿扩展的惰性贪婪搜索算法缓解信息聚合中的边际收益递减问题。

Result: 在多个真实世界电子健康记录基准测试上的广泛实验表明，GraphWalker始终优于最先进的上下文学习基线方法，在临床推理性能上取得了显著提升。

Conclusion: GraphWalker通过系统解决现有上下文学习方法在电子健康记录临床推理中的三个关键挑战，提供了一个原则性的演示选择框架，显著提升了临床推理性能，代码已开源。

Abstract: Clinical Reasoning on Electronic Health Records (EHRs) is a fundamental yet challenging task in modern healthcare. While in-context learning (ICL) offers a promising inference-time adaptation paradigm for large language models (LLMs) in EHR reasoning, existing methods face three fundamental challenges: (1) Perspective Limitation, where data-driven similarity fails to align with LLM reasoning needs and model-driven signals are constrained by limited clinical competence; (2) Cohort Awareness, as demonstrations are selected independently without modeling population-level structure; and (3) Information Aggregation, where redundancy and interaction effects among demonstrations are ignored, leading to diminishing marginal gains. To address these challenges, we propose GraphWalker, a principled demonstration selection framework for EHR-oriented ICL. GraphWalker (i) jointly models patient clinical information and LLM-estimated information gain by integrating data-driven and model-driven perspectives, (ii) incorporates Cohort Discovery to avoid noisy local optima, and (iii) employs a Lazy Greedy Search with Frontier Expansion algorithm to mitigate diminishing marginal returns in information aggregation. Extensive experiments on multiple real-world EHR benchmarks demonstrate that GraphWalker consistently outperforms state-of-the-art ICL baselines, yielding substantial improvements in clinical reasoning performance. Our code is open-sourced at https://github.com/PuppyKnightUniversity/GraphWalker

</details>


### [637] [Playing DOOM with 1.3M Parameters: Specialized Small Models vs Large Language Models for Real-Time Game Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07385)
*David Golchinfar,Daryoush Vaziri,Alexander Marquardt*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 1.3M参数模型SauerkrautLM-Doom-MultiVec在DOOM游戏中实时表现超越大语言模型92,000倍，仅需31ms决策时间


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索小型任务专用模型在实时控制任务中是否能够超越通用大语言模型，同时降低推理成本并能在消费级硬件上部署

Method: 结合ModernBERT编码器、哈希嵌入、深度感知令牌表示和注意力池化分类头，从ASCII帧表示中选择游戏动作；仅使用31,000个人类游戏演示进行训练

Result: 在defend_the_center场景中10个回合获得178个击杀（每回合17.8个），超过所有测试LLMs的总和（13个击杀）；决策时间仅31ms，参数比Nemotron-120B少92,000倍

Conclusion: 小型任务专用模型在适当领域数据训练下，能够在实时控制任务中决定性超越通用LLMs，推理成本大幅降低且可在消费级硬件部署

Abstract: We present SauerkrautLM-Doom-MultiVec, a 1.3 million parameter model that plays the classic first-person shooter DOOM in real time, outperforming large language models up to 92,000x its size, including Nemotron-120B, Qwen3.5-27B, and GPT-4o-mini. Our model combines a ModernBERT encoder with hash embeddings, depth-aware token representations, and an attention pooling classification head to select game actions from ASCII frame representations at 31ms per decision. Trained on just 31,000 human gameplay demonstrations, it achieves 178 frags in 10 episodes (17.8 per episode) in the defend_the_center scenario, more than all tested LLMs combined (13 frags total). All agents receive equivalent input: ASCII frames and depth maps. Despite having 92,000x fewer parameters than Nemotron-120B, our model is the only agent that actively engages enemies rather than purely evading them. These results demonstrate that small, task-specific models trained on domain-appropriate data can decisively outperform general-purpose LLMs at real-time control tasks, at a fraction of the inference cost, with deployment capability on consumer hardware.

</details>


### [638] [Decisions and Deployment: The Five-Year SAHELI Project (2020-2025) on Restless Multi-Armed Bandits for Improving Maternal and Child Health](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07384)
*Shresth Verma,Arpan Dasgupta,Neha Madhiwalla,Aparna Taneja,Milind Tambe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SAHELI项目使用基于Restless Multi-Armed Bandit的决策聚焦学习框架，优化印度母婴健康项目中有限医疗资源的分配，将累积参与度下降减少31%，并显著改善真实健康行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全球母婴健康项目中，有限的医疗工作者资源无法为弱势群体提供持续个性化服务，需要优化有限实时服务资源的调度以最大化长期参与度。

Method: 采用Restless Multi-Armed Bandit框架解决序列资源分配问题，关键创新是从传统的"预测-优化"两阶段方法转向决策聚焦学习，使学习目标与最大化受益者参与度的最终目标直接对齐。

Result: 大规模随机对照试验显示，DFL策略相比当前标准护理将累积参与度下降减少31%，显著优于两阶段模型。研究证实项目参与度的提高直接转化为真实健康行为的显著改善，特别是新妈妈持续摄入铁和钙补充剂。

Conclusion: SAHELI项目为将序列决策AI应用于优化健康项目资源分配提供了可扩展的蓝图，展示了AI在公共卫生干预中的实际价值。

Abstract: Maternal and child health is a critical concern around the world. In many global health programs disseminating preventive care and health information, limited healthcare worker resources prevent continuous, personalised engagement with vulnerable beneficiaries. In such scenarios, it becomes crucial to optimally schedule limited live-service resources to maximise long-term engagement. To address this fundamental challenge, the multi-year SAHELI project (2020-2025), in collaboration with partner NGO ARMMAN, leverages AI to allocate scarce resources in a maternal and child health program in India. The SAHELI system solves this sequential resource allocation problem using a Restless Multi-Armed Bandit (RMAB) framework. A key methodological innovation is the transition from a traditional Two-Stage "predict-then-optimize" approach to Decision-Focused Learning (DFL), which directly aligns the framework's learning method with the ultimate goal of maximizing beneficiary engagement. Empirical evaluation through large-scale randomized controlled trials demonstrates that the DFL policy reduced cumulative engagement drops by 31% relative to the current standard of care, significantly outperforming the Two-Stage model. Crucially, the studies also confirmed that this increased program engagement translates directly into statistically significant improvements in real-world health behaviors, notably the continued consumption of vital iron and calcium supplements by new mothers. Ultimately, the SAHELI project provides a scalable blueprint for applying sequential decision-making AI to optimize resource allocation in health programs.

</details>


### [639] [SHAPE: Stage-aware Hierarchical Advantage via Potential Estimation for LLM Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06636)
*Zhengyang Ai,Zikang Shan,Xiaodong Ai,Jingxian Tang,Hangkai Hu,Pinyan Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SHAPE是一种用于增强LLM推理的分层过程监督框架，通过状态空间潜力估计和分层信用分配机制，在减少30%token消耗的同时实现3%的平均准确率提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有过程监督方法无法区分实质性进展与冗长表达，导致推理能力有限且token效率低下，需要一种能够识别推理过程中关键突破点并优化资源分配的方法。

Method: SHAPE将推理形式化为经验可解性状态空间的轨迹，采用分层信用分配机制：在段落级别使用阶段感知优势函数优先处理低潜力状态的突破；在token级别使用熵驱动重分配来锐化执行信号。

Result: 在三个基础模型和五个数学推理基准测试中，SHAPE实现了平均准确率提升3%，同时减少了30%的token消耗。

Conclusion: SHAPE通过分层过程监督有效解决了现有方法在区分实质性进展和token效率方面的问题，为LLM推理优化提供了新的框架。

Abstract: Process supervision has emerged as a promising approach for enhancing LLM reasoning, yet existing methods fail to distinguish meaningful progress from mere verbosity, leading to limited reasoning capabilities and unresolved token inefficiency. To address this, we propose Stage-aware Hierarchical Advantage via Potential Estimation (SHAPE), a framework that formalizes reasoning as a trajectory through a state space of empirical solvability. SHAPE introduces a hierarchical credit assignment mechanism: at the segment level, it employs a stage-aware advantage function to prioritize efficient breakthroughs in low-potential states; at the token level, it utilizes entropy-driven redistribution to sharpen execution signals. Extensive experiments in math reasoning across three base models and five benchmarks demonstrate that SHAPE achieves an average accuracy gain of 3% with 30% reduced token consumption.

</details>


### [640] [PD-SOVNet: A Physics-Driven Second-Order Vibration Operator Network for Estimating Wheel Polygonal Roughness from Axle-Box Vibrations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06620)
*Xiancheng Wang,Lin Wang,Rui Wang,Zhibo Zhang,Minghang Zhao,Xiaoheng Zhang,Zhongyue Tan,Kaitai Mao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PD-SOVNet：一种物理引导的灰盒框架，用于从轴箱振动信号中估计车轮多边形粗糙度的1-40阶频谱，在真实运营数据和未见车轮条件下实现连续回归。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 车轮多边形粗糙度的定量估计是轨道车辆状态监测中具有挑战性但实际相关的问题。现有研究主要集中于检测、识别或严重程度分类，而在真实运营数据和未见车轮条件下的多阶粗糙度谱连续回归研究较少。

Method: 提出PD-SOVNet框架，结合共享二阶振动核、4×4 MIMO耦合模块、自适应物理校正分支和基于Mamba的时序分支，将模态响应先验嵌入模型，同时保留数据驱动的灵活性用于样本相关校正和剩余时序动态。

Result: 在三个真实世界数据集（包括运营数据和真实故障数据）上的实验表明，该方法提供了有竞争力的预测精度和相对稳定的跨车轮性能，在更具挑战性的数据集III上优势最明显。噪声注入实验进一步表明Mamba时序分支有助于减轻扰动输入下的性能退化。

Conclusion: 结构化物理先验有助于在实际轨道车辆监测场景中稳定粗糙度回归，但仍需要在更广泛的操作条件和更严格的比较协议下进行进一步验证。

Abstract: Quantitative estimation of wheel polygonal roughness from axle-box vibration signals is a challenging yet practically relevant problem for rail-vehicle condition monitoring. Existing studies have largely focused on detection, identification, or severity classification, while continuous regression of multi-order roughness spectra remains less explored, especially under real operational data and unseen-wheel conditions. To address this problem, this paper presents PD-SOVNet, a physics-guided gray-box framework that combines shared second-order vibration kernels, a $4\times4$ MIMO coupling module, an adaptive physical correction branch, and a Mamba-based temporal branch for estimating the 1st--40th-order wheel roughness spectrum from axle-box vibrations. The proposed design embeds modal-response priors into the model while retaining data-driven flexibility for sample-dependent correction and residual temporal dynamics. Experiments on three real-world datasets, including operational data and real fault data, show that the proposed method provides competitive prediction accuracy and relatively stable cross-wheel performance under the current data protocol, with its most noticeable advantage observed on the more challenging Dataset III. Noise injection experiments further indicate that the Mamba temporal branch helps mitigate performance degradation under perturbed inputs. These results suggest that structured physical priors can be beneficial for stabilizing roughness regression in practical rail-vehicle monitoring scenarios, although further validation under broader operating conditions and stricter comparison protocols is still needed.

</details>


### [641] [World Action Verifier: Self-Improving World Models via Forward-Inverse Asymmetry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01985)
*Yuejiang Liu,Fan Feng,Lingjing Kong,Weifeng Lu,Jinzhou Tang,Kun Zhang,Kevin Murphy,Chelsea Finn,Yilun Du*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WAV框架通过将动作条件状态预测分解为状态合理性和动作可达性两个因素，并分别验证，使世界模型能够识别自身预测错误并进行自我改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 通用世界模型需要比策略学习更广泛的鲁棒性，必须对大量次优动作保持可靠预测，但动作标记的交互数据往往覆盖不足，导致模型在未充分探索区域表现不佳。

Method: 将动作条件状态预测分解为状态合理性和动作可达性；利用视频语料库生成多样化子目标；使用稀疏逆模型从状态特征子集推断动作；通过生成子目标、推断动作和前向推演的循环一致性进行验证。

Result: 在MiniGrid、RoboMimic和ManiSkill的9个任务中，WAV实现了2倍的样本效率提升，下游策略性能提高18%。

Conclusion: 通过分解验证和利用数据可用性与特征维度不对称性，WAV框架有效解决了世界模型在未充分探索区域的可靠性问题，显著提升了样本效率和策略性能。

Abstract: General-purpose world models promise scalable policy evaluation, optimization, and planning, yet achieving the required level of robustness remains challenging. Unlike policy learning, which primarily focuses on optimal actions, a world model must be reliable over a much broader range of suboptimal actions, which are often insufficiently covered by action-labeled interaction data. To address this challenge, we propose World Action Verifier (WAV), a framework that enables world models to identify their own prediction errors and self-improve. The key idea is to decompose action-conditioned state prediction into two factors -- state plausibility and action reachability -- and verify each separately. We show that these verification problems can be substantially easier than predicting future states due to two underlying asymmetries: the broader availability of action-free data and the lower dimensionality of action-relevant features. Leveraging these asymmetries, we augment a world model with (i) a diverse subgoal generator obtained from video corpora and (ii) a sparse inverse model that infers actions from a subset of state features. By enforcing cycle consistency among generated subgoals, inferred actions, and forward rollouts, WAV provides an effective verification mechanism in under-explored regimes, where existing methods typically fail. Across nine tasks spanning MiniGrid, RoboMimic, and ManiSkill, our method achieves 2x higher sample efficiency while improving downstream policy performance by 18%.

</details>


### [642] [SCOT: Multi-Source Cross-City Transfer with Optimal-Transport Soft-Correspondence Objective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07383)
*Yuyao Wang,Min Yang,Meng Chen,Weiming Huang,Yongshun Gong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SCOT是一个跨城市表示学习框架，通过Sinkhorn熵最优传输学习不等区域集之间的显式软对应关系，改善标签稀缺城市的预测性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 跨城市迁移学习在标签稀缺城市中通过利用其他城市的标注数据来改善预测，但当城市采用不兼容的分区且没有真实区域对应关系时变得困难。现有方法要么依赖启发式区域匹配（对锚点选择敏感），要么进行分布级对齐（对应关系隐式且异构性强时不稳定）。

Method: SCOT框架：1）通过Sinkhorn熵最优传输学习不等区域集之间的显式软对应关系；2）使用OT加权对比目标锐化可迁移结构；3）通过循环式重建正则化器稳定优化；4）对于多源迁移，使用目标诱导原型先验引导的平衡熵传输将每个源和目标对齐到共享原型中心。

Result: 在真实世界城市和任务中，SCOT持续提高了迁移准确性和鲁棒性，同时学习到的传输耦合和中心分配为对齐质量提供了可解释的诊断。

Conclusion: SCOT通过显式学习区域对应关系解决了跨城市迁移中的分区不兼容问题，优于现有的启发式匹配和分布对齐方法，提供了更稳定和可解释的迁移学习框架。

Abstract: Cross-city transfer improves prediction in label-scarce cities by leveraging labeled data from other cities, but it becomes challenging when cities adopt incompatible partitions and no ground-truth region correspondences exist. Existing approaches either rely on heuristic region matching, which is often sensitive to anchor choices, or perform distribution-level alignment that leaves correspondences implicit and can be unstable under strong heterogeneity. We propose SCOT, a cross-city representation learning framework that learns explicit soft correspondences between unequal region sets via Sinkhorn-based entropic optimal transport. SCOT further sharpens transferable structure with an OT-weighted contrastive objective and stabilizes optimization through a cycle-style reconstruction regularizer. For multi-source transfer, SCOT aligns each source and the target to a shared prototype hub using balanced entropic transport guided by a target-induced prototype prior. Across real-world cities and tasks, SCOT consistently improves transfer accuracy and robustness, while the learned transport couplings and hub assignments provide interpretable diagnostics of alignment quality.

</details>


### [643] [Latent Structure of Affective Representations in Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07382)
*Benjamin J. Choi,Melanie Weber*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LLMs学习的情感表征具有与心理学中效价-唤醒模型一致的几何结构，支持线性表征假设，并可用于量化情感处理任务的不确定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究LLMs潜在表征的几何结构对模型透明度和AI安全具有重要意义。现有研究主要关注学习表征的一般几何和拓扑特性，但由于缺乏真实潜在几何作为基准，验证这些发现具有挑战性。情感处理为探究表征几何提供了有趣的测试平台，因为情感既具有分类组织又具有连续的情感维度，这在心理学文献中已有充分研究。

Method: 使用几何数据分析工具研究LLMs中情感表征的潜在结构。通过分析LLMs学习的情感表征，并与心理学中广泛使用的效价-唤醒模型进行比较，探究其几何特性。

Result: 1. LLMs学习到与心理学效价-唤醒模型一致的情感潜在表征；2. 这些表征展现出非线性几何结构，但仍能被线性良好近似，为模型透明度方法中常用的线性表征假设提供了实证支持；3. 学习的潜在表征空间可用于量化情感处理任务中的不确定性。

Conclusion: LLMs获得的情感表征具有与人类情感模型相似的几何结构，这对模型可解释性和安全性具有实际意义。研究结果为理解LLMs如何表示情感信息提供了新见解，并支持在模型透明度方法中使用线性近似。

Abstract: The geometric structure of latent representations in large language models (LLMs) is an active area of research, driven in part by its implications for model transparency and AI safety. Existing literature has focused mainly on general geometric and topological properties of the learnt representations, but due to a lack of ground-truth latent geometry, validating the findings of such approaches is challenging. Emotion processing provides an intriguing testbed for probing representational geometry, as emotions exhibit both categorical organization and continuous affective dimensions, which are well-established in the psychology literature. Moreover, understanding such representations carries safety relevance. In this work, we investigate the latent structure of affective representations in LLMs using geometric data analysis tools. We present three main findings. First, we show that LLMs learn coherent latent representations of affective emotions that align with widely used valence--arousal models from psychology. Second, we find that these representations exhibit nonlinear geometric structure that can nonetheless be well-approximated linearly, providing empirical support for the linear representation hypothesis commonly assumed in model transparency methods. Third, we demonstrate that the learned latent representation space can be leveraged to quantify uncertainty in emotion processing tasks. Our findings suggest that LLMs acquire affective representations with geometric structure paralleling established models of human emotion, with practical implications for model interpretability and safety.

</details>


### [644] [The Lifecycle of the Spectral Edge: From Gradient Learning to Weight-Decay Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07380)
*Yongzhong Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究分析了在序列任务中，梯度下降和权重衰减如何共同作用形成谱边缘（Gram矩阵的主导方向），揭示了grokking过程中的两阶段生命周期和三种普适性类别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是理解在grokking现象中，参数更新的谱边缘如何演化，以及梯度下降和权重衰减在模型压缩和算法学习中的具体作用机制。

Method: 方法包括：1）将谱边缘分解为梯度驱动和权重衰减分量；2）在Dyck-1和SCAN序列任务上分析grokking过程；3）使用间隙流方程预测三种普适性类别；4）应用线性和非线性探针评估信息编码。

Result: 主要结果：1）发现grokking前谱边缘由梯度驱动且功能活跃；2）grokking时梯度与权重衰减对齐，谱边缘成为压缩轴，对扰动平坦但对消融敏感（比随机方向影响大4000倍以上）；3）识别三种普适性类别（功能型、混合型、压缩型）；4）非线性探针显示信息被重新编码而非丢失（MLP R²=0.99 vs 线性R²=0.86）；5）grokking后移除权重衰减可逆转压缩同时保留算法。

Conclusion: 结论：梯度下降和权重衰减在grokking中协同作用，谱边缘从功能活跃转变为压缩轴，信息被重新编码而非丢失，权重衰减在grokking后对算法保留非必需但对压缩至关重要。

Abstract: We decompose the spectral edge -- the dominant direction of the Gram matrix of parameter updates -- into its gradient and weight-decay components during grokking in two sequence tasks (Dyck-1 and SCAN). We find a sharp two-phase lifecycle: before grokking the edge is gradient-driven and functionally active; at grokking, gradient and weight decay align, and the edge becomes a compression axis that is perturbation-flat yet ablation-critical (>4000x more impactful than random directions). Three universality classes emerge (functional, mixed, compression), predicted by the gap flow equation. Nonlinear probes show information is re-encoded, not lost (MLP $R^2=0.99$ where linear $R^2=0.86$), and removing weight decay post-grok reverses compression while preserving the algorithm.

</details>


### [645] [When Does Context Help? A Systematic Study of Target-Conditional Molecular Property Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06558)
*Bryan Cheng,Jasper Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究首次系统评估了目标上下文在分子性质预测中的作用，发现融合架构设计比是否包含上下文更重要，上下文可实现数据稀缺情况下的预测，但也可能因分布不匹配而损害性能，同时揭示了标准基准测试中的根本缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是系统性地探究目标上下文（如蛋白质靶点信息）何时有助于分子性质预测，填补该领域缺乏系统性评估的空白，并揭示现有基准测试中的缺陷。

Method: 使用NestDrug（基于FiLM的架构）在10个不同蛋白质家族、4种融合架构、67-9,409个训练化合物的数据规模下进行评估，同时采用时间分割（训练至2020年，测试2021-2024年）和随机分割两种评估方式。

Result: FiLM架构优于拼接和加性条件化；在数据稀缺的CYP3A4上，多任务迁移学习实现0.686 AUC，而单目标随机森林仅0.238；但上下文也可能因分布不匹配而损害性能（如BACE1下降10.2 pp）；时间分割评估显示0.843 AUC且无性能下降，证明能泛化到未来化学空间。

Conclusion: 融合架构设计比是否包含上下文更重要；上下文可实现数据稀缺预测但可能因分布不匹配而损害性能；标准基准测试存在根本缺陷（如数据泄露）；时间分割评估提供了上下文条件化分子表示能泛化到未来化学空间的首次严谨证据。

Abstract: We present the first systematic study of when target context helps molecular property prediction, evaluating context conditioning across 10 diverse protein families, 4 fusion architectures, data regimes spanning 67-9,409 training compounds, and both temporal and random evaluation splits. Using NestDrug, a FiLM-based architecture that conditions molecular representations on target identity, we characterize both success and failure modes with three principal findings. First, fusion architecture dominates: FiLM outperforms concatenation by 24.2 percentage points and additive conditioning by 8.6 pp; how you incorporate context matters more than whether you include it. Second, context enables otherwise impossible predictions: on data-scarce CYP3A4 (67 training compounds), multi-task transfer achieves 0.686 AUC where per-target Random Forest collapses to 0.238. Third, context can systematically hurt: distribution mismatch causes 10.2 pp degradation on BACE1; few-shot adaptation consistently underperforms zero-shot. Beyond methodology, we expose fundamental flaws in standard benchmarking: 1-nearest-neighbor Tanimoto achieves 0.991 AUC on DUD-E without any learning, and 50% of actives leak from training data, rendering absolute performance metrics meaningless. Our temporal split evaluation (train up to 2020, test 2021-2024) achieves stable 0.843 AUC with no degradation, providing the first rigorous evidence that context-conditional molecular representations generalize to future chemical space.

</details>


### [646] [Efficient Quantization of Mixture-of-Experts with Theoretical Generalization Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06515)
*Mohammed Nowaz Rabbani Chowdhury,Kaoutar El Maghraoui,Hsinyu Tsai,Naigang Wang,Geoffrey W. Burr,Liu Liu,Meng Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出基于专家变化敏感性的专家级混合精度量化方法，通过路由器L2范数变化和神经元内方差分配比特宽度，在Switch Transformer和Mixtral等大规模MoE模型上实现更高精度和更低推理成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏混合专家模型虽然通过激活少量专家减少计算量，但大量参数仍导致显著内存开销。现有混合精度方法需要大量计算分配比特宽度，且忽略了不同专家对量化敏感性的差异。

Method: 提出理论基础的专家级混合精度策略：1) 基于训练期间路由器L2范数变化分配比特宽度，变化小的专家捕获低频关键特征，对量化更敏感，需要更高精度；2) 为避免高量化噪声，对具有大最大神经元内方差的专家也分配更高精度。

Result: 在大规模MoE模型（包括Switch Transformer和Mixtral）上的实验表明，该方法比现有方法获得更高精度，同时减少推理成本，且比特宽度分配开销可忽略不计。

Conclusion: 提出的专家级混合精度量化方法通过考虑专家对量化的不同敏感性，实现了更好的精度-效率权衡，为大规模MoE模型的部署提供了有效的量化解决方案。

Abstract: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) allows scaling of language and vision models efficiently by activating only a small subset of experts per input. While this reduces computation, the large number of parameters still incurs substantial memory overhead during inference. Post-training quantization has been explored to address this issue. Because uniform quantization suffers from significant accuracy loss at low bit-widths, mixed-precision methods have been recently explored; however, they often require substantial computation for bit-width allocation and overlook the varying sensitivity of model performance to the quantization of different experts. We propose a theoretically grounded expert-wise mixed precision strategy that assigns bit-width to each expert primarily based on their change in routers l2 norm during training. Experts with smaller changes are shown to capture less frequent but critical features, and model performance is more sensitive to the quantization of these experts, thus requiring higher precision. Furthermore, to avoid allocating experts to lower precision that inject high quantization noise, experts with large maximum intra-neuron variance are also allocated higher precision. Experiments on large-scale MoE models, including Switch Transformer and Mixtral, show that our method achieves higher accuracy than existing approaches, while also reducing inference cost and incurring only negligible overhead for bit-width assignment.

</details>


### [647] [VLMShield: Efficient and Robust Defense of Vision-Language Models against Malicious Prompts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06502)
*Peigui Qi,Kunsheng Tang,Yanpu Yu,Jialin Wu,Yide Song,Wenbo Zhou,Zhicong Huang,Cheng Hong,Weiming Zhang,Nenghai Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出VLMShield：基于MAFE框架的轻量级安全检测器，用于识别视觉语言模型中的恶意提示攻击


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视觉语言模型在视觉集成过程中存在对齐弱化问题，容易受到恶意提示攻击；现有防御方法在效率和鲁棒性方面存在不足

Method: 首先提出MAFE框架使CLIP能处理长文本并融合多模态信息；基于MAFE提取特征发现良性/恶意提示的分布差异；开发VLMShield作为即插即用的轻量级安全检测器

Result: 在多个维度上表现出优越性能，包括鲁棒性、效率和实用性；代码已开源

Conclusion: 为更安全的多模态AI部署铺平道路

Abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) face significant safety vulnerabilities from malicious prompt attacks due to weakened alignment during visual integration. Existing defenses suffer from efficiency and robustness. To address these challenges, we first propose the Multimodal Aggregated Feature Extraction (MAFE) framework that enables CLIP to handle long text and fuse multimodal information into unified representations. Through empirical analysis of MAFE-extracted features, we discover distinct distributional patterns between benign and malicious prompts. Building upon this finding, we develop VLMShield, a lightweight safety detector that efficiently identifies multimodal malicious attacks as a plug-and-play solution. Extensive experiments demonstrate superior performance across multiple dimensions, including robustness, efficiency, and utility. Through our work, we hope to pave the way for more secure multimodal AI deployment. Code is available at [this https URL](https://github.com/pgqihere/VLMShield).

</details>


### [648] [Transformer See, Transformer Do: Copying as an Intermediate Step in Learning Analogical Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06501)
*Philipp Hellwig,Willem Zuidema,Claire E. Stevenson,Martha Lewis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 使用元学习组合性方法训练Transformer处理字母串类比任务，发现通过包含复制任务引导模型关注关键信息元素可提升学习效果，异质数据集训练增强泛化能力，但无法泛化到全新变换


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 类比推理是人类智能的标志，但开发具有稳健人类类比推理能力的人工智能系统一直很困难。本研究旨在探索如何通过元学习组合性方法训练Transformer模型来解决字母串类比推理任务，并评估其泛化能力

Method: 使用元学习组合性方法训练Transformer模型处理字母串类比任务，通过在训练数据中包含复制任务来引导模型关注最信息丰富的问题元素，使用异质数据集增强泛化能力，采用3层编码器-解码器架构，并通过可解释性分析识别模型的计算算法

Result: 1) 包含复制任务使字母串类比变得可学习；2) 异质数据集训练提升对新字母表的泛化能力，3层编码器-解码器模型优于大多数前沿模型；3) MLC方法能泛化到已训练变换的组合，但不能泛化到全新变换；4) 识别出近似模型计算的算法，并通过可解释性分析验证模型可按算法预期精确调控

Conclusion: 元学习组合性方法能有效提升Transformer在类比推理任务上的性能，通过特定训练策略可引导模型关注关键信息元素并增强泛化能力，但模型仍受限于训练数据的覆盖范围，无法处理完全新颖的变换。研究结果为更大模型的泛化能力和人类类比推理的相似性提供了启示

Abstract: Analogical reasoning is a hallmark of human intelligence, enabling us to solve new problems by transferring knowledge from one situation to another. Yet, developing artificial intelligence systems capable of robust human-like analogical reasoning has proven difficult. In this work, we train transformers using Meta-Learning for Compositionality (MLC) on an analogical reasoning task (letter-string analogies) and assess their generalization capabilities. We find that letter-string analogies become learnable when guiding the models to attend to the most informative problem elements induced by including copying tasks in the training data. Furthermore, generalization to new alphabets becomes better when models are trained with more heterogeneous datasets, where our 3-layer encoder-decoder model outperforms most frontier models. The MLC approach also enables some generalization to compositions of trained transformations, but not to completely novel transformations. To understand how the model operates, we identify an algorithm that approximates the model's computations. We verify this using interpretability analyses and show that the model can be steered precisely according to expectations derived from the algorithm. Finally, we discuss implications of our findings for generalization capabilities of larger models and parallels to human analogical reasoning.

</details>


### [649] [Optimal Rates for Pure {\varepsilon}-Differentially Private Stochastic Convex Optimization with Heavy Tails](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06492)
*Andrew Lowy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了具有重尾梯度的随机凸优化在纯ε-差分隐私下的问题，提出了在仅假设k阶矩有界（而非Lipschitz常数有界）条件下的最优风险界，并设计了多项式时间算法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注近似(ε,δ)-差分隐私下的重尾梯度随机凸优化，但纯ε-差分隐私情况的最优风险界尚未解决。传统方法假设Lipschitz常数有界，这限制了重尾分布的应用。本文旨在放宽这一假设，仅要求梯度的k阶矩有界，从而处理无界、重尾的随机梯度分布，并获得更尖锐的过风险界。

Method: 提出基于经验损失的Lipschitz扩展私有优化新框架。算法在多项式时间内以高概率达到最优过风险率。对于某些结构化问题类（如欧几里得球、椭球、多面体上的铰链/ReLU型和绝对值损失），即使在最坏情况Lipschitz参数无限时，也能在概率1下多项式时间内实现相同过风险保证。

Result: 刻画了纯ε-差分隐私重尾随机凸优化的极小极大最优过风险率（至对数因子）。算法在多项式时间内以高概率达到该最优率。当最坏情况Lipschitz参数多项式有界时，算法在概率1下多项式时间运行。对于特定结构化问题类，即使Lipschitz参数无限，也能在概率1下多项式时间实现相同过风险保证。

Conclusion: 本文解决了纯ε-差分隐私下重尾梯度随机凸优化的开放问题，建立了最优过风险界并设计了高效算法。通过仅假设梯度的k阶矩有界而非Lipschitz常数有界，扩展了差分隐私优化的适用范围，特别适用于重尾分布场景。提出的Lipschitz扩展框架为私有优化提供了新工具。

Abstract: We study stochastic convex optimization (SCO) with heavy-tailed gradients under pure epsilon-differential privacy (DP). Instead of assuming a bound on the worst-case Lipschitz parameter of the loss, we assume only a bounded k-th moment. This assumption allows for unbounded, heavy-tailed stochastic gradient distributions, and can yield sharper excess risk bounds. The minimax optimal rate for approximate (epsilon, delta)-DP SCO is known in this setting, but the pure epsilon-DP case has remained open. We characterize the minimax optimal excess-risk rate for pure epsilon-DP heavy-tailed SCO up to logarithmic factors. Our algorithm achieves this rate in polynomial time with high probability. Moreover, it runs in polynomial time with probability 1 when the worst-case Lipschitz parameter is polynomially bounded. For important structured problem classes - including hinge/ReLU-type and absolute-value losses on Euclidean balls, ellipsoids, and polytopes - we achieve the same excess-risk guarantee in polynomial time with probability 1 even when the worst-case Lipschitz parameter is infinite. Our approach is based on a novel framework for privately optimizing Lipschitz extensions of the empirical loss. We complement our excess risk upper bound with a novel high probability lower bound.

</details>


### [650] [Discrete Flow Matching Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06491)
*Maojiang Su,Po-Chung Hsieh,Weimin Wu,Mingcheng Lu,Jiunhau Chen,Jerry Yao-Chieh Hu,Han Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DoMinO：将离散流匹配模型的强化学习微调统一为马尔可夫决策过程框架，避免偏差估计器，引入总变差正则化防止策略崩溃，在DNA序列设计中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL微调方法在离散流匹配模型上常使用有偏的辅助估计器和似然替代，导致采样器改变和性能下降。需要一种能保持原始采样器、避免偏差且防止策略崩溃的统一框架。

Method: 将DFM采样过程视为多步马尔可夫决策过程，将微调奖励最大化重新表述为稳健的RL目标。引入总变差正则化保持微调分布接近预训练分布，理论分析离散化误差和正则化上界。

Result: 在调控DNA序列设计任务中，DoMinO相比先前最佳奖励驱动基线，实现了更强的预测增强子活性和更好的序列自然性。正则化进一步改善了与自然序列分布的匹配，同时保持强功能性能。

Conclusion: DoMinO为可控离散序列生成提供了一个有用框架，能保持原始DFM采样器、避免偏差估计器，并通过正则化防止策略崩溃，在生物序列设计等应用中表现出色。

Abstract: We introduce Discrete flow Matching policy Optimization (DoMinO), a unified framework for Reinforcement Learning (RL) fine-tuning Discrete Flow Matching (DFM) models under a broad class of policy gradient methods. Our key idea is to view the DFM sampling procedure as a multi-step Markov Decision Process. This perspective provides a simple and transparent reformulation of fine-tuning reward maximization as a robust RL objective. Consequently, it not only preserves the original DFM samplers but also avoids biased auxiliary estimators and likelihood surrogates used by many prior RL fine-tuning methods. To prevent policy collapse, we also introduce new total-variation regularizers to keep the fine-tuned distribution close to the pretrained one. Theoretically, we establish an upper bound on the discretization error of DoMinO and tractable upper bounds for the regularizers. Experimentally, we evaluate DoMinO on regulatory DNA sequence design. DoMinO achieves stronger predicted enhancer activity and better sequence naturalness than the previous best reward-driven baselines. The regularization further improves alignment with the natural sequence distribution while preserving strong functional performance. These results establish DoMinO as an useful framework for controllable discrete sequence generation.

</details>


<div id='hep-ex'></div>

# hep-ex [[Back]](#toc)

### [651] [Towards foundation-style models for energy-frontier heterogeneous neutrino detectors via self-supervised pre-training](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07037)
*Saúl Alonso-Monsalve,Fabio Cufino,Umut Kose,Anna Mascellani,André Rubbia*

Main category: hep-ex

TL;DR: 提出稀疏ViT框架，通过自监督预训练学习可重用表征，应用于高能物理探测器数据分析，在FASERCal模拟事件中提升性能并实现有效迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 加速器中微子物理进入TeV能区前沿，产生密集重叠的探测器信号，传统重建方法难以处理，且标记数据稀缺，需要跨多种下游任务的通用解决方案。

Method: 采用稀疏ViT框架，结合掩码自编码器重建和关系体素级目标（层次结构、幽灵和粒子识别）进行自监督预训练，然后共享编码器在分类和回归任务上联合微调。

Result: 预训练持续提升中微子味道和粲夸克识别、动量回归和顶点重建性能；关系目标在拓扑复杂通道中带来额外增益；预训练编码器仅需约10^3标记事件即可达到随机初始化模型使用10倍数据的效果；学习表征能有效迁移到不同探测器技术和能标的公开基准。

Conclusion: 多模态探测器数据的自监督预训练是构建可重用表征的可扩展途径，适用于中微子和粒子探测器分析。

Abstract: Accelerator-based neutrino physics is entering an energy-frontier regime in which interactions reach the TeV scale and produce exceptionally dense, overlapping detector signatures. In this regime, event interpretation becomes impractical for conventional reconstruction approaches, particularly when labelled data are scarce and the analysis spans diverse downstream objectives. We present a sparse ViT framework for learning reusable representations from heterogeneous detector data. Self-supervised pre-training combines masked autoencoder reconstruction with relational voxel-level objectives for hierarchy, ghost and particle identification, and the resulting shared encoder is then jointly fine-tuned across classification and regression tasks. Evaluated on simulated events from the proposed FASERCal concept at the LHC, we find that pre-training consistently improves neutrino flavour and charm-quark identification, momentum regression, and vertex reconstruction over training from scratch, with the addition of relational objectives yielding further gains in the most topologically complex channels. Interpretability analyses further show that pre-training yields a more structured latent space, while detector-subsystem ablations recover physically plausible channel-dependent roles for the heterogeneous inputs. A data-efficiency study shows that, with roughly $10^3$ labelled events, the pre-trained encoder already matches the flavour-classification performance of a randomly initialised model trained on an order of magnitude more data. The learned representations also transfer effectively to publicly available benchmarks spanning different detector technologies and energy scales, matching or exceeding published baselines. These results support self-supervised pre-training on multimodal detector data as a scalable route towards reusable representations for neutrino and particle-detector analysis.

</details>


<div id='quant-ph'></div>

# quant-ph [[Back]](#toc)

### [652] [QARIMA: A Quantum Approach To Classical Time Series Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08277)
*Nishikanta Mohanty,Bikash K. Behera,Badshah Mukherjee,Pravat Dash*

Main category: quant-ph

TL;DR: 提出量子启发的ARIMA方法，集成量子辅助滞后发现与固定配置变分量子电路，用于参数估计和弱滞后项精炼，在环境和工业数据集上展示优于经典ARIMA的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统ARIMA模型在滞后项选择和参数估计中存在计算复杂性和超参数优化开销问题。量子计算提供新的计算范式，但需要明确量子效应在时间序列分析中的具体作用位置，避免超参数泄漏。

Method: 1) 使用交换测试驱动的量子自相关(QACF)和量子偏自相关(QPACF)进行差分和候选滞后项识别；2) 延迟矩阵构造将量子投影对齐时间域回归器；3) 固定VQC架构、优化器和训练预算进行参数估计；4) VQC-AR估计自回归系数，VQC-MA估计移动平均系数；5) 轻量级VQC弱滞后项精炼重新加权或修剪筛选的AR滞后项。

Result: 在环境和工业数据集上进行滚动原点评估，相比自动化经典ARIMA，报告了样本外均方误差(MSE)、平均绝对百分比误差(MAPE)以及Diebold-Mariano检验结果。七个量子贡献共同减少了元优化开销，并明确了量子效应在阶数发现、滞后项精炼和AR/MA参数估计中的具体作用。

Conclusion: 量子启发的ARIMA方法通过量子辅助滞后发现和固定配置VQC参数估计，在时间序列分析中实现了性能提升，同时明确了量子计算在传统统计模型中的具体应用位置，为量子计算在时间序列分析中的实际应用提供了框架。

Abstract: We present a quantum-inspired ARIMA methodology that integrates quantum-assisted lag discovery with \emph{fixed-configuration} variational quantum circuits (VQCs) for parameter estimation and weak-lag refinement. Differencing and candidate lags are identified via swap-test-driven quantum autocorrelation (QACF) and quantum partial autocorrelation (QPACF), with a delayed-matrix construction that aligns quantum projections to time-domain regressors, followed by standard information-criterion parsimony. Given the screened orders $(p,d,q)$, we retain a fixed VQC ansatz, optimizer, and training budget, preventing hyperparameter leakage, and deploy the circuit in two estimation roles: VQC-AR for autoregressive coefficients and VQC-MA for moving-average coefficients. Between screening and estimation, a lightweight VQC weak-lag refinement re-weights or prunes screened AR lags without altering $(p,d,q)$. Across environmental and industrial datasets, we perform rolling-origin evaluations against automated classical ARIMA, reporting out-of-sample mean squared error (MSE), mean absolute percentage error (MAPE), and Diebold--Mariano tests on MSE and MAE. Empirically, the seven quantum contributions -- (1) differencing selection, (2) QACF, (3) QPACF, (4) swap-test primitives with delayed-matrix construction, (5) VQC-AR, (6) VQC weak-lag refinement, and (7) VQC-MA -- collectively reduce meta-optimization overhead and make explicit where quantum effects enter order discovery, lag refinement, and AR/MA parameter estimation.

</details>


### [653] [Exponential quantum advantage in processing massive classical data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07639)
*Haimeng Zhao,Alexander Zlokapa,Hartmut Neven,Ryan Babbush,John Preskill,Jarrod R. McClean,Hsin-Yuan Huang*

Main category: quant-ph

TL;DR: 量子计算机在经典数据处理和机器学习中展现出指数级优势，仅需多对数规模量子比特即可处理大规模分类和降维任务，而经典机器需要指数级更大规模才能达到相同性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索量子计算在经典数据处理和机器学习中的广泛适用性优势，解决量子优势在实用领域的基本开放问题，特别是在处理大规模经典数据时的量子加速潜力。

Method: 提出量子oracle sketching算法，通过随机经典数据样本在量子叠加态中访问经典世界，结合经典阴影技术绕过数据加载和读出瓶颈，从海量经典数据构建简洁的经典模型。

Result: 在单细胞RNA测序和电影评论情感分析等实际应用中验证了量子优势，实现了4-6个数量级的规模缩减，使用少于60个逻辑量子比特；证明经典机器需要指数级更大规模才能达到相同预测性能。

Conclusion: 经典数据上的机器学习是量子优势的广泛自然领域，也是量子力学在复杂性前沿的基本测试；量子优势在经典机器拥有无限时间或BPP=BQP条件下依然存在，仅依赖于量子力学的正确性。

Abstract: Broadly applicable quantum advantage, particularly in classical data processing and machine learning, has been a fundamental open problem. In this work, we prove that a small quantum computer of polylogarithmic size can perform large-scale classification and dimension reduction on massive classical data by processing samples on the fly, whereas any classical machine achieving the same prediction performance requires exponentially larger size. Furthermore, classical machines that are exponentially larger yet below the required size need superpolynomially more samples and time. We validate these quantum advantages in real-world applications, including single-cell RNA sequencing and movie review sentiment analysis, demonstrating four to six orders of magnitude reduction in size with fewer than 60 logical qubits. These quantum advantages are enabled by quantum oracle sketching, an algorithm for accessing the classical world in quantum superposition using only random classical data samples. Combined with classical shadows, our algorithm circumvents the data loading and readout bottleneck to construct succinct classical models from massive classical data, a task provably impossible for any classical machine that is not exponentially larger than the quantum machine. These quantum advantages persist even when classical machines are granted unlimited time or if BPP=BQP, and rely only on the correctness of quantum mechanics. Together, our results establish machine learning on classical data as a broad and natural domain of quantum advantage and a fundamental test of quantum mechanics at the complexity frontier.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [654] [Beyond Pessimism: Offline Learning in KL-regularized Games](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06738)
*Yuheng Zhang,Claire Chen,Nan Jiang*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 提出一种无需悲观估计的离线KL正则化零和博弈算法，首次实现Õ(1/n)样本复杂度，优于先前Õ(1/√n)的统计速率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离线KL正则化零和博弈方法依赖悲观价值估计处理分布偏移，只能获得Õ(1/√n)的统计速率。需要开发更高效的算法来提升样本复杂度。

Method: 基于KL正则化最佳响应的平滑性和纳什均衡的斜对称稳定性，开发新的无悲观算法框架。提出高效的自博弈策略优化算法，迭代次数与样本量线性相关。

Result: 首次实现KL正则化零和博弈的Õ(1/n)样本复杂度，完全无需悲观估计。自博弈算法在线性迭代次数下达到与极小极大估计相同的快速统计速率。

Conclusion: 通过利用KL正则化博弈的结构特性，成功消除对悲观估计的依赖，显著提升离线学习的统计效率，为KL正则化零和博弈提供了最优样本复杂度的解决方案。

Abstract: We study offline learning in KL-regularized two-player zero-sum games, where policies are optimized under a KL constraint to a fixed reference policy. Prior work relies on pessimistic value estimation to handle distribution shift, yielding only $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/\sqrt n)$ statistical rates. We develop a new pessimism-free algorithm and analytical framework for KL-regularized games, built on the smoothness of KL-regularized best responses and a stability property of the Nash equilibrium induced by skew symmetry. This yields the first $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/n)$ sample complexity bound for offline learning in KL-regularized zero-sum games, achieved entirely without pessimism. We further propose an efficient self-play policy optimization algorithm and prove that, with a number of iterations linear in the sample size, it achieves the same fast $\widetilde{\mathcal{O}}(1/n)$ statistical rate as the minimax estimator.

</details>


<div id='cs.DC'></div>

# cs.DC [[Back]](#toc)

### [655] [Exploiting Aggregate Programming in a Multi-Robot Service Prototype](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06876)
*Giorgio Audrito,Andrea Basso,Daniele Bortoluzzi,Ferruccio Damiani,Giordano Scarso,Gianluca Torta*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: 将聚合编程应用于多机器人系统协调，通过仿真和图书馆测试验证原型


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多机器人系统在医疗、勘探、救援等领域日益重要，但构建此类系统面临物理机器人复杂性、环境复杂性以及分布式协调的多重挑战，需要更有效的工程方法

Method: 采用聚合编程方法设计和实现多机器人服务系统的协调软件，构建原型系统，并通过仿真和大学图书馆的实际测试进行验证

Result: 成功开发了基于聚合编程的多机器人服务系统原型，并在仿真和实际图书馆环境中进行了验证，证明了聚合编程在多机器人协调中的可行性

Conclusion: 聚合编程是构建弹性多机器人系统的有前景方法，能够有效处理机器人物理特性、环境复杂性和分布式协调的挑战，为多机器人系统开发提供了新的工程途径

Abstract: Multi-robot systems are becoming increasingly relevant within diverse application domains, such as healthcare, exploration, and rescue missions. However, building such systems is still a significant challenge, since it adds the complexities of the physical nature of robots and their environments to those inherent in coordinating any distributed (multi-agent) system. Aggregate Programming (AP) has recently emerged as a promising approach to engineering resilient, distributed systems with proximity-based communication, and is notably supported by practical frameworks.  In this paper we present a prototype of a multi-robot service system, which adopts AP for the design and implementation of its coordination software. The prototype has been validated both with simulations, and with tests in a University library.

</details>


### [656] [LegoDiffusion: Micro-Serving Text-to-Image Diffusion Workflows](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08123)
*Lingyun Yang,Suyi Li,Tianyu Feng,Xiaoxiao Jiang,Zhipeng Di,Weiyi Lu,Kan Liu,Yinghao Yu,Tao Lan,Guodong Yang,Lin Qu,Liping Zhang,Wei Wang*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: LegoDiffusion：一种将文本到图像生成工作流分解为松散耦合模型执行节点的微服务系统，实现细粒度资源管理和优化


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有服务系统将扩散工作流视为不透明的整体，统一配置、放置和扩展所有组成模型，这掩盖了内部数据流、阻碍模型共享，并强制实施粗粒度资源管理

Method: 将工作流分解为松散耦合的模型执行节点，实现独立管理和调度；通过显式管理单个模型推理，解锁集群级优化，包括按模型扩展、模型共享和自适应模型并行

Result: LegoDiffusion优于现有扩散工作流服务系统，可维持高达3倍的请求率，并能容忍高达8倍的突发流量

Conclusion: 微服务扩散工作流的方法通过细粒度资源管理和优化显著提升了系统性能和弹性

Abstract: Text-to-image generation executes a diffusion workflow comprising multiple models centered on a base diffusion model. Existing serving systems treat each workflow as an opaque monolith, provisioning, placing, and scaling all constituent models together, which obscures internal dataflow, prevents model sharing, and enforces coarse-grained resource management. In this paper, we make a case for micro-serving diffusion workflows with LegoDiffusion, a system that decomposes a workflow into loosely coupled model-execution nodes that can be independently managed and scheduled. By explicitly managing individual model inference, LegoDiffusion unlocks cluster-scale optimizations, including per-model scaling, model sharing, and adaptive model parallelism. Collectively, LegoDiffusion outperforms existing diffusion workflow serving systems, sustaining up to 3x higher request rates and tolerating up to 8x higher burst traffic.

</details>


### [657] [Blink: CPU-Free LLM Inference by Delegating the Serving Stack to GPU and SmartNIC](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07609)
*Mohammad Siavashi,Mariano Scazzariello,Gerald Q. Maguire,Dejan Kostić,Marco Chiesa*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: Blink是一种端到端的LLM服务架构，通过将CPU从稳态推理路径中移除，使用SmartNIC和GPU重新分配责任，显著提升推理性能并减少CPU干扰影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前LLM服务架构将主机CPU置于关键路径上进行编排和令牌级控制，导致性能对CPU干扰敏感，限制了应用共置和资源利用率，需要一种能消除CPU瓶颈的解决方案。

Method: Blink采用SmartNIC和GPU协同架构：SmartNIC卸载请求处理并通过RDMA将输入直接送入GPU内存；使用持久GPU内核替代主机驱动调度，执行批处理、调度和KV缓存管理，完全无需CPU参与。

Result: 相比TensorRT-LLM、vLLM和SGLang，Blink在隔离环境下将预饱和P99 TTFT降低8.47倍，P99 TPOT降低3.40倍，解码吞吐量提升2.1倍，每令牌能耗降低48.6%；在CPU干扰下保持稳定性能，而现有系统性能下降可达两个数量级。

Conclusion: Blink通过将CPU从LLM推理关键路径中移除，实现了显著的性能提升和干扰鲁棒性，为数据中心LLM服务提供了更高效、稳定的架构方案。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) inference is rapidly becoming a core datacenter service, yet current serving stacks keep the host CPU on the critical path for orchestration and token-level control. This makes LLM performance sensitive to CPU interference, undermining application colocation and forcing operators to reserve CPU headroom, leaving substantial capacity unutilized.
  We introduce Blink, an end-to-end serving architecture that removes the host CPU from the steady-state inference path by redistributing responsibilities across a SmartNIC and a GPU. Blink offloads request handling to the SmartNIC, which delivers inputs directly into GPU memory via RDMA, and replaces host-driven scheduling with a persistent GPU kernel that performs batching, scheduling, and KV-cache management without CPU involvement.
  Evaluated against TensorRT-LLM, vLLM, and SGLang, Blink outperforms all baselines even in isolation, reducing pre-saturation P99 TTFT by up to 8.47$\times$ and P99 TPOT by up to 3.40$\times$, improving decode throughput by up to 2.1$\times$, and reducing energy per token by up to 48.6$\%$. Under CPU interference, Blink maintains stable performance, while existing systems degrade by up to two orders of magnitude.

</details>


### [658] [NestPipe: Large-Scale Recommendation Training on 1,500+ Accelerators via Nested Pipelining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06956)
*Zhida Jiang,Zhaolong Xing,Huichao Chai,Tianxing Sun,Qiang Peng,Baopeng Yuan,Jiaxing Wang,Hua Du,Zhixin Wu,Xuemiao Li,Yikui Cao,Xinyu Liu,Yongxiang Feng,Zhen Chen,Ke Zhang*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: NestPipe是一个大规模去中心化嵌入训练框架，通过嵌套流水线解决万亿参数推荐模型在千级集群中的查找和通信瓶颈，同时保持同步训练语义。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代推荐模型参数已达万亿级别，当集群规模扩展到千级时，分布式训练瓶颈从计算和内存转移到数据移动，特别是嵌入的查找和通信延迟。现有解决方案要么只优化一个瓶颈，要么通过牺牲训练一致性来提高吞吐量。

Method: NestPipe采用嵌套流水线利用两种层次稀疏并行机会：1) 批间级：通过双缓冲同步构建无陈旧五阶段流水线（DBP），缓解查找瓶颈；2) 批内级：基于嵌入冻结现象，通过协调流调度和以键为中心的样本聚类实现FWP，将All2All通信与密集计算重叠。

Result: 在生产GPU和NPU集群（1,536个worker）上的实验表明，NestPipe实现了最高3.06倍的加速和94.07%的扩展效率。

Conclusion: NestPipe通过嵌套流水线同时解决了大规模推荐模型训练中的查找和通信瓶颈，在保持同步训练语义的同时显著提升了训练效率。

Abstract: Modern recommendation models have increased to trillions of parameters. As cluster scales expand to O(1k), distributed training bottlenecks shift from computation and memory to data movement, especially lookup and communication latency associated with embeddings. Existing solutions either optimize only one bottleneck or improve throughput by sacrificing training consistency. This paper presents NestPipe, a large-scale decentralized embedding training framework that tackles both bottlenecks while preserving synchronous training semantics. NestPipe exploits two hierarchical sparse parallelism opportunities through nested pipelining. At the inter-batch level, Dual-Buffer Pipelining (DBP) constructs a staleness-free five-stage pipeline through dual-buffer synchronization, mitigating lookup bottlenecks without embedding staleness. At the intra-batch level, we identify the embedding freezing phenomenon, which inspires Frozen-Window Pipelining (FWP) to overlap All2All communication with dense computation via coordinated stream scheduling and key-centric sample clustering. Experiments on production GPU and NPU clusters with 1,536 workers demonstrate that NestPipe achieves up to 3.06x speedup and 94.07% scaling efficiency.

</details>


### [659] [CodecSight: Leveraging Video Codec Signals for Efficient Streaming VLM Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06036)
*Yulin Zou,Yan Chen,Wenyan Chen,JooYoung Park,Shivaraman Nitin,Luo Tao,Francisco Romero,Dmitrii Ustiugov*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: CodecSight：基于视频编解码元数据的流媒体视频分析系统，利用压缩过程中的时空结构信息，统一优化视频解码、视觉处理和LLM预填充，无需离线训练即可显著提升吞吐量并降低GPU计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 视频流分析是视觉语言模型服务的关键工作负载，但多模态推理的高成本限制了可扩展性。现有系统通过利用视频流中的时空冗余来降低推理成本，但仅针对视觉变换器（ViT）或LLM的有限视角，未能挖掘端到端优化机会。此外，现有方法需要大量开销来识别冗余（通过离线分析训练或昂贵的在线计算），不适合动态实时流。

Method: CodecSight基于关键观察：视频编解码器在压缩过程中已经提取了每个流的时空结构作为副产品。系统将编解码元数据作为低成本运行时信号，统一优化视频解码、视觉处理和LLM预填充。具体包括：1）在ViT编码前进行编解码引导的补丁剪枝；2）在LLM预填充期间选择性刷新键值缓存。这些操作完全在线，无需离线训练，且通过直接在压缩比特流上操作获得传输减少的固有优势。

Result: 实验表明，CodecSight相比最先进的基线方法，吞吐量提升高达3倍，GPU计算减少高达87%，同时保持有竞争力的准确率，仅导致0~8%的F1分数下降。

Conclusion: CodecSight通过利用视频编解码元数据作为低成本运行时信号，实现了端到端的视频流分析优化，显著提升了系统效率，同时保持了良好的准确率，为实时视频分析提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Video streaming analytics is a crucial workload for vision-language model serving, but the high cost of multimodal inference limits scalability. Prior systems reduce inference cost by exploiting temporal and spatial redundancy in video streams, but they target either the vision transformer (ViT) or the LLM with a limited view, leaving end-to-end opportunities untapped. Moreover, existing methods incur significant overhead to identify redundancy, either through offline profiling and training or costly online computation, making them ill-suited for dynamic real-time streams.
  We present CodecSight, a codec-guided streaming video analytics system, built on a key observation that video codecs already extract the temporal and spatial structure of each stream as a byproduct of compression. CodecSight treats this codec metadata as a low-cost runtime signal to unify optimization across video decoding, visual processing, and LLM prefilling, with transmission reduction as an inherent benefit of operating directly on compressed bitstreams. This drives codec-guided patch pruning before ViT encoding and selective key-value cache refresh during LLM prefilling, both of which are fully online and do not require offline training. Experiments show that CodecSight achieves an improvement in throughput of up to 3$\times$, and a reduction of up to 87% in GPU compute over state-of-the-art baselines, maintaining competitive accuracy with only 0$\sim$8% F1 drop.

</details>


### [660] [Foundry: Template-Based CUDA Graph Context Materialization for Fast LLM Serving Cold Start](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06664)
*Xueshen Liu,Yongji Wu,Yuncheng Yao,Danyang Zhuo,Ion Stoica,Z. Morley Mao*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: Foundry通过模板化CUDA图上下文物化系统，将离线处理的图拓扑和执行上下文持久化，在线重建可执行图，将Qwen3-235B-A22B的冷启动时间从10分钟降至3.9秒


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代LLM服务提供商依赖自动扩缩容和并行重构应对变化的工作负载，但冷启动延迟仍是主要瓶颈。CUDA图捕获需要数十秒到数分钟，且无法简单序列化，现有方法要么依赖脆弱的特定内核补丁，要么使用重量级的进程级检查点/恢复，无法灵活适应动态并行切换。

Method: Foundry采用模板化CUDA图上下文物化系统：1）在离线处理阶段持久化图拓扑和执行上下文；2）在线重建可执行图，开销可忽略；3）强制确定性内存布局；4）自动提取和重载捕获图所需的内核二进制文件；5）通过基于拓扑的模板化降低在线重建成本；6）支持单GPU离线捕获生成多GPU部署模板，仅修补与rank相关的通信状态。

Result: 在高达235B参数的密集和MoE模型上，Foundry将冷启动延迟降低高达99%，将Qwen3-235B-A22B的初始化时间从10分钟减少到3.9秒，同时保持CUDA图的吞吐量优势。

Conclusion: Foundry通过模板化方法有效解决了CUDA图序列化的挑战，显著降低了LLM服务的冷启动延迟，支持动态并行切换，为大规模模型部署提供了实用的解决方案。

Abstract: Modern LLM service providers increasingly rely on autoscaling and parallelism reconfiguration to respond to rapidly changing workloads, but cold-start latency remains a major bottleneck. While recent systems have reduced model weight loading to seconds, CUDA graph capture still takes tens of seconds to minutes and often dominates startup. Unfortunately, CUDA graphs cannot be naively serialized: beyond graph topology, they are tightly coupled to execution context, including device addresses embedded in kernel arguments and kernel code lazily loaded during warmup. Existing approaches either rely on brittle kernel-specific patching or heavyweight process-level checkpoint/restore that are inflexible to dynamic parallelism switching. We present Foundry, a template-based CUDA graph context materialization system that persists both graph topology and execution context during an offline processing stage, and reconstructs executable graphs online with negligible overhead. Foundry enforces deterministic memory layouts, automatically extracts and reloads kernel binaries required by captured graphs, and reduces online reconstruction costs through topology-based templating. For distributed serving, Foundry further enables a single-GPU offline capture to generate templates for multi-GPU deployments by patching only rank-dependent communication state. Across dense and MoE models up to 235B parameters, Foundry reduces cold-start latency by up to 99%, cutting the initialization time of Qwen3-235B-A22B from 10 minutes to 3.9 seconds while preserving the throughput gains of CUDA graphs.

</details>


### [661] [DynLP: Parallel Dynamic Batch Update for Label Propagation in Semi-Supervised Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06596)
*S M Shovan,Arindam Khanda,S M Ferdous,Sajal K. Das,Mahantesh Halappanavar*

Main category: cs.DC

TL;DR: DynLP：一种GPU中心的动态批处理并行标签传播算法，用于图半监督学习的增量数据场景，避免全图重计算，实现显著加速


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实应用中数据通常以增量批次到达，传统标签传播算法需要重新计算所有标签，导致冗余计算、计算密集且效率低下，缺乏高效的标签传播更新方法

Method: 提出DynLP算法，仅执行必要的更新，将变化传播到相关子图而不需要完全重新计算，利用GPU架构优化实现并行处理

Result: 在大规模数据集上平均实现13倍加速，最高达到102倍加速，相比最先进方法有显著性能提升

Conclusion: DynLP为图半监督学习中的增量数据场景提供了高效的动态标签传播解决方案，通过GPU优化实现了数量级的性能提升

Abstract: Semi-supervised learning aims to infer class labels using only a small fraction of labeled data. In graph-based semi-supervised learning, this is typically achieved through label propagation to predict labels of unlabeled nodes. However, in real-world applications, data often arrive incrementally in batches. Each time a new batch appears, reapplying the traditional label propagation algorithm to recompute all labels is redundant, computationally intensive, and inefficient. To address the absence of an efficient label propagation update method, we propose DynLP, a novel GPU-centric Dynamic Batched Parallel Label Propagation algorithm that performs only the necessary updates, propagating changes to the relevant subgraph without requiring full recalculation. By exploiting GPU architectural optimizations, our algorithm achieves on average 13x and upto 102x speedup on large-scale datasets compared to state-of-the-art approaches.

</details>


<div id='cs.DL'></div>

# cs.DL [[Back]](#toc)

### [662] [The Shrinking Lifespan of LLMs in Science](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07530)
*Ana Trišović*

Main category: cs.DL

TL;DR: 该研究首次大规模实证分析了科学家如何随时间采用和放弃语言模型，发现科学采用遵循倒U型轨迹（科学采用曲线），且该曲线正在压缩——每年发布时间缩短27%的达到峰值采用时间，发布时间是预测模型生命周期动态的最强因素。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩展定律描述了语言模型能力如何随计算和数据增长，但未说明模型发布后的生命周期。本研究旨在填补这一空白，通过大规模实证分析了解科学家如何随时间采用和放弃语言模型，揭示模型在科学界的实际生命周期动态。

Method: 追踪62个LLM在2018-2025年间超过108k篇引用论文，每个模型至少有三年发布后数据。对每个引用进行分类（主动采用vs背景参考），构建每个模型的采用轨迹，这些轨迹是原始引用计数无法揭示的。使用统计方法分析采用模式、时间动态和影响因素。

Result: 发现三个规律：1）科学采用遵循倒U型轨迹（科学采用曲线）；2）曲线正在压缩——每年发布时间缩短27%的达到峰值采用时间；3）发布时间是预测模型生命周期动态的最强因素，比架构、开放性或规模更具解释力，但模型规模和访问模式对总采用量仍有适度预测能力。

Conclusion: 这些发现通过采用侧规律补充了扩展定律，表明驱动快速能力进步的相同力量可能也在压缩科学相关性。发布时间成为模型生命周期动态的主导预测因素，揭示了LLM在科学界的快速迭代和短暂相关性特征。

Abstract: Scaling laws describe how language model capabilities grow with compute and data, but say nothing about how long a model matters once released. We provide the first large-scale empirical account of how scientists adopt and abandon language models over time. We track 62 LLMs across over 108k citing papers (2018-2025), each with at least three years of post-release data, and classify every citation as active adoption or background reference to construct per-model adoption trajectories that raw citation counts cannot resolve. We find three regularities. First, scientific adoption follows an inverted-U trajectory: usage rises after release, peaks, and declines as newer models appear, a pattern we term the \textit{scientific adoption curve}. Second, this curve is compressing: each additional release year is associated with a 27\% reduction in time-to-peak adoption ($p < 0.001$), robust to minimum-age thresholds and controls for model size. Third, release timing dominates model-level attributes as a predictor of lifecycle dynamics. Release year explains both time-to-peak and scientific lifespan more strongly than architecture, openness, or scale, though model size and access modality retain modest predictive power for total adoption volume. Together, these findings complement scaling laws with adoption-side regularities and suggest that the forces driving rapid capability progress may be the same forces compressing scientific relevance.

</details>


<div id='math.OC'></div>

# math.OC [[Back]](#toc)

### [663] [Density-Driven Optimal Control: Convergence Guarantees for Stochastic LTI Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08495)
*Kooktae Lee*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出随机密度驱动最优控制(D²OC)方法，解决多智能体系统的分散式非均匀区域覆盖问题，通过最小化Wasserstein距离作为运行成本，确保时间平均经验分布收敛到非参数目标密度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于密度的方法通常依赖于计算量大的欧拉PDE求解器或启发式规划，缺乏严格的收敛保证。需要一种能够桥接个体智能体动力学与集体分布匹配的严谨拉格朗日框架。

Method: 提出随机密度驱动最优控制(D²OC)，这是一个随机MPC类问题，将Wasserstein距离最小化作为运行成本。基于随机LTI动力学，通过可达性分析建立形式化收敛保证，即使在存在过程和测量噪声的情况下也能提供有界跟踪误差。

Result: 数值结果表明，随机D²OC实现了鲁棒的分散式覆盖，在最优性和一致性方面优于先前的启发式方法。该方法确保了时间平均经验分布收敛到非参数目标密度。

Conclusion: 随机D²OC为多智能体系统的非均匀区域覆盖提供了一个严谨的拉格朗日框架，具有形式化收敛保证，能够处理噪声并实现鲁棒的分散式控制，优于现有启发式方法。

Abstract: This paper addresses the decentralized non-uniform area coverage problem for multi-agent systems, a critical task in missions with high spatial priority and resource constraints. While existing density-based methods often rely on computationally heavy Eulerian PDE solvers or heuristic planning, we propose Stochastic Density-Driven Optimal Control (D$^2$OC). This is a rigorous Lagrangian framework that bridges the gap between individual agent dynamics and collective distribution matching. By formulating a stochastic MPC-like problem that minimizes the Wasserstein distance as a running cost, our approach ensures that the time-averaged empirical distribution converges to a non-parametric target density under stochastic LTI dynamics. A key contribution is the formal convergence guarantee established via reachability analysis, providing a bounded tracking error even in the presence of process and measurement noise. Numerical results verify that Stochastic D$^2$OC achieves robust, decentralized coverage while outperforming previous heuristic methods in optimality and consistency.

</details>


### [664] [Parameter-free non-ergodic extragradient algorithms for solving monotone variational inequalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07662)
*Lingqing Shen,Fatma Kılınç-Karzan*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出参数自由的外梯度方法，用于单调变分不等式问题，具有非渐近的最后迭代保证，无需全局光滑性信息。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有外梯度方法依赖于问题特定的全局光滑性信息来选择步长，这在实际中难以准确估计且可能不适用。同时，大多数理论关注迭代的遍历平均，而实际性能往往由最后迭代的更强行为驱动。

Method: 开发参数自由的外梯度方法：1) 对于全局Lipschitz算子，设计算法达到o(1/√T)的最后迭代收敛率；2) 通过回溯线搜索扩展到局部Lipschitz算子，保持参数自由特性。

Result: 算法在全局Lipschitz算子下实现o(1/√T)的最后迭代收敛率，通过回溯线搜索扩展到局部Lipschitz算子后仍保持相同收敛率。数值实验在双线性矩阵博弈、LASSO、极小极大群体公平性和最大熵采样松弛等任务上展示了广泛适用性和优于现有方法的性能。

Conclusion: 提出的参数自由外梯度方法为单调变分不等式问题提供了无需全局光滑性信息的最后迭代保证，使参数自由的最后迭代方法适用于全局光滑性不现实的广泛问题类别。

Abstract: Monotone variational inequalities (VIs) provide a unifying framework for convex minimization, equilibrium computation, and convex-concave saddle-point problems. Extragradient-type methods are among the most effective first-order algorithms for such problems, but their performance hinges critically on stepsize selection. While most existing theory focuses on ergodic averages of the iterates, practical performance is often driven by the significantly stronger behavior of the last iterate. Moreover, available last-iterate guarantees typically rely on fixed stepsizes chosen using problem-specific global smoothness information, which is often difficult to estimate accurately and may not even be applicable. In this paper, we develop parameter-free extragradient methods with non-asymptotic last-iterate guarantees for constrained monotone VIs. For globally Lipschitz operators, our algorithm achieves an $o(1/\sqrt{T})$ last-iterate rate. We then extend the framework to locally Lipschitz operators via backtracking line search and obtain the same rate while preserving parameter-freeness, thereby making parameter-free last-iterate methods applicable to important problem classes for which global smoothness is unrealistic. Our numerical experiments on bilinear matrix games, LASSO, minimax group fairness, and state-of-the-art maximum entropy sampling relaxations demonstrate wide applicability of our results as well as strong last-iterate performance and significant improvements over existing methods.

</details>


### [665] [Continuous-Time Dynamics of the Difference-of-Convex Algorithm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06926)
*Yi-Shuai Niu*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 该论文研究了具有强凸分量的光滑DC分解的差凸算法(DCA)的连续时间结构，将经典DCA解释为非线性自治系统的显式欧拉离散化，提出了阻尼DCA方案，并分析了其收敛性质。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究DCA算法的连续时间结构，通过将经典DCA解释为非线性自治系统的显式欧拉离散化，为理解DCA的收敛行为提供新的理论视角，并基于此设计改进的阻尼DCA方案。

Method: 1. 在对偶坐标下将经典DCA解释为非线性自治系统的全步长显式欧拉离散化；2. 提出阻尼DCA方案（也是Bregman正则化DCA变体）；3. 分析阻尼方案的单调下降、渐近临界性、KL收敛性；4. 研究步长趋于零时的Hessian-Riemannian梯度流极限；5. 建立不同DC分解诱导不同连续动力学的几何联系。

Result: 1. 阻尼DCA方案具有单调下降性、渐近临界性、KL收敛性，在度量DC-PL不等式下获得全局线性收敛率；2. 极限流具有精确能量恒等式、渐近临界性，在度量相对误差界下获得显式全局收敛率，在KL假设下获得有限长度和单点收敛，在非退化局部极小值附近获得局部指数收敛；3. 揭示了全局-局部权衡：半松弛方案提供最佳全局保证，全步长方案在非退化极小值附近局部最快；4. 不同DC分解通过凸分量生成的度量诱导不同的连续动力学。

Conclusion: 通过连续时间视角为DCA算法提供了统一的理论框架，揭示了DCA的几何结构，建立了不同DC分解质量与Bregman几何的联系，为算法设计和收敛分析提供了新的理论基础。

Abstract: We study the continuous-time structure of the difference-of-convex algorithm (DCA) for smooth DC decompositions with a strongly convex component. In dual coordinates, classical DCA is exactly the full-step explicit Euler discretization of a nonlinear autonomous system. This viewpoint motivates a damped DCA scheme, which is also a Bregman-regularized DCA variant, and whose vanishing-step limit yields a Hessian-Riemannian gradient flow generated by the convex part of the decomposition. For the damped scheme we prove monotone descent, asymptotic criticality, Kurdyka-Lojasiewicz convergence under boundedness, and a global linear rate under a metric DC-PL inequality. For the limiting flow we establish an exact energy identity, asymptotic criticality of bounded trajectories, explicit global rates under metric relative error bounds, finite-length and single-point convergence under a Kurdyka-Lojasiewicz hypothesis, and local exponential convergence near nondegenerate local minima. The analysis also reveals a global-local tradeoff: the half-relaxed scheme gives the best provable global guarantee in our framework, while the full-step scheme is locally fastest near a nondegenerate minimum. Finally, we show that different DC decompositions of the same objective induce different continuous dynamics through the metric generated by the convex component, providing a geometric criterion for decomposition quality and linking DCA with Bregman geometry.

</details>


### [666] [A Generalized Sinkhorn Algorithm for Mean-Field Schrödinger Bridge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06531)
*Asmaa Eldesoukey,Yongxin Chen,Abhishek Halder*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出用于求解平均场薛定谔桥问题的广义Hopf-Cole变换和Sinkhorn型递归算法，解决具有非局部相互作用的扩散过程最优控制问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 平均场薛定谔桥问题描述具有非局部相互作用的多智能体系统在给定时间内从初始分布转移到目标分布的最小努力控制问题。由于非局部相互作用导致问题非凸，传统方法难以求解，需要开发新的计算框架。

Method: 提出平均场薛定谔桥问题的广义Hopf-Cole变换，并基于此设计Sinkhorn型递归算法来求解相关的积分-偏微分方程组。算法在温和的相互作用势假设下具有收敛性保证。

Result: 建立了算法的收敛性理论，并通过数值实验展示了算法在排斥和吸引相互作用情况下的有效性，验证了理论贡献。

Conclusion: 该工作为平均场薛定谔桥问题提供了有效的计算框架，通过广义Hopf-Cole变换和Sinkhorn型算法解决了非局部相互作用带来的非凸性挑战，为大规模多智能体系统的最优控制提供了新工具。

Abstract: The mean-field Schrödinger bridge (MFSB) problem concerns designing a minimum-effort controller that guides a diffusion process with nonlocal interaction to reach a given distribution from another by a fixed deadline. Unlike the standard Schrödinger bridge, the dynamical constraint for MFSB is the mean-field limit of a population of interacting agents with controls. It serves as a natural model for large-scale multi-agent systems. The MFSB is computationally challenging because the nonlocal interaction makes the problem nonconvex. We propose a generalization of the Hopf-Cole transform for MFSB and, building on it, design a Sinkhorn-type recursive algorithm to solve the associated system of integro-PDEs. Under mild assumptions on the interaction potential, we discuss convergence guarantees for the proposed algorithm. We present numerical examples with repulsive and attractive interactions to illustrate the theoretical contributions.

</details>


### [667] [Stochastic Auto-conditioned Fast Gradient Methods with Optimal Rates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06525)
*Yao Ji,Guanghui Lan*

Main category: math.OC

TL;DR: 提出了一种随机自条件快速梯度方法（stochastic AC-FGM），无需先验知识即可实现随机复合凸优化的最优收敛速率，解决了参数自适应加速的开放问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随机复合凸优化中，在不了解问题参数（如Lipschitz常数、迭代时域、噪声水平）的情况下实现最优收敛速率是一个核心挑战。现有参数自由随机方法要么无法达到加速速率，要么依赖限制性假设（如有限域、有界梯度、已知迭代时域或严格次高斯噪声）。

Method: 提出随机自条件快速梯度方法（stochastic AC-FGM），这是确定性自条件快速梯度方法的随机变体。该方法完全自适应于Lipschitz常数、迭代时域和噪声水平，无需线搜索程序即可实现自适应步长选择和自适应小批量大小。

Result: 在标准有界条件方差假设下，随机AC-FGM实现了最优迭代复杂度O(1/√ε)和最优样本复杂度O(1/ε²)。

Conclusion: 该工作解决了将参数自由加速扩展到随机设置的开放问题，提供了一种无需先验知识即可实现随机复合凸优化最优收敛速率的实用方法。

Abstract: Achieving optimal rates for stochastic composite convex optimization without prior knowledge of problem parameters remains a central challenge. In the deterministic setting, the auto-conditioned fast gradient method has recently been proposed to attain optimal accelerated rates without line-search procedures or prior knowledge of the Lipschitz smoothness constant, providing a natural prototype for parameter-free acceleration. However, extending this approach to the stochastic setting has proven technically challenging and remains open. Existing parameter-free stochastic methods either fail to achieve accelerated rates or rely on restrictive assumptions, such as bounded domains, bounded gradients, prior knowledge of the iteration horizon, or strictly sub-Gaussian noise. To address these limitations, we propose a stochastic variant of the auto-conditioned fast gradient method, referred to as stochastic AC-FGM. The proposed method is fully adaptive to the Lipschitz constant, the iteration horizon, and the noise level, enabling both adaptive stepsize selection and adaptive mini-batch sizing without line-search procedures. Under standard bounded conditional variance assumptions, we show that stochastic AC-FGM achieves the optimal iteration complexity of $O(1/\sqrt{\varepsilon})$ and the optimal sample complexity of $O(1/\varepsilon^2)$.

</details>


<div id='eess.SY'></div>

# eess.SY [[Back]](#toc)

### [668] [Complementary Filtering on SO(3) for Attitude Estimation with Scalar Measurements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08099)
*Alessandro Melis,Soulaimane Berkane,Tarek Hamel*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于标量测量的姿态估计互补滤波器，适用于惯性向量仅沿特定体坐标系向量部分观测的情况，通过改进创新项设计实现几乎全局渐近稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当惯性向量无法完全观测而只能沿特定体坐标系向量进行标量测量时，需要开发相应的姿态估计算法。这种情况出现在不完全向量测量或从异构传感器信息推导姿态约束的问题中。

Method: 基于SO(3)上的经典互补滤波器，提出了一种改进创新项的观测器，专门针对标量输出结构设计。当至少三个惯性向量沿共同体坐标系向量测量时，在适当的持续激励条件下恢复几乎全局渐近稳定性。

Result: 对于三标量配置（三个惯性向量沿共同体坐标系向量测量），在持续激励条件下实现几乎全局渐近稳定性。对于二标量配置（一个惯性向量沿两个体坐标系向量测量或两个惯性向量沿共同体坐标系向量测量），推导了保证在减小吸引域内收敛的充分条件。

Conclusion: 所提出的基于标量的互补滤波器在涉及减少感知和/或新型感知模式的挑战性场景中，对姿态估计具有有效性，并通过不同示例和数值结果得到验证。

Abstract: Attitude estimation using scalar measurements, corresponding to partial vectorial observations, arises naturally when inertial vectors are not fully observed but only measured along specific body-frame vectors. Such measurements arise in problems involving incomplete vector measurements or attitude constraints derived from heterogeneous sensor information. Building on the classical complementary filter on SO(3), we propose an observer with a modified innovation term tailored to this scalar-output structure. The main result shows that almost-global asymptotic stability is recovered, under suitable persistence of excitation conditions, when at least three inertial vectors are measured along a common body-frame vector, which is consistent with the three-dimensional structure of SO(3). For two-scalar configurations - corresponding either to one inertial vector measured along two body-frame vectors, or to two inertial vectors measured along a common body-frame vector - we further derive sufficient conditions guaranteeing convergence within a reduced basin of attraction. Different examples and numerical results demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed scalar-based complementary filter for attitude estimation in challenging scenarios involving reduced sensing and/or novel sensing modalities.

</details>


### [669] [Karma Mechanisms for Decentralised, Cooperative Multi Agent Path Finding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07970)
*Kevin Riehl,Julius Schlapbach,Anastasios Kouvelas,Michail A. Makridis*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于Karma机制的去中心化多智能体路径规划框架，通过不可交易的信用记录智能体历史合作行为，在双边协商中调节冲突解决，实现长期公平性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 集中式最优求解器计算复杂度指数级增长，难以扩展到大规模系统和实时应用；现有去中心化启发式方法虽然更快，但导致次优结果和高成本差异。需要一种能在有限计算和通信资源下实现公平高效协调的解决方案

Method: 基于Karma机制的去中心化协调框架：Karma是不可交易的人工信用，记录智能体历史合作行为；将冲突解决建模为双边协商过程，通过成对重规划解决冲突；在有限通信和无全局优先级结构下促进长期公平性

Result: 在具有运动学方向约束的终身机器人仓库多智能体取送场景中评估：Karma机制平衡了各智能体的重规划工作量，减少了服务时间差异，同时不牺牲整体效率

Conclusion: Karma机制为大规模多智能体系统提供了一种去中心化协调解决方案，在有限计算和通信资源下实现了公平性和效率的平衡，特别适用于需要长期公平性的应用场景

Abstract: Multi-Agent Path Finding (MAPF) is a fundamental coordination problem in large-scale robotic and cyber-physical systems, where multiple agents must compute conflict-free trajectories with limited computational and communication resources. While centralised optimal solvers provide guarantees on solution optimality, their exponential computational complexity limits scalability to large-scale systems and real-time applicability. Existing decentralised heuristics are faster, but result in suboptimal outcomes and high cost disparities. This paper proposes a decentralised coordination framework for cooperative MAPF based on Karma mechanisms - artificial, non-tradeable credits that account for agents' past cooperative behaviour and regulate future conflict resolution decisions. The approach formulates conflict resolution as a bilateral negotiation process that enables agents to resolve conflicts through pairwise replanning while promoting long-term fairness under limited communication and without global priority structures. The mechanism is evaluated in a lifelong robotic warehouse multi-agent pickup-and-delivery scenario with kinematic orientation constraints. The results highlight that the Karma mechanism balances replanning effort across agents, reducing disparity in service times without sacrificing overall efficiency. Code: https://github.com/DerKevinRiehl/karma_dmapf

</details>


### [670] [eVTOL Aircraft Energy Overhead Estimation under Conflict Resolution in High-Density Airspaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06093)
*Alex Zongo,Peng Wei*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: MVP冲突解决算法在eVTOL运行中能耗极低，中位数能耗开销低于1.5%，但分布右偏，尾部案例可达44%开销，95%分位数在3.84%-5.3%之间，建议4-5%的储备裕度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高密度城市空域中eVTOL飞机需要通过战术冲突解决保持安全间隔，但此类机动的能量成本尚未得到系统量化。本文旨在研究MVP算法下的冲突解决机动如何影响eVTOL能耗。

Method: 将基于物理的功率模型集成到交通仿真中，分析一个扇区内约71,767个航路段，覆盖10-60架同时飞行飞机的交通密度。开发机器学习模型在任务开始时估计能耗开销，提供点估计和不确定性边界。

Result: MVP冲突解决具有能量效率：所有密度水平下中位数能耗开销保持在1.5%以下，扇区内大多数航段飞行产生可忽略的惩罚。但分布呈现明显右偏，最高密度下尾部案例达到44%开销。95%分位数范围为3.84%至5.3%。机器学习模型的不确定性边界保守，实际结果落在预测范围内的频率高于声明的置信水平。

Conclusion: 结果验证了MVP算法适用于能量受限的eVTOL运行，并为先进空中交通中的储备能量确定提供了定量指导。4-5%的储备裕度可覆盖绝大多数战术冲突解决场景，机器学习模型支持安全关键的储备规划。

Abstract: Electric vertical takeoff and landing (eVTOL) aircraft operating in high-density urban airspace must maintain safe separation through tactical conflict resolution, yet the energy cost of such maneuvers has not been systematically quantified. This paper investigates how conflict-resolution maneuvers under the Modified Voltage Potential (MVP) algorithm affect eVTOL energy consumption. Using a physics-based power model integrated within a traffic simulation, we analyze approximately 71,767 en route sections within a sector, across traffic densities of 10-60 simultaneous aircraft. The main finding is that MVP-based deconfliction is energy-efficient: median energy overhead remains below 1.5% across all density levels, and the majority of en route flights within the sector incur negligible penalty. However, the distribution exhibits pronounced right-skewness, with tail cases reaching 44% overhead at the highest densities due to sustained multi-aircraft conflicts. The 95th percentile ranges from 3.84% to 5.3%, suggesting that a 4-5% reserve margin accommodates the vast majority of tactical deconfliction scenarios. To support operational planning, we develop a machine learning model that estimates energy overhead at mission initiation. Because conflict outcomes depend on future traffic interactions that cannot be known in advance, the model provides both point estimates and uncertainty bounds. These bounds are conservative; actual outcomes fall within the predicted range more often than the stated confidence level, making them suitable for safety-critical reserve planning. Together, these results validate MVP's suitability for energy-constrained eVTOL operations and provide quantitative guidance for reserve energy determination in Advanced Air Mobility.

</details>


### [671] [Measurement of Generative AI Workload Power Profiles for Whole-Facility Data Center Infrastructure Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07345)
*Roberto Vercellino,Jared Willard,Gustavo Campos,Weslley da Silva Pereira,Olivia Hull,Matthew Selensky,Juliane Mueller*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种将AI工作负载高分辨率功耗测量与数据中心整体能耗需求关联的方法，通过NVIDIA H100 GPU测量AI训练、微调和推理任务的功耗，并建立自下而上的数据中心能耗模型进行整体设施能耗分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI快速发展导致数据中心能耗急剧增加，但现有功耗数据多为专有且分辨率不一，难以准确估算整体设施能耗和规划基础设施。

Method: 在NLR高性能计算数据中心使用NVIDIA H100 GPU，以0.1秒分辨率测量AI训练、微调和推理任务的功耗；使用MLCommons基准进行训练和微调，vLLM基准进行推理；建立自下而上、事件驱动的数据中心能耗模型，将工作负载功耗扩展到整体设施级别。

Result: 获得了AI工作负载的高分辨率功耗数据集并公开；建立了能够捕捉AI工作负载和用户行为驱动的真实时间波动的整体设施能耗模型；该模型可用于电网连接、现场发电和分布式微电网等基础设施规划。

Conclusion: 该方法填补了AI工作负载高分辨率功耗测量与数据中心整体能耗需求之间的空白，为数据中心基础设施规划提供了可靠的数据支持和分析工具。

Abstract: The rapid growth of generative artificial intelligence (AI) has introduced unprecedented computational demands, driving significant increases in the energy footprint of data centers.
