However, existing power consumption data is largely proprietary and reported at varying resolutions, creating challenges for estimating whole-facility energy use and planning infrastructure. In this work, we present a methodology that bridges this gap by linking high-resolution workload power measurements to whole-facility energy demand. Using NLR's high-performance computing data center equipped with NVIDIA H100 GPUs, we measure power consumption of AI workloads at 0.1-second resolution for AI training, fine-tuning and inference jobs. Workloads are characterized using MLCommons benchmarks for model training and fine-tuning, and vLLM benchmarks for inference, enabling reproducible and standardized workload profiling. The dataset of power consumption profiles is made publicly available. These power profiles are then scaled to the whole-facility-level using a bottom-up, event-driven, data center energy model. The resulting whole-facility energy profiles capture realistic temporal fluctuations driven by AI workloads and user-behavior, and can be used to inform infrastructure planning for grid connection, on-site energy generation, and distributed microgrids.

</details>


### [672] [Synchronous Observer Design for Landmark-Inertial SLAM with Magnetometer and Intermittent GNSS Measurements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05156)
*Arkadeep Saha,Pieter van Goor,Ravi Banavar*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种非线性观测器解决LI-SLAM中的不可观测性问题，通过间歇性GNSS和磁力计测量实现几乎全局渐近稳定和局部指数稳定


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在基于地标-惯性的同时定位与建图(LI-SLAM)中，机器人在惯性坐标系中的位置、地标位置以及机器人的偏航角是不可观测的，这限制了系统的性能和应用

Method: 提出一种非线性观测器，通过结合间歇性GNSS位置测量和磁力计测量来克服LI-SLAM的观测性约束，建立完整的误差动力学模型

Result: 理论分析表明所提观测器的全状态误差动力学具有几乎全局渐近稳定性和局部指数稳定性，并通过仿真验证了这些理论结果

Conclusion: 通过引入间歇性GNSS和磁力计测量，成功解决了LI-SLAM中的不可观测性问题，实现了稳定可靠的定位与建图性能

Abstract: In Landmark-Inertial Simultaneous Localisation and Mapping (LI-SLAM), the positions of landmarks in the environment and the robot's pose relative to these landmarks are estimated using landmark position measurements, and measurements from the Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU). However, the robot and landmark positions in the inertial frame, and the yaw of the robot, are not observable in LI-SLAM. This paper proposes a nonlinear observer for LI-SLAM that overcomes the observability constraints with the addition of intermittent GNSS position and magnetometer measurements. The full-state error dynamics of the proposed observer is shown to be both almost-globally asymptotically stable and locally exponentially stable, and this is validated using simulations.

</details>


### [673] [Finite-Step Invariant Sets for Hybrid Systems with Probabilistic Guarantees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05102)
*Varun Madabushi,Elizabeth Dietrich,Hanna Krasowski,Maegan Tucker*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于采样优化的算法框架，为混合动力系统中的周期轨道计算有限步不变椭球，并提供概率保证


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 庞加莱返回映射是分析混合动力系统周期轨道的基本工具，但计算不变集在计算上很困难，特别是当系统动力学只能通过前向模拟获得时

Method: 提出基于采样优化的算法框架，利用返回映射的采样评估计算名义周期轨道周围的有限步不变椭球

Result: 算法框架在三个系统上得到验证：两个低维系统和一个指南针步态行走模型

Conclusion: 该方法能够为混合动力系统的周期轨道计算不变集，并提供满足用户定义精度阈值的概率保证

Abstract: Poincare return maps are a fundamental tool for analyzing periodic orbits in hybrid dynamical systems, including legged locomotion, power electronics, and other cyber-physical systems with switching behavior. The Poincare return map captures the evolution of the hybrid system on a guard surface, reducing the stability analysis of a periodic orbit to that of a discrete-time system. While linearization provides local stability information, assessing robustness to disturbances requires identifying invariant sets of the state space under the return dynamics. However, computing such invariant sets is computationally difficult, especially when system dynamics are only available through forward simulation. In this work, we propose an algorithmic framework leveraging sampling-based optimization to compute a finite-step invariant ellipsoid around a nominal periodic orbit using sampled evaluations of the return map. The resulting solution is accompanied by probabilistic guarantees on finite-step invariance satisfying a user-defined accuracy threshold. We demonstrate the approach on two low-dimensional systems and a compass-gait walking model.

</details>


### [674] [Periodic Event-Triggered Explicit Reference Governor for Constrained Attitude Control on SO(3)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04041)
*Satoshi Nakano,Masahiro Suzuki,Misa Ohashi,Noboru Chikami,Shusuke Otabe*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种周期性事件触发显式参考调节器(PET-ERG)，在SO(3)群上解决刚体姿态控制问题，避免参数化奇异性和在线优化，同时满足输入饱和和几何指向约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决刚体姿态控制中存在的三个关键问题：1) 避免欧拉角等参数化带来的奇异性；2) 处理输入饱和约束；3) 满足几何指向约束，同时避免在线优化计算负担。

Method: 提出周期性事件触发显式参考调节器(PET-ERG)：在SO(3)群上直接设计控制律，采用周期性事件触发监督更新机制，仅在采样时刻满足鲁棒安全条件时更新辅助参考信号，避免连续时间参考更新，实现级联系统的严格稳定性分析。

Result: 严格证明了闭环系统对几乎所有初始配置的渐近稳定性和指数收敛性，数值仿真验证了控制架构的有效性，展示了约束满足和收敛特性。

Conclusion: PET-ERG方法成功解决了SO(3)上的约束姿态控制问题，避免了参数化奇异性，无需在线优化，通过周期性事件触发机制实现了严格稳定性分析，为刚体姿态控制提供了一种有效的解决方案。

Abstract: This letter addresses the constrained attitude control problem for rigid bodies directly on the special orthogonal group SO(3), avoiding singularities associated with parameterizations such as Euler angles. We propose a novel Periodic Event-Triggered Explicit Reference Governor (PET-ERG) that enforces input saturation and geometric pointing constraints without relying on online optimization. A key feature is a periodic event-triggered supervisory update: the auxiliary reference is updated only at sampled instants when a robust safety condition is met, thereby avoiding continuous-time reference updates and enabling a rigorous stability analysis of the cascade system on the manifold. Through this structured approach, we rigorously establish the asymptotic stability and exponential convergence of the closed-loop system for almost all initial configurations. Numerical simulations validate the effectiveness of the proposed control architecture and demonstrate constraint satisfaction and convergence properties.

</details>


### [675] [Element-based Formation Control: a Unified Perspective from Continuum Mechanics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04027)
*Kun Cao,Lihua Xie*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于连续介质力学变形梯度概念的统一元素框架，用于编队控制，将编队建模为离散弹性体，通过最小化局部变形梯度张量的广义畸变能量实现分布式控制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统编队控制方法通常基于图边定义的几何约束，缺乏统一的理论框架。本文旨在建立连接现有刚性基和拉普拉斯基方法的桥梁，提供更通用的编队控制理论。

Method: 引入连续介质力学中的变形梯度概念，将编队建模为由单纯形元素组成的离散弹性体。基于局部变形梯度张量定义广义畸变能量，推导出能够强制执行平移、旋转、缩放和仿射变换等几何不变性的分布式控制律家族。

Result: 理论分析表明，该框架连接了刚性基和拉普拉斯基方法：刚性基控制器在数学上等价于最小化变形能量张量的特定投影；建立了所提能量最小化与拉普拉斯基编队控制之间的严格联系。2D和3D数值仿真验证了框架的有效性和统一性。

Conclusion: 提出的基于元素的框架为编队控制提供了统一的理论基础，能够处理多种几何变换，并揭示了现有方法之间的深层数学联系，为分布式编队控制提供了新的理论视角。

Abstract: This paper establishes a unified element-based framework for formation control by introducing the concept of the deformation gradient from continuum mechanics. Unlike traditional methods that rely on geometric constraints defined on graph edges, we model the formation as a discrete elastic body composed of simplicial elements. By defining a generalized distortion energy based on the local deformation gradient tensor, we derive a family of distributed control laws that can enforce various geometric invariances, including translation, rotation, scaling, and affine transformations. The convergence properties and the features of the proposed controllers are analyzed in detail. Theoretically, we show that the proposed framework serves as a bridge between existing rigidity-based and Laplacian-based approaches. Specifically, we show that rigidity-based controllers are mathematically equivalent to minimizing specific projections of the deformation energy tensor. Furthermore, we establish a rigorous link between the proposed energy minimization and Laplacian-based formation control. Numerical simulations in 2D and 3D validate the effectiveness and the unified nature of the proposed framework.

</details>


### [676] [Risk-Constrained Belief-Space Optimization for Safe Control under Latent Uncertainty](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03868)
*Clinton Enwerem,John S. Baras,Calin Belta*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出了一种风险敏感的信度空间MPPI控制框架，通过CVaR约束在潜在参数不确定性下规划轨迹，在保持性能的同时确保安全


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 安全关键控制系统需要在传感器无法直接解析的潜在不确定性下运行，传统方法要么只优化期望性能（对罕见严重事件保护不足），要么过于保守（未利用概率结构），需要一种能平衡性能与尾部风险的方法

Method: 针对部分可观测动态系统，提出风险敏感的信度空间MPPI控制框架，在信度分布下规划轨迹，同时对滚动时域内的轨迹安全裕度施加CVaR约束，优化风险正则化的性能目标

Result: 在视觉引导灵巧收纳任务的物理仿真中，高风险规避配置下达到82%成功率且零接触违规，而风险中性配置和机会约束基线分别为55%和50%成功率且均有非零外部接触力

Conclusion: 该方法能有效处理潜在参数不确定性，通过CVaR约束提供概率安全保证，在保持性能的同时显著降低安全违规风险，适用于需要在高不确定性下确保安全的关键控制任务

Abstract: Many safety-critical control systems must operate under latent uncertainty that sensors cannot directly resolve at decision time. Such uncertainty, arising from unknown physical properties, exogenous disturbances, or unobserved environment geometry, influences dynamics, task feasibility, and safety margins. Standard methods optimize expected performance and offer limited protection against rare but severe outcomes, while robust formulations treat uncertainty conservatively without exploiting its probabilistic structure. We consider partially observed dynamical systems whose dynamics, costs, and safety constraints depend on a latent parameter maintained as a belief distribution, and propose a risk-sensitive belief-space Model Predictive Path Integral (MPPI) control framework that plans under this belief while enforcing a Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR) constraint on a trajectory safety margin over the receding horizon. The resulting controller optimizes a risk-regularized performance objective while explicitly constraining the tail risk of safety violations induced by latent parameter variability. We establish three properties of the resulting risk-constrained controller: (1) the CVaR constraint implies a probabilistic safety guarantee, (2) the controller recovers the risk-neutral optimum as the risk weight in the objective tends to zero, and (3) a union-bound argument extends the per-horizon guarantee to cumulative safety over repeated solves. In physics-based simulations of a vision-guided dexterous stowing task in which a grasped object must be inserted into an occupied slot with pose uncertainty exceeding prescribed lateral clearance requirements, our method achieves 82% success with zero contact violations at high risk aversion, compared to 55% and 50% for a risk-neutral configuration and a chance-constrained baseline, both of which incur nonzero exterior contact forces.

</details>


### [677] [Minimal Information Control Invariance via Vector Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03132)
*Ege Yuceel,Teodor Tchalakov,Sayan Mitra*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出基于向量量化自编码器的控制方法，学习状态空间划分和有限控制码本，在12维非线性四旋翼模型上实现157倍码本压缩，同时保持安全性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 安全关键自主系统需要在有限计算和感知预算下满足硬状态约束，但基于学习的控制器通常比安全操作所需复杂得多。需要形式化这种差距，研究在采样数据控制下保持紧凑集前向不变性所需的不同控制信号数量。

Method: 提出向量量化自编码器，联合学习状态空间划分和有限控制码本；开发迭代前向认证算法，使用基于Lipschitz的可达集包围和平方和规划。

Result: 在12维非线性四旋翼模型上，学习的控制器相比均匀网格基线实现了157倍的码本大小缩减，同时保持不变性；实证表征了与安全操作兼容的最小感知分辨率。

Conclusion: 该方法通过信息论不变性熵的概念，显著压缩控制码本大小，在保持安全性的同时降低计算复杂度，为安全关键系统的紧凑控制设计提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Safety-critical autonomous systems must satisfy hard state constraints under tight computational and sensing budgets, yet learning-based controllers are often far more complex than safe operation requires. To formalize this gap, we study how many distinct control signals are needed to render a compact set forward invariant under sampled-data control, connecting the question to the information-theoretic notion of invariance entropy. We propose a vector-quantized autoencoder that jointly learns a state-space partition and a finite control codebook, and develop an iterative forward certification algorithm that uses Lipschitz-based reachable-set enclosures and sum-of-squares programming. On a 12-dimensional nonlinear quadrotor model, the learned controller achieves a $157\times$ reduction in codebook size over a uniform grid baseline while preserving invariance, and we empirically characterize the minimum sensing resolution compatible with safe operation.

</details>


### [678] [Global Geometry of Orthogonal Foliations in the Control Allocation of Signed-Quadratic Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01912)
*Antonio Franchi*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 该研究形式化了具有符号二次驱动映射系统的冗余解析的微分拓扑结构，建立了非线性驱动零空间的全局拓扑，揭示了正交分布的可积性，并提出了避免几何秩损失和边界穿越奇异性的分配策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机在于解决经典伪线性静态分配策略中不可避免的奇异边界超平面问题，这些边界会导致无限导数动力学奇异性，并将任务空间分割成指数级数量的奇异分离扇区。需要建立几何框架来理解冗余解析的微分拓扑特性，并为推进器驱动架构的控制分配提供理论基础。

Method: 通过分析最小冗余情况，建立了定义非线性驱动零空间的连续纤维丛的全局拓扑。证明了正交于这些纤维的分布是全局可积的，并由精确对数势场控制。该场将驱动器空间分层为横向层，其组合大小遵循严格二项式级数。在层内，相邻象限通过称为互易铰链的低维流形连续连接，而层本身由作为纤维全局截面的边界超平面（门户）分隔。

Result: 研究揭示了经典伪线性静态分配策略必然与奇异边界超平面相交，触发无限导数动力学奇异性，并将任务空间分割成指数级数量的奇异分离扇区。相比之下，从正交流形导出的分配器产生连续可微的全局截面，对于横向层仅具有线性数量的扇区，或在两个极值层的情况下甚至形成到任务空间的单一全局微分同胚，从而完全避免了几何秩损失和边界穿越奇异性。

Conclusion: 该研究为符号二次驱动映射系统的冗余解析提供了完整的微分拓扑框架，揭示了驱动空间的几何分层结构，并提出了避免奇异性的分配策略。这些理论结果直接适用于推进器驱动架构的控制分配，包括多旋翼无人机、海洋和水下航行器。

Abstract: This work formalizes the differential topology of redundancy resolution for systems governed by signed-quadratic actuation maps. By analyzing the minimally redundant case, the global topology of the continuous fiber bundle defining the nonlinear actuation null-space is established. The distribution orthogonal to these fibers is proven to be globally integrable and governed by an exact logarithmic potential field. This field foliates the actuator space, inducing a structural stratification of all orthants into transverse layers whose combinatorial sizes follow a strictly binomial progression. Within these layers, adjacent orthants are continuously connected via lower-dimensional strata termed reciprocal hinges, while the layers themselves are separated by boundary hyperplanes, or portals, that act as global sections of the fibers. This partition formally distinguishes extremal and transitional layers, which exhibit fundamentally distinct fiber topologies and foliation properties. Through this geometric framework, classical pseudo-linear static allocation strategies are shown to inevitably intersect singular boundary hyperplanes, triggering infinite-derivative kinetic singularities and fragmenting the task space into an exponential number of singularity-separated sectors. In contrast, allocators derived from the orthogonal manifolds yield continuously differentiable global sections with only a linear number of sectors for transversal layers, or can even form a single global diffeomorphism to the task space in the case of the two extremal layers, thus completely avoiding geometric rank-loss and boundary-crossing singularities. These theoretical results directly apply to the control allocation of propeller-driven architectures, including multirotor UAVs, marine, and underwater vehicles.

</details>


### [679] [Neural Robust Control on Lie Groups Using Contraction Methods (Extended Version)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01448)
*Yi Lok Lo,Longhao Qian,Hugh H. T. Liu*

Main category: eess.SY

TL;DR: 提出一种在Lie群上为动力系统合成鲁棒控制器的学习框架，通过联合训练鲁棒控制收缩度量（RCCM）和神经反馈控制器来满足流形上的收缩条件


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为在Lie群上演化的动力系统开发鲁棒控制器合成方法，解决流形几何约束下的控制问题，确保系统在扰动下的稳定性和性能

Method: 提出联合训练鲁棒控制收缩度量（RCCM）和神经反馈控制器的学习框架，推导RCCM和神经控制器存在的充分条件，确保流形结构约束得到满足并建立扰动相关的输出轨迹管界

Result: 以四旋翼飞行器为案例研究设计了反馈控制器，通过数值仿真评估性能并与几何控制器进行比较

Conclusion: 所提出的学习框架能够有效合成Lie群上动力系统的鲁棒控制器，在保持流形几何约束的同时提供扰动下的性能保证

Abstract: In this paper, we propose a learning framework for synthesizing a robust controller for dynamical systems evolving on a Lie group. A robust control contraction metric (RCCM) and a neural feedback controller are jointly trained to enforce contraction conditions on the Lie group manifold. Sufficient conditions are derived for the existence of such an RCCM and neural controller, ensuring that the geometric constraints imposed by the manifold structure are respected while establishing a disturbance-dependent tube that bounds the output trajectories. As a case study, a feedback controller for a quadrotor is designed using the proposed framework. Its performance is evaluated using numerical simulations and compared with a geometric controller.

</details>


<div id='q-bio.QM'></div>

# q-bio.QM [[Back]](#toc)

### [680] [Predicting Activity Cliffs for Autonomous Medicinal Chemistry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07560)
*Michael Cuccarese*

Main category: q-bio.QM

TL;DR: 该研究开发了一个预测活性悬崖（activity cliff）的系统，能够识别哪些位置的小结构修饰最可能导致活性显著变化，将化学家需要探索的位置从3.1个减少到2.1个（减少31%），但仅从结构预测具体修饰方案不可行。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 活性悬崖预测是计算药物化学中长期存在的挑战，即识别哪些位置的小结构变化会导致活性大幅改变。本研究采用简约定义：确定哪些位置的小修饰最可能导致结果变化。

Method: 使用来自6个蛋白家族50个ChEMBL靶标的2500万匹配分子对计算位置级敏感性。区分两个问题：1）哪些位置变化最大？仅用支架大小即可回答；2）哪些是真正的活性悬崖？需要包含3D药效团上下文的11特征模型，使用SALI归一化捕获小修饰导致的不成比例大效应。

Result: 模型在NDCG@3上达到0.910（随机0.839），在六个蛋白家族、新支架（0.913）和时间分割（0.878）上均能泛化。模型在53%的情况下首先识别出悬崖易发位置（随机27%），将化学家需要探索的位置从3.1个减少到2.1个（减少31%）。仅从结构预测具体修饰不可行（Spearman 0.268，新支架上降至-0.31）。

Conclusion: 活性悬崖预测需要区分"哪些位置变化最大"和"哪些是真正的活性悬崖"两个不同问题。前者仅需支架大小信息，后者需要包含3D上下文的机器学习模型。系统已作为开源代码和交互式Web应用发布。

Abstract: Activity cliff prediction - identifying positions where small structural changes cause large potency shifts - has been a persistent challenge in computational medicinal chemistry. This work focuses on a parsimonious definition: which small modifications, at which positions, confer the highest probability of an outcome change. Position-level sensitivity is calculated using 25 million matched molecular pairs from 50 ChEMBL targets across six protein families, revealing that two questions have fundamentally different answers. "Which positions vary most?" is answered by scaffold size alone (NDCG@3 = 0.966), requiring no machine learning. "Which are true activity cliffs?" - where small modifications cause disproportionately large effects, as captured by SALI normalization - requires an 11-feature model with 3D pharmacophore context (NDCG@3 = 0.910 vs. 0.839 random), generalizing across all six protein families, novel scaffolds (0.913), and temporal splits (0.878). The model identifies the cliff-prone position first 53% of the time (vs. 27% random - 2x lift), reducing positions a chemist must explore from 3.1 to 2.1 - a 31% reduction in first-round experiments. Predicting which modification to make is not tractable from structure alone (Spearman 0.268, collapsing to -0.31 on novel scaffolds). The system is released as open-source code and an interactive webapp.

</details>


<div id='cs.GL'></div>

# cs.GL [[Back]](#toc)

### [681] [The Theorems of Dr. David Blackwell and Their Contributions to Artificial Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06621)
*Napoleon Paxton*

Main category: cs.GL

TL;DR: 该论文调查了David Blackwell的三个核心理论成果（Rao-Blackwell定理、Blackwell可接近性定理、Blackwell信息性定理）及其对现代人工智能和机器学习的持续影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Blackwell在统计理论、博弈论和决策理论方面的贡献早于现代人工智能的许多算法突破。本文旨在展示这些1940-1950年代的理论成果如何在当代AI和机器学习中保持技术活力，并探讨它们如何为现代AI核心问题提供统一框架。

Method: 通过调查分析三个核心理论成果：Rao-Blackwell定理（统计估计）、Blackwell可接近性定理（博弈论）、Blackwell信息性定理（实验比较），并追踪它们在现代AI子领域中的直接应用和影响。

Result: 这些理论成果在多个现代AI领域保持技术活力，包括：MCMC推断、SLAM机器人导航、生成模型训练、无遗憾在线学习、RLHF、大语言模型对齐、信息设计等。NVIDIA 2024年将其旗舰GPU架构命名为"Blackwell"也证明了其持久相关性。

Conclusion: Blackwell定理形成了一个统一框架，解决信息压缩、不确定性下的序列决策和信息源比较等现代AI核心问题。论文还记录了一个新兴前沿：在LLM RLHF管道中显式使用Rao-Blackwell化方差减少技术，虽然已提出但尚未成为标准实践。

Abstract: Dr. David Blackwell was a mathematician and statistician of the first rank, whose contributions to statistical theory, game theory, and decision theory predated many of the algorithmic breakthroughs that define modern artificial intelligence. This survey examines three of his most consequential theoretical results the Rao Blackwell theorem, the Blackwell Approachability theorem, and the Blackwell Informativeness theorem (comparison of experiments) and traces their direct influence on contemporary AI and machine learning. We show that these results, developed primarily in the 1940s and 1950s, remain technically live across modern subfields including Markov Chain Monte Carlo inference, autonomous mobile robot navigation (SLAM), generative model training, no-regret online learning, reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF), large language model alignment, and information design. NVIDIAs 2024 decision to name their flagship GPU architecture (Blackwell) provides vivid testament to his enduring relevance. We also document an emerging frontier: explicit Rao Blackwellized variance reduction in LLM RLHF pipelines, recently proposed but not yet standard practice. Together, Blackwell theorems form a unified framework addressing information compression, sequential decision making under uncertainty, and the comparison of information sources precisely the problems at the core of modern AI.

</details>


<div id='cs.CE'></div>

# cs.CE [[Back]](#toc)

### [682] [XR-CareerAssist: An Immersive Platform for Personalised Career Guidance Leveraging Extended Reality and Multimodal AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06901)
*N. D. Tantaroudas,A. J. McCracken,I. Karachalios,E. Papatheou,V. Pastrikakis*

Main category: cs.CE

TL;DR: XR-CareerAssist是一个融合扩展现实和多种AI模块的沉浸式多语言职业指导平台，通过语音交互、机器翻译、对话助手、视觉语言模型和文本转语音等技术，提供动态可视化的职业发展指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统职业指导平台依赖静态文本界面，缺乏互动性和个性化，对职业发展的叙事维度关注不足。现有计算机辅助职业指导系统自1960年代以来虽有发展，但在交互性和沉浸体验方面仍有局限。

Method: 平台整合了五种AI模块：自动语音识别实现语音交互；神经机器翻译支持英、希、法、意四种语言；基于Langchain的对话训练助手提供个性化对话；基于BLIP的视觉语言模型生成职业可视化；AWS Polly文本转语音通过交互式3D虚拟形象呈现。职业轨迹以动态桑基图形式展示，数据来自10万+匿名职业档案。系统使用Unity开发，面向Meta Quest 3，后端服务托管于AWS。

Result: 埃克塞特大学23名参与者的试点评估显示：语音识别准确率达95.6%，总体用户满意度78.3%，系统响应性好评率91.3%。反馈推动了运动舒适度、音频清晰度和文本可读性等方面的改进。

Conclusion: XR-CareerAssist展示了XR与AI融合如何创造更具吸引力、可访问性和有效性的职业发展工具。五种AI模块在单一沉浸式环境中的集成提供了多模态交互体验，使其区别于现有职业指导平台。

Abstract: Conventional career guidance platforms rely on static, text-driven interfaces that struggle to engage users or deliver personalised, evidence-based insights. Although Computer-Assisted Career Guidance Systems have evolved since the 1960s, they remain limited in interactivity and pay little attention to the narrative dimensions of career development. We introduce XR-CareerAssist, a platform that unifies Extended Reality (XR) with several Artificial Intelligence (AI) modules to deliver immersive, multilingual career guidance. The system integrates Automatic Speech Recognition for voice-driven interaction, Neural Machine Translation across English, Greek, French, and Italian, a Langchain-based conversational Training Assistant for personalised dialogue, a BLIP-based Vision-Language model for career visualisations, and AWS Polly Text-to-Speech delivered through an interactive 3D avatar. Career trajectories are rendered as dynamic Sankey diagrams derived from a repository of more than 100,000 anonymised professional profiles. The application was built in Unity for Meta Quest 3, with backend services hosted on AWS. A pilot evaluation at the University of Exeter with 23 participants returned 95.6% speech recognition accuracy, 78.3% overall user satisfaction, and 91.3% favourable ratings for system responsiveness, with feedback informing subsequent improvements to motion comfort, audio clarity, and text legibility. XR-CareerAssist demonstrates how the fusion of XR and AI can produce more engaging, accessible, and effective career development tools, with the integration of five AI modules within a single immersive environment yielding a multimodal interaction experience that distinguishes it from existing career guidance platforms.

</details>


<div id='cs.CY'></div>

# cs.CY [[Back]](#toc)

### [683] [The Weaponization of Computer Vision: Tracing Military-Surveillance Ties through Conference Sponsorship](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07803)
*Noa Garcia,Amelia Katirai*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 该研究分析了计算机视觉研究如何通过会议赞助与军事和监控应用产生关联，发现44%的赞助商有直接军事或监控联系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 计算机视觉领域倾向于将自己定位为中立的技术追求，但实际已被系统性地武器化用于监控和战争。研究旨在揭示该领域研究与军事/监控应用之间的实际联系程度。

Method: 通过收集计算机视觉领域核心研究交流平台（会议）的赞助商数据，分析这些科技公司的活动。会议赞助被视为公司对该领域投资和影响其发展轨迹的重要证据。研究还通过两个案例研究探讨了赞助作为揭示技术武器化手段的机遇和局限性。

Result: 研究发现44%的会议赞助商与军事或监控应用有直接联系，揭示了计算机视觉研究领域与军事化应用之间的实质性关联。

Conclusion: 计算机视觉领域不能被视为纯粹中立的学术追求，其研究通过会议赞助等渠道与军事和监控应用紧密相连。该研究揭示了技术武器化的隐蔽路径，并强调了该领域需要更透明地讨论其双重用途应用。

Abstract: Computer vision, a core domain of artificial intelligence (AI), is the field that enables the computational analysis, understanding, and generation of visual data. Despite being historically rooted in military funding and increasingly deployed in warfare, the field tends to position itself as a neutral, purely technical endeavor, failing to engage in discussions about its dual-use applications. Yet it has been reported that computer vision systems are being systematically weaponized to assist in technologies that inflict harm, such as surveillance or warfare. Expanding on these concerns, we study the extent to which computer vision research is being used in the military and surveillance domains. We do so by collecting a dataset of tech companies with financial ties to the field's central research exchange platform: conferences. Conference sponsorship, we argue, not only serves as strong evidence of a company's investment in the field but also provides a privileged position for shaping its trajectory. By investigating sponsors' activities, we reveal that 44% of them have a direct connection with military or surveillance applications. We extend our analysis through two case studies in which we discuss the opportunities and limitations of sponsorship as a means for uncovering technological weaponization.

</details>


### [684] [Infrastructure First: Enabling Embodied AI for Science in the Global South](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06722)
*Shaoshan Liu,Jie Tang,Marwa S. Hassan,Mohamed H. Sharkawy,Moustafa M. G. Fouda,Tiewei Shang,Zixin Wang*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: EAI4S通过将感知、推理和机器人行动结合，实现物理世界实验的自主运行，对全球南方而言，这是克服人力限制、将自动化从奢侈品转变为必要科学基础设施的关键。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 全球南方面临的根本能力约束是：实验人员太少而实验需求太多。EAI4S能够在人力、电力和连接性有限的条件下实现持续可靠的实验，将自动化从奢侈品转变为必要的科学基础设施。

Method: 采用基础设施优先的方法，重点发展可靠的边缘计算、节能硬件、模块化机器人系统、本地化数据管道和开放标准，而不是单纯依赖算法能力。

Result: 开源AI和基础模型已经缩小了知识差距，但EAI4S的成功部署需要上述基础设施支持，否则即使最强大的模型也只能局限在资源充足的实验室中。

Conclusion: EAI4S为全球南方机构提供了一条将AI进步转化为持续科学能力和有竞争力研究产出的具体路径，关键在于采取基础设施优先的部署策略。

Abstract: Embodied AI for Science (EAI4S) brings intelligence into the laboratory by uniting perception, reasoning, and robotic action to autonomously run experiments in the physical world. For the Global South, this shift is not about adopting advanced automation for its own sake, but about overcoming a fundamental capacity constraint: too few hands to run too many experiments. By enabling continuous, reliable experimentation under limits of manpower, power, and connectivity, EAI4S turns automation from a luxury into essential scientific infrastructure. The main obstacle, however, is not algorithmic capability. It is infrastructure. Open-source AI and foundation models have narrowed the knowledge gap, but EAI4S depends on dependable edge compute, energy-efficient hardware, modular robotic systems, localized data pipelines, and open standards. Without these foundations, even the most capable models remain trapped in well-resourced laboratories. This article argues for an infrastructure-first approach to EAI4S and outlines the practical requirements for deploying embodied intelligence at scale, offering a concrete pathway for Global South institutions to translate AI advances into sustained scientific capacity and competitive research output.

</details>


### [685] [The ATOM Report: Measuring the Open Language Model Ecosystem](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07190)
*Nathan Lambert,Florian Brand*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 该论文分析了开源语言模型的采用情况，显示中国模型在2025年夏季超越美国模型并持续扩大优势


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 了解开源语言模型生态系统的现状和发展趋势，特别是中美模型之间的竞争格局，为研究人员、创业者和政策顾问提供参考

Method: 采用混合方法分析约1,500个主流开源模型，包括Hugging Face下载量、模型衍生品、推理市场份额、性能指标等多维度数据

Result: 中国模型在2025年夏季超越美国模型，并在后续持续扩大与西方模型的差距

Conclusion: 开源语言模型生态系统呈现明显的地域性变化，中国模型已成为该领域的主导力量，这一趋势对全球AI研究和应用具有重要影响

Abstract: We present a comprehensive adoption snapshot of the leading open language models and who is building them, focusing on the ~1.5K mainline open models from the likes of Alibaba's Qwen, DeepSeek, Meta's Llama, that are the foundation of an ecosystem crucial to researchers, entrepreneurs, and policy advisors. We document a clear trend where Chinese models overtook their counterparts built in the U.S. in the summer of 2025 and subsequently widened the gap over their western counterparts. We study a mix of Hugging Face downloads and model derivatives, inference market share, performance metrics and more to make a comprehensive picture of the ecosystem.

</details>


### [686] [Google, AI Literacy, and the Learning Sciences: Multiple Modes of Research, Industry, and Practice Partnerships](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07601)
*Victor R. Lee,Michael Madaio,Ben Garside,Aimee Welch,Kristen Pilner Blair,Ibrahim Oluwajoba Adisa,Alon Harris,Kevin Holst,Liat Ben Rafael,Ronit Levavi Morad,Ben Travis,Belle Moller,Andrew Shields,Zak Brown,Lois Hinx,Marisol Diaz,Evan Patton,Selim Tezel,Robert Parks,Hal Abelson,Adam Blasioli,Jeremy Roschelle*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 该研讨会探讨谷歌与多方合作推动AI素养普及的伙伴关系项目，分析研究、实践与产业合作的交汇点、影响因素及未来合作机会。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模提升公众AI素养需要多方协作，产业界和技术公司是关键参与者。研究者与公司有机会成为合作伙伴，共同实现提升AI素养的目标。

Method: 通过研讨会形式，汇集谷歌参与的多项AI素养伙伴项目作为比较案例，结合专题报告、评论和小组讨论，分析合作模式。

Result: 研讨会旨在识别：(1)研究、实践与产业合作在项目生命周期中的交汇点；(2)影响合作方向的因素和历史背景；(3)未来互利共赢的新型合作配置机会。

Conclusion: 产业-研究-实践伙伴关系对推动AI素养普及至关重要，需要系统分析现有合作模式，探索未来更有效的协作机制。

Abstract: Enabling AI literacy in the general population at scale is a complex challenge requiring multiple stakeholders and institutions collaborating together. Industry and technology companies are important actors with respect to AI, and as a field, we have the opportunity to consider how researchers and companies might be partners toward shared goals. In this symposium, we focus on a collection of partnership projects that all involve Google and all address AI literacy as a comparative set of examples. Through a combination of presentations, commentary, and moderated group discussion, the session, we will identify (1) at what points in the life cycle do research, practice, and industry partnerships clearly intersect; (2) what factors and histories shape the directional focus of the partnerships; and (3) where there may be future opportunities for new configurations of partnership that are jointly beneficial to all parties.

</details>


### [687] [Designing Safe and Accountable GenAI as a Learning Companion with Women Banned from Formal Education](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07253)
*Hamayoon Behmanush,Freshta Akhtari,Ingmar Weber,Vikram Kamath Cannanure*

Main category: cs.CY

TL;DR: 在性别限制和监控环境下，阿富汗女性使用生成式AI作为学习同伴和职业导师，但面临隐私风险和文化不适应性，参与式设计提升了她们的抱负和能动性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在阿富汗等性别限制和监控环境中，女性被排除在正规教育之外，转向在线学习和生成式AI追求教育职业目标，但缺乏对安全、负责任AI支持的理解。

Method: 采用远程参与式设计研究，包括招募调查（n=140）和20名阿富汗女性的参与，探讨她们如何设想生成式AI用于学习和就业能力提升。

Result: 参与者将生成式AI视为随时可用的同伴、导师和职业指导来源，而非单纯信息源；参与式设计显著提升了参与者的抱负（p=.01）、感知能动性（p=.01）和感知途径（p=.03）。

Conclusion: 负责任且安全的生成式AI不仅是减少伤害，还能积极赋能女性设想和追求可行的学习就业未来，需关注安全优先交互、用户控制、资源限制下的情境支持以及支持真正学习的教学对齐辅助。

Abstract: In gender-restrictive and surveilled contexts, where access to formal education may be restricted for women, pursuing education involves safety and privacy risks. When women are excluded from schools and universities, they often turn to online self-learning and generative AI (GenAI) to pursue their educational and career aspirations. However, we know little about what safe and accountable GenAI support is required in the context of surveillance, household responsibilities, and the absence of learning communities. We present a remote participatory design study with 20 women in Afghanistan, informed by a recruitment survey (n = 140), examining how participants envision GenAI for learning and employability. Participants describe using GenAI less as an information source and more as an always-available peer, mentor, and source of career guidance that helps compensate for the absence of learning communities. At the same time, they emphasize that this companionship is constrained by privacy and surveillance risks, contextually unrealistic and culturally unsafe support, and direct-answer interactions that can undermine learning by creating an illusion of progress. Beyond eliciting requirements, envisioning the future with GenAI through participatory design was positively associated with significant increases in participants' aspirations (p=.01), perceived agency (p=.01), and perceived avenues (p=.03). These outcomes show that accountable and safe GenAI is not only about harm reduction but can also actively enable women to imagine and pursue viable learning and employment futures. Building on this, we translate participants' proposals into accountability-focused design directions that center on safety-first interaction and user control, context-grounded support under constrained resources, and offer pedagogically aligned assistance that supports genuine learning rather than quick answers.

</details>


<div id='astro-ph.IM'></div>

# astro-ph.IM [[Back]](#toc)

### [688] [Focal plane wavefront control with model-based reinforcement learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.00993)
*Jalo Nousiainen,Iremsu Taskin,Markus Kasper,Gilles Orban De Xivry,Olivier Absil*

Main category: astro-ph.IM

TL;DR: 提出基于强化学习的非共光路像差控制方法PO4NCPA，通过序列相位多样性自动检测和校正动态与静态NCPA，适用于系外行星直接成像


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 系外行星直接成像受限于快速移动的大气散斑和准静态非共光路像差，传统机械镜面探测方法会降低性能，需要自动化的NCPA校正方法

Method: 提出基于模型的强化学习算法PO4NCPA，将焦平面图像作为输入，通过序列相位多样性确定相位校正，无需先验系统知识，可优化非日冕和日冕后PSF

Result: PO4NCPA能稳健补偿静态和动态NCPA：静态情况下实现近最优焦平面光抑制和近最优Strehl比；动态情况下性能与模态最小二乘重构加1步延迟积分器相当

Conclusion: PO4NCPA是模型无关方法，适用于标准成像和任何日冕仪，亚毫秒级推理时间使其适合实时低阶大气湍流校正，为系外行星直接成像提供有效解决方案

Abstract: The direct imaging of potentially habitable exoplanets is one prime science case for high-contrast imaging instruments on extremely large telescopes. Most such exoplanets orbit close to their host stars, where their observation is limited by fast-moving atmospheric speckles and quasi-static non-common-path aberrations (NCPA). Conventional NCPA correction methods often use mechanical mirror probes, which compromise performance during operation. This work presents machine-learning-based NCPA control methods that automatically detect and correct both dynamic and static NCPA errors by leveraging sequential phase diversity. We extend previous work in reinforcement learning for AO to focal plane control. A new model-based RL algorithm, Policy Optimization for NCPAs (PO4NCPA), interprets the focal-plane image as input data and, through sequential phase diversity, determines phase corrections that optimize both non-coronagraphic and post-coronagraphic PSFs without prior system knowledge. Further, we demonstrate the effectiveness of this approach by numerically simulating static NCPA errors on a ground-based telescope and an infrared imager affected by water-vapor-induced seeing (dynamic NCPAs). Simulations show that PO4NCPA robustly compensates static and dynamic NCPAs. In static cases, it achieves near-optimal focal-plane light suppression with a coronagraph and near-optimal Strehl without one. With dynamics NCPA, it matches the performance of the modal least-squares reconstruction combined with a 1-step delay integrator in these metrics. The method remains effective for the ELT pupil, vector vortex coronagraph, and under photon and background noise. PO4NCPA is model-free and can be directly applied to standard imaging as well as to any coronagraph. Its sub-millisecond inference times and performance also make it suitable for real-time low-order correction of atmospheric turbulence beyond HCI.

</details>


<div id='cs.IR'></div>

# cs.IR [[Back]](#toc)

### [689] [Ensembles at Any Cost? Accuracy-Energy Trade-offs in Recommender Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07869)
*Jannik Nitschke,Lukas Wegmeth,Joeran Beel*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 该研究系统评估了推荐系统中集成方法的准确性与能耗权衡，发现集成方法能提升准确率0.3%-5.7%，但能耗增加19%-2549%，选择性集成比穷举平均更节能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注集成方法在推荐系统中的准确性和鲁棒性提升，但缺乏对能耗效率的系统评估。随着AI系统能耗问题日益突出，需要量化集成技术带来的准确性与能耗权衡。

Method: 在两个推荐流水线中进行了93个受控实验：1) 使用Surprise的显式评分预测（RMSE）；2) 使用LensKit的隐式反馈排序（NDCG@10）。评估了四个数据集（MovieLens 100K、1M、ModCloth、Anime），比较了四种集成策略（平均、加权、堆叠/排序融合、最佳表现者）与基线和优化单模型。使用EMERS智能插座测量系统总能耗并转换为CO2当量。

Result: 集成方法在提升准确率0.3%-5.7%的同时，能耗增加19%-2549%。在MovieLens 1M上，最佳表现者集成将RMSE提升0.96%，能耗增加18.8%；在MovieLens 100K上，平均集成将NDCG@10提升5.7%，能耗增加103%；在Anime数据集上，Surprise最佳表现者集成提升RMSE 1.2%，但能耗增加2005%（0.21 vs 0.01 Wh），排放从2.6增至53.8 mg CO2当量。选择性集成比穷举平均更节能。

Conclusion: 集成方法在推荐系统中确实能提升准确性，但能耗代价显著。研究强调了在模型优化中考虑能耗效率的重要性，建议采用选择性集成策略而非穷举方法，以实现更好的准确性与能耗平衡。

Abstract: Ensemble methods are frequently used in recommender systems to improve accuracy by combining multiple models. Recent work reports sizable performance gains, but most studies still optimize primarily for accuracy and robustness rather than for energy efficiency. This paper measures accuracy energy trade offs of ensemble techniques relative to strong single models. We run 93 controlled experiments in two pipelines: 1. explicit rating prediction with Surprise (RMSE) and 2. implicit feedback ranking with LensKit (NDCG@10). We evaluate four datasets ranging from 100,000 to 7.8 million interactions (MovieLens 100K, MovieLens 1M, ModCloth, Anime). We compare four ensemble strategies (Average, Weighted, Stacking or Rank Fusion, Top Performers) against baselines and optimized single models. Whole system energy is measured with EMERS using a smart plug and converted to CO2 equivalents. Across settings, ensembles improve accuracy by 0.3% to 5.7% while increasing energy by 19% to 2,549%. On MovieLens 1M, a Top Performers ensemble improves RMSE by 0.96% at an 18.8% energy overhead over SVD++. On MovieLens 100K, an averaging ensemble improves NDCG@10 by 5.7% with 103% additional energy. On Anime, a Surprise Top Performers ensemble improves RMSE by 1.2% but consumes 2,005% more energy (0.21 vs. 0.01 Wh), increasing emissions from 2.6 to 53.8 mg CO2 equivalents, and LensKit ensembles fail due to memory limits. Overall, selective ensembles are more energy efficient than exhaustive averaging,

</details>


### [690] [Efficient Dataset Selection for Continual Adaptation of Generative Recommenders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07739)
*Cathy Jiao,Juan Elenter,Praveen Ravichandran,Bernd Huber,Joseph Cauteruccio,Todd Wasson,Timothy Heath,Chenyan Xiong,Mounia Lalmas,Paul Bennett*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 该研究探索了在流式推荐系统中，通过基于梯度的表示和分布匹配策略进行数据筛选，以应对时间分布漂移问题，实现高效且鲁棒的模型更新。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模流式推荐系统面临用户行为持续演变的挑战，频繁的完整模型重训练不切实际，需要寻找既能应对时间分布漂移又能保持可扩展性的解决方案。

Method: 评估了多种表示选择和采样策略，重点关注基于梯度的表示方法和分布匹配策略，用于从用户交互数据中筛选出信息量丰富的小规模子集。

Result: 基于梯度的表示结合分布匹配策略能够提升下游模型性能，在获得训练效率提升的同时保持对分布漂移的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 数据筛选是生产级推荐系统中实现可扩展监控和自适应模型更新的实用机制，为解决时间分布漂移问题提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Recommendation systems must continuously adapt to evolving user behavior, yet the volume of data generated in large-scale streaming environments makes frequent full retraining impractical. This work investigates how targeted data selection can mitigate performance degradation caused by temporal distributional drift while maintaining scalability. We evaluate a range of representation choices and sampling strategies for curating small but informative subsets of user interaction data. Our results demonstrate that gradient-based representations, coupled with distribution-matching, improve downstream model performance, achieving training efficiency gains while preserving robustness to drift. These findings highlight data curation as a practical mechanism for scalable monitoring and adaptive model updates in production-scale recommendation systems.

</details>


### [691] [BRIDGE: Multimodal-to-Text Retrieval via Reinforcement-Learned Query Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07201)
*Mohamed Darwish Mounis,Mohamed Mahmoud,Shaimaa Sedek,Mahmoud Abdalla,Mahmoud SalahEldin Kasem,Abdelrahman Abdallah,Hyun-Soo Kang*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: BRIDGE系统通过查询对齐解决多模态到文本检索的瓶颈，无需多模态编码器，在MM-BRIGHT上超越现有方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前多模态检索系统在处理图像-文本查询对纯文本语料库时表现不佳，作者认为瓶颈在于查询本身而非检索器，原始多模态查询包含视觉描述、对话噪声和检索意图的混杂，导致嵌入相似度下降

Method: 提出BRIDGE两组件系统：1) FORGE查询对齐模型，通过强化学习训练，将噪声多模态查询提炼为紧凑的检索优化搜索字符串；2) LENS推理增强的密集检索器，在推理密集型检索数据上微调，处理FORGE生成的意图丰富查询

Result: 在MM-BRIGHT数据集(2,803查询，29个领域)上，BRIDGE达到29.7 nDCG@10，超越所有多模态编码器基线；当FORGE作为即插即用对齐器与Nomic-Vision结合时，系统达到33.3 nDCG@10，超过最佳纯文本检索器(32.2)

Conclusion: 查询对齐是多模态到文本检索的关键瓶颈，BRIDGE系统通过查询对齐而非改进多模态编码器，有效解决了多模态查询与文本语料库之间的不匹配问题

Abstract: Multimodal retrieval systems struggle to resolve image-text queries against text-only corpora: the best vision-language encoder achieves only 27.6 nDCG@10 on MM-BRIGHT, underperforming strong text-only retrievers. We argue the bottleneck is not the retriever but the query -- raw multimodal queries entangle visual descriptions, conversational noise, and retrieval intent in ways that systematically degrade embedding similarity. We present \textbf{BRIDGE}, a two-component system that resolves this mismatch without multimodal encoders. \textbf{FORGE} (\textbf{F}ocused Retrieval Query Generato\textbf{r}) is a query alignment model trained via reinforcement learning, which distills noisy multimodal queries into compact, retrieval-optimized search strings. \textbf{LENS} (\textbf{L}anguage-\textbf{E}nhanced \textbf{N}eural \textbf{S}earch) is a reasoning-enhanced dense retriever fine-tuned on reasoning-intensive retrieval data to handle the intent-rich queries FORGE produces. Evaluated on MM-BRIGHT (2,803 queries, 29 domains), BRIDGE achieves \textbf{29.7} nDCG@10, surpassing all multimodal encoder baselines including Nomic-Vision (27.6). When FORGE is applied as a plug-and-play aligner on top of Nomic-Vision, the combined system reaches \textbf{33.3} nDCG@10 -- exceeding the best text-only retriever (32.2) -- demonstrating that \textit{query alignment} is the key bottleneck in multimodal-to-text retrieval. https://github.com/mm-bright/multimodal-reasoning-retrieval

</details>


### [692] [ReRec: Reasoning-Augmented LLM-based Recommendation Assistant via Reinforcement Fine-tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07851)
*Jiani Huang,Shijie Wang,Liangbo Ning,Wenqi Fan,Qing Li*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: ReRec是一个基于强化微调的框架，通过双图增强奖励塑造、推理感知优势估计和在线课程调度器来提升LLM在复杂推荐任务中的推理能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着LLM的发展，需要智能推荐助手来处理复杂查询并提供个性化、推理驱动的推荐。现有的LLM推荐器在多步推理方面面临挑战，需要推理增强的系统来解决这一差距。

Method: 提出ReRec框架，包含三个关键组件：1) 双图增强奖励塑造，整合NDCG@K等推荐指标与查询对齐和偏好对齐分数；2) 推理感知优势估计，将LLM输出分解为推理段并惩罚错误步骤；3) 在线课程调度器，动态评估查询难度并组织训练课程。

Result: 实验表明ReRec优于最先进的基线方法，并保持了指令遵循和通用知识等核心能力。

Conclusion: ReRec通过强化微调和专门的推理增强机制，有效提升了LLM在复杂推荐任务中的性能，为解决LLM推荐器的推理挑战提供了有效方案。

Abstract: With the rise of LLMs, there is an increasing need for intelligent recommendation assistants that can handle complex queries and provide personalized, reasoning-driven recommendations. LLM-based recommenders show potential but face challenges in multi-step reasoning, underscoring the need for reasoning-augmented systems. To address this gap, we propose ReRec, a novel reinforcement fine-tuning (RFT) framework designed to improve LLM reasoning in complex recommendation tasks. Our framework introduces three key components: (1) Dual-Graph Enhanced Reward Shaping, integrating recommendation metrics like NDCG@K with Query Alignment and Preference Alignment Scores to provide fine-grained reward signals for LLM optimization; (2) Reasoning-aware Advantage Estimation, which decomposes LLM outputs into reasoning segments and penalizes incorrect steps to enhance reasoning of recommendation; and (3) Online Curriculum Scheduler, dynamically assess query difficulty and organize training curriculum to ensure stable learning during RFT. Experiments demonstrate that ReRec outperforms state-of-the-art baselines and preserves core abilities like instruction-following and general knowledge. Our codes are available at https://github.com/jiani-huang/ReRec.

</details>


### [693] [Filling the Gaps: Selective Knowledge Augmentation for LLM Recommenders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07825)
*Jaehyun Lee,Sanghwan Jang,SeongKu Kang,Hwanjo Yu*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: KnowSA_CKP通过选择性知识增强解决LLM推荐中的知识鸿沟问题，避免对已知项目的冗余增强，提高推荐准确性和上下文效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型作为免训练推荐器存在知识鸿沟问题，即对各个项目的知识不均衡，现有方法对所有项目进行统一增强浪费上下文预算且可能干扰模型推理

Method: 提出KnowSA_CKP方法，通过评估LLM捕捉协同关系的能力来估计其内部知识，仅对最需要知识补充的项目选择性注入额外信息，避免对已知项目的冗余增强

Result: 在四个真实世界数据集上，KnowSA_CKP无需微调步骤，持续提高了推荐准确性和上下文效率

Conclusion: 选择性知识增强能有效解决LLM推荐中的知识鸿沟问题，通过聚焦最需要知识补充的项目，更有效地利用上下文预算，提升推荐性能

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently emerged as powerful training-free recommenders. However, their knowledge of individual items is inevitably uneven due to imbalanced information exposure during pretraining, a phenomenon we refer to as knowledge gap problem. To address this, most prior methods have employed a naive uniform augmentation that appends external information for every item in the input prompt. However, this approach not only wastes limited context budget on redundant augmentation for well-known items but can also hinder the model's effective reasoning. To this end, we propose KnowSA_CKP (Knowledge-aware Selective Augmentation with Comparative Knowledge Probing) to mitigate the knowledge gap problem. KnowSA_CKP estimates the LLM's internal knowledge by evaluating its capability to capture collaborative relationships and selectively injects additional information only where it is most needed. By avoiding unnecessary augmentation for well-known items, KnowSA_CKP focuses on items that benefit most from knowledge supplementation, thereby making more effective use of the context budget. KnowSA_CKP requires no fine-tuning step, and consistently improves both recommendation accuracy and context efficiency across four real-world datasets.

</details>


### [694] [Dual-Rerank: Fusing Causality and Utility for Industrial Generative Reranking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07420)
*Chao Zhang,Shuai Lin,ChengLei Dai,Ye Qian,Fan Mingyang,Yi Zhang,Yi Wang,Jingwei Zhuo*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: Dual-Rerank：快手提出的工业级重排序框架，通过序列知识蒸馏解决自回归与非自回归模型的结构权衡，使用列表解耦重排序优化实现稳定在线强化学习，显著提升用户体验和观看时长，大幅降低推理延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在快手日活超4亿、日处理数亿搜索查询的工业场景中，传统重排序方法无法捕捉组合依赖关系。生成式重排序虽能直接建模排列概率，但面临双重困境：1）结构权衡——自回归模型序列建模能力强但延迟过高，非自回归模型高效但依赖捕捉能力弱；2）优化差距——监督学习难以直接优化整页效用，强化学习在高吞吐数据流中不稳定。

Method: 提出Dual-Rerank统一框架：1）通过序列知识蒸馏（Sequential Knowledge Distillation）桥接结构差距，将自回归模型的序列知识迁移到非自回归模型；2）使用列表解耦重排序优化（List-wise Decoupled Reranking Optimization, LDRO）进行稳定在线强化学习，解决优化差距。

Result: 在生产流量上进行大规模A/B测试，Dual-Rerank达到最先进性能，显著提升用户满意度和观看时长，同时相比自回归基线大幅降低推理延迟。

Conclusion: Dual-Rerank成功解决了工业级重排序中的双重困境，通过序列知识蒸馏和列表解耦优化实现了高效且有效的生成式重排序，为大规模短视频平台提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Kuaishou serves over 400 million daily active users, processing hundreds of millions of search queries daily against a repository of tens of billions of short videos. As the final decision layer, the reranking stage determines user experience by optimizing whole-page utility. While traditional score-and-sort methods fail to capture combinatorial dependencies, Generative Reranking offers a superior paradigm by directly modeling the permutation probability. However, deploying Generative Reranking in such a high-stakes environment faces a fundamental dual dilemma: 1) the structural trade-off where Autoregressive (AR) models offer superior Sequential modeling but suffer from prohibitive latency, versus Non-Autoregressive (NAR) models that enable efficiency but lack dependency capturing; 2) the optimization gap where Supervised Learning faces challenges in directly optimizing whole-page utility, while Reinforcement Learning (RL) struggles with instability in high-throughput data streams. To resolve this, we propose Dual-Rerank, a unified framework designed for industrial reranking that bridges the structural gap via Sequential Knowledge Distillation and addresses the optimization gap using List-wise Decoupled Reranking Optimization (LDRO) for stable online RL. Extensive A/B testing on production traffic demonstrates that Dual-Rerank achieves State-of-the-Art performance, significantly improving User satisfaction and Watch Time while drastically reducing inference latency compared to AR baselines.

</details>


### [695] [DCD: Domain-Oriented Design for Controlled Retrieval-Augmented Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07590)
*Valeriy Kovalskiy,Nikita Belov,Nikita Miteyko,Igor Reshetnikov,Max Maximov*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: DCD是一个面向领域的RAG设计框架，通过层次化知识结构和多阶段路由控制查询处理，提升异构语料和多步查询下的RAG系统性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统RAG在处理异构语料库和多步查询时，由于扁平的知识表示和缺乏明确的工作流程，往往导致质量下降。需要一种不修改底层语言模型就能结构化知识并控制查询处理的方法。

Method: 提出DCD（Domain-Collection-Document）框架：1）层次化分解信息空间；2）基于结构化模型输出的多阶段路由；3）渐进式限制检索和生成范围；4）智能分块、混合检索、集成验证和生成护栏机制。

Result: 在合成评估数据集上的结果表明，DCD架构显著提升了RAG系统的鲁棒性、事实准确性和答案相关性，特别是在应用RAG场景中。

Conclusion: DCD通过面向领域的设计有效解决了异构语料和多步查询中RAG系统的挑战，提供了一种结构化知识表示和可控查询处理的实用框架。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is widely used to ground large language models in external knowledge sources. However, when applied to heterogeneous corpora and multi-step queries, Naive RAG pipelines often degrade in quality due to flat knowledge representations and the absence of explicit workflows. In this work, we introduce DCD (Domain-Collection-Document), a domain-oriented design to structure knowledge and control query processing in RAG systems without modifying the underlying language model. The proposed approach relies on a hierarchical decomposition of the information space and multi-stage routing based on structured model outputs, enabling progressive restriction of both retrieval and generation scopes. The architecture is complemented by smart chunking, hybrid retrieval, and integrated validation and generation guardrail mechanisms. We describe the DCD architecture and workflow and discuss evaluation results on synthetic evaluation dataset, highlighting their impact on robustness, factual accuracy, and answer relevance in applied RAG scenarios.

</details>


### [696] [Don't Measure Once: Measuring Visibility in AI Search (GEO)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07585)
*Julius Schulte,Malte Bleeker,Philipp Kaufmann*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 论文指出大语言模型聊天系统广泛应用下，生成引擎优化(GEO)成为重要问题。与传统搜索引擎结果透明稳定不同，AI搜索的随机性导致答案随运行、提示和时间变化，需要重复测量来评估品牌GEO表现，将可见性视为分布而非单点结果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着基于大语言模型的聊天系统日益普及，生成引擎优化(GEO)成为信息访问和检索的重要问题。传统搜索引擎结果相对透明稳定，而AI搜索的固有概率性质改变了这一范式，答案会随运行、提示和时间变化，使得一次性观察不可靠。

Method: 基于实证研究，通过重复测量来评估品牌的GEO性能，将可见性特征化为分布而非单点结果。

Result: 研究发现需要重复测量来准确评估品牌在生成引擎中的表现，强调可见性应被视为概率分布而非固定排名。

Conclusion: AI搜索的随机性要求采用新的评估方法，通过重复测量和分布视角来理解和优化生成引擎中的品牌可见性。

Abstract: As large language model-based chat systems become increasingly widely used, generative engine optimization (GEO) has emerged as an important problem for information access and retrieval. In classical search engines, results are comparatively transparent and stable: a single query often provides a representative snapshot of where a page or brand appears relative to competitors. The inherent probabilistic nature of AI search changes this paradigm. Answers can vary across runs, prompts, and time, making one-off observations unreliable. Drawing on empirical studies, our findings underscore the need for repeated measurements to assess a brand's GEO performance and to characterize visibility as a distribution rather than a single-point outcome.

</details>


### [697] [CASE: Cadence-Aware Set Encoding for Large-Scale Next Basket Repurchase Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06718)
*Yanan Cao,Ashish Ranjan,Sinduja Subramaniam,Evren Korpeoglu,Kaushiki Nag,Kannan Achan*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: CASE：一种用于下次购物篮重复购买推荐的可扩展节奏感知集合编码方法，通过解耦商品级节奏学习与跨商品交互，实现显式日历时间建模


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有下次购物篮重复购买推荐模型将历史表示为按访问顺序索引的离散购物篮事件序列，无法显式建模日历时间流逝或随着购买间隔天数更新商品排名。在需要频繁补货的品类中，重复购买行为遵循稳定的商品特定节奏，需要更好的时间建模方法。

Method: CASE将每个商品的购买历史表示为固定时间范围内的日历时间信号，应用共享多尺度时间卷积捕捉重复节奏，使用诱导集合注意力建模跨商品依赖关系（具有亚二次复杂度），实现高效批量推理。

Result: 在三个公共基准数据集和一个专有数据集上，CASE在多个截断点持续改进Precision、Recall和NDCG指标。在生产规模评估中（数千万用户和大型商品目录），CASE在top-5上实现最高8.6%相对Precision提升和9.9% Recall提升。

Conclusion: 可扩展的节奏感知建模在基准测试和工业环境中都能带来可测量的性能提升，CASE通过解耦商品级节奏学习和跨商品交互，实现了显式日历时间建模同时保持生产可扩展性。

Abstract: Repurchase behavior is a primary signal in large-scale retail recommendation, particularly in categories with frequent replenishment: many items in a user's next basket were previously purchased and their timing follows stable, item-specific cadences. Yet most next basket repurchase recommendation models represent history as a sequence of discrete basket events indexed by visit order, which cannot explicitly model elapsed calendar time or update item rankings as days pass between purchases. We present CASE (Cadence-Aware Set Encoding for next basket repurchase recommendation), which decouples item-level cadence learning from cross-item interaction, enabling explicit calendar-time modeling while remaining production-scalable. CASE represents each item's purchase history as a calendar-time signal over a fixed horizon, applies shared multi-scale temporal convolutions to capture recurring rhythms, and uses induced set attention to model cross-item dependencies with sub-quadratic complexity, allowing efficient batch inference at scale. Across three public benchmarks and a proprietary dataset, CASE consistently improves Precision, Recall, and NDCG at multiple cutoffs compared to strong next basket prediction baselines. In a production-scale evaluation with tens of millions of users and a large item catalog, CASE achieves up to 8.6% relative Precision and 9.9% Recall lift at top-5, demonstrating that scalable cadence-aware modeling yields measurable gains in both benchmark and industrial settings.

</details>


### [698] [SubSearch: Intermediate Rewards for Unsupervised Guided Reasoning in Complex Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07415)
*Roxana Petcu,Evangelos Kanoulas,Maarten de Rijke*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: SubSearch框架通过内在过程奖励优化LLM推理过程，无需外部监督，在复杂查询中实现更鲁棒的推理轨迹


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型语言模型在处理需要多步推理的复杂查询时面临挑战，现有基于结果监督的方法效果有限，需要转向对中间推理步骤的监督

Method: 提出SubSearch框架，使用内在过程奖励直接优化生成器，这些奖励是内部衍生的，无需外部监督，激励规划高质量推理路径

Result: 在七个基准测试上，使用内在过程奖励比仅使用结果奖励在QA和多跳QA数据集中产生更鲁棒的推理轨迹

Conclusion: SubSearch为构建更好的推理轨迹提供数据高效的方法，帮助智能体更好地集成搜索引擎处理复杂查询，实现自主的信息密集型推理

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are probabilistic in nature and perform more reliably when augmented with external information. As complex queries often require multi-step reasoning over the retrieved information, with no clear or predetermined reasoning path, they remain challenging. Recent approaches train models using reinforcement learning on the model's outcome, showing promise in improving how models handle complex information. We introduce SubSearch, a specialized framework that shifts from outcome-only supervision to intermediate reward signals that incentivize planning high-quality reasoning. Unlike previous work on process reward modeling, which focuses on training a separate reward model with annotated trajectories by either human annotators or large LLM judges, SubSearch directly optimizes the generator using intrinsic process rewards, which we define as internally-derived rewards, eliminating the need for external supervision, and moving towards autonomous information-intensive reasoning. Experiments on seven benchmarks show that rewarding intermediate reasoning steps with intrinsic rewards leads to more robust reasoning traces in both QA and multi-hop QA datasets over using only outcome rewards. SubSearch can help in building reasoning traces that allow agents to better integrate search engines for complex query answering, while offering a data-efficient alternative to supervised process modeling.

</details>


<div id='cs.CR'></div>

# cs.CR [[Back]](#toc)

### [699] [PIArena: A Platform for Prompt Injection Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08499)
*Runpeng Geng,Chenlong Yin,Yanting Wang,Ying Chen,Jinyuan Jia*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: PIArena是一个统一的提示注入评估平台，解决了当前缺乏标准化评估框架的问题，通过综合评估揭示了现有防御方法的局限性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前社区面临关键缺口：缺乏统一的提示注入评估平台，导致难以可靠比较防御方法、理解其真实鲁棒性或评估跨任务泛化能力。许多最初报告有效的防御方法后来被发现对多样化数据集和攻击的鲁棒性有限。

Method: 引入PIArena，一个统一且可扩展的提示注入评估平台，允许用户轻松集成最先进的攻击和防御方法，并在各种现有和新基准上进行评估。同时设计了一种基于动态策略的攻击方法，能够根据防御反馈自适应优化注入提示。

Result: 通过PIArena的综合评估，揭示了最先进防御方法的关键局限性：跨任务泛化能力有限、对自适应攻击的脆弱性，以及当注入任务与目标任务对齐时的根本性挑战。

Conclusion: PIArena填补了提示注入评估的关键空白，为社区提供了标准化评估框架，揭示了现有防御方法的实质性局限性，强调了需要更鲁棒和泛化的防御策略。

Abstract: Prompt injection attacks pose serious security risks across a wide range of real-world applications. While receiving increasing attention, the community faces a critical gap: the lack of a unified platform for prompt injection evaluation. This makes it challenging to reliably compare defenses, understand their true robustness under diverse attacks, or assess how well they generalize across tasks and benchmarks. For instance, many defenses initially reported as effective were later found to exhibit limited robustness on diverse datasets and attacks. To bridge this gap, we introduce PIArena, a unified and extensible platform for prompt injection evaluation that enables users to easily integrate state-of-the-art attacks and defenses and evaluate them across a variety of existing and new benchmarks. We also design a dynamic strategy-based attack that adaptively optimizes injected prompts based on defense feedback. Through comprehensive evaluation using PIArena, we uncover critical limitations of state-of-the-art defenses: limited generalizability across tasks, vulnerability to adaptive attacks, and fundamental challenges when an injected task aligns with the target task. The code and datasets are available at https://github.com/sleeepeer/PIArena.

</details>


### [700] [PrivFedTalk: Privacy-Aware Federated Diffusion with Identity-Stable Adapters for Personalized Talking-Head Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08037)
*Soumya Mazumdar,Vineet Kumar Rakesh,Tapas Samanta*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: PrivFedTalk：基于条件潜在扩散和参数高效身份适应的隐私感知联邦框架，用于个性化说话头生成，避免原始数据共享并降低通信成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统说话头生成训练依赖集中式人脸视频和语音数据集，存在严重隐私问题。个性化说话头生成中身份特定数据高度敏感，通常无法跨用户或设备共享，需要隐私保护的联邦学习解决方案。

Method: 结合条件潜在扩散与参数高效身份适应：共享扩散主干跨客户端训练，每个客户端从本地私有视听数据学习轻量级LoRA身份适配器。引入身份稳定联邦聚合（ISFA）处理异构客户端分布，使用时序去噪一致性（TDC）正则化减少帧间漂移和闪烁。应用安全聚合和客户端级差分隐私限制更新侧隐私风险。

Result: 在多种训练和聚合条件下与FedAvg、FedProx比较，PrivFedTalk展示稳定的联邦优化和成功的端到端训练评估。支持低内存GPU执行和异构共享硬件上的多GPU客户端并行训练。

Conclusion: 结果支持隐私感知个性化说话头训练在联邦环境中的可行性，但指出需要进一步标准化评估来验证组件性能、隐私-效用权衡和定性声明。

Abstract: Talking-head generation has advanced rapidly with diffusion-based generative models, but training usually depends on centralized face-video and speech datasets, raising major privacy concerns. The problem is more acute for personalized talking-head generation, where identity-specific data are highly sensitive and often cannot be pooled across users or devices. PrivFedTalk is presented as a privacy-aware federated framework for personalized talking-head generation that combines conditional latent diffusion with parameter-efficient identity adaptation. A shared diffusion backbone is trained across clients, while each client learns lightweight LoRA identity adapters from local private audio-visual data, avoiding raw data sharing and reducing communication cost. To address heterogeneous client distributions, Identity-Stable Federated Aggregation (ISFA) weights client updates using privacy-safe scalar reliability signals computed from on-device identity consistency and temporal stability estimates. Temporal-Denoising Consistency (TDC) regularization is introduced to reduce inter-frame drift, flicker, and identity drift during federated denoising. To limit update-side privacy risk, secure aggregation and client-level differential privacy are applied to adapter updates. The implementation supports both low-memory GPU execution and multi-GPU client-parallel training on heterogeneous shared hardware. Comparative experiments on the present setup across multiple training and aggregation conditions with PrivFedTalk, FedAvg, and FedProx show stable federated optimization and successful end-to-end training and evaluation under constrained resources. The results support the feasibility of privacy-aware personalized talking-head training in federated environments, while suggesting that stronger component-wise, privacy-utility, and qualitative claims need further standardized evaluation.

</details>


### [701] [TADP-RME: A Trust-Adaptive Differential Privacy Framework for Enhancing Reliability of Data-Driven Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08113)
*Labani Halder,Payel Sadhukhan,Sarbani Palit*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: TADP-RME：一种信任自适应差分隐私框架，通过逆信任分数动态调整隐私预算，并利用反向流形嵌入破坏局部几何结构以抵御推理攻击，在异构用户信任环境下提升可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有差分隐私方案使用固定隐私预算，导致在异构用户信任环境下效用-隐私权衡僵化；同时噪声差分隐私保留几何结构，易被推理攻击利用造成隐私泄露。

Method: 提出TADP-RME框架：1) 引入[0,1]范围的逆信任分数自适应调节隐私预算，实现效用与隐私的平滑过渡；2) 采用反向流形嵌入进行非线性变换，破坏局部几何关系，同时通过后处理保持形式化差分隐私保证。

Result: 理论与实证结果表明，该框架改善了隐私-效用权衡，将攻击成功率降低达3.1%且无明显效用退化；在对抗推理攻击方面持续优于现有方法。

Conclusion: TADP-RME为对抗环境下的可靠学习提供了统一框架，通过信任自适应隐私预算和几何结构破坏机制，有效应对异构用户信任和推理攻击挑战。

Abstract: Ensuring reliability in adversarial settings necessitates treating privacy as a foundational component of data-driven systems. While differential privacy and cryptographic protocols offer strong guarantees, existing schemes rely on a fixed privacy budget, leading to a rigid utility-privacy trade-off that fails under heterogeneous user trust. Moreover, noise-only differential privacy preserves geometric structure, which inference attacks exploit, causing privacy leakage.
  We propose TADP-RME (Trust-Adaptive Differential Privacy with Reverse Manifold Embedding), a framework that enhances reliability under varying levels of user trust. It introduces an inverse trust score in the range [0,1] to adaptively modulate the privacy budget, enabling smooth transitions between utility and privacy. Additionally, Reverse Manifold Embedding applies a nonlinear transformation to disrupt local geometric relationships while preserving formal differential privacy guarantees through post-processing.
  Theoretical and empirical results demonstrate improved privacy-utility trade-offs, reducing attack success rates by up to 3.1 percent without significant utility degradation. The framework consistently outperforms existing methods against inference attacks, providing a unified approach for reliable learning in adversarial environments.

</details>


### [702] [Securing Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Taxonomy of Attacks, Defenses, and Future Directions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08304)
*Yuming Xu,Mingtao Zhang,Zhuohan Ge,Haoyang Li,Nicole Hu,Jason Chen Zhang,Qing Li,Lei Chen*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 该论文提出RAG安全的核心在于外部知识访问管道的安全性，建立了操作边界来区分LLM固有缺陷与RAG引入/放大的威胁，将RAG工作流抽象为六个阶段，围绕三个信任边界和四个主要安全面组织文献，并指出当前防御措施主要处于被动和碎片化状态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 检索增强生成(RAG)虽然显著提升了大型语言模型(LLM)的能力，但通过外部知识访问引入了新的安全风险。现有研究往往将LLM固有风险与RAG特定引入的风险混为一谈，缺乏对RAG安全本质的系统性理解。

Method: 提出RAG安全的根本在于外部知识访问管道的安全性，建立操作边界来分离LLM固有缺陷与RAG引入/放大的威胁。将RAG工作流抽象为六个阶段，围绕三个信任边界和四个主要安全面（预检索知识污染、检索时访问操纵、下游上下文利用、知识泄露）组织文献，系统回顾相应的攻击、防御、修复机制和评估基准。

Result: 通过系统性文献回顾，揭示了当前RAG安全防御措施主要处于被动和碎片化状态，缺乏系统性的分层保护机制。

Conclusion: 指出了RAG安全领域的研究空白，强调需要在知识访问生命周期中实现分层、边界感知的保护机制，为未来研究方向提供了指导。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) significantly enhances large language models (LLMs) but introduces novel security risks through external knowledge access. While existing studies cover various RAG vulnerabilities, they often conflate inherent LLM risks with those specifically introduced by RAG. In this paper, we propose that secure RAG is fundamentally about the security of the external knowledge-access pipeline. We establish an operational boundary to separate inherent LLM flaws from RAG-introduced or RAG-amplified threats. Guided by this perspective, we abstract the RAG workflow into six stages and organize the literature around three trust boundaries and four primary security surfaces, including pre-retrieval knowledge corruption, retrieval-time access manipulation, downstream context exploitation, and knowledge exfiltration. By systematically reviewing the corresponding attacks, defenses, remediation mechanisms, and evaluation benchmarks, we reveal that current defenses remain largely reactive and fragmented. Finally, we discuss these gaps and highlight future directions toward layered, boundary-aware protection across the entire knowledge-access lifecycle.

</details>


### [703] [TrajGuard: Streaming Hidden-state Trajectory Detection for Decoding-time Jailbreak Defense](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07727)
*Cheng Liu,Xiaolei Liu,Xingyu Li,Bangzhou Xin,Kangyi Ding*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: TrajGuard：基于解码过程中隐藏状态轨迹的实时越狱防御框架，无需训练，通过滑动窗口聚合风险信号，在风险持续超阈值时触发语义裁决，实现即时中断或约束后续解码。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有越狱防御范式主要依赖对提示、输出或内部状态的静态检测，忽视了风险在解码过程中的动态演变。这导致解码轨迹中嵌入的风险信号未被充分利用，构成当前防御系统的关键盲点。作者发现解码阶段关键层的隐藏状态比输入越狱提示携带更强、更稳定的风险信号。

Method: 提出TrajGuard训练免费的解码时防御框架：1）通过滑动窗口聚合隐藏状态轨迹以实时量化风险；2）仅当局部窗口内风险持续超过阈值时触发轻量级语义裁决；3）实现对后续解码的即时中断或约束。该方法无需模型修改。

Result: 在12种越狱攻击和多种开源LLM上的广泛实验表明：TrajGuard平均防御率达到95%；检测延迟降至5.2毫秒/词元；误报率保持在1.5%以下。验证了解码过程中隐藏状态轨迹对实时越狱检测的有效性。

Conclusion: 解码过程中隐藏状态轨迹能够有效支持实时越狱检测，为无需模型修改的防御提供了有前景的方向。TrajGuard框架通过利用解码轨迹的动态风险信号，实现了高效、低延迟的防御机制。

Abstract: Existing jailbreak defense paradigms primarily rely on static detection of prompts, outputs, or internal states, often neglecting the dynamic evolution of risk during decoding. This oversight leaves risk signals embedded in decoding trajectories underutilized, constituting a critical blind spot in current defense systems. In this work, we empirically demonstrate that hidden states in critical layers during the decoding phase carry stronger and more stable risk signals than input jailbreak prompts. Specifically, the hidden representations of tokens generated during jailbreak attempts progressively approach high-risk regions in the latent space. Based on this observation, we propose TrajGuard, a training-free, decoding-time defense framework. TrajGuard aggregates hidden-state trajectories via a sliding window to quantify risk in real time, triggering a lightweight semantic adjudication only when risk within a local window persistently exceeds a threshold. This mechanism enables the immediate interruption or constraint of subsequent decoding. Extensive experiments across 12 jailbreak attacks and various open-source LLMs show that TrajGuard achieves an average defense rate of 95%. Furthermore, it reduces detection latency to 5.2 ms/token while maintaining a false positive rate below 1.5%. These results confirm that hidden-state trajectories during decoding can effectively support real-time jailbreak detection, highlighting a promising direction for defenses without model modification.

</details>


### [704] [DDP-SA: Scalable Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning via Distributed Differential Privacy and Secure Aggregation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07125)
*Wenjing Wei,Farid Nait-Abdesselam,Alla Jammine*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: DDP-SA是一个结合本地差分隐私和加法秘密共享的联邦学习隐私保护框架，通过两阶段保护机制在保持计算可行性的同时提供更强的端到端隐私保障。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦学习隐私保护方法要么仅依赖差分隐私，要么仅依赖安全多方计算，无法在提供强隐私保护的同时保持模型准确性和计算可行性。需要一种既能保护个体客户端数据隐私，又能维持模型性能的实用框架。

Method: 提出两阶段保护机制：1) 客户端使用校准的拉普拉斯噪声扰动本地梯度（LDP阶段）；2) 将噪声梯度分解为加法秘密份额并分发到多个中间服务器（ASS阶段）。这种设计确保单个服务器或通信信道无法泄露任何个体客户端更新信息，且参数服务器只能重构聚合的噪声梯度。

Result: 实验表明DDP-SA比单独的LDP方法获得显著更高的模型准确率，同时比仅使用MPC的方法提供更强的隐私保护。框架参与者的数量呈线性扩展，计算和通信开销可控。

Conclusion: DDP-SA通过联合利用客户端本地差分隐私和全阈值加法秘密共享，为联邦学习应用提供了一个实用、可扩展的隐私保护解决方案，在保持计算可行性的同时提供了更强的端到端隐私保障。

Abstract: This article presents DDP-SA, a scalable privacy-preserving federated learning framework that jointly leverages client-side local differential privacy (LDP) and full-threshold additive secret sharing (ASS) for secure aggregation. Unlike existing methods that rely solely on differential privacy or on secure multi-party computation (MPC), DDP-SA integrates both techniques to deliver stronger end-to-end privacy guarantees while remaining computationally practical. The framework introduces a two-stage protection mechanism: clients first perturb their local gradients with calibrated Laplace noise, then decompose the noisy gradients into additive secret shares that are distributed across multiple intermediate servers. This design ensures that (i) no single compromised server or communication channel can reveal any information about individual client updates, and (ii) the parameter server reconstructs only the aggregated noisy gradient, never any client-specific contribution. Extensive experiments show that DDP-SA achieves substantially higher model accuracy than standalone LDP while providing stronger privacy protection than MPC-only approaches. The proposed framework scales linearly with the number of participants and offers a practical, privacy-preserving solution for federated learning applications with controllable computational and communication overhead.

</details>


### [705] [MCP-DPT: A Defense-Placement Taxonomy and Coverage Analysis for Model Context Protocol Security](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07551)
*Mehrdad Rostamzadeh,Sidhant Narula,Nahom Birhan,Mohammad Ghasemigol,Daniel Takabi*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一个面向防御部署的MCP安全分析框架，通过分层分类法组织攻击，识别主要和次要防御点，揭示当前防御主要集中在工具层，而在主机编排、传输和供应链层存在持续安全缺口。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MCP（模型上下文协议）使大语言模型能够动态发现和调用第三方工具，显著扩展了智能体能力，但引入了独特的安全格局。现有研究主要是攻击中心或基准驱动，缺乏关于在MCP架构中缓解责任应位于何处的指导，这在MCP的多方设计和分布式信任边界下存在问题。

Method: 提出了一个面向防御部署的MCP安全分析方法，引入了一个分层对齐的分类法，将攻击按负责执行的架构组件组织。威胁被映射到六个MCP层，识别主要和次要防御点，以支持在对手控制工具、服务器或生态系统组件情况下的深度防御原则推理。将现有学术和行业防御措施结构性地映射到此框架。

Result: 分析揭示了当前防御措施不均衡且主要集中在工具层，而在主机编排、传输和供应链层存在持续的安全缺口。现有防御措施主要是工具中心化的保护，其他关键层防护不足。

Conclusion: 许多MCP安全弱点源于架构错位而非孤立的实现缺陷。需要更均衡的分层防御策略，特别是在主机编排、传输和供应链层加强安全措施，以建立全面的深度防御体系。

Abstract: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) enables large language models (LLMs) to dynamically discover and invoke third-party tools, significantly expanding agent capabilities while introducing a distinct security landscape. Unlike prompt-only interactions, MCP exposes pre-execution artifacts, shared context, multi-turn workflows, and third-party supply chains to adversarial influence across independently operated components. While recent work has identified MCP-specific attacks and evaluated defenses, existing studies are largely attack-centric or benchmark-driven, providing limited guidance on where mitigation responsibility should reside within the MCP architecture. This is problematic given MCP's multi-party design and distributed trust boundaries. We present a defense-placement-oriented security analysis of MCP, introducing a layer-aligned taxonomy that organizes attacks by the architectural component responsible for enforcement. Threats are mapped across six MCP layers, and primary and secondary defense points are identified to support principled defense-in-depth reasoning under adversaries controlling tools, servers, or ecosystem components. A structured mapping of existing academic and industry defenses onto this framework reveals uneven and predominantly tool-centric protection, with persistent gaps at the host orchestration, transport, and supply-chain layers. These findings suggest that many MCP security weaknesses stem from architectural misalignment rather than isolated implementation flaws.

</details>


### [706] [Private Seeds, Public LLMs: Realistic and Privacy-Preserving Synthetic Data Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07486)
*Qian Ma,Sarah Rajtmajer*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: RPSG是一种利用差分隐私和私有种子生成真实且隐私保护的合成数据的方法，在保持高保真度的同时提供强隐私保护。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型已成为合成数据生成的强大工具，特别是在生成私有文本的合成副本方面，需要在隐私性和实用性之间取得平衡。当前需要一种既能保护隐私又能生成真实合成数据的方法。

Method: 提出RPSG（真实且隐私保护的合成数据生成）方法，利用隐私保护机制，包括形式化的差分隐私（DP）和私有种子（特别是包含个人信息的文本），来生成真实的合成数据。

Result: 与最先进的私有合成数据生成方法相比，RPSG在保持对私有数据高保真度的同时，提供了强大的隐私保护。

Conclusion: RPSG方法成功解决了在合成数据生成中平衡隐私和实用性的挑战，为私有文本数据的合成副本生成提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as a powerful tool for synthetic data generation. A particularly important use case is producing synthetic replicas of private text, which requires carefully balancing privacy and utility. We propose Realistic and Privacy-Preserving Synthetic Data Generation (RPSG), which leverages privacy-preserving mechanisms, including formal differential privacy (DP); and private seeds, in particular text containing personal information, to generate realistic synthetic data. Comprehensive experiments against state-of-the-art private synthetic data generation methods demonstrate that RPSG achieves high fidelity to private data while providing strong privacy protection.

</details>


### [707] [Data Leakage in Automotive Perception: Practitioners' Insights](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06899)
*Md Abu Ahammed Babu,Sushant Kumar Pandey,Darko Durisic,Andras Balint,Miroslaw Staron*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: 研究调查汽车感知领域从业者对数据泄漏的认知与实践，发现知识分布碎片化且角色相关，泄漏控制是跨角色协调的社会技术问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 数据泄漏对汽车感知等安全关键系统的机器学习模型可靠性构成重大风险，但工业实践中从业者如何认知和管理数据泄漏尚不清楚，需要实证研究填补这一知识空白

Method: 通过10次半结构化访谈，采访汽车感知功能开发的系统设计、开发和验证工程师，采用反思性主题分析方法分析从业者的知识、经验和缓解策略

Result: 数据泄漏知识广泛存在但碎片化：ML工程师视为数据分割/验证问题，设计和验证角色则从代表性和场景覆盖角度理解；检测多通过一般考虑和性能异常而非专用工具；预防更常见，依赖经验和知识共享

Conclusion: 数据泄漏控制是跨角色和工作流分布的社会技术协调问题，需要共享定义、可追溯数据实践和持续跨角色沟通，将数据泄漏意识制度化于汽车ML开发中

Abstract: Data leakage is the inadvertent transfer of information between training and evaluation datasets that poses a subtle, yet critical, risk to the reliability of machine learning (ML) models in safety-critical systems such as automotive perception. While leakage is widely recognized in research, little is known about how industrial practitioners actually perceive and manage it in practice. This study investigates practitioners' knowledge, experiences, and mitigation strategies around data leakage through ten semi-structured interviews with system design, development, and verification engineers working on automotive perception functions development. Using reflexive thematic analysis, we identify that knowledge of data leakage is widespread and fragmented along role boundaries: ML engineers conceptualize it as a data-splitting or validation issue, whereas design and verification roles interpret it in terms of representativeness and scenario coverage. Detection commonly arises through generic considerations and observed performance anomalies rather than implying specific tools. However, data leakage prevention is more commonly practiced, which depends mostly on experience and knowledge sharing. These findings suggest that leakage control is a socio-technical coordination problem distributed across roles and workflows. We discuss implications for ML reliability engineering, highlighting the need for shared definitions, traceable data practices, and continuous cross-role communication to institutionalize data leakage awareness within automotive ML development.

</details>


### [708] [FedDetox: Robust Federated SLM Alignment via On-Device Data Sanitization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06833)
*Shunan Zhu,Jiawei Chen,Yonghao Yu,Hideya Ochiai*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: FedDetox：针对资源受限边缘设备上小型语言模型的联邦学习安全对齐框架，通过知识蒸馏和拒绝模板替换解决意外数据中毒问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高质量公共数据稀缺，联邦学习成为利用私有用户数据的重要途径，但现实客户端数据常包含有毒或不安全信息，导致意外数据中毒问题，严重损害联邦对齐过程中全局模型的安全对齐

Method: 1. 使用知识蒸馏将大规模安全对齐教师模型的复杂安全对齐能力转移到适合资源受限边缘设备的轻量级学生分类器；2. 在人类偏好对齐的联邦学习过程中，边缘客户端在源头识别不安全样本，并用拒绝模板替换，将潜在毒药转化为积极的安全信号

Result: 实验表明，该方法在保持与集中式基线相当的安全水平的同时，不损害模型的通用效用

Conclusion: FedDetox为资源受限边缘设备上的小型语言模型提供了一个有效的联邦学习安全对齐框架，成功解决了意外数据中毒问题，平衡了安全性和实用性

Abstract: As high quality public data becomes scarce, Federated Learning (FL) provides a vital pathway to leverage valuable private user data while preserving privacy. However, real-world client data often contains toxic or unsafe information. This leads to a critical issue we define as unintended data poisoning, which can severely damage the safety alignment of global models during federated alignment. To address this, we propose FedDetox, a robust framework tailored for Small Language Models (SLMs) on resource-constrained edge devices. We first employ knowledge distillation to transfer sophisticated safety alignment capabilities from large scale safety aligned teacher models into light weight student classifiers suitable for resource constrained edge devices. Specifically, during federated learning for human preference alignment, the edge client identifies unsafe samples at the source and replaces them with refusal templates, effectively transforming potential poisons into positive safety signals. Experiments demonstrate that our approach preserves model safety at a level comparable to centralized baselines without compromising general utility.

</details>


### [709] [Towards Privacy-Preserving Large Language Model: Text-free Inference Through Alignment and Adaptation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06831)
*Jeongho Yoon,Chanhee Park,Yongchan Chun,Hyeonseok Moon,Heuiseok Lim*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: PPFT是一种隐私保护微调方法，通过客户端编码和服务器端投影模块，使用k-pooled提示嵌入代替原始文本传输，结合噪声注入嵌入进行微调，在保护隐私的同时保持模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前基于LLM的服务通常要求用户提交原始文本，无论其敏感性如何，这带来了重大的隐私风险。现有防御方法虽然试图缓解这些风险，但往往带来巨大的计算开销并降低模型性能。需要克服隐私与效率之间的权衡问题。

Method: PPFT采用两阶段训练流程：第一阶段训练客户端编码器、服务器端投影模块和LLM，使服务器能够基于k-pooled提示嵌入而非原始文本进行条件处理；第二阶段使用噪声注入嵌入在私有领域特定数据上微调投影模块和LLM，实现有效适应而不暴露明文提示，且无需访问解码器内部参数。

Result: 在领域特定和通用基准测试上的广泛实验表明，PPFT在隐私保护与模型效用之间实现了显著平衡，与无噪声上限相比性能下降最小，保持了竞争力。

Conclusion: PPFT提供了一种新颖的训练流程，消除了传输原始提示文本的需求，为客户端和服务提供商在隐私保护与模型效用之间提供了有利的平衡，克服了现有方法的隐私-效率权衡问题。

Abstract: Current LLM-based services typically require users to submit raw text regardless of its sensitivity. While intuitive, such practice introduces substantial privacy risks, as unauthorized access may expose personal, medical, or legal information. Although prior defenses strived to mitigate these risks, they often incur substantial computational overhead and degrade model performance. To overcome this privacy-efficiency trade-off, we introduce Privacy-Preserving Fine-Tuning (PPFT), a novel training pipeline that eliminates the need for transmitting raw prompt text while maintaining a favorable balance between privacy preservation and model utility for both clients and service providers. Our approach operates in two stages: first, we train a client-side encoder together with a server-side projection module and LLM, enabling the server to condition on k-pooled prompt embeddings instead of raw text; second, we fine-tune the projection module and LLM on private, domain-specific data using noise-injected embeddings, allowing effective adaptation without exposing plain text prompts and requiring access to the decoder's internal parameters. Extensive experiments on domain-specific and general benchmarks demonstrate that PPFT achieves a striking balance between privacy and utility, maintaining competitive performance with minimal degradation compared to noise-free upper bounds.

</details>


### [710] [SkillTrojan: Backdoor Attacks on Skill-Based Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06811)
*Yunhao Feng,Yifan Ding,Yingshui Tan,Boren Zheng,Yanming Guo,Xiaolong Li,Kun Zhai,Yishan Li,Wenke Huang*

Main category: cs.CR

TL;DR: SkillTrojan是一种针对技能型智能体系统的后门攻击，通过将恶意逻辑嵌入看似正常的技能中，利用技能组合重构并执行攻击者指定的有效载荷，攻击成功率高达97.2%且对正常任务影响很小。


<details>
