  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 技能型智能体系统通过组合可重用技能来处理复杂任务，提高了模块化和可扩展性，但同时也引入了未被充分研究的安全攻击面。当前研究主要关注模型参数或训练数据的攻击，而忽视了技能实现层面的安全风险。

Method: SkillTrojan将加密的有效载荷分割到多个看似良性的技能调用中，仅在预定义触发条件下激活。攻击支持从任意技能模板自动合成后门技能，实现跨技能型智能体生态系统的可扩展传播。研究还发布了包含3000多个精心策划的后门技能的数据集，涵盖多种技能模式和触发-有效载荷配置。

Result: 在代表性代码型智能体环境中实例化SkillTrojan，评估了清洁任务效用和攻击成功率。结果显示，技能级后门攻击效果显著，对良性行为影响最小。具体在EHR SQL任务中，SkillTrojan在GPT-5.2-1211-Global上达到97.2%的攻击成功率，同时保持89.3%的清洁任务准确率。

Conclusion: 技能级后门攻击揭示了当前技能型智能体架构中的关键安全盲点，表明攻击者可以通过看似正常的技能组合实现高效攻击。这强调了需要开发能够显式推理技能组合和执行的安全防御机制，以应对这一新型攻击面。

Abstract: Skill-based agent systems tackle complex tasks by composing reusable skills, improving modularity and scalability while introducing a largely unexamined security attack surface. We propose SkillTrojan, a backdoor attack that targets skill implementations rather than model parameters or training data. SkillTrojan embeds malicious logic inside otherwise plausible skills and leverages standard skill composition to reconstruct and execute an attacker-specified payload. The attack partitions an encrypted payload across multiple benign-looking skill invocations and activates only under a predefined trigger. SkillTrojan also supports automated synthesis of backdoored skills from arbitrary skill templates, enabling scalable propagation across skill-based agent ecosystems. To enable systematic evaluation, we release a dataset of 3,000+ curated backdoored skills spanning diverse skill patterns and trigger-payload configurations. We instantiate SkillTrojan in a representative code-based agent setting and evaluate both clean-task utility and attack success rate. Our results show that skill-level backdoors can be highly effective with minimal degradation of benign behavior, exposing a critical blind spot in current skill-based agent architectures and motivating defenses that explicitly reason about skill composition and execution. Concretely, on EHR SQL, SkillTrojan attains up to 97.2% ASR while maintaining 89.3% clean ACC on GPT-5.2-1211-Global.

</details>


<div id='cond-mat.stat-mech'></div>

# cond-mat.stat-mech [[Back]](#toc)

### [711] [Generative optimal transport via forward-backward HJB matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07762)
*Haiqian Yang,Vishaal Krishnan,Sumit Sinha,L. Mahadevan*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 论文提出了一种基于时间反转对偶性的随机最优控制方法，通过正向松弛轨迹计算反向最优控制的价值函数，避免了反向模拟和目标分布解析形式的依赖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决从无序参考态到结构化目标系综的随机系统演化控制问题，传统方法需要已知目标系综的轨迹信息，而这正是需要构建的对象，形成循环依赖。

Method: 建立时间反转对偶性：反向动力学的价值函数满足等价的正向时间HJB方程，通过Cole-Hopf变换和Feynman-Kac表示，将正向势函数计算为路径空间自由能对正向松弛轨迹的平均。

Result: 开发了一个物理可解释的框架，仅需目标系综的样本和易于模拟的正向松弛路径，无需反向模拟或目标分布的解析知识，即可计算最优控制过程。

Conclusion: 该方法在随机最优控制、薛定谔桥理论和非平衡统计力学之间建立了统一联系，通过数值示例展示了空间成本场如何类似非均匀介质中的费马原理塑造输运几何。

Abstract: Controlling the evolution of a many-body stochastic system from a disordered reference state to a structured target ensemble, characterized empirically through samples, arises naturally in non-equilibrium statistical mechanics and stochastic control. The natural relaxation of such a system - driven by diffusion - runs from the structured target toward the disordered reference. The natural question is then: what is the minimum-work stochastic process that reverses this relaxation, given a pathwise cost functional combining spatial penalties and control effort? Computing this optimal process requires knowledge of trajectories that already sample the target ensemble - precisely the object one is trying to construct. We resolve this by establishing a time-reversal duality: the value function governing the hard backward dynamics satisfies an equivalent forward-in-time HJB equation, whose solution can be read off directly from the tractable forward relaxation trajectories. Via the Cole-Hopf transformation and its associated Feynman-Kac representation, this forward potential is computed as a path-space free energy averaged over these forward trajectories - the same relaxation paths that are easy to simulate - without any backward simulation or knowledge of the target beyond samples. The resulting framework provides a physically interpretable description of stochastic transport in terms of path-space free energy, risk-sensitive control, and spatial cost geometry. We illustrate the theory with numerical examples that visualize the learned value function and the induced controlled diffusions, demonstrating how spatial cost fields shape transport geometry analogously to Fermat's Principle in inhomogeneous media. Our results establish a unifying connection between stochastic optimal control, Schrödinger bridge theory, and non-equilibrium statistical mechanics.

</details>


### [712] [Score Shocks: The Burgers Equation Structure of Diffusion Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07404)
*Krisanu Sarkar*

Main category: cond-mat.stat-mech

TL;DR: 该论文通过Burgers型演化定律分析扩散生成模型的得分场，揭示了VE扩散中得分遵循粘性Burgers方程，为物种形成转变提供了PDE视角，并推导了对称高斯混合情况下的临界扩散时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究扩散生成模型中得分场的演化规律，特别是理解物种形成转变（speciation transitions）的数学机制，为模式边界形成提供偏微分方程视角，并建立与现有理论（如Biroli等人的谱准则）的联系。

Method: 采用Burgers型演化定律分析VE扩散的得分场：1) 证明一维情况下得分遵循粘性Burgers方程，d维情况下遵循对应的无旋向量Burgers系统；2) 对任意二值分解的噪声密度，将得分分解为平滑背景项和由分量对数比确定的tanh界面项；3) 推导对称高斯混合情况下的临界扩散时间；4) 通过变量变换将VP-SDE简化为VE情况。

Result: 1) 建立了得分场与Burgers方程的严格对应关系；2) 推导了物种形成的正态准则；3) 在对称高斯混合中，该准则与中点导数检测的临界扩散时间一致，并与Biroli等人的谱准则相符；4) 获得了VP-SDE的闭式物种形成时间；5) 高斯混合公式达到机器精度验证，局部定理在四次双势阱上进行了数值验证。

Conclusion: 扩散生成模型的得分场演化遵循Burgers型动力学，为物种形成转变提供了统一的偏微分方程框架。该理论不仅解释了模式边界锐化的数学机制，还建立了与现有理论的一致性，并为分析更复杂的扩散过程提供了工具。

Abstract: We analyze the score field of a diffusion generative model through a Burgers-type evolution law. For VE diffusion, the heat-evolved data density implies that the score obeys viscous Burgers in one dimension and the corresponding irrotational vector Burgers system in $\R^d$, giving a PDE view of \emph{speciation transitions} as the sharpening of inter-mode interfaces. For any binary decomposition of the noised density into two positive heat solutions, the score separates into a smooth background and a universal $\tanh$ interfacial term determined by the component log-ratio; near a regular binary mode boundary this yields a normal criterion for speciation. In symmetric binary Gaussian mixtures, the criterion recovers the critical diffusion time detected by the midpoint derivative of the score and agrees with the spectral criterion of Biroli, Bonnaire, de~Bortoli, and Mézard (2024). After subtracting the background drift, the inter-mode layer has a local Burgers $\tanh$ profile, which becomes global in the symmetric Gaussian case with width $σ_τ^2/a$. We also quantify exponential amplification of score errors across this layer, show that Burgers dynamics preserves irrotationality, and use a change of variables to reduce the VP-SDE to the VE case, yielding a closed-form VP speciation time. Gaussian-mixture formulas are verified to machine precision, and the local theorem is checked numerically on a quartic double-well.

</details>


<div id='cs.AR'></div>

# cs.AR [[Back]](#toc)

### [713] [From LLM to Silicon: RL-Driven ASIC Architecture Exploration for On-Device AI Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07526)
*Ravindra Ganti,Steve Xu*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: RL驱动的编译器联合优化ASIC架构、内存层次和工作负载划分，用于AI推理，覆盖3nm到28nm工艺节点，通过SAC算法探索设计空间，实现自动配置优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统ASIC设计需要针对不同工艺节点进行手动调优，过程耗时且难以实现跨节点的自动优化。需要一种能够联合优化架构、内存和分区，并能自动适应不同工艺节点的智能设计方法。

Method: 将设计空间建模为混合离散-连续动作的马尔可夫决策过程，使用带专家混合门控的Soft Actor-Critic算法，联合探索网格拓扑、每核微架构和算子放置。统一优化功耗-性能-面积目标。

Result: 在7个工艺节点上验证：Llama 3.1 8B FP16在3nm下达到29809 tokens/秒；SmolVLM在所有节点功耗低于13mW（10MHz）。RL自动调整网格大小和每瓦配置，包括异构FETCH、VLEN和内存分配，无需节点特定手动调优。

Conclusion: 提出的RL驱动编译器能够自动联合优化ASIC设计，实现跨工艺节点的自适应配置，显著减少手动调优工作量，为AI推理提供高效的硬件设计解决方案。

Abstract: We present an RL-driven compiler that jointly optimizes ASIC architecture, memory hierarchy, and workload partitioning for AI inference across 3nm to 28nm. The design space is formulated as a single Markov Decision Process with mixed discrete-continuous actions and a unified Power-Performance-Area (PPA) objective. Soft Actor-Critic (SAC) with Mixture-of-Experts gating explores the joint space of mesh topology, per-core microarchitecture, and operator placement. We validate on two workloads, Llama 3.1 8B FP16 (high-performance mode, 29809 tokens per second at 3nm) and SmolVLM (low-power mode, less than 13 mW at all nodes, 10 MHz). Across 7 process nodes, the RL automatically adapts mesh sizes and per-tile configurations, including heterogeneous FETCH, VLEN, and memory allocation without node-specific manual retuning.

</details>


### [714] [DHFP-PE: Dual-Precision Hybrid Floating Point Processing Element for AI Acceleration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04507)
*Shubham Kumar,Vijay Pratap Sharma,Vaibhav Neema,Santosh Kumar Vishvakarma*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: 提出一种支持FP8和FP4格式的双精度浮点乘累加处理单元，采用创新的比特划分技术实现硬件复用，在28nm工艺下实现高性能、低功耗，适用于AI推理和混合精度计算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 人工智能和边缘计算中低精度算术的快速普及，对能效高且灵活的浮点乘累加单元产生了强烈需求。现有设计在支持多种低精度格式时存在硬件利用率低和功耗高的问题。

Method: 提出双精度浮点MAC处理单元架构，支持FP8（E4M3、E5M2）和FP4（2×E2M1、2×E1M2）格式。采用创新的比特划分技术，使单个4位单元乘法器既能作为标准4×4乘法器用于FP8，又能作为两个并行2×2乘法器用于2位操作数，实现最大硬件利用率而无需重复逻辑。

Result: 在28nm工艺下实现，工作频率达1.94GHz，面积0.00396mm²，功耗2.13mW。与最先进设计相比，面积减少高达60.4%，功耗节省86.6%。

Conclusion: 该设计通过创新的比特划分技术实现了硬件高效复用，在支持多种低精度格式的同时显著降低了面积和功耗，非常适合部署在大型加速器架构中，用于能量受限的AI推理和混合精度计算应用。

Abstract: The rapid adoption of low-precision arithmetic in artificial intelligence and edge computing has created a strong demand for energy-efficient and flexible floating-point multiply-accumulate (MAC) units. This paper presents a dual-precision floating-point MAC processing element supporting FP8 (E4M3, E5M2) and FP4 (2 x E2M1, 2 x E1M2) formats, specifically optimized for low-power and high-throughput AI workloads. The proposed architecture employs a novel bit-partitioning technique that enables a single 4-bit unit multiplier to operate either as a standard 4 x 4 multiplier for FP8 or as two parallel 2 x 2 multipliers for 2-bit operands, achieving maximum hardware utilization without duplicating logic. Implemented in 28 nm technology, the proposed PE achieves an operating frequency of 1.94 GHz with an area of 0.00396 mm^2 and power consumption of 2.13 mW, resulting in up to 60.4% area reduction and 86.6% power savings compared to state-of-the-art designs, making it well suited for energy-constrained AI inference and mixed-precision computing applications when deployed within larger accelerator architectures.

</details>


### [715] [CBM-Dual: A 65-nm Fully Connected Chaotic Boltzmann Machine Processor for Dual Function Simulated Annealing and Reservoir Computing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06808)
*Kanta Yoshioka,Soshi Hirayae,Yuichiro Tanaka,Yuichi Katori,Takashi Morie,Hakaru Tamukoh*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: CBM-Dual是首个硅验证的数字混沌动力学处理器，同时支持模拟退火和储层计算，采用1024神经元全连接混沌玻尔兹曼机，通过专用调度器和乘法分割方案显著降低计算和面积开销。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为自主边缘AI提供实时决策和轻量级自适应能力，解决数字混沌动力学处理器高计算和面积成本的问题。

Method: 1) 利用神经元翻转率低的特性设计CBM专用调度器，减少99%乘累加操作；2) 提出高效乘法分割方案，减少59%面积；3) 实现1024神经元全连接混沌玻尔兹曼机架构。

Result: 65nm工艺下芯片面积12mm²，同时执行异构任务，在模拟退火和储层计算领域分别实现25-54倍和4.5倍的能效提升，达到最先进水平。

Conclusion: CBM-Dual是首个硅验证的双模混沌动力学处理器，通过创新架构显著提升能效，为边缘AI的实时决策和自适应计算提供了高效硬件平台。

Abstract: This paper presents CBM-Dual, the first silicon-proven digital chaotic dynamics processor (CDP) supporting both simulated annealing (SA) and reservoir computing (RC). CBM-Dual enables real-time decision-making and lightweight adaptation for autonomous Edge AI, employing the largest-scale fully connected 1024-neuron chaotic Boltzmann machine (CBM). To address the high computational and area costs of digital CDPs, we propose: 1) a CBM-specific scheduler that exploits an inherently low neuron flip rate to reduce multiply-accumulate operations by 99%, and 2) an efficient multiply splitting scheme that reduces the area by 59%. Fabricated in 65nm (12mm$^2$), CBM-Dual achieves simultaneous heterogeneous task execution and state-of-the-art energy efficiency, delivering $\times$25-54 and $\times$4.5 improvements in the SA and RC fields, respectively.

</details>


### [716] [SHIELD: A Segmented Hierarchical Memory Architecture for Energy-Efficient LLM Inference on Edge NPUs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07396)
*Jintao Zhang,Xuanyao Fong*

Main category: cs.AR

TL;DR: SHIELD是一种针对边缘NPU上LLM推理的eDRAM架构，通过利用BF16激活值的生命周期和位级敏感性，隔离符号/指数与尾数，对瞬态QO尾数禁用刷新，对持久KV尾数应用宽松刷新，减少35%刷新能耗。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 边缘NPU上LLM推理受限于片上内存容量，高密度eDRAM适合存储激活工作空间但其周期性刷新消耗大量能量。先前工作主要关注减少片外流量或优化持久KV缓存的刷新，而忽略了瞬态且容错的查询和注意力输出激活。

Method: 提出SHIELD架构，基于生命周期感知的分段eDRAM设计，联合利用BF16激活值的时间驻留特性和位级敏感性。具体方法包括：隔离符号和指数字段与尾数字段；对瞬态QO尾数完全禁用刷新；对持久KV尾数应用宽松刷新策略。

Result: 在多种LLM和推理场景下，SHIELD相对于标准刷新基线减少了35%的eDRAM刷新能量消耗，同时在WikiText-2、PIQA和ARC-Easy基准测试上保持了模型精度。

Conclusion: SHIELD通过生命周期感知的eDRAM架构设计，有效利用了BF16激活值的特性，显著降低了边缘NPU上LLM推理的刷新能耗，同时保持了模型准确性，为边缘AI推理提供了高效的内存解决方案。

Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) inference on edge Neural Processing Units (NPUs) is fundamentally constrained by limited on-chip memory capacity. Although high-density embedded DRAM (eDRAM) is attractive for storing activation workspaces, its periodic refresh consumes substantial energy. Prior work has primarily focused on reducing off-chip traffic or optimizing refresh for persistent Key-Value (KV) caches, while transient and error-resilient Query and Attention Output (QO) activations are largely overlooked. We propose SHIELD, a lifecycle-aware segmented eDRAM architecture that jointly exploits temporal residency and bit-level sensitivity in bfloat16 (BF16) activations. SHIELD isolates the sign and exponent fields from the mantissa, disables refresh for transient QO mantissas, and applies relaxed refresh to persistent KV mantissas. Across multiple LLMs and inference scenarios, SHIELD reduces eDRAM refresh energy by 35% relative to a standard-refresh baseline while preserving accuracy on WikiText-2, PIQA, and ARC-Easy.

</details>


<div id='cs.CC'></div>

# cs.CC [[Back]](#toc)

### [717] [Toward a Tractability Frontier for Exact Relevance Certification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07349)
*Tristan Simas*

Main category: cs.CC

TL;DR: 该论文证明了在闭包封闭域上，不存在能对四个特定障碍族给出精确特征化的正确可处理性分类器，这是由闭包定律的元不可能性定理导致的。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究精确相关性认证中坐标结构决策问题，探讨在闭包封闭域上是否存在能对特定障碍族给出精确特征化的可处理性分类器。

Method: 通过构造四个障碍族（主导对集中、边际掩蔽、幽灵动作集中、加性/状态偏移集中）的同轨道分歧，使用动作无关、对目标仿射见证，证明元不可能性定理。

Result: 证明了在闭包封闭域上，没有正确的可处理性分类器能对这四个障碍族给出精确特征化，闭包轨道一致性由正确性强制而非作为不变性公理假设。

Conclusion: 精确相关性认证的闭包定律是规范的，但闭包封闭域上的正确分类器无法对特定障碍族提供精确特征化，这揭示了结构收敛与零失真摘要之间的根本限制。

Abstract: Exact relevance certification asks which coordinates are necessary to determine the optimal action in a coordinate-structured decision problem. The tractable families treated here admit a finite primitive basis, but optimizer-quotient realizability is maximal, so quotient shape alone cannot characterize the frontier.
  We prove a meta-impossibility theorem for efficiently checkable structural predicates invariant under the theorem-forced closure laws of exact certification. Structural convergence with zero-distortion summaries, quotient entropy bounds, and support-counting arguments explains why those closure laws are canonical. We establish the theorem by constructing same-orbit disagreements for four obstruction families, namely dominant-pair concentration, margin masking, ghost-action concentration, and additive/statewise offset concentration, using action-independent, pair-targeted affine witnesses. Consequently no correct tractability classifier on a closure-closed domain yields an exact characterization over these families. Here closure-orbit agreement is forced by correctness rather than assumed as an invariance axiom. The result therefore applies to correct classifiers on closure-closed domains, not only to classifiers presented through a designated admissibility package.

</details>


<div id='cs.GR'></div>

# cs.GR [[Back]](#toc)

### [718] [What a Comfortable World: Ergonomic Principles Guided Apartment Layout Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08411)
*Piotr Nieciecki,Aleksander Plocharski,Przemyslaw Musialski*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 提出一种将建筑学设计原则融入Transformer生成过程的楼层平面图生成方法，通过可微损失函数优化房间邻接与邻近关系，显著提升布局的宜居性指标


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前数据驱动的楼层平面图生成方法往往复制了真实世界训练数据集中存在的工效学低效问题，需要将建筑学设计原则直接融入生成过程以改善布局质量

Method: 基于Transformer的生成方法，通过文献中建立的建筑标准制定可微损失函数来优化房间邻接和邻近关系，在训练过程中用这些工效学先验指导模型

Result: 方法生成的布局在宜居性指标上显著改善，比较评估显示在保持高结构有效性的同时，在工效学合规性方面优于基线方法

Conclusion: 将建筑学设计原则直接集成到生成过程中是改善楼层平面图工效学质量的有效方法，能够在保持结构合理性的同时提升布局的宜居性

Abstract: Current data-driven floor plan generation methods often reproduce the ergonomic inefficiencies found in real-world training datasets. To address this, we propose a novel approach that integrates architectural design principles directly into a transformer-based generative process. We formulate differentiable loss functions based on established architectural standards from literature to optimize room adjacency and proximity. By guiding the model with these ergonomic priors during training, our method produces layouts with significantly improved livability metrics. Comparative evaluations show that our approach outperforms baselines in ergonomic compliance while maintaining high structural validity.

</details>


### [719] [Splats under Pressure: Exploring Performance-Energy Trade-offs in Real-Time 3D Gaussian Splatting under Constrained GPU Budgets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07177)
*Muhammad Fahim Tajwar,Arthur Wuhrlin,Bhojan Anand*

Main category: cs.GR

TL;DR: 研究边缘设备上实时3D高斯泼溅渲染的可行性，通过GPU降频模拟不同性能等级，分析功耗-性能关系。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索客户端3D高斯泼溅渲染的实际性能下限，评估其在能耗受限环境（如独立头显和瘦客户端）中的部署潜力。

Method: 采用基于仿真的方法，通过系统性地降低GPU核心频率和施加功耗限制，在单个高端GPU上模拟不同GPU能力等级。在不同性能点测量帧率、运行时行为和功耗，分析FPS-功耗曲线、每帧能耗和每瓦性能等关系。

Result: 该方法能够近似模拟从嵌入式/移动级设备到高端消费级系统的多样化GPU类别的性能边界，为边缘部署的3DGS系统提供早期性能-能耗权衡分析。

Conclusion: 研究提供了关于边缘部署3D高斯泼溅渲染系统可行性的性能-能耗权衡洞察，为在资源受限环境中部署实时3D渲染技术提供了评估框架。

Abstract: We investigate the feasibility of real-time 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) rasterisation on edge clients with varying Gaussian splat counts and GPU computational budgets. Instead of evaluating multiple physical devices, we adopt an emulation-based approach that approximates different GPU capability tiers on a single high-end GPU. By systematically under-clocking the GPU core frequency and applying power caps, we emulate a controlled range of floating-point performance levels that approximate different GPU capability tiers. At each point in this range, we measure frame rate, runtime behaviour, and power consumption across scenes of varying complexity, pipelines, and optimisations, enabling analysis of power-performance relationships such as FPS-power curves, energy per frame, and performance per watt. This method allows us to approximate the performance envelope of a diverse class of GPUs, from embedded and mobile-class devices to high-end consumer-grade systems.
  Our objective is to explore the practical lower bounds of client-side 3DGS rasterisation and assess its potential for deployment in energy-constrained environments, including standalone headsets and thin clients. Through this analysis, we provide early insights into the performance-energy trade-offs that govern the viability of edge-deployed 3DGS systems.

</details>


<div id='cs.LO'></div>

# cs.LO [[Back]](#toc)

### [720] [Formally Guaranteed Control Adaptation for ODD-Resilient Autonomous Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07414)
*Gricel Vázquez,Calum Imrie,Sepeedeh Shahbeigi,Nawshin Mannan Proma,Tian Gan,Victoria J Hodge,John Molloy,Simos Gerasimou*

Main category: cs.LO

TL;DR: 提出一种自适应概率系统模型方法，用于处理超出操作设计域的场景，同时提供定量保证，增强自主系统在未预见情况下的可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 确保自主系统在操作设计域之外场景中的可靠性能是构建弹性自主系统的主要挑战，需要解决系统在未预见情况下的适应性和验证问题。

Method: 引入自适应概率系统模型方法，动态扩展现有系统态势能力覆盖范围，支持系统在未预见情况下的行为验证和适应，同时提供定量保证。

Result: 初步结果表明，该方法通过自适应系统行为并提供形式化保证，有效提高了系统在未预见ODD场景下的可靠性。

Conclusion: 所提出的方法能够增强自主系统在操作设计域之外场景的适应能力，为构建更具弹性的自主系统提供了有前景的解决方案。

Abstract: Ensuring reliable performance in situations outside the Operational Design Domain (ODD) remains a primary challenge in devising resilient autonomous systems. We explore this challenge by introducing an approach for adapting probabilistic system models to handle out-of-ODD scenarios while, in parallel, providing quantitative guarantees. Our approach dynamically extends the coverage of existing system situation capabilities, supporting the verification and adaptation of the system's behaviour under unanticipated situations. Preliminary results demonstrate that our approach effectively increases system reliability by adapting its behaviour and providing formal guarantees even under unforeseen out-of-ODD situations.

</details>


<div id='stat.ME'></div>

# stat.ME [[Back]](#toc)

### [721] [From Ground Truth to Measurement: A Statistical Framework for Human Labeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07591)
*Robert Chew,Stephanie Eckman,Christoph Kern,Frauke Kreuter*

Main category: stat.ME

TL;DR: 论文提出一个统计框架，将标注结果分解为可解释的变异来源：实例难度、标注者偏差、情境噪声和关系对齐，挑战了传统将所有分歧视为噪声的观点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统机器学习将所有标注分歧视为噪声，这掩盖了标注过程中的系统性变异（如模糊项目、不同解释和错误），限制了我们对模型实际学习内容的理解。需要重新审视标注作为测量过程的本质。

Method: 提出一个统计框架，将标注结果分解为四个可解释的变异来源：实例难度（item difficulty）、标注者偏差（annotator bias）、情境噪声（situational noise）和关系对齐（relational alignment）。该框架扩展了经典测量误差模型，能够同时处理共享和个性化的真实概念。

Result: 在多标注者自然语言推理数据集上的应用显示，所有四个理论成分都有实证证据支持。该方法能够有效诊断标注任务中哪种误差机制（传统vs.人类标注变异）更适用。

Conclusion: 该框架为数据中心的机器学习提供了新视角，有助于发展更系统的标注科学。通过区分不同类型的标注变异，可以更好地理解模型学习的内容，并指导更有效的标注实践。

Abstract: Supervised machine learning assumes that labeled data provide accurate measurements of the concepts models are meant to learn. Yet in practice, human labeling introduces systematic variation arising from ambiguous items, divergent interpretations, and simple mistakes. Machine learning research commonly treats all disagreement as noise, which obscures these distinctions and limits our understanding of what models actually learn. This paper reframes annotation as a measurement process and introduces a statistical framework for decomposing labeling outcomes into interpretable sources of variation: instance difficulty, annotator bias, situational noise, and relational alignment. The framework extends classical measurement-error models to accommodate both shared and individualized notions of truth, reflecting traditional and human label variation interpretations of error, and provides a diagnostic for assessing which regime better characterizes a given task. Applying the proposed model to a multi-annotator natural language inference dataset, we find empirical evidence for all four theorized components and demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. We conclude with implications for data-centric machine learning and outline how this approach can guide the development of a more systematic science of labeling.

</details>
